name: 1880 Hospitality
description: 1880 Hospitality is an expert manufacturer and supplier of tabletop products for the foodservice industry. We are here to serve the industry with a portfolio of prestigious and innovative brands, including Oneida, Focus Foodservice and Sant' Andrea. Our goal is to be your ally in the hospitality industry, offering our extensive industry expertise and world class customer service to elevate every tabletop. Together with our brand partners, we bring innovative solutions to market that help foodservice operators design the dining experience.

name: 2 Pint Provisions
description: At 2 Pint Provisions, our passion for excellence drives us to deliver superior quality beef products in the US while maintaining our Irish heritage in each bite with the distinct essence of Guinness, the worlds original and favorite stout. With over 100 years' combined experience in the beef industry, our Irish American team has a strong knowledge of what makes a burger special. Our founders joined forces with Guinness to bring the first ever Guinness Wagyu Beef burger to the US, carefully crafting the perfect balance of flavors to create a mouthwatering burger, bite after bite. Our Guinness-flavored Wagyu beef patties, are available in 2 oz, 4 oz, 5.33 oz, and 8 oz sizes. Rich, savory flavor with a unique blend of premium Wagyu beef and stout, perfect for an elevated burger experience. As we launch our burger, we are excited to serve our customers and deliver a consistent, superior quality product. We maintain high standards of integrity in every aspect of our business to be able to deliver what we promise.

name: 365 Retail Markets
description: 365 Retail Markets is the global leader of self-service technology and convenience solutions for the Foodservice industry. Through our combination of MicroMarket, vending, and dining technologies, we offer the best-in-class point-of-service platform for the workplace. 365 offers a consolidated approach to operators seeking a streamlined system that consumers love to use. With a diverse portfolio of products, 365 has been pioneering innovation since 2008 and continues to revolutionize the market with superior technology, strategic partnerships and ultimate flexibility in customization and branding. Clients love the stress-free purchasing experience and products that withstand the challenges of any location. At 365, we are committed to ensuring you capture every single transaction, every single time, by delivering products that are secure, scalable and reliable.

name: 3Eye Technologies
description: 3Eye is a value-added IT distributor focused on the modern, deskless workforce, and the partners who empower them. We enable our partners to deliver outcomes for the people who work where work gets done: on the factory floor, in the field, at the point of care, or on the move. Welcome to the most compelling destination in channel distribution.

name: 41 Grains
description: 41 Grains is a farm-to-table company growing and creating healthy and Gluten-Free foods that everyone can enjoy! Our Lentil Cruncher Snacks are a fan favorite with 4 flavors for all tastes!! Signature Salty, Sweet Hickory, Dill Pickle, and Sauced Apple. Beyond snacks these are wonderful to top off a lettuce salad, potatoe salad, cottage cheese, or yogurt the possibilities are only limited by your imagination!! We want to help people be able to eat food as close to the farm as possible with clean ingredients and full transparency in how we grow and make our products

name: 86DeadStock
description: 86DeadStock is a B2B marketplace built specifically for hospitality professionals to buy, sell, and move excess equipment, supplies, and inventory. We help restaurants turn deadstock into cash, reduce waste, free up storage space, and source affordable items from trusted industry peers. Simple to use, free to join, and designed to help operators protect margins in today’s challenging market.

name: 915 Food Company
description: 915 Foods is a trusted supplier of premium, ready-to-serve products and ingredients for restaurants, distributors, and food manufacturers. Our high-quality, grab-and-go Mediterranean lineup—including hummus, pita chips, tzatziki, lentil soup, and more—delivers authentic flavor with zero prep. Rigorously tested for consistency and backed by HACCP, GMP, and FDA certifications, we ensure scalable, food-safe production for commercial kitchens and beyond.

name: A Gift From Nature
description: A Gift From Nature CBD Turn your beverage program into a profit driver. We manufacture fast-moving, high-margin THC-infused drinks like Hemp DRNK (10mg Delta-9 + 40mg CBD) — a modern alternative to alcohol that customers are actively seeking. Easy to integrate. Federally compliant. Built to sell.

name: AARCO Products, Inc.
description: Manufacturer of visual communication and point of sale marketing products.

name: abcPOS
description: Abacus Business Computer (abcPOS) is a platform of services (POS) company based in New York City, USA since 1991, providing one-stop solutions from POS systems to merchant services to growth marketing. With over 30 years in the industry, the abcPOS system has evolved from DOS to Windows to Android to a cloud-based system. Customers range from restaurants to retailers, e-commerce to franchises to international brands. We aim to help you to manage your business as easy as abc.

name: Abe's Vegan Muffins
description: Abe's makes school-friendly muffins and other baked goods. Everything we make is free from dairy, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, and sesame -- and our dedicated facility is also free from those allergens. Retail and foodservice products available.

name: Able Solutions USA, Inc
description: Noriteo is an immersive cultural space where authentic Korean flavors meet interactive entertainment. Discover modern Korean sensibility through our curated food and products. Featuring a signature Ramen Wall, an innovative Boba Fountain, and Life4U selfie stations, Noriteo is your destination to eat, play, and experience the vibrant energy of Korea.

name: Acai Roots
description: Founded in San Diego, CA in 2005, Acai Roots has a mission to share the love of acai with the world while helping people maintain a healthy lifestyle. Because our mission is your health, we add absolutely no fillers or juices to our products keeping the acai berry at its most natural form. Because of this, our products are some of the most natural acai products on the market containing 30% more berries than our competitors. We understand that it’s easy for companies to claim they care about sustainability and social equality, but at Acai Roots, it’s at the heart of everything we do. Our triple bottom line philosophy is rooted in our passion to protect the Amazon and the people who live there. Over the past few years, acai has become increasingly popular due to its high source of antioxidants and other nutritional benefits. In addition to our creamy organic and dairy free ready to eat sorbets, we offer plant-based superfood bars, (the first ever) acai kombucha, superfood toppings, shelf stable juices, and blendable pouches.

name: Accel Entertainment
description: Accel Entertainment partners with bars, restaurants, convenience stores, truck stops, and fraternal and veteran organizations nationwide to provide high-quality video gaming terminals, redemption machines, and amusement devices. Our mission is to help our partners grow their business by delivering a turn-key solution that includes industry-leading customer support, regulatory compliance expertise, and hands-on operational guidance to ensure they maximize revenue and enhance their customer experience.

name: Accurate Box Company
description: Accurate Box Company is a leading manufacturer of custom high-graphic corrugated packaging. We specialize in offset lithography and have the ability to print 7 colors plus a UV coating in a single pass on both small and large runs. Our corrugated take-out boxes and trays help our customers provide their consumers with sturdy take-out containers while promoting their brand with graphics. Our products include take-out carriers, catering trays, coffee-to-go boxes, counter displays, club store packaging, food subscription boxes, and much more! In business since 1944 and women-owned since 1998, Accurate Box is a fourth-generation family-owned business that manufactures in New Jersey and ships competitively throughout all of North America. Learn more at https://www.accuratebox.com/.

name: AccuTemp Products Inc
description: AccuTemp Products is your source for industry leading, ENERGY STAR qualified commercial kitchen equipment, from our award-winning Evolution steamer and Accu-Steam griddle to our full lines of Edge Series steam jacketed kettles and tilt skillets, with the industry's ONLY Lifetime Service Support Guarantee, AccuTemp has trained Service Technicians available 7 days a week from 7am - 7pm EST, 362 days a year. We are powered by steam and driven by innovation. AccuTemp Products is your source for industry leading, ENERGY STAR qualified commercial kitchen equipment, from our award-winning Evolution steamer and Accu-Steam griddle to our full lines of Edge Series steam jacketed kettles and tilt skillets, with the industry's ONLY Lifetime Service Support Guarantee.

name: ACE Mystery Shopping
description: Fast growing brands have one problem in common, consistency across multiple locations, a problem we solve. Our secret shoppers give you the inside scoop on what’s going on in your existing locations, so you can continue to grow your brand with confidence. You trust your team. But if you don't "Trust but Verify" as Ronald Reagan once said, it’s going to cost you… Quick growth can lead to inconsistency without the right tool to maintain it Some locations over-serving or under-serving, which creates big problems for your brand, such as..... ✅Missed sales opportunities ✅Poor brand recognition across multiple units ✅Negative online reviews ✅You won't be able to grow as quickly ✅Your competitors may outperform you ✅Your guest retention rate may suffer You don’t have to do it alone. Knowledge is power. Sign up with ACE Mystery Shopping and you'll learn what you need to do, and what you need to stop doing right now, in order to scale your brand. We've been serving the restaurant industry since 2001, and we like to think of ourselves an extension of your team.

name: ACP, Inc., a Welbilt Company
description: ACP, Inc. is the manufacturer of XpressChef high-speed ovens, as well as Amana Commercial and Menumaster Commercial microwave and specialty ovens. ACP, Inc. ovens have ranked best-in-class for over 25 years. They are known for performance, reliability, service, safety, ease of use, and are proudly fabricated in the U.S.A. Headquartered in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, ACP, Inc. is a member of the Ali Group a privately held corporation that through its subsidiaries designs, manufactures, markets and services commercial foodservice equipment for major restaurant, grocery, and hotel chains, independent restaurants, hospitals, schools, airports, and commissaries, through its 101 global brands in 34 countries. Visit their website for the full ACP Inc., product line up at https://www.acpsolutions.com

name: Actual Veggies
description: In 2020, Actual Veggies co-founder Jason quit eating meat for health reasons. Alongside co-founder Hailey, he set out to create a better alternative, chef-crafted, restaurant-quality veggie burgers made only with real, colorful vegetables. That mission helped Actual Veggies become the category leader in the veggie burger set. We now offer allergen free veggie burgers, falafels, fries, and tots to Foodservice and Retail businesses across the US!

name: Adam Equipment
description: Adam Equipment is a leading, sustainability-focused global designer and manufacturer of high-quality, precision scales, balances and accessories. The company, which was founded in 1972, is based in the UK. With additional offices and distribution centers in the US, South Africa, Australia, China and Germany, Adam is able to easily provide product support and fast, efficient delivery to consumers in collaboration with our worldwide distribution network. Customers trust Adam’s broad product lineup to offer dependability, intuitive operation, solid performance and superior value to facilitate everyday work and simplify complex applications. With a strong focus on exceeding customer expectations and enhancing the customer experience, Adam’s support extends well beyond the point of sale with services like technical support, servicing and calibrations.

name: Adams Keegan
description: Adams Keegan is a leading national provider of cloud-based, integrated solutions for human resources information systems (HRIS), payroll, employee benefits, and benefits administration. Adams Keegan serves clients in a range of industries and sizes, from 5 to 5,000 employees. Our services are delivered through a combination of innovative HR technology and talented employment professionals. Efficenter®, our HRIS, integrates with other management systems, providing a single version of the truth for employee-related operations. Plus, our tenured staff of experts in all key HR disciplines is ready to take your call – and know you by name. This unique approach differs from that of pure payroll or SaaS providers. While our technology compares favorably with any provider on the market, we earn and keep our clients through our people and our client-first culture of unmatched service. We offer hands-on stewardship to our clients’ businesses and employees, and are fully accountable for everything we promise to do on their behalf. The result? Knowing that the hassles of employee administration and compliance are gone, our clients can return to growing their business. Let us get to know your business, and we’ll demonstrate how our client-centric approach can benefit your people, your customers, and your enterprise.

name: ADEKA Corporation
description: With over 100 years of history, ADEKA Corporation has built deep expertise in oils and fats and is a leading company in Japan’s processed oils and fats industry. Based on this technological foundation, ADEKA develops functional food ingredients for professional foodservice, focusing on flavor control, texture design, and stable back-of-house performance. As matcha continues to grow as a global food and beverage trend, ADEKA has focused on how whipped cream can best support and elevate matcha-based drinks and desserts. Through extensive formulation development, we designed a cream that enhances matcha’s balance, bitterness, and aroma without overpowering its delicate character. In this process, a plant-based formulation was selected as the optimal solution, enabling cleaner flavor expression, smooth melt-in-the-mouth texture, excellent shape retention, and consistent performance during service. The result is a whipped cream with high workability, ideal for efficient topping and finishing in high-volume kitchen operations. As a Japanese manufacturer from one of the world’s leading matcha-producing origins, ADEKA brings a deep understanding of matcha quality and application. Our matcha-optimized cream helps increase product value in beverages and desserts while also supporting labor-saving, reliable back-of-house operations, addressing both quality and operational challenges in modern foodservice.

name: ADITYA MINDA INDUSTRIES PRIVATE LIMITED
description: Welcome to Minda group, a 25-year-old family owned and managed business with a vision to supply wide variety of premium quality products in disposable and food packaging industry. Since its inception, Minda group has been serving the Foodservice, Retail and Horeca segment with variety of food grade disposable products of exceptionally high standards of hygiene, quality and durability through its distributors, traders, institutional clients & private label. Covering categories from Aluminum Foil Container, Aluminum Foil Rolls, Cling Films, etc. A leader in the field, we enjoy a reputation for reliability earned over the years by our customers. We thrive to establish strong, long term relationships with our valued clients, offering top quality products at very competitive pricing. As trailblazers in the industry, our cutting edge way of working is also facilitated by ultra-modern facilities spanning 40000 sq. ft. for manufacturing hub located at Kaman - Vasai, approximately 30 Kms north-west of Mumbai. Our research and development continues to make aggressive efforts to continuously introduce new products with innovative new designs and ensures high product standards. Quality, hygiene and service are the cornerstone on which we built our business that set us apart. This catalogue shows you the wide range of products we offer to our customers worldwide. If you would like any other information or wish to give us feedback, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. I convey gratitude to all our team members and business partners, for their valuable contributions in supporting and trusting our MINDA brand, and look forward to continuous support and association in years to come.

name: Advantech
description: Advantech offers customized solutions that can accommodate the unique needs of retail and hospitality businesses of varying sizes while maintaining scalability and achieving operational excellence.

name: Adversign Media GmbH
description: viewneo Dinio - Not an ordinary table top. The digital e-paper table display automatically shows the right offers at the right time. We bring Point-of-Dining Digital Out-of-Home (PoD-DOOH) to the restaurant world — turning every table, bar top, and tasting room counter into a premium, brand-safe media moment. At NRS 2026, we’re introducing viewneo dinio to the U.S. market: a sleek, double-sided digital tabletop display built for venues where attention is won in seconds and decisions happen right at the point of purchase. Think of it as the missing link between great beer and the next order — a screen that lives where guests browse menus, discover new taps, and choose what to try next. What makes dinio different? It’s designed specifically for hospitality: compact, eye-level, and made to feel like part of the table — not another “screen” in the room. With dynamic content on both sides, dinio can speak to guests and staff simultaneously: spotlight a limited release, promote a flight, upsell food pairings, or guide visitors through your story — while still keeping the vibe authentic. Behind the hardware sits the viewneo CMS, a powerful yet simple content platform that helps you manage screens across one taproom or hundreds of locations. Schedule day-part messaging (lunch vs. evening), run seasonal campaigns, localize promotions by venue, and update everything in minutes — without printing costs, delays, or waste. For brands and multi-site groups, dinio becomes a scalable network: consistent messaging, measurable impact, and the agility to test what actually sells. Whether you’re a beverage brand, a restaurant chain, or a bar owner, dinio helps you: Sell more at the moment of choice (specials, flights, add-ons, merch) Launch new offers on your menu faster with instant updates and targeted campaigns Strengthen brand storytelling in the most social space of the venue Create premium placements for partners without cluttering walls Standardize communication across locations while staying locally relevant We believe restaurants and beverage brands deserve better marketing tools — ones that respect the guest experience and amplify what makes your brand unique. Small display. Big impact. Visit us at NRS 2026 to see viewneo dinio live, explore use cases tailored to breweries, and talk about pilots, rollouts, and partnership opportunities in the U.S. market.

name: Aegean Fisheries and Animal Products Exporters’ Association
description: The Aegean Exporters' Associations , one of the unique examples of public and private sector cooperation established in Trkiye, has built herself into a research, coordination, decision making and implementing institution, which works for the promotion of Trkiye's exports and provides the smooth and functional running of the relationships between the exporters and the law making system in a rational and dynamic way. Working in close collaboration with the Ministry of Trade, Aegean Exporters' Associations General Secretariat comprises of 6 different associations in food sectors and serves over 3.000 member companies. The annual exports realized by the members of these 6 Associations account for approximately 25% of Trkiye's total exports. The potential of Aegean Exporters is promoted globally within Turkish Tastes brand which is officially an umbrella brand, designed and developed by Trkiye Exporters Assembly.

name: Aegis Foods
description: Innovative, pasteurized eggs for your professional kitchen. Aegis Foods is redefining eggs through its patented in-shell pasteurization and ongoing innovation. Our process makes eggs safer and more consistent while maintaining taste and performance. By offering both raw pasteurized eggs and ready-to-eat options like poached, soft-boiled, and jammy, Aegis Foods provides a versatile platform that reduces risk, saves time, and expands possibilities. We specialize in quality, in-shell pasteurized eggs crafted to meet the demanding needs of the foodservice, healthcare, and hospitality industries. Using FDA-approved pasteurization technology, our eggs eliminate the risk of Salmonella while preserving the taste, texture, and performance you rely on. Our innovative products are all pasteurized, helping reduce the risk of foodborne illness while delivering consistent quality, flavor, and innovation. Whether you're serving soft-boiled, poached, or sunny-side up, Aegis eggs cut prep time, improve safety, and extend shelf life. We're here to help you serve safer, smarter, and faster, without compromising taste, texture, or flavor.

name: Aegis Prime Technology, LLC
description: Aegis Prime Technology is a leading software solutions provider with over 15 years of experience in developing unified technology platforms for the Food & Beverage and Retail industries. Our solutions are designed to address key operational challenges faced by modern businesses, enabling organizations to streamline workflows, reduce staffing costs, and improve operational efficiency. By integrating digital technologies across business processes, we help our partners deliver superior customer experiences, strengthen brand recognition, and drive sustainable revenue growth.

name: AFEHC
description: AFEHC, Spanish Exporting Manufacturers Association for the Hospitality Industry, is a non-lucrative organisation, which was born in year 2001 once seen the convenience of uniting the efforts of the exporting manufacturers within the industry. You can find our companies at the South Hall: Infrico – 4848; Onnera Group – 3468; Gesame – 3973; Sammic – 3868; Garcia de Pou – 4676

name: AGT Foods
description: AGT Foods is a global leader in value-added processing of pulses, staple foods and ingredients and a leading exporter of quality food products. AGT Foods was founded on the principle ‘From Producer to the World’, buying pulses, grains and specialty crops from farmers around its facilities in Canada, Turkey, the U.S., Australia and South Africa and processing and exporting its non-GMO, gluten-free and non-allergenic pulses, milled durum wheat products, oilseeds and more to over 120 countries around the world. AGT Foods produces nutritious, non-GMO, gluten-free and non-allergenic pulse ingredient products in our flagship ingredient production facility in Minot, North Dakota, USA, which features capabilities for deflavouring, extrusion and pregelled flours. Our diverse portfolio of products includes Veggimeal plant-based meal kits, Veggipasta™ 100% Pea Pasta and Veggicrumb™ 100% Pea Crumb, single-ingredient innovations designed to replicate the kid-friendly taste and texture of traditional wheat-based products, with all the health benefits of plant-based ingredients. The Veggi line is non-GMO, vegan and gluten-free—not to mention delicious! AGT Foods’ retail production facility in Saint-Léonard, Quebec features processing, canning and packaging on a full line of canned and dry-pack products, bringing the tastes of the world to your kitchen. Our North American retail business offers a range of over 1,400 products, including more than 75 varieties of dry pulses and cereals, over 40 varieties of canned pulses, 20 varieties of rice and a full line of traditional and alternative pasta products.

name: Aguas Frescas de Mexico LLC
description: Aguas Frescas de Mexico is a Hispanic company born from the need to deliver authentic and traditional beverages, promoting our values as a community.

name: Ahara Rasa
description: Ahara Rasa is a grass-fed ghee company handcrafted in the PNW. We use time-honored methods and pure ingredients, always made the traditional way over an open flame. Every flavor is crafted with care and brings warmth and depth to your kitchen. Sustainability is woven into everything we do. Our Ghee production process is completely plastic free, and we are dedicated to limiting waste in our process. Each choice we make is with care for our community, our customers, and the planet we share. We’re a small scaling producer focused on creativity, quality, and thoughtful sourcing. Our ghee is strictly made in small batches 0% plastic in production and made by the same two people every time. We enjoy engaging directly with our community, offering samples, and sharing how ghee fits into everyday cooking.

name: AHLSTROM
description: Ahlstrom is the global leader in fiber-based specialty materials. Our purpose is to Purify and Protect with Every Fiber, for a Sustainable World. Our vision is to be the Preferred Sustainable Specialty Materials Company for all our stakeholders. Ahlstrom has three divisions that are aligned to address global trends: Filtration & Life Sciences, Food & Consumer Packaging, and Protective Materials. LIQUID FILTRATION FOR FOOD PROCESSING AND BEVERAGE Our filter materials have applications in the fast food industry, milk filtration, in the production of alcoholic and soft beverages, and in the processing of syrups, cooking oils and shortenings. Our filter materials are developed in accordance with the most stringent burst strength and particle retention requirements, delivering better quality and more reliable end products. For Hot Cooking Oil : Our high performance materials for hot cooking oil filtration are designed to deliver fast flow with good particle retention, maximizing filtration efficiency. For Milk Filtration : With more than 30 years of experience in the milk filtration market, we offer a complete product range covering all types of milk filter media used globally. Food and industrial liquids processing: Our products include grades suitable for general coarse filtration, fine filtration, and retention of specified particle sizes during the clarification of various liquids.

name: AIT Services
description: AIT Services is a nationwide technology and installation partner specializing in the restaurant and hospitality industry. We deliver end-to-end solutions that support new store builds, remodels, rollouts, and ongoing service across all 50 states. Our core focus is low-voltage infrastructure and technology deployment, including structured cabling, point-of-sale (POS) systems, self-service kiosks, kitchen display systems (KDS), digital menu boards, surveillance systems, and network hardware. We work closely with general contractors, IT teams, and brand leadership to ensure every installation is executed efficiently, accurately, and in alignment with project timelines. AIT Services is known for managing complex, multi-location rollouts with a high level of consistency and accountability. From pre-construction planning and site surveys to installation, testing, and post-install support, our team provides full project lifecycle coverage. We prioritize clear communication, detailed documentation, and real-time coordination to minimize delays and ensure successful deployments. In addition to installations, we provide ongoing field support, troubleshooting, maintenance, and rapid-response service for restaurants in operation. Our ability to scale quickly while maintaining quality makes us a reliable partner for both emerging brands and established national chains. With deep experience in high-volume restaurant environments, AIT Services understands the importance of speed, precision, and minimal disruption to operations. Our technicians are trained to meet the demands of fast-paced installs while maintaining strict quality standards and professionalism on every job site. At our core, we are a service-driven company focused on execution, reliability, and long-term partnerships. Whether supporting a single location or a nationwide rollout, AIT Services delivers solutions that keep restaurants running efficiently and positioned for growth.

name: Aiteme MFG Co., Ltd.
description: Aiteme MFG Co., Ltd. is a green and eco-friendly food packaging manufacturer.We have successfully integrated the entire industrial chain,from composite material manufacturing, printing, and food packaging.Our philosophy is"Pioneering a New Eco-Conscious and Healthy Lifestyle." We are committed to leveraging the power of technological innovation to create a healthy,green,and stylish eco-friendly life for you.

name: AIYA MATCHA
description: Family owned and operated since 1888, Aiya Matcha is the largest producer of premium Japanese Matcha green tea. Based in Nishio, Japan, Aiya oversees all phases of the Matcha production process, from seed to bowl. Aiya is committed to providing high-quality organic and conventional Matcha to the world. All of Aiya's pure Matcha products are Non-GMO Project Verified, Gluten-Free, and Kosher certified. Taste the difference at booth #790!

name: Ajinomoto Foods North America
description: Ajinomoto Foods North America makes it easy to menu the flavors of the world with premium frozen appetizers, handhelds, entrees, and sides. With trusted industry brands that save time and labor, our products meet the needs of every operation. With products in the Asian, Shareables Bites, and Latin/Mexican categories, we offer a wide breadth of diverse products, flavors and platforms that serve an extensive range of operators and consumers.

name: Al Bayader International
description: Al Bayader International is a global manufacturer, distributor and retailer of creative solutions in sustainable food packaging, and personal home care products. With a dedicated team of around 1,000+ employees from 30 different nationalities serving 9,000 business customers and millions of consumers and the support of over 400 business partners, the company delivers unquestionable value to the global food and beverage industry. With an extensive product portfolio, housing 4,000+ products, Al Bayader International represents the backbone of the retail and foodservice sectors in the UAE and the GCC region. As part of its constant expansion efforts, Al Bayader International currently owns and operates three manufacturing complexes with an ever-increasing production capacity of +31,000 tons per annum. With 16 industrial and logistics locations and 5 retail shops, the Company leads several GCC markets with a substantial market share, while steadily increasing penetration into markets further afield, including Europe and Africa. A product range to be proud of Al Bayaders products are segmented into the following broad categories: Disposable Tableware Disposable Containers Baking Molds and Sheets Bags Wrapping Systems Cleaning Hygiene Products Food Decorations items Foil Film rolls Paper products Bottles Jars Hygiene and Safety products Foodstuff and Beverages Outdoor Activities Barbecue Accessories

name: Alamance Foods
description: Alamance Foods, Inc. is a family-rooted food manufacturer with more than a century of heritage in dairy processing. The business traces its origins to the early 1900s when founder R. W. Scott began selling surplus butter and cream produced on his family farm. The company expanded in 1927 when Ralph H. Scott established Melville Dairy , which later evolved into the modern Alamance Foods operation. Today, the company manufactures and distributes a range of consumer food products, including: Aerosol whipped cream and whipped dairy toppings Coffee creamers and toppings Freeze pops and frozen treats Flavored drinks and bottled water Alamance Foods was one of the early U.S. producers of aerosol whipped cream in 1959 , helping popularize this product category. The company continues to innovate with new food concepts, such as whipped condiments and other dairy-based products.

name: Alberto's Food Products, Inc.
description: Alberto's Food Products, Inc. is known for its amazing condiments.

name: Alchemy Spice Company
description: Alchemy Spice Co., a family-owned business, crafts premium, chef-driven spice blends for foodservice teams. Handcrafting artisan blends since 2003, we freshly grind and blend in small batches to deliver vibrant, consistent seasonings that elevate every dish without compromise. We are committed to sourcing the highest-quality of ingredients, and along with our seasonings, we offer over 100 single spices and ingredients available in foodservice packaging. We partner with operators of every kind, from independent restaurants and multi-unit groups to schools, healthcare, hotels, stadiums, and any commercial kitchen in between. Through national distribution with US Foods, Sysco, Gordon Food Service, PFG, and Cheney Brothers plus bulk custom blending, co-packing, and private labeling, we make it easy to scale flavor your way, saving time while inspiring creativity in the kitchen. The result: better taste, lower costs, and confidence on every plate.

name: Alden Oils
description: Alden Oils is a trusted supplier of high-quality, food-grade oils, delivering custom oil solutions for restaurants, foodservice operators, and CPG manufacturers. Our portfolio spans conventional, non-GMO, and organic oils, including soybean, canola, sunflower, palm, olive, and avocado, designed to meet the performance demands of professional kitchens. We package our oils in 35 lb. JIB formats for efficiency. They’re engineered for high-heat stability, consistent results, and versatile use in frying, sautéing, baking, and food production. With a commitment to clean ingredients, reliable sourcing, and a scalable supply, Alden Oils partners with businesses to optimize quality, cost, and kitchen performance. Whether you need bulk ingredients, private-label solutions, or dependable everyday cooking oils, we provide the consistency you can trust because great food starts with great oil.

name: Alhadaf Intl co For Importing & Industry
description: Alhadaf Intl Co. For Importing & Industry L.L.C A leading manufacturer of packaging and disposable items for the food service industry. We have a successful history of over 20 years in providing high-quality products that our clients trust and rely on. Export countries: 23 Certifications: ISO 9001, 14001, 22000, BRC export@alhadaf-int.com www.rz.jo

name: Alicorp USA LLC
description: Tari is a Peruvian Flavorful Hot Sauce made with authentic peppers that only grow in the Andes: Rocoto and Aji Amarillo. It offers great flavor with a kick and has a creamy and unique texture. Dip, drip or drizzle Tari on everything: chicken, tacos, pizza, meat, dumplings, noodles and much more! Are you ready to EAT DIFERENTE?

name: Allen Brothers
description: Chefs’ Warehouse is THE specialty wholesale food distributor servicing restaurants, hotels, country clubs, and fine food stores throughout North America and the world. The World’s Best Ingredients for the World's Best Chefs. Our team of experts search the globe for the most superior and innovative ingredients to ensure a distinct variety to meet the unique needs of every kitchen. From the finest Meats, Seafood, Produce, Cheese, Charcuterie, Pastries, Oils, Truffles and everything in between, we’ve got you covered. We passionately consult, sell, and build relationships with our 70,000 customers through best-in-breed technology, service, and support from our long-standing established and up-and-coming premium restaurants. Within the Chefs Warehouse family of brands is Allen Brothers. Allen Brothers sources the highest quality product available in the market. Our team of master butchers hand cuts each piece of consistently aged meat to perfection. Delivering excellence, for 130+ years. Allen Brothers has proudly stood as a symbol of excellence for generations and remains committed to leading the way for many more to come.

name: Allied-Eco-Grip Flooring
description: THE MOST DURABLE SPECIALTY COMMERCIAL FLOORING ON THE MARKET. With the chemistry to back it up. After years of research and extensive testing, Eco-Grip has engineered a state-of-the-art flooring formula that is transforming the industry. We combine short staple fiber and unique, 98% recycled polyvinyl to create a flooring solution that will not fail. Slip-resistant, shock absorbent extremely easy to clean, it is the perfect solution for foodservice, aquatic, athletic, veterinary, outdoor space and healthcare industries. Our nationwide network of installers can retrofit or update new spaces with virtually no downtime and often in 24-48 hours.

name: Allonis LLC
description: Bar and Restaurant Audio Video Control Systems TVs, Video walls, multi zone audio, DirecTV, Cable Box, AppleTV, IPCameras, Digital Signage and more. Cost effective, scalable and easiest to use system controlled via a custom floorplan on your iPad or smartphone. Custom programmed by Allonis experts. Installed locally by you or your installer. Try a live system at booth 8545. See our myServer control system manage content on the gorgeous LED walls from our partner company, i5LED.com! Show pricing available!

name: Aloha Shoyu Company, Ltd.
description: In 1946, a small shoyu (soy sauce) manufacturing plant was established in Kalihi, Hawaii by five local Japanese families amidst post World War II. Aloha Shoyu Company has survived through competition to become one of today's market leaders in Soy Sauce sales in Hawaii. Aloha Shoyu continues to expand its line of quality products which now includes Lower Salt Soy Sauce, Aloha Gold Soy Sauce, Gluten-Free Soy Sauce, White Distilled Vinegar, Cider Vinegar, Sushi No Tomo Vinegar, Barbecue Sauce, Hawaiian Teriyaki Sauce, Somen Tsuyu Noodle Sauce, and Teriyaki Glaze and Marinades. Tradition, local roots, and flavor make Aloha Shoyu products a favorite among Hawaiian islanders and visitors alike, so serve up your next favorite dish with a little Aloha. The name Aloha Shoyu was conceived to reflect our deeply rooted island heritage melded with our Japanese origin and to portray the company's core values. The word Shoyu originates from Japan and is a term widely accepted in Hawaii which refers to Soy Sauce. Aloha, a term widely used as a greeting, also signifies important values in the Hawaiian culture, which includes kindness, unity, humility and perseverance. Over the years our line has grown from only soy sauces, to include a variety of sauces, marinades, and vinegars to meet the changing and expanding needs of the consumer. It is with this attention to detail and dedication to our customers that Aloha Shoyu has captured over 65 percent of the market share in Hawaii. In 2018, Aloha Shoyu acquired Malolo Beverages and Supplies from the Young families who were looking to enjoy retirement. Malolo was well known for their iconic line of shave ice and beverage syrups, but their business also expanded into a full-service restaurant supply company. Aloha Shoyu saw an opportunity to acquire a company that had been a staple in Hawaii since 1927. The synergies between the two companies made an ideal match. Much of Aloha Shoyu's consumer base were also loyal customers of Malolo and Aloha Shoyu already possessed the infrastructure and expertise in production to enhance and keep the syrup brand alive in Hawaii. From this acquisition along with Aloha Shoyu's existing bottling division, Aloha Packaging and Supplies was born. Although transitioning to a new venture is always trying and difficult, Aloha Packaging and Supplies has been able to capture a significant market in the restaurant supplies sector in Hawaii. Over the past six years, Aloha Packaging and Supplies went from servicing primarily Oahu customers to being able to service customers nationally.

name: Alpha Baking Company, Inc.
description: Alpha Baking excels in blending old world tradition with new world technology to bake a wide variety of quality bread, buns, rolls, muffins and sweet goods. In addition to the plethora of products we already offer, we are always working to develop new, on trend items for our customers. Based in Chicago, we offer: nationwide frozen distribution, dsd delivery in the midwest, retail and private labeling.

name: Alpha Brass Controls Inc.
description: Established in 1989, Alpha Brass Controls operates under ISO 9001:2008 and our laboratory cooperates with CSA and CE testing bodies to manufacture commercial gas valves and provides solutions of thermostats, safety valves, and various gas valves for the professional cooking industry.

name: Alto-Shaam, Inc.
description: For more than 60 years, Alto-Shaam has pioneered commercial foodservice equipment that has advanced the industry. As a leading global equipment manufacturer, Alto-Shaam continues to innovate cutting-edge products and services. Our award-winning portfolio includes the latest Converge Multi-Cook Ovens, recipient of the 2022 Kitchen Innovations award! Other product innovations include Vector Multi-Cook Ovens, Prodigi Combi Ovens, Cook Hold Ovens, a variety of heated holding solutions, and more.

name: Aluf Plastics
description: Aluf Plastics is a minority, woman-owned WBENC member, family-run manufacturer of commercial, retail and private label can liners. From hundreds of stock items to custom solutions, we provide a comprehensive range of liners and sheeting in a wide variety of materials, gauges, sizes and options to address your every need. We are committed to manufacturing environmentally friendly and ecologically responsible products to help protect the environment and sustain our natural resources for current and future generations. Where are you on your Sustainability Journey? Whether you are an eco-starter or an environmentalist, we're all looking to make smarter choices for our planet. Reducing pollution, shrinking landfills and keeping natural resources intact are all paths the lead to a more sustainable future. Wherever you are on your Sustainability Journey, we've GOT A BAG FOR YOU!

name: Alutech United, Inc.
description: The quality we offer At Alutech, quality is our number one concern. To ensure this, we start with the very best materials to make every product in our line. We combine the right materials with our years of experience and our proven technology engineering to guarantee our customers delivery of the finest security shutters in the industry. Our attention to aesthetics Alutech has taken innovative measures to lessen the visual impact caused by the installation of traditional security shutters. We offer custom shapes shutters for trapezoid and arched shapes and a number of other products meant to protect a home while still offering visual appeal. Our experience - Alutech is a leading manufacturer of storm shutters, retractable awnings, and hurricane screens. Our business began more than 35 years ago in Germany when founder Hans Schanz began researching roller shutter designs. As a mechanical engineer, Schanz saw a number of other applications for this design and Alutech was born. In the 1980s, the company pioneered a new design of security shutters that could follow the shapes of a variety of windows. By the 1990s, Alutech expanded internationally and today services customers all over the world from its new headquarters in Selbyville, Delaware. Our versatility While our storm shutters are ideal to have in place when severe weather threatens, they are also perfect for everyday use. Our shutters and screens are versatile enough to provide shading and will even serve as a thermal barrier on days with the temperatures spike or plummet. The peace of mind you'll enjoy When you have Alutech hurricane shutters in place, you'll enjoy the peace of mind that comes with knowing you've done your part to protect your home and your family. Our shutters can offer you protection from sun, storms, cold and hot weather and even burglary. When it is time to better protect your home, Alutech United is here to help. We offer a variety of solutions that range from removable storm panels to systems you can put into use every day. At Alutech, your safety, security and satisfaction are our top priorities. If you're ready to enjoy the protection storm shutters provide, Alutech is here for you.

name: Amafruits
description: Premium supplier of Superfruits from the Amazon Rainforest including pure fruit pulps, purees, smoothie packs and ready-to-serve blends and sorbets. Amafruits is family owned and operated since 2009. Our passion is sourcing and providing the best tasting super-nutritious fruits of the Amazon Rainforest harvested sustainably; including Acai, Acerola, Graviola (soursop), Pink Guava, Passion Fruit, Dragon Fruit and more.

name: AMEICO
description: AMEICO is the exclusive U.S. distributor and hospitality partner for Humble Lights, a design-led lighting brand known for its refined, portable, and rechargeable lamps. We work closely with hospitality designers and operators to bring Humble’s thoughtful balance of form, function, and atmosphere into hotels, restaurants, and commercial spaces. As the brand’s exclusive U.S. partner, we represent more than the product—we tell Humble’s design story, translating its aesthetic and values into cohesive lighting solutions that create warm, memorable guest experiences.

name: American Beverage Marketers
description: American Beverage Marketers is committed to long-term world-wide leadership in the development, marketing and sale of premium cocktail mixes and ingredients from source to sip. From our founding, we set out to be the best at one thing and one thing only cocktail mixes and ingredients.

name: American Culinary Federation
description: American Culinary Federation (ACF), is the largest professional organization for chefs and cooks. The association is made up of more than 15,000 members belonging to more than 170 chapters in four regions across the US. Today, ACF is the leader in offering educational resources, training, apprenticeship, competitions and programmatic accreditation designed to enhance professional growth for all current and future chefs and pastry chefs. In addition, ACF operates the most comprehensive culinary certification program in the world. ACF is also home to ACF Culinary Team USA, the official representative for the United States in major international competitions. We also offer the best in class Regional and National Professional Development Events in the Culinary Industry, Online Continuing Education, as well as print and digital publications and much more to help foster the growth of professional chefs and the foodservice industry. If you are not already a part of our organization, we invite you to join us and gain access to the best culinary resources and networking available. Check out our ACF news hub at www.wearechefs.com

name: American Maid
description: American Maid is a privately held company based in Riverside, California, specializing in the development and manufacturing of high-quality plastic houseware products. Our company has a diverse distribution network across the United States, serving all trade classes, including foodservice, grocery, drug, and home improvement. Founded in 1997, American Maid now employs over 150 people. We offer an extensive BPA-free product line across multiple categories, including food storage, hydration, kitchen and laundry utilities, serveware, and home storage and organization.

name: American Metalcraft
description: American Metalcraft specializes in a variety of products for the food-service industry. From tabletop and buffet items to pizza supplies and plate covers, our product line is diverse and growing. Each year, we introduce hundreds of new items to position ourselves as one of the most trend-forward food-service suppliers in the market! To learn more about our products, visit our website at www.amnow.com or give us a call at 800-333-9133.

name: American Tack & Hardware Inc.
description: Headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, Amerelle has expanded to a much wider catalog and larger warehouse, with over 3 million wallplates in stock and ready to ship to you. Today we are proud to be the leading designer and manufacturer of decorative switch plates, outlet covers, and restaurant table lamps. As we look to the future, we remain committed to the company's principles – quality products, good value, and outstanding customer service.

name: Amish Pretzel Company
description: Amish Pretzel Co. is the new frozen pretzels. Our pretzels have NO dairy, egg, nuts and soy free and No harsh preservatives. It's sweet, buttery and salty all in one bite. We offer a variety and some fun shaped pretzels too.

name: Amoretti
description: Amoretti is a California based company that produces the only finest ingredients by sourcing the freshest and tastiest fruits, herbs, spices, chocolates, vanillas peppers from around the world, paying meticulous attention to quality consistency to ensure an impeccable, creative, and consistent batch every day.

name: Amoroso’s Baking Company
description: •Amoroso’s has supplied the finest hearth-baked bread since 1904. •Amoroso’s is the largest private bakery in Philadelphia and the largest family owned bakery on the east coast. •As legend has it, Amoroso’s made the first cheesesteak rolls back in the 1930’s. •Our roll is the only authentic Italian cheesesteak roll. •The Amoroso and Ginsburg names are known nationwide and represent quality, value and consistency.

name: AMOY ASIAN FOODS NORTH AMERICA
description: Established in 1908, Amoy founded their cornerstone on the quality and reliability of the products across generations. With over a hundred and seventeen years of history, the centennial brand stands strong with product quality that meets the needs and demands of the restaurant industry. Our goal is to deliver authentic dimsum, noodles, rice and sauces that satisfy the taste of customers while at the same time providing the restaurant operator with labor saving efficiencies.

name: Amru Rice (Cambodia) Co., Ltd
description: Amru Rice Cambodia Co., Ltd is the largest producer and exporter of organic rice from Cambodia. We source, process and export rice that is organic or sustainably produced according to international certification standards. We conduct our business with strong ethical values aligned with corporate social responsibility. We embrace sustainable practices in the production phase by investing in farmers along the supply chain and providing them with education and financial security. We work closely with various Agricultural Cooperatives (AC) throughout Cambodia in a carefully crafted contract farming format that improves farmers’ livelihoods and brings positive social change to the communities we work with. Saran and his brother venture the trading rice companies led by Muny Khy, Saran’s wife, and his brothers. The company established to promote the export of the Cambodian rice as per government policy and EBA access to Europe market. Saran fully joined as CEO of the company in 2012 and expanding the company to global rice export players – transforming to contract farming and export of the heathy rice to the world and launched the diverse markets, including Malaysia, China, the European Union (EU), Africa and North America. The company has become a key factor in the foreign market for Cambodian rice millers. Amru Rice is still very active in all these markets except for Africa; in 2015, the company focused on organic rice and sustainable fragrant rice as well as investing infrastructure for high end food safety standard for Europe, USA, China, and Asia Pacific market. AmruRice’s business is also conducted with strong ethics by embracing its CSR concept and working closely with various Agriculture Cooperatives throughout the country in carefully crafted contract farming format to also improve livelihood of our farmers along the supply chain. The company has also strived tirelessly to diversify into niche market segments to capture more value add and enhance corporate margins. Our over 200 employees and 10,000 farmers family strong work force keeps expanding through constant on-the-job training as our activities grow throughout the provinces where we operate, directly supporting the cooperative institutions and farmer organizations in partnership with public and non-profit organizations.

name: Anchor Packaging
description: A global innovation leader in designing and manufacturing rigid food containers and food service cling film in the USA since 1963. Committed to protecting food and the environment by using materials that reduce food and packaging waste to conserve valuable natural resources while delivering what the chef intended. Our partners at restaurant chains, supermarkets, convenience stores, food processors, and the distributors that warehouse and ship to these market segments utilize our award-winning performance features in durable packaging that preserves food quality, taste, and texture.

name: Anfora
description: Established 106 years ago, Anfora is the top North American manufacturer of fully vitrified ceramic dinnerware made specifically for foodservice. Based in Mexico and serving the U.S. hospitality market since 2000, Anfora combines the strength of large-scale manufacturing, alumina content in its body, a huge variety of shapes and reactive glazes, with the logistical advantages of land shipping to the continental United States. For restaurants, hotels, chains, dealers, and distributors, Anfora offers a compelling alternative to distant offshore (and copycat) sourcing: high-performance tabletop solutions made closer to market, with the flexibility, scale, quality and responsiveness that business owners and operators need. Designed for the realities of commercial use, Anfora’s fully vitrified dinnerware delivers the key characteristics foodservice professionals demand: strength, durability, full vitrification, design driven patterns, stock in the US, and long-term beauty under heavy daily use. In busy dining rooms, chef driven operations, and high-volume service environments, your dinnerware must do much more than look good. It must withstand repeated handling, dishwashing, stacking, and continuous circulation while maintaining a refined presentation on the table. Anfora is built around the balance of performance, quality and presentation. What sets Anfora apart is its 1,000 people strong manufacturing base in North America with German machinery that includes digital printing . Producing in Mexico allows Anfora to supply the U.S. market through land shipping, creating important advantages in freight planning, replenishment, lead times, and stable supply chain agility that does not depend on China or the Middle East. In an era when hospitality buyers value reliability as much as design, we offer a practical sourcing model backed by real manufacturing depth. Our name stands behind the beloved ranges such as our hand-painted Puebla pattern, the reactive glaze of Chena , the beautiful low profile Motiva , the urban colors of Denali and the tray ranges of Sedona , combining proven foodservice utility with distinctive tabletop character. This year, we´re introducing Ranieri stainless steel flatware to the market, offering both 18/0 and 18/10 solutions to support complete tabletop programs. For more than two decades, Anfora has been a trusted presence in the American hospitality market. Today, it is also actively open to adding new distribution partners and independent sales representatives as it expands its reach in the United States. We pride ourselves on offering custom development for independent chefs and hospitality concepts seeking a more distinctive identity. Anfora stands out as a superb manufacturing partner next door to the US: a company that brings together fully vitrified performance, production scale, custom design capabilities, beautiful glazes, latest digital decoration, stainless steel flatware, and strategic advantages of North American supply.

name: ANGEL Health Technology Ltd.
description: ANGEL delivers professional-grade water treatment solutions for the foodservice and hospitality industries. We create filtration systems, water dispensers, and softening technologies designed to ensure consistent quality and operational efficiency. With over 35 years of experience and global manufacturing capabilities, ANGEL supports businesses with dependable solutions for cleaner, safer, better-performing water.

name: Angel's Bakery, USA LLC
description: Bakers of the World's Best Pita, by far. Artisan Pita Bread that is what Real Pita Bread should be. Soft and fluffy, with a well developed cell structure. Only 6 Natural Kitchen Ingredients!

name: Anhui Fuchs International Trade Co., Ltd
description: Anhui Fuchs International Trade Co., Ltd, located in Anqing, China, is a professional company engaged in the research, development, sale and service of disposable food packaging products. Main products include paper cups and lids, etc. Founded in 2010, FUCHS not only own self-printing, cutting and forming workshops, but also have experienced workers and management teams to guarantee high efficiency and large production capacity. With highly sophisticated production equipments and multiple quality inspection procedures, we strictly control the product quality. Selling well in all cities and provinces around China, our products are also exported to clients in such countries and regions as North America, Europe, the Middle East and other areas in the world. In addition, we have obtained ISO, BRC, FSC, FDA and other professional recognition certificates. Quality products, competitive prices and attentive service make us get good reputation from lots of clients. FUCHS are making great efforts to develop new products to meet different requirements. Looking forward to having a long-term business relationship with customers from all over the world.

name: Anhui Hualing Kitchen Equipment Co., Ltd
description: We are professional manufacturer of kitchen equipments in China, we have two factories, mainly produce: meat slicer, vegetable cutter, meat grinder, soup warmer, food warmer, fryer, refrigeration, ice maker..., and so on, most of our items sell to Ameria and Europe with certificate of ETL, ETL SANITATION, CE, and with good reputation by high quality and best prices.

name: ANHYDRA
description: ANHYDRA specializes in dehydrated garnishes and fruit powders for cocktails, desserts, seasonings and creative culinary applications. All our products are carefully dehydrated in our SQF certified food facility. Stop by our booth to discover our products and grab some samples! Available through : Gordon Food Service, Sysco, Cheney Brothers.

name: Aniai
description: Aniai is a foodservice robotics manufacturer building automated cooking equipment for high-volume restaurant kitchens. Our systems are designed to improve speed and consistency, reduce physical strain on kitchen teams, and help operators run leaner, more predictable operations. Aniai supports restaurant brands navigating labor shortages, rising costs, and the need to scale without adding complexity to the kitchen.

name: ANKUTSAN PACKAGING
description: Ankutsan Packaging With its 5 factories in 5 different cities in Turkey, ANKUTSAN is one of the leading box manufacturers, exporting to more than 60 countries in 5 different continents. Thanks to its special machinery and full automation system, ANKUTSAN manufactures Pizza Boxes at world standards which are untouc Boxes, Pizza Delivery, Packaging Supplies, Paper Products, Pizza Packaging

name: Annasea
description: Celebrating over 25 years as a family-owned business, our mission is to source and deliver the highest-quality fish products to our US and global customers. Western United Fish Company was started in Seattle, Washington, in 2000 and has evolved into six business operations worldwide under the Annasea Foods Group. Our objective is to produce high-quality products and deliver outstanding customer service. To uphold our company values of Sustainability and Traceability, we engage in Fishery Improvement Projects (FIP) working toward Marine Steward Council (MSC) standards. It is our responsibility to conserve natural resources in our oceans. We work jointly with fishing communities, local governments, and non-government organizations (NGO) to implement industry best practices in supply chain improvement systems. Prioritizing sustainability in our business operations is part of our values. We believe environmental stewardship ensures the quality of our fish products.

name: Anqing City Shuanglong Paper Co., Ltd
description: Anqing City Shuanglong Paper Co., Ltd. is located in the Economic Development Zone of Huaining County, Anqing City, Anhui Province. It was established in 2007 and obtained the right to self-operate exports in 2014, founding an export trading company. In 2019, it expanded its new factory area with a total investment of 67 million yuan, covering 20 mu and a total construction area of 23,000 square meters. The main facilities include standardized workshops, warehouses, supporting buildings, equipment purchase and installation, and other ancillary facilities. After completion, it will have an annual production capacity of 1 billion PLA biodegradable disposable paper cups. Once the project reaches full production capacity, it can achieve an annual output value of 100 million yuan, including 9 million US dollars in export earnings and an annual profit and tax of over 31 million yuan, creating 90 new jobs. The completion of the project will effectively enhance the production level of the green paper and plastic characteristic industrial cluster (base) in Huaining County and increase the level of export earnings. Anqing City Shuanglong Paper Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of green and environmentally friendly paper cups, paper bowls, and paper straws. It has a one-stop business level covering design, printing, cutting, and production. After more than ten years of solid operation, Shuanglong Paper Industry has grown into a high-quality enterprise, with its products sold far and wide both at home and abroad. Due to its excellent quality, it has gained the trust of customers at home and abroad. Our company adheres to the business philosophy of "winning the market with integrity and revitalizing the enterprise with quality". From raw material procurement, printing to molding, we strictly control every step, always adhering to the principle of "quality first, reputation first", and consistently maintaining a business approach of "high quality, low price". We are dedicated to providing customers with high-quality and reliable disposable products through more convenient and efficient services, a wider range of products, and superior quality. Since the completion of the new factory area, our company has rapidly carried out product positioning, further improving the quality and diversity of products, and aiming to enter the high-end market. Timely upgrading of hardware facilities ensures that Shuanglong's products maintain high quality. The spirit of keeping pace with the times and continuous innovation has enabled Shuanglong to remain prosperous. Shuanglong will not disappoint expectations and always maintain a pure heart, standing out in the highly competitive environment today.

name: Antonina’s Gluten-Free Bakery
description: Elevate Your Menu with Antonina’s Gluten-Free Bakery Antonina’s Gluten-Free Bakery is redefining indulgence with premium gluten-free muffins, bundt cakes, cornbread and brownies so delicious, your guests won’t believe it's gluten-free. As gluten-free demand continues to grow—up more than 10% CAGR in recent years—restaurants, cafés, and hospitality operators have a clear opportunity to attract new guests and drive repeat visits with high-quality options everyone can enjoy. Gluten-free is no longer a compromise. It’s an expectation. Antonina’s delivers on taste, consistency, and convenience with pre-baked, thaw-and-serve solutions designed for foodservice. From individually wrapped brownies and grab-and-go snacks to beautifully finished cakes and cupcakes for celebrations, our products help operators expand their menu and increase incremental sales with zero added labor. Start the day with our moist, sour cream-based muffins. Build out grab-and-go with individually wrapped options. Elevate dessert with premium, crowd-pleasing favorites. Whether you’re looking to grow your gluten-free offerings or simply serve better baked goods, Antonina’s makes it easy. Let’s connect and talk about how Antonina’s can support your menu.

name: APCOR - Portuguese Cork Association
description: Associação Portuguesa da Cortiça (APCOR) exists to represent and promote the Portuguese cork industry and its products. APCOR is the employers’ association of national scope, created in 1956 and is based in Santa Maria de Lamas, at the heart of the cork industry, around 30 kilometers from Porto, Portugal’s second largest city. Membership of the association is open to all companies operating in the fields of production, marketing or export of cork products. The organization advocates on behalf of the Portuguese cork industry worldwide and is the driving force of an industry based on tradition, innovation and sustainability.

name: Apex Order Pickup Solutions
description: Apex Order Pickup Solutions helps foodservice operators hand off orders faster, smoother, and more securely. Our smart locker solutions get rid of lines and lobby chaos, letting guests grab their food in seconds while giving staff time back to focus on service. Teams move with less stress, operations run smoother, and operators get useful data on order flow, dwell times, and staffing needs—keeping every location sharp. Apex solutions speed up mobile order pickup, increase throughput, and create a better experience for guests, staff, and operators alike. See how Apex can make order pickup faster, simpler, and more profitable at ApexOrderPickup.com .

name: Appsuite
description: Appsuite takes the guess work out of building your technology stack with our robust suite of pre-integrated applications. Powering thousands of locations around the globe, our Ordering, Kiosk, Loyalty/CRM, Gift and Delivery Management solutions drive a seamless experience for customer and operator alike! Extend your ordering capabilities beyond the POS all while enhancing your customer's experience. Gather critical data and insights into your customers' spending habits to drive marketing efforts, customer loyalty and increase spend. Why Appsuite? Appsuite is the only integrated Oracle Micros partner that provides a one-stop-shop for customers who want to leverage customer intelligence, mobile apps, 1-1 marketing, rewards, loyalty, gift, ordering (kiosk, web, native), and delivery and driver management into a simple to use and fully integrated solution. -- Supported Industries: Restaurants, Franchisors and Franchisees, Hotels, Health Services, Education, Casinos, Corporate Dining, Manufacturing, Stadiums, Entertainment Parks and Venues -- Appsuite offers global support and services to thousands of locations including KFC, TGIF, Church’s Chicken, Atlantis Dubai, Margaritaville, Pizza Hut, US Marine Corps, and more. -- Ask us about online ordering, self-ordering, call-in ordering, kiosk, mobile apps, gift cards, loyalty, CRM, marketing, Oracle Simphony POS Integration, delivery, pick-up, curbside, food and beverage, hotels, stadiums, casinos

name: Apricot and Honey Gourmet
description: Apricot & Honey Gourmet is a family-operated importer and distributor of French artisanal fine Food. We are continuously searching for the highest quality products to bring fully artisanal, unique food and beverage to the market. We offer a wide variety of products for hotels and restaurants. Our brands are : Emile Vergeois Juices & Nectars, Maison Perrotte preserves & honey, Martin-Pouret condiments, Binet 1660 sea salt, La Maison du Miel Honey, Moulin de la Veyssière Virgin Oils

name: Aquamor
description: At Aquamor, our vision is clear: to provide water treatment solutions that are as unique as the water we treat. By leveraging Aquamor’s manufacturing excellence and analytical acumen, we tailor our approach to each customer’s specific needs. This isn’t just about selling products; it’s about offering a partnership that understands, adapts, and overcomes the distinct challenges of water treatment. Through this partnership we provide a unique approach to the marketplace, driving focused solutions, enhancing quality, longevity and ultimately an unparalleled value proposition to our customers and the industry. WATER: A COMPLEX CHALLENGE, A TAILORED SOLUTION Water is a complex entity. Its characteristics can vary dramatically, even within the same neighborhood. This variability demands not just solutions, but smart, adaptable, and precise strategies. Aquamor brings a heightened level of analysis and knowledge, applying years of industry expertise to the nuances of water treatment. A PROMISE OF SUCCESS AND IMPACT Aquamor promises not just success, but a significant impact on the water treatment space. We offer more than products; we offer a commitment to understanding your unique water challenges and delivering solutions that work. As we continue on this journey, we invite you, our valued customers and partners, to join us in shaping a future where every drop of water is treated with the utmost care and expertise. We’re not just treating water; we’re setting the standard for the industry. Welcome to the future of water treatment. Welcome to Aquamor. Crafted with the future in mind, inspired by a legacy of excellence. Clean Water. Clear Dedication.

name: Arc Cardinal
description: We design and curate complete tabletop and buffet solutions that transform every meal into an experience.

name: Arcobaleno Pasta Machines, LLC
description: Making Pasta Happen! Arcobaleno is the leading manufacturer of pasta and pizza equipment for the commercial, restaurant, and foodservice industries. We offer a full line of equipment including pasta extruders, pasta cookers, dough sheeters, ravioli machines, gnocchi machines, pasta dryers, flywheel slicers, pizza ovens, spiral mixers, dough rounders, and more.

name: ARCPLAST PLASTIK SANAYI A.S.
description: Turkey’s Export Leader in Disposable Tableware Based in Istanbul, ARCPLAST is a pioneering and reliable manufacturer in the disposable plastic tableware sector, powered by a modern and technologically advanced machinery park. We take great pride in being recognized as the Export Leader in our industry. This achievement is a concrete reflection of our strong presence in international markets, our uncompromising commitment to quality, and our vision for sustainable growth. Production Strength & Vision Under our flagship brand, "Zebra Disposables" we have built our corporate policy on responding rapidly to the ever-evolving demands of consumers. Thanks to our flexibility and agile operational capabilities, we have successfully met the expectations of global clients for years. Our Product Range We offer a comprehensive selection of high-quality products, including: * PS and PP Plastic Cutlery: Forks, knives, and spoons. * Packaged Cutlery Sets: Convenient PS and PP solutions. * PP and PS Plates: Available in various designs and sizes. * Food Containers: (Leak-proof and Microwave-safe options) * Shot and Sauce Cups: Precision-molded for diverse needs. * PP and PET Cups: Durable and crystal-clear options. Private Label Expertise All our product groups can be manufactured under Private Label (Customer Brand) according to specific requirements. We streamline your operational processes and optimize costs by offering: * Custom Retail Packaging: Tailored to your brand’s identity. * Mixed Container Loading: Flexible shipping options to maximize efficiency. Category: Reusable & Disposable Plastic Kitchenware / Housewares / Food Service

name: Arla Foods
description: Arla Foods is the fourth-largest dairy company in the world and a cooperative owned by more than 9,000 dairy farmers with products sold globally in over 150 countries. Arla combines traditional craftsmanship and world-class technologies to ensure its products remain closer to nature, from farm to fridge. Our philosophy of producing natural, healthy and high-quality dairy products dates back to the 1880s when dairy farmers in Denmark and Sweden joined forces with one common goal: to produce and provide the best dairy products. Arla Foods USA sells dairy deli products across several brands, including the Arla brand, Castello, Lurpak, Arla Pro, Cocio and Dofino. When it comes to branded growth, the U.S. has been one of the largest international markets for Castello cheese. With a delicious range of cheeses, Arla aims to bring joy to those every day moments that make up life. Traceability... Because we are owned by the same farmers who produce most of our milk, we have full control of the milk's journey from our cows to you. Every single step of the way is recorded and can be traced. Using this tracing system, we ensure that you always get products with the best, pure and tasty milk. Global Innovation... In our recently built Arla Innovation Center, along with product development teams in the UK, Sweden, China, Germany, Netherlands, Finland and the US, we passionately innovate from farm to plate to create the future dairy products to the world. We do this with state-of-the-art science and consumer labs and a 2000 m2 pilot plant, with more flexibility to install any type of process needed for our innovation projects. The Innovation Centre is at the heart of the Danish Food cluster ranked first in the EU in terms of business investment in food and drink RD our researchers are strongly connected, and make innovation happen, all-across Arla and its markets.

name: Arm & Hammer
description: Arm & Hammer™ Commercial & Professional brings together four household names — Arm & Hammer™, OxiClean™, Kaboom™, and XTRA™ — into one powerhouse portfolio serving the foodservice, hospitality, healthcare, commercial laundry, and janitorial industries. Backed by the trusted science and reliability of Church & Dwight, our products are designed to meet the rigorous standards of professional environments with the same integrity and effectiveness that built consumer loyalty.

description: Art Marble Furniture specializes in the manufacturing of light weight, easy to install stone tables, specifically for the Foodservice & Hospitality industries. All standard items are available for immediate shipment, with custom available with an extended lead time. Our new sintered stone tabletops and gold stainless bases will be on display. This year we are partnering with Axis Laser Metal Fabricators. Axis Laser produces a vast array of items ranging from utility carts and outdoor fencing, to high end luxury art work, with custom requests available.
