description: We print and ship Placemats and Trayliners throughout North America (our pricing always includes shipping). Our production facility is located in Toronto and the company was founded by my Grandfather in 1932.

name: Arteseans Seafoods
description: Arteseans Seafoods is a wholesale provider of premium ocean-cultivated scallops, recognized for their sustainable farming practices. Driven by a passion for seafood and marine conservation, we focus on sustainable mariculture to protect vital marine ecosystems. Our commitment to sustainability guarantees that our seafood is responsibly harvested, supporting environmental preservation for future generations. Our scallops are cultivated in the clean waters of Sechura Bay, located in the Pacific Ocean off Peru's coast. This location offers a naturally sweet and creamy texture, enriched by nutrients from the Humboldt Current. We carefully handle our scallops from harvest through processing, ensuring top-quality texture and flavor. Our scallops are 100% natural, traceable, and free from chemicals, microplastics, water, mercury, and additives. Arteseans sea and bay half-shell scallops are hand-shucked and naturally attached to their shells. Scallops are available in the following sizes: 10-20, 20-30, and 30-40. We are the direct source for sashimi-grade, individually quick-frozen Peruvian scallops on the half shell. We maintain year-round stock in Los Angeles, CA, and Miami, FL. The Seafood Watch Program at the Monterey Bay Aquarium rates our Pacific Peruvian scallops as a "Best Choice." They are rich in protein, Omega-3 fatty acids, Vitamin B12, and Zinc.

name: Arvco Container
description: A full service corrugated packaging manufacturer with custom design and custom print capabilities. We offer a full line of pizza boxes, pizza circles, to-go boxes, lunch boxes, and catering boxes.

name: Aryaa Organic
description: Aryaa Organic is bringing 5,000 years of culinary wisdom to the future of food. Minority- and women-owned, Aryaa revives ancient global recipes and premium ingredients, reimagined for modern restaurant innovation. Inspired by India’s rich culinary heritage, we elevate time-tested foods that have nourished civilizations for millennia, now adapted for today’s plant-forward, clean-label, experience-driven menus. At NRA, we are showcasing: Khichdi — The Original Indian Risotto (5,000 Years Old). An organic sacred Indian comfort dish crafted from organic basmati rice, lentils, and functional spices. Naturally creamy, protein-rich, high in fiber, gluten-free, and plant-forward, Khichdi adapts seamlessly into fast-casual bowls, healthcare dining, university programs, hospitality concepts, and elevated “modern Indian risotto” presentations. Now proudly served at Sheraton Grand Chicago – Shula’s Steakhouse, and expanding as a featured vegetarian/vegan room service and banquet offering at the Grand. Paan — A Cultural Experience Reimagined. A bold, refreshing, sweet-spiced tradition served after meals across India. Our paan is NON-GMO, with no artificial flavors or colorings. It can be enjoyed as a flavorful bite or brewed as an edible tea, offering chefs and beverage programs a distinctive digestif, mocktail infusion, or experiential hospitality element. We are also featuring chef-ready culinary staples: • A2 Grass-Fed Ghee – Traditionally crafted clarified butter from grass-fed cows, prized for its rich flavor, high smoke point, and versatility across savory and sweet applications. Chef approved. • Turmeric (Non-GMO, High Curcumin) – Vibrant color, bold flavor, and functional appeal for sauces, beverages, marinades, and wellness-forward menus. • Cardamom Seeds (Non-GMO) – Premium aromatic spice elevating desserts, beverages, sauces, and global flavor profiles. Why Aryaa stands apart: • 5,000-year-old authentic culinary roots • Organic, non-GMO, gluten-free offerings • Plant-forward and globally inspired • Minority- and women-owned business • Designed for menu innovation and cultural storytelling • Crafted with intentional sourcing and traditional preparation methods that honor ancient culinary principles Available for foodservice distribution, hospitality groups, private label, and bulk purchasing. Designed for operational efficiency, consistent preparation, and strong menu margins. Visit Aryaa at NRA and explore how ancient flavor can shape modern menus.

name: Association Kiosk Manufacturers
description: Experience the future of restaurant automation at Booth #5829 (North Building) . May 16-19 McCormick Center. The Kiosk Association (KMA) and The Industry Group (TIG) bring together world-class providers and experts. This year, we have five powerhouse partners transforming the guest experience. Quick LInks Pyramid Computer – kiosks Vispero – Universal Accessibility Sitekiosk — interactive software URway Holdings – Conversational AI Innovative MyCheckr - AI-driven age verification Featured Innovations: Pyramid Computer – When high-traffic environments demand durability and sleek design, Pyramid Computer delivers. Vispero – Accessibility is a fundamental pillar of modern hospitality. Vispero , the world’s leading assistive technology provider, demonstrates how QSRs and fast-casual brands can provide a truly inclusive experience. What to See: The JAWS for Kiosk screen reader and tactile input solutions. URway Holdings – Conversational AI Step into the next generation of guest interaction with URway Holdings . The “AI Connect Bar” represents the shift from simple touchscreens to intuitive, voice-activated engagement. What to See: The AI Connect Bar . Experience how generative and conversational AI allows guests to speak naturally to a kiosk to place complex orders, reducing friction and increasing average ticket sizes through intelligent, real-time upselling. Sitekiosk — SiteKiosk is a kiosk and digital signage software platform that locks down Windows and Android devices for secure, unattended use in public spaces. Latest release notes . It combines OS/browser lockdown, remote management, and a built-in CMS so you can configure, monitor, and update self-service kiosks and interactive displays from a central web portal. Innovative MyCheckr – The MyCheckr device is a compact, AI-driven age verification solution designed for self-service environments such as restaurant kiosks and unattended retail. It uses camera-based estimation to determine whether a customer meets age requirements, enabling staff-free compliance for alcohol or restricted-item purchases. Intel — Intel edge systems increasingly integrate computer vision and AI, enabling item recognition, loss prevention, and autonomous micro-stores that reduce labor while improving customer experience. Expert Consulting & Strategy Led by 40 year industry veteran Craig Allen Keefner , our team provides the strategic roadmap for your digital transformation. Please review our 2026 Strategic Compliance Checklist Craig Keefner Email: craig.keefner@gmail.com Phone: 720-324-1837 See you in the North Building at Booth #5829!

Our world-class manufacturing facilities and highly skilled employees, combined with our innovative manufacturing procedures ensure that our customers always receive top-quality products at economical prices. Since the 1980's, AUTEC has expanded its operations to the USA and Canada with a goal to make high-quality sushi accessible and affordable to anyone, anywhere by designing aesthetically pleasing robots to assist all levels of sushi chefs and various types of businesses to successfully run at a lower operational cost.

Our Coast-to-Coast 24-Hour Service means: You call. We're there.

Our equipment has helped thousands of businesses, including convenience stores, implement a successful foodservice program. AutoFry is the leader in self-contained and automated, ventless deep-frying technology. AutoFry takes the hard work out of frying and ensures a quality product output day in and out. Simplifry™ Technology, a revolutionary heat/time compensation intelligence, helps you to serve up perfectly prepared menu items like French fries, chicken wings, mozzarella sticks, empanadas, beignets, and more with just the press of a button! AutoFry is the only supplier with a complete range of automated, ventless, frying systems, from single to double basket, and countertop to floor models. Capable of serving a wide range of deep-frying demands; from small independent taverns to large stadiums, to worldwide multi-unit chains, AutoFry can handle it all. Most importantly, we continue to offer an affordable, safe, and simple alternative to traditional open commercial fryers.

name: AyrKing, LLC.
description: At AyrKing, we're committed to helping operators make their food preparation process more efficient. Our assortment of food preparation equipment is designed to streamline workflows, enhance consistency and ensure quality with every order. For operators who freshly bread protein, veggies and other sides, AyrKing’s Breading Station equipment helps streamline the food preparation process, saving time, reducing labor costs, extending ingredient life, and producing more consistent product. Whether adding a touch of flavor before additional processing, or creating a deep, strong flavor, AyrKing’s commercial marinators can make it easier to produce perfectly flavored proteins for both high-volume and specialty operations. Standard commercial blenders aren’t the right food preparation equipment for all applications. Discover how the specially designed features of AyrKing’s robust commercial mixers and blenders can help in your food prep process. For operators who understand the value of freshly breaded proteins and sides but are struggling with labor-intensive hand breading, AyrKing’s automated breading equipment can be an ideal solution. Having the right food preparation equipment to keep foods at proper temperatures during the food prep process is critical to food safety. AyrKing’s ice baths, ice bath carts, and protein rails are designed to seamlessly integrate into your food prep process. Across all market segments — from fast food, casual and high-end dining to supermarkets and convenience stores — AyrKing's product solutions are born out of what we learn on the ground, inside kitchens, around the world. That's what makes us true industry experts.

name: Azienda Agricola Ricci Luca
description: Luca Ricci Farm was founded in 1999, rooted in a long family tradition built on experience, dedication, and love for the land. Our story reaches back into the past: from our grandfather, a winemaker, to our father, a farmer, and now to us, with new chapters still to be written. Whether it is wine, the fruits of our fields, or authentic experiences to share, our goal has always been the same: to enhance what this extraordinary land offers us and to share it with those who appreciate its true essence. Our identity has three souls: we are farmers, winemakers, and innkeepers. For us, innovation does not mean abandoning the past, but understanding its roots deeply, reinterpreting its techniques, and bringing them into the present—making the most of the opportunities technology offers while never losing our connection to tradition.

name: Bakerly
description: SUD'N'SOL is a French company created more than 20 years ago, whose very first priority is product quality. Leader in Europe for roasted vegetables, we supply delicious oven-roasted vegetables (tomatoes, artichokes, peppers, mixed vegetables), colorful FABI-Awarded veggies spreads and 100% plant-based burgers. Why are our vegetables so tasty? Once the best variety of tomatoes and vegetables have gone through a rigorous and specific selection, they are partially grilled or dried at a low temperature for several hours in order to enhance their flavor. They are then impregnated with Mediterranean aromas. The secret of our products' unique flavor and color is our respect for the product at every stage of its transformation process. SUD'N'SOL is committed to offer clean label products: 100% vegan, gluten-free, no artificial colors, no artificial flavoring, non-GMO, no preservatives, palm oil-free. Our American office is based in Brooklyn and all our products are available now.

description: BAPI looks forward to showcasing our innovative line of Wireless sensors, including our Wireless Asset Monitoring (WAM) system, and Blü-Test wireless test instruments for the Food Service and Hospitality Industry. Since our start in 1993, BAPI has been committed to manufacturing the highest quality sensors. name: Bar-i
description: Bar-i provides beverage inventory software platform and services to on-premise bars that are ready to upgrade from their inefficient and ineffective liquor inventory processes. Starting at $80 per month, users of our Speed Count system use shelf-to-sheet mapping, Bluetooth scales & physical barcode scanners to count their liquor inventory in half the time. Starting at $250 per month, users of our Pro system are able to precisely compare how many servings of every product were sold versus actually poured during each period. Our Speed Count Pro is a "Hybrid" inventory system combining the lower costs of a user-counted system with the performance, accuracy, and ease of use of full-service systems. On average users reduce their liquor cost by three percentage points. Make Counting Count with our Down to the Serving Results, combining a Knowledgeable and Experienced Inventory Coach, Simple Start Onboarding Process Guided Error Resolution.

name: Bare Beans
description: Bare Beans are fully cooked and ready to eat, offering Garbanzo, Black, Pinto, Red and Navy beans. We want to be your bean supplier for industrial and wholesale. We distribute across North America. We produce our products under this mind frame: fresh, all natural, clean label, and minimally processed. Bare Beans are cooked al dente simulating the home-cooked process without preservatives, coloring, or firming agents and with no added salt. Our pouches have a 90-day refrigerated shelf life. There’s nothing in the pouch but beans and the water that hydrates them, they are not swimming in liquid and over-cooked like canned beans. Whether you currently use canned beans, or your chefs cook from scratch, using Bare Beans can be a money- and time-saver in the kitchen. Bare Beans is woman-, indigenous- and farmer-owned in Idaho. We grow or source our beans locally. Our facility is SQF certified. We can cook to your specs and have multiple options for food service packaging. We are the perfect ingredient in any industrial application including hummus and ready-to-eat preparations. We are ideal partners in healthy meal prep and meal kits. Chefs love us in restaurants, schools, hospitals, institutions, and company cafeterias. Where there is a bean, there can be a Bare Bean! Bare Beans are non-GMO, gluten-free, and offer easy to incorporate plant-based protein.

name: Be Rich Limited
description: Be Rich LTD Taiwan, the professional company that specializes in providing total solution and full service of using PP, PE and PLA coated paperboards for series of takeaway beverage paper cups, paper coffee cups and paper food containers. Our own-stated factory are located in Nankang Industrial Area, Nantou City, and have been certified by the highest level of food production standards - ISO22000 & HACCP. name: Beirut Bakery, INC
description: For nearly five decades, Beirut Bakery has stood as a cornerstone of flavor, tradition, and community in Redford, Michigan, proudly serving generations of families with recipes rooted in Lebanese heritage and crafted with love. What began as a humble family dream, built by hardworking immigrants who carried their culinary traditions from Lebanon to the heart of Metro Detroit, has grown into a trusted name known for quality, authenticity, and consistency. Every dish that leaves our kitchen tells a story—of early mornings preparing fresh pita, of carefully blended spices passed down through generations, and of a deep commitment to nourishing our community with wholesome, flavorful food. From our signature hummus and creamy garlic spread to vibrant chickpea salads, hand-rolled grape leaves, and perfectly seasoned shawarma, each item reflects the same passion and dedication that founded our business. Beirut Bakery is more than just a place to eat—it’s a place where customers become family, where conversations are shared over fresh meals, and where tradition meets innovation as we continue to grow and evolve while staying true to our roots. Over the years, we’ve expanded beyond our retail storefront, bringing our products to grocery stores, hospitals, arenas, and large venues across Michigan, allowing even more people to experience the flavors that define us. Despite our growth, our mission has remained unchanged: to create food that is not only delicious, but also nourishing, using high-quality ingredients and time-honored methods. We take pride in being part of our customers’ everyday lives—from quick lunches and family dinners to holidays and celebrations—knowing that our food brings comfort, connection, and a sense of home. As we look toward the future, we remain deeply grateful for the support of our loyal community, whose continued trust has allowed us to do what we love for nearly 50 years. Beirut Bakery is a testament to perseverance, family values, and the power of food to bring people together, and we are honored to continue sharing our story, one dish at a time.

Our biodegradable straws, which vanish from both soil and marine environments in less than 90 days, are more than just eco-friendly—they’re a statement of quality and innovation. What sets us apart? description: Blues Hog is an award-winning barbecue brand known for delivering championship barbecue flavor through premium barbecue sauces, dry rubs, charcoal, smoked meats, sausages, and specialty protein products for both retail and foodservice. Rooted in competition barbecue, Blues Hog has built a national reputation as the Award-Winning Choice of Champions, trusted by pitmasters, chefs, restaurants, and distributors across the country. Originally developed for competition barbecue teams, Blues Hog products quickly became widely used by professional pitmasters and culinary professionals seeking authentic barbecue flavor with consistent performance. Today the brand has grown into a full portfolio of products designed for restaurants, foodservice operators, grocery retailers, specialty markets, and barbecue enthusiasts. Blues Hog’s lineup of barbecue sauces and marinades includes favorites such as Original, Smokey Mountain, Tennessee Red, Champions Blend, Raspberry Chipotle, Honey Mustard, and Smokey Mountain. Complementing the sauces is a full line of dry rubs and seasonings including Bold and Beefy, Sweet and Savory, Original Dry Rub, Smokey Mountain Rub, Cajun Bayou, Rodeo Rub, and Truffle and Chop. These products are used across barbecue, grilling, smoking, marinating, and menu development. Blues Hog also offers premium lump charcoal and smoking products that help pitmasters and chefs achieve authentic wood-fired flavor and consistent cooking performance. In addition to sauces and seasonings, Blues Hog has expanded into premium ready-to-heat smoked meats and fully cooked barbecue proteins for foodservice and retail prepared food programs. The lineup includes sliced brisket, chopped brisket, whole briskets, burnt ends, pulled pork, smoked turkey breast, smoked pork ribs, and shredded chicken. Blues Hog also produces premium smoked sausages and specialty protein products including jalapeño cheddar sausage, sweet and savory sausage, and bold beef sausage varieties. In 2026, Blues Hog will introduce a new line of liquid Wagyu beef tallow for both foodservice and retail use. This premium cooking fat is designed for grilling, searing, frying, and roasting, bringing rich beef flavor and strong cooking performance to commercial kitchens and home cooks alike. Today Blues Hog products are distributed nationwide through grocery, foodservice, specialty retail, and e-commerce channels and are used by championship barbecue teams, independent restaurants, regional chains, and major retailers. From sauces and seasonings to charcoal, smoked meats, sausages, and liquid Wagyu beef tallow, Blues Hog continues to deliver authentic competition barbecue flavor and high-quality products designed to perform in both restaurant kitchens and retail environments.

Our systems are easy to install , highly reliable, and a cost-effective choice for businesses of all sizes. Whether you're managing a single location or multiple sites, BluLine scales with you. By integrating BluLine’s wireless monitoring solutions , your company can safeguard inventory, streamline compliance, and ensure the safety and quality your customers expect. Connect with BluLine Solutions Website: https://blulinesolutions.com Email: sales@blulinesolutions.com Phone: 1.800.240.7193 Follow Us LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/blulinesolutions Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/blulinesolution Twitter/X: https://x.com/blulinesolution

This makes Bocon an ideal partner for restaurants, hotels, catering services, and meal solution providers looking to optimize kitchen operations while delivering Italian culinary excellence with consistency at scale. It carries not just a product but a promise: of quality, consistency, and a memorable customer experience. Based in Mumbai, India, Thee Packaging Company is one of the fastest-growing manufacturers and exporters of foodservice packaging solutions — proudly serving Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs) , cafés , delivery platforms , and retail chains across India and international markets. What We Offer: Paper Bags • PTH Bags (Flat Handle, Twisted Handle) • SOS Kraft Bags • Oil & Grease Resistant (OGR) Bags ☕ Coffee Cups • PE Coated Paper Cups • Aqueous Coated (Aqua) Paper Cups • PLA Compostable Cups • Ripple Wall, Single Wall, Double Wall Variants Soup Bowls • Leak-proof paper bowls for hot and liquid foods, with PE or compostable coatings PP Beverage Series • PP Sipper Cups • Juice and Cold Drink Cups • Injection Molded and Thermoformed Beverage Solutions Custom Mono Cartons • Printed retail-ready cartons for food, FMCG, and e-commerce applications Why Buyers Choose Thee Packaging Company: ✅ Export-Ready: • End-to-end shipping support including documentation, customs paperwork, and on-time dispatches • Experience shipping to North America, Europe, and the Middle East ✅ Global Standards & Certifications: • Food-grade compliant materials • Sustainable options including recyclable and compostable lines • Committed to globally recognized certifications for food safety and environmental standards ✅ Customization Expertise: • Full-service custom printing, private label production, and branded packaging solutions • MOQ flexibility to support both growing brands and large rollouts ✅ Consistent Quality at Scale: • Structured production systems and strong supply chain management • Quality assurance embedded at every stage ✅ Sustainability that Performs: • Real solutions like OGR recyclable bags, compostable cups, and aqueous coatings—not marketing greenwash Our Belief: Packaging isn’t just about shipping products — it’s about delivering experiences. At Thee Packaging Company , we engineer packaging that protects quality, preserves brand perception, and scales effortlessly across fast-moving foodservice businesses. As we exhibit at the National Restaurant Association Show 2025 in Chicago , we are excited to meet foodservice operators, distributors, and brands looking for a trusted, export-ready packaging partner from India. Let’s build the future of food packaging, together.

name: Boss Defrost LLC
description: Boss Defrost is a commercial food thawing system designed to safely, quickly, and consistently thaw frozen foods while protecting product quality and reducing water waste. Using controlled, continuously circulating cold water, the system thaws proteins evenly without exposing food to unsafe temperatures, helping operators maintain food safety standards and regulatory compliance. Unlike traditional running-water methods, Boss Defrost uses up to 99% less fresh water and eliminates the need for constant monitoring, making it both environmentally friendly and labor efficient. Its portable, plug-and-play design allows kitchens to thaw food anywhere in the workspace while standardizing processes across locations — ideal for restaurants, franchises, universities, and commercial kitchens. Independent peer review testing by Towson University confirmed Boss Defrost as a safe and effective thawing solution, demonstrating improved temperature control, faster thaw times, and reduced cross-contamination risk compared to conventional methods. Boss Defrost helps foodservice operators: • Thaw faster without compromising safety • Maintain texture, color, and freshness • Reduce water usage and labor costs • Standardize procedures across multiple locations • Improve operational efficiency and consistency Boss Defrost delivers a smarter, safer, and more sustainable way to thaw food.

name: Branch
description: Branch is a leading workforce payments platform designed to help restaurants and other hospitality businesses streamline their operations and boost employee satisfaction through fast, digital-first payments. By replacing outdated, manual processes with a seamless digital wallet experience, Branch allows restaurants to pay their staff every single day with no-cost, fee-free options. Branch focuses on solving the administrative headache of traditional tipping through: Cashless Tips: Managers can eliminate risky bank runs and the need to keep large amounts of cash on-site by sending tips directly to a workers digital wallet immediately after their shift. Automated Tip Pooling: Branch simplifies complex tip pooling and daily tip-outs, providing fast, automated calculations that ensure every team memberfrom servers to back-of-house staffis paid accurately and transparently. Flexible Pay Options: In addition to cashless tips, the platform offers an upgraded paycard experience and Earned Wage Access (EWA), giving employees instant access to a portion of their earned wages before payday to help manage unexpected expenses. Ultimately, Branch empowers hospitality leaders to become employers of choice by providing the modern, flexible financial tools that today's workforce demands.

description: Brighton Mills is a 5th generation flour milling and dry blending operation with locations in Cincinnati, Ohio and West Harrison, Indiana. Our blending operation has grown from a single local account into single stores, regional and national chain restaurants with distribution coast to coast, plus some internationally. We also sell our coating systems to many processors, small and large, who in turn sell their value-added products to the restaurant industry, and grocery stores nationwide. The majority of our products (near 1,000) consist of flour which works to our distinct advantage as we also have our own flour mill which produces over 1,000,000 pounds a day. This makes our primary ingredient as fresh as possible and keeps our product costs down since no middlemen are involved. All of the other ingredients needed we source from our high-quality established suppliers, all of whom we have created valuable relationships with through the years. We currently package products in valve bags ranging from 25 lb through 50 lb, and also bulk sacks up to 2500 lb. For our retail clients we've also introduced Form Fill and Seal product ranging from pillow pouches to standup with integrated Inno-Lock feature. Logistically, our facilities are well positioned near I-75, I-71, I-70 and I-74, bringing one half of the US population reachable for “next day” deliveries. In this day of disrupted food chains in this country due to multiple issues, let it be known we are here offering you a fresh, competitively priced product to help you diversify your supply chain while getting quality products requiring minimal lead times with on time deliveries. We look forward to hearing from you to discuss some mutual blending opportunities.

Our signature products are a testament to our commitment to excellence. Each one has been carefully crafted to showcase the unique flavors and ingredients of Thai and Indonesian cuisine. Here are some of our most popular offerings: 1. Cooking sauces: We offer a variety of cooking sauces from Thailand, including Thai basil sauces, yellow curry, and green curry. Made with authentic ingredients, our cooking sauces are the perfect way to add a burst of flavor to your favorite dishes. 2. Dipping sauces: Our sweet and chili sauces are the perfect accompaniment to any meal. Made with high-quality ingredients, they are sure to add a burst of flavor to your favorite foods. 3. Ginger syrup: Our ginger syrup is a delicious and healthy way to add flavor to your drinks and desserts. Made with fresh Indonesian ginger, it is the perfect addition to everything from tea to ice cream. 4. Gem Gem chewy ginger candy: Our chewy ginger candy is made using real Indonesian ginger, which is kettle-cooked for three hours for each batch of candy. This process brings out the richer and more intense ginger flavor, resulting in a deliciously satisfying treat that is both sweet and spicy. 5. Melting Sweet hard candy: Our selection of hard candies includes a variety of sweet and savory flavors, from lychee and ginger to creamy coconut. Each one is made with the finest ingredients and is sure to satisfy even the most discerning palate. At Brothers Trading LLC, we are committed to delivering the highest level of quality in all of our products. From the selection of the finest ingredients to the careful crafting of each recipe, we take great care to ensure that every product we offer meets our exacting standards. We believe that our customers deserve nothing less than the best, and we work hard to exceed their expectations at every turn. If youre looking for unique and flavorful products that capture the essence of Thai and Indonesian cuisine, look no further than Brothers Trading LLC. Contact us today to learn more about our offerings and to place an order

Our dumplings are crafted using time-honored techniques with thoughtfully sourced proteins and vegetables, delivering restaurant-quality flavor with the convenience today’s consumers expect. Cali Dumpling operates a state-of-the-art production facility that supports wholesale, foodservice, and retail distribution. Our products can be found in grocery chains, specialty markets, and restaurants, as well as through strategic partnerships that bring high-quality dumplings into new and unexpected spaces. From freezer aisles to school lunch programs and workplace dining, we aim to make delicious, accessible Asian food a daily staple. Driven by innovation, cultural pride, and operational excellence, Cali Dumpling is building the next generation of Asian comfort food—bridging heritage and modernity, and bringing people together one dumpling at a time.

name: California Milk Advisory Board
description: The California Milk Advisory Board (CMAB), an instrumentality of the California Department of Food and Agriculture, is funded by the state's dairy families and is one of the largest agricultural marketing boards in the United States. With a mission to increase demand for products made with Real California Milk, the CMAB is celebrating over 50 years of promoting California's sustainable dairy products in the state, across the U.S. around the world through advertising, public relations, research, and retail and foodservice promotional programs. Stop by our booth and sample real California dairy from the following processors: Angelo Franco, Bellwether Farms, Dosa by Dosa, Double Rainbow, Lifeway, Marin French, Petit Pot, Point Reyes Farmstead Cheese, Super Store Industries, Sweet Craft Dolceria Wheyward Spirit.

name: California Umbrella
description: California Umbrella has been producing premium commercial patio and market umbrellas for 80 years. The products in our line perfectly deliver on their mission to offer robust framework with little to no moving parts and superior fabric performance under prolonged and never ending sun exposure conditions. We start by sourcing and utilized components that are heavier and more robust so that the framework withstands a year-round climate evolution while being handled by a large number of people. Then, we pull away all the moving parts like cranks and tilts, so that the Umbrella has no weak points that could be damaged by an unintended accident or weather event. Finally, we use unique frame materials developed in our own privately owned factory to build up commercial performance and exceed lifespan expectations.

name: CallMate LLC
description: CallMate is a U.S.-based provider of wireless communication solutions designed to improve restaurant operations across both front-of-house and back-of-house teams. Our systems help restaurants operate more efficiently, allowing them to do more with less while maintaining a high level of service. By streamlining internal communication, CallMate helps improve server efficiency, reduce response times, increase guest satisfaction, and support faster table turns. The system is intuitive, easy for staff to use, and helps teams stay focused on service instead of unnecessary trips or manual check-ins. Flexible and scalable, CallMate solutions can be adapted for restaurants of all sizes, from single locations to multi-unit operations. Our goal is simple: help restaurants improve performance, elevate the guest experience, and drive measurable gains in efficiency, sales, and revenue.

name: Camanchaca Inc.
description: Camanchaca is a vertically integrated, premium seafood company based in Chile, supplying fresh and frozen seafood products to customers around the world. With full control of its operations from origin through processing and distribution, Camanchaca ensures consistent quality, reliable supply, and complete traceability across its product portfolio. The company specializes in Atlantic salmon, Coho salmon, and steelhead trout, offering a wide range of formats including fresh and frozen fillets, portion-controlled programs, and custom specifications tailored to foodservice and retail needs. In addition to salmonids, Camanchaca provides a diversified portfolio that includes Chilean mussels, Argentine red shrimp, and other seafood products, as well as premium tuna and swordfish through its exclusive partnership with Frime of Spain. Camanchaca supports large-scale foodservice operators, retail programs, and global distribution networks by delivering consistent sizing, strong visual and taste quality, and scalable supply across multiple regions. Its vertically integrated model allows for greater control over production, improved pricing stability, and the ability to meet the evolving demands of multi-unit and international customers. With a focus on sustainability, innovation, and operational excellence, Camanchaca is committed to providing high-quality seafood solutions that integrate seamlessly into existing supply chains while supporting long-term growth for its partners.

name: CAMBRO Mfg. Co.
description: Cambro Manufacturing is based in Huntington Beach, California, USA, and is a leading manufacturer and supplier of equipment and supplies to the foodservice industry worldwide. Specializing in food safety and labor efficiency, Cambro has been serving front and back of the house operations since 1951, earning the trust and loyalty of generations of customers with innovative products designed to save space, time, resources and labor. With over 13,000 items offered by Cambro today, key product categories include Insulated Transport Equipment, Camshelving, Food Storage Containers and Pans, Merchandising Equipment, Trays, Tumblers, Pitchers, Healthcare Meal Delivery equipment and supplies and the Camrack Warewashing and Storage System. Cambro is dedicated to helping a variety of foodservice operators such as restaurants, hotels, caterers, hospitals, universities, military installations and schools support their food safety initiatives, enhance their sustainability efforts and streamline their operations. We pride ourselves on being an innovative, global company that provides cost-effective, long-term solutions and service to our valued customers. Every product we manufacture reflects the highest quality standards due to Cambro's commitment to extensive product research and development, the highest grade materials, and consistent manufacturing processes across all our manufacturing facilities in the United States, Germany, China and Turkey. For more information please visit www.cambro.com.

name: Cameo China Tableware
description: IMAGINE THE POSSIBILITIES. CAMEO PROVIDES THE SOLUTION. Cameo China, for over 25 years, continues to maintain a proud tradition of serving the global Foodservice Industry with innovative, award-winning commercial dinnerware. Cameo was the sole provider for dinnerware decorated exclusively for the Olympics in Beijing in 2008. This distinction is visible proof of the intense passion, creativity and innovation that is demonstrated by the excellence and distinctiveness of our products. The Beijing Olympics was a chance for China to showcase the best examples of their products to the world. Cameo was chosen based on their attention to detail and the superior quality of their products. Cameo craftsmanship is critical and integral part of the culinary inspiration of chefs around the world. Modern innovative products that can be mixed and matched allow the imagination to explore new and exciting presentations. Our goal of surpassing customers' expectations is an essential philosophy of Cameo and our participation in the discovery of unique formulas for success is an ongoing and rewarding achievement. Responsibility, honesty, respect, commitment, and dedication: these five guiding principles focus our attention on a model of business that looks to the future with a strength of vision and the wisdom to succeed. Cameo will never lose sight of their commitment to each and every loyal customer and partner that maintaining large inventory of products and ensuring those products are always of the highest quality is our job every day of every year. It is hard work, but we believe that it is critical to our success and a very important part of the way a credible and dedicated manufacturer should treat their customers. A fundamental belief in the honour of ethical and moral business practices keeps our customers' satisfaction as our highest priority. Since 1991 Cameo China has been recognized as a world-renowned manufacturer of affordable, versatile and durable commercial dinnerware of the highest quality. Cameo remains dedicated to offering every customer the excellent customer service they deserve, every day. We are here to serve you! Cameo China has the right solution to ensure that culinary creations worldwide receive the admiration they deserve. CAMEO IMAGINE THE POSSIBILITIES

name: Cangshan Cutlery Company
description: New Star Foodservice, the sister company of Cangshan, is a premier manufacturer of commercial kitchenware and supplies, leveraging expertise in efficient and adaptable manufacturing methods paired with an adept and professional support staff. We are innovators, designing new kitchenware and improving upon existing concepts to offer better solutions for every type of foodservice business. Our customers have confidence in our superior products and service, as we establish ourselves as an industry leader in quality and trust.

name: Cantrip
description: For adults who crave flavor, feeling, and a little everyday magic, Cantrip is the inspired hemp-derived THC beverage brand that makes life taste and feel a little better because every pour delivers connection, creativity, and calm without compromise, so you can hang out without the hangover.

name: Caoxian Smart Wooden Products Co., Ltd
description: Caoxian Smart Wooden Products Co., Ltd. was established in 2019, located in Cao Xian, Shandong, China, covers approximate 15000 square meters and has more than 100 employees. The company is professional manufacturer of wooden products with two production systems. One is for cutlery, such as wooden knives, forks and spoons; coffee stirrers; ice cream sticks and spoons; wooden sticks, etc. There are FSC & BRC & BSCI certifications for wooden cutlery. The other is for all kinds of wooden crafts, such as wooden boxes, wooden wall shelves, wooden cutting boards, wooden trays, etc. All wooden products are made of replanted forest wood to protect the environment. They are under highly quality inspection and are traceable, TWO YEARS QUALITY WARRANTY is guaranteed. In addition, all the products can be customized. The company has developed into a modern enterprise focus on scientific research, exploration, design, manufacture and marketing, service. We have established long-term and steady-going business relations with customers from North America, South America, EU, Mid-East, East Asia and so on. We put our customer first, provide the best quality product, outstanding customer service, and work at a competitive price. Warmly welcome you to establish cooperation with us. We are looking forward to forming successful business relationships with new clients around the world.

name: Caput Energy Ltd
description: Cap Energy helps multi-site restaurants stop guessing about energy and start making confident operational and investment decisions. We provide clean, appliance-level data across your sites, showing exactly where energy is being used and wasted. That allows operators to control staff behaviour, reduce waste, and typically save 10–20% on energy. But it goes further. Using real load data, we can accurately model the payback on major investments like solar, batteries, or equipment upgrades, giving you reliable multi-year ROI calculations. Instead of rough estimates, you get clear numbers for big decisions.

name: CareerPlug
description: CareerPlug was founded in 2007 in the heart of Austin, Texas by Clint Smith. He had a simple vision to make hiring easier for busy business leaders. Today we are the preferred partner to over 400 hundred franchise brands and member-based organizations, as well as over 60,000 business owners. Together, we are achieving our purpose of empowering teams to grow by making it easier for managers to hire and retain the right people. Our software is easy-to-use and built for busy owners and managers who are not HR professionals but still need to hire and retain their teams. CareerPlug has a proven playbook that has helped our clients build a winning culture, hire faster, and retain great people. In addition to innovative tools that streamline and automate time-consuming HR tasks, we offer exceptional client support to help you hire, grow, and retain your team.

name: Cargo Crew
description: Cargo Crew is the global destination for uniforms. Founded in Melbourne in 2002, CargoCrew began as a simple idea - to create uniforms people actually want to wear. It has since grown from a small family into globally recognised brand, proudly worn by over 80,000 crews in 90 countries. Cargo Crew believes everyone should feel confident and comfortable at work. Through listening to the evolving needs of the modern workforce, they’re continually innovating to deliver high-performing uniform solutions, designed with purpose and made with a conscious commitment to sustainable practices.

name: Carma Bio Products
description: We ” CARMA INDUSTRIES” were Established in the year 2014 and Located in Morbi Gujarat, India. We have two main companies (1) Carma Paper cup and (2) Carma Bio products We manufacture of the best quality disposable paper cups, Salad Bowl, Pizza Boxes, food boxes, and paper bowls. We are also manufacturing bagasse products like round plates, clamshells and 3cp,5cp, and 9cp plates. We have a 12zo bowl as well. We have a complete range of disposable paper products and give the best facility to our clients starting from designing to delivering the product, We believe in the quality and service of our products. We are listed as a well-satisfied client in PAN India because of quality, service and a broad range of products. Currently, we export our products to the UAE, USA, UK, Canada, Ireland, and many more.

name: Carpigiani, a Welbilt Company
description: Carpigiani North America is a leading provider of gelato and ice cream machines, with a strong presence in the North American market. As a subsidiary of the renowned Italian company based near Bologna, Carpigiani specializes in manufacturing both machines for crafting authentic Italian artisan gelato and those designed for producing soft serve gelato and ice cream. With a significant share of the global market, Carpigiani North America plays a key role in delivering high-quality equipment to support the frozen dessert industry across the region.

name: Carrying International Food Corp.
description: Founded in 2016, Carrying International Food (CIF) is committed to bringing the Red Sun brand to the global stage, sharing the rich culture of pearl milk tea with the world. As a leading supplier of bubble tea ingredients and equipment, we specialize in concentrated syrups, instant powders, tapioca pearls, and all the essential tools of the industry. With over 20 years of trusted sales experience on the U.S. West Coast, Red Sun has become synonymous with quality innovation in the bubble tea market.

name: Casa Sabor LLC
description: Casa Sabor LLC offers custom culinary solutions for Foodservice and Retail customers across the nation, featuring a variety of entrees, sides, appetizers, sauces, soups and seasoned proteins. Specializing in authentic Latin cuisine, we honor traditional flavors and techniques. Yet, our expertise spans diverse international cuisines, that make them truly exceptional. Offering an array of ready-to-heat, ready-to-cook, and ready-to-serve products, we help streamline kitchen operations, allowing you to focus on serving your customers. As your reliable culinary partner, we are committed to providing cost-effective solutions that prioritize convenience, consistency, and exceptional quality, all while enhancing your customers' dining experience.

name: Cash Cow
description: CashCow is a full-service cash automation solution designed to help retailers, concessionaires, and event operators streamline their operations. By combining cash acceptance, cash recycling, and change dispensing into one system, CashCow eliminates the need for a traditional cashier. With its cash management features, CashCow securely handles bills and coins, reducing shrinkage and errors while improving accountability. Its cashier replacement capabilities allow businesses to significantly cut labor costs, especially in high-volume environments like fairs, stadiums, and quick-service locations. For a flat monthly cost, operators gain a reliable, automated alternative to human cashiers, driving efficiency, lowering expenses, and ensuring a seamless customer experience.

name: Cassida USA
description: Cassida USA manufactures a complete line of money handling equipment. Our wide selection of paper and coin currency counters, sorters and counterfeit detectors provide flexible business solutions for today's cash handling environment. Cassida's comprehensive product portfolio offers a variety of solutions for businesses of all sizes, from desktop machines for low cash volume operations to heavy-duty, state-of-the-art counters for cash-intensive environments like banks and casinos. Cassida Pro, a subsidiary of Cassida, was developed to help solve real-world needs. By working directly with tellers, cashiers, and cash room employees, Cassida Pro has been able to develop leading-edge, intuitive, cash handling solutions with the mission of improving efficiency, streamlining process, and improving accuracy in the cash room. We are continually developing and improving products via our US-based product development team so that we can bring our customers the latest advances in cash room management technology.

name: Catalonia Plates
description: Catalonia Plates / Pordamsa USA is an official distributor of Pordamsa Tableware in North America. Pordamsa enjoys over 45 years of impeccable experience in artistic service to haute cuisine. World's best restaurants count themselves among their loyal customers. Inspired by nature, its shapes, textures... Pordamsa creates unique tableware and gastronomic accessories for chefs who are committed to telling a story with each dish.

name: Caviar Polanco USA
description: Sustainable Sturgeon caviar Farm cetified by CITES Unites Nations. Our Caviar Polanco (ITQI 3 stars Superior Taste Award) 100% Russian genetics is exceptionally harvested in the Rio Negro Uruguay. We are worldwide recognized as high quality caviar producer and one of the very few farms globally capable to grow sturgeons directly in a natural habitat. We have all legal permits and registrations to commercialize it in USA (CITES, FDA, HACCP) and we also already export to other counties like Russia, Japan, UK, Brazil, France, Mexico, Singapore among others. We count in our clientele hundreds of gourmet stores, hotels, cruise lines and restaurants including several Michelin stars and 5 Diamond AAA awarded ones. We have commercial offices and re-packing facility in USA and looking for Distributors and Brokers in USA

name: Cawley Company
description: Introducing the world one name badge at a time: Cawley Company can supply you with our large selection of name badges/accessories, lapel pins, small indoor signage, plaques, awards and personalization equipment. Check out our virtual catalog - https://online.flippingbook.com/view/354161417/

name: Caye Technology (Suzhou) Co., Ltd.
description: CAYE Technology is the first company in China to specialize in fully automatic coffee machines built on afully self-developed high-efficiency brewing system. Headquartered in Suzhou Industrial Park, CAYEintegrates R&D, manufacturing, and sales to deliver advanced coffee equipment solutions. Adhering to the vision of “better technologies for better coffee moments”, CAYE Technology focuses onunderlying innovation in core technologies. Dedicated to independent intellectual property rights, thecompany keeps optimizing its global strategic layout of patents. As of the end of 2025, the company has filed nearly 300 patents, with invention patents accounting forover 40%. With a technology transfer rate exceeding 70%, CAYE continues to lead the industry intechnological innovation.

name: CDN
description: CDN manufactures a wide range of precision thermometers, timers and scales. Founded in 1984, CDN is recognized as a global category leader in measurement tools. CDN products are used in thousands of commercial locations worldwide. Restaurants, including independents and chains, schools, healthcare facilities and industrial sites depend on CDN products for accuracy, speed and quality for reliable results. As a family- and woman-owned business, CDN is committed to quality, product innovation and superior customer service.

name: Cedar Electronics
description: Cedar Electronics is a leading electronics firm known for its Cobra brand and has a history of over 60 years connecting people on the move. With a steadfast commitment to innovation and quality, Cobra’s business two-way radio communication solutions provide businesses with immediate, essential communication for teams. Cobra business radios are empowering communications at retail, dining, hospitality, events and much more.

name: Ceilume
description: Ceilume is the leading producer of thermoformed decorative ceiling tiles and panels for restaurants and hotels. Our products have been used around the world for more than 50 years, and our research and development continues to improve interior finish systems to meet changing environmental, performance, and aesthetic needs.

name: Celsius Holdings
description: Celsius Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CELH) is a functional beverage company and the owner of energy drink brand CELSIUS , hydration brand CELSIUS HYDRATION TM , health and wellness brand Alani Nu and Rockstar Energy . Born in fitness and pioneering the rapidly growing, better-for-you, functional beverage category, the company creates and markets leading functional beverage products. For more information, please visit www.celsiusholdingsinc.com .

name: Celtrade
description: Celtrade is your condiments and sauce resource for all your foodservice needs. We pride ourselves on delivering exquisite culinary experiences. Our team of chefs, culinary experts, procurement specialists and manufacturing professionals create an array of products which are globally sourced and authentically created. Using only the highest quality ingredients we are known for creativity, innovation and exceptional taste. We deliver real recipes, using real ingredients.

name: CenSea
description: CenSea®, a family-owned seafood company for the past 60 years, is one of the largest importers of frozen seafood in the United States. From its corporate offices in Northbrook, Illinois, the company markets a variety of quality seafood items from nearly 25 countries to a diverse array of customers including restaurant chains, foodservice distributors, retailers, and wholesalers. Our two main brands, CenSea® and A-PAC®, are known to retail and commercial buyers throughout the United States. CenSea has specialists in every area of the seafood industry ready to move products from all over the world to our customers’ doors.

name: CertiStar, Inc.
description: Innovative menu platform helping restaurants provide better, easier, and safer dining experiences for food allergic guests.

name: CFS Brands
description: We've unified our collection of incredible brands under the CFS Brands name toward our goal of becoming THE single source you turn to for all your foodservice, healthcare, and hygiene solutions. This means hundreds of innovative products and solutions that feature enhanced design, intuitive integration, and increased value to help you meet today's challenges and realize a whole new level of success. This strategic refresh will be the catalyst for many exciting new initiatives here at CFS Brands, which will be rolling out over the months to come. Meanwhile, continue convenient online ordering at carlislefsp.com and sanjamar.com or directly from your CFS Brands representative. Please join us in celebrating the new CFS Brands as we move forward and make good on our new brand promise: Designing Value. Delivering Success.

name: Chain Store Guide
description: Chain Store Guide (CSG) has been the leading provider of comprehensive retail and foodservice intelligence to businesses around the world. CSG details all major chains as-well-as high-performance single unit stores in the United States and Canada with contact information, including email addresses, social media handles and direct dial numbers, for hundreds of thousands of key decision makers. Our data is reviewed and confirmed by our experienced team of industry experts. While some companies simply scrape data from the internet without verification, our researchers validate every company profiled. These updates are confirmed and authenticated regularly to ensure that the data is accurate and current. CSG provides data in an online portal, customized databases, and prints directories. Our clients consist of manufacturers, suppliers, service providers, brokers, real estate professionals, restaurants, analysts, consultants and other professionals seeking to gain insight into retail and foodservice markets in the U.S. and Canada. In addition, CSG tracks over 700,000 geocoded retail and foodservice locations, providing updates for openings and closings, historical snapshots spanning over 10 years, and mappings of the locations closed both temporary & permanent due to the pandemic.

name: Champion Industries, a Welbilt Company
description: Over 130 years of experience in the commercial dishwasher business has earned Champion the reputation of The Dishwashing Machine Specialist. Headquarted in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, Champion remains devoted to excellence - in products, manufacturing, sales and service. Champion has ENERGY STAR qualified dish machines in all categories. Over the last century, we've perfected every single application and installation requirement for dishwashers... undercounters, doors, racks, flights, conveyor systems, accumulators, disposal, drying of trays... you name it and we've provided the most efficient solution. From the smallest glasswasher to the most complex flight machine capable of efficiently cleaning and sanitizing 20,000 wares per hour, it pays to work with Champion. Champion Industries and Bi-line Conveyor Systems combine to provide a truly integrated approach to warewashing, ware handling and waste reduction solutions. Whether you need a large capacity flight-type dishwasher or a compact undercounter dishwasher, Champion can engineer a complete dish handling solution to meet all your needs.

name: Changde Green Planet Paper Technology Co., Ltd
description: Green Planet Paper, established in 2011, is a leading OEM manufacturer and exporter of tissue paper products. For over 13 years, we have been dedicated to providing reliable and sustainable tissue solutions to customers worldwide. With established factories in China and Thailand, we serve a global clientele, including the USA, Australia, Canada, New Zealand, France, the UK and many more. Based on the strong foundation we have built on advanced manufacturing equipment and production efficiency management, we offer a diverse range of tissue products, including paper towels, paper napkins, facial tissues, toilet paper, kitchen towels, etc. Our products are available in various sizes and designs for both household and commercial use, and can be tailored to meet the specific needs and brand requirements of our customers worldwide. At Green Planet Paper, we pride ourselves on our strict daily quality control procedures, ensuring not only timely and reliable delivery to clients but also minimizing environmental impact. Our mission is to provide our clients with the best tissue paper products meeting their needs while fostering long-term relationships based on trust and mutual growth.

name: Changzhou Runxiang Plastic Products Co., Ltd
description: Changzhou Runxiang Plastic Products Co., Ltd. was established in 2006, with a factory located near Shanghai. We specialize in the research and development, production, and sales of disposable plastic tablecloths, plastic plates, and cups. We have a modern 15000 square meter factory and a professional team of over 150 people, providing a full process service system. We have equipped 6 casting machines in the tablecloth roll film workshop to process plastic particles into tablecloth rolls film; There are 2 professional equipment in the printing workshop that support multi-color printing of tablecloths. We also supports customized sampling, and sample delivery allows customers to visually verify the effect. The Tablecloth Slitting Workshop completes tablecloth rolls film slitting and folding through fully automatic equipment. It can provide customized packaging bags and outer cartons as required, and supports brand-exclusive packaging design. The Tablecloth Roll Slitting Workshop can cut rolls into different lengths and sizes according to needs, with synchronized customized packaging services. The Injection Molding Workshop is equipped with 15 injection molding machines and hundreds of sets of molds. It mass-produces popular plastic tableware and can also customize exclusive molds and products based on product drawings. We have a large warehouse of 7000 square meters, and we have hundreds of colors and styles of ready-made products that can be shipped quickly without the need for customers to wait.we have a service team of 30 people who can provide you with customized personalized service solutions. In terms of logistics, we support sea, land, and air transportation, and arrange shipments on time according to customer needs. We supply globally and our products are exported to regions such as North America, Europe, Australia, and the Middle Eastern countries. We have experience in collaborating with large supermarkets and online e-commerce platforms, successfully delivering orders to nearly a hundred large supermarkets. Our cooperative clients are very satisfied with our quality and continue to reach future cooperation with us. Looking forward to your joining.

name: Chaozhou Xiangfa Kitchen Equipment Co., Ltd.
description: XiangFa always adheres to the principles of “quality development and fighting for the trust of dealers and consumers”. The company has sophisticated technology to produce first-class quality products. With the pursuit of excellence, down to earth approach, continuous advancement, the company is gaining market positions in the world.

name: Charcutnuvo
description: We are artisanal, small batch, European style sausage makers. We partner with growers that ethically raise animals on sustainable farms without the use of antibiotics and hormones. We strongly adhere to the belief that animals should be able to live as naturally as possible, which is why we only source Grass-Fed and Grass Finished Beef, and we proudly support ranchers focused on regenerative agriculture. We never use artificial ingredients, chemicals, or unnecessary fillers such as sugars. Our products are considered the purest on the market and are all free from nitrates and nitrites. Artisanal, delicious, versatile, portion controlled, fully cooked protein like this is rare. Made in Denver since 1969, always small batch, guaranteed and delicious

name: Chaucer Foods Inc.
description: Chaucer Foods - Premium Freeze-Dried Ingredients for Foodservice & Beverage At Chaucer Foods, we are passionate about delivering high-quality freeze-dried ingredients that enhance your foodservice and beverage applications. Our premium fruits, vegetables, and powders offer exceptional taste, texture, and nutrition - perfect for chefs, mixologists, and food manufacturers looking to create standout menu items. Our freeze-drying process locks in natural flavors, colors, and nutrients while providing a long shelf life and convenient, lightweight format. From vibrant fruit inclusions for beverages and desserts to savory vegetable blends for soups, sauces, and meal kits, our ingredients help elevate culinary creativity with clean-label, on-trend solutions. Visit us at Booth 11758 at the Lakeside Center to discover how Chaucer Foods can help you craft delicious, innovative offerings with the power of freeze-dried ingredients.

name: CheckThisOut.io
description: Check This Out's advanced, mobile messaging platform fills seats for restaurants. Our sales engine is the fastest, most effective, and cost efficient way to acquire new customers and get existing customers to return more often. Check This Out MMS/SMS campaigns, with a 98% open rate within 3 minutes, allow restaurants to announce specials, events, update hours, etc. to their existing customers. Customers click on a link to make a reservation or order online and our clients track all click throughs/conversions through their Check This Out dashboard. Similarly, Check This Out's word-of-mouth customer acquisition engine is unparalleled in the restaurant industry for its effectiveness in acquiring new customers for our clients. It integrates seamlessly into the campaign module and lets restaurants harness and accelerate word-of-mouth by allowing their customers to refer friends through texted discounts. We do all of this to help good people with great ideas thrive in the restaurant business and be a force for good in their communities.

name: Chef FLO-K Foods
description: Afric Sauce is a premium African traditional sauce and stew base that brings bold, authentic flavors from across the African continent to modern kitchens and foodservice. Rooted in rich culinary traditions, the brand transforms traditional spices and recipes into versatile, ready-to-use sauce designed for both home cooks and professional chefs. Founded by Florence Karp. Afric Sauce is more than just a product It’s a cultural experience. Each sauce is crafted to deliver depth, heat, and complexity while remaining approachable, making it easy to elevate everyday meals like chicken, seafood, vegetables, and grains. Positioned for both retail and wholesale markets, Afric Sauce stands out for its unique flavor profiles, natural ingredients, and strong storytelling. The brand represents a bridge between heritage and innovation, introducing global consumers to the richness of African cuisine in a convenient, high-quality format. In short: Afric Sauce is where authentic African flavor meets modern convenience. Crafted to inspire, elevate, and differentiate every dish.

name: Chef Works Inc
description: At Chef Works | Bragard, were more than just a brand; were the heartbeat of the culinary world, providing chefs, restaurants, and enterprise customers worldwide with workwear and apparel that defines their brand, elevates their culinary journey, and creates a sense of belonging across international properties. We take pride in knowing were the worlds largest and most trusted culinary apparel provider. Chef Works continues to lead because we never rest. Much like our namesake, we work hard to ensure the worlds dedicated culinarians have a product built to last. In 2021, Chef Works acquired Bragard, the most iconic European culinary brand. Steeped in tradition, Bragard set the standard in luxury culinary uniforms for almost a century. By combining Bragard craftsmanship with Chef Works cutting-edge design and technology, we now proudly offer the industrys most comprehensive culinary and workwear catalog. Dont let our name fool you. Chef Works | Bragard facilitates workwear for multiple industries. We curate programs that meet your needs, from hotel concierge to assisted living, and everything in between. The Chef Works | Bragard family of brands are your partners, ensuring your look is consistent across multiple locations, all done with the ease and confidence of knowing your uniform needs are taken care of by the best in the business. Whether it is embellishment, alterations to existing products, or complete custom design, Chef Works | Bragard is here to service your brands needs. Our in-house designers and style teams can curate your complete uniform needs by pulling from our robust catalog of goods, adding trims or distinct features that meet your brands color profile, and creating elements from scratch to set your brands uniforms apart from the competition. At Chef Works, we believe in nurturing the planet we call home as much as the culinary world. From sustainable apparel production to complete overhauls of our internal practices, we dont just seek the most significant impact; we look for every opportunity to reduce our impact. Our global mission includes responsible manufacturing that reduces our need for precious resources and minimizes our effect on the world around us.

name: CHEFCO KITCHEN & RESTAURANT SUPPLIES INC
description: Sub-equip has its beginnings in 2018 when a group of passionate individuals in the restaurant and foodservice industry wanted to dedicate a space to help restauranteurs and foodservice businesses access restaurant quality smallwares and equipment. With an expanding online presence, Sub-equip is a restaurant and kitchen supplier that delivers an expansive line of products from front of house operations all the way to janitorial products. Our product line and offerings is continuously being curated and manufactured to meet client demands and the high standards of the food industry. We are committed to offering reliable and high-quality products.

name: Chefeon Inc.
description: A cooking robot company, Chefeon Inc. designs, manufactures and sells robotic solutions for food service. Combining modern automation, cloud computing, AI and nutrition science, Chefeon systems free people of their daily labor in cooking while providing gourmet and healthy food. Chefeon systems are fully automated cooking machines, including auto heating, auto ingredients-adding, auto stirring, auto flavoring, auto dishing, auto wok-cleansing, auto cooking-fume processing. The XA400 series have a capacity of between 200gram to 3kg per wok in just two to four minutes, while achieving master chef quality, ideal for restaurants of various kinds. The GA400 series are bigger and have a capacity of 6kg per wok, good for cafeterias and the likes. name: ConnectedFresh
description: QSR | FSR | Video | Book Time At Show Are you still taking manual temperature logs ? Would you like to fully automate cool down logs ? Is your refrigerator pulling too much energy , indicating a larger problem? See how much you can save. About ConnectedFresh: ConnectedFresh provides hospitality customers with end-to-end smart sensor monitoring solutions. Our use cases include automated temperature monitoring for coolers and other equipment (both stationary and in-transit), energy management, leak detection, and more. Key Features: • Real-Time Monitoring: Utilize multiple sensor types to monitor temperature, humidity, energy consumption, door activity, leaks, and more. • Automated Temperature Monitoring: Ensure your coolers and equipment maintain optimal conditions, preventing spoilage and ensuring safety. • Automated Cool Down Logs: Ensure compliance with health regulations and streamline record-keeping with our fully automated cool down logs solution. • Energy Management: Track and optimize energy usage to reduce costs and improve efficiency. • Leak Detection: Early detection of leaks to prevent water damage and loss. • Seamless Integrations: Integrate effortlessly with systems like Ecotrak and CMX1, automating work order creation based on issue severity. • Preventative Maintenance: Identifying issues and alerting the right team member at the right time to fix problems before they escalate. • Fully Automated Cool Down Logs: Streamline your operations with automated cool down logs, ensuring compliance and saving time. • Scalability: Built to scale easily across many locations, leveraging our partnership with AWS. • LoRaWAN Technology: Wireless sensors that last years on a single charge. • Managed Service: Pre-configured, ready-to-go systems requiring no technical expertise to implement or operate. Notification System: Our robust notification system drives users to the ConnectedFresh dashboards for deeper insights, utilizing multiple channels such as email, SMS, automated calls, and Slack, tailored to the severity of the issues.
