name: Cooler Keg
description: The Cooler Keg is a portable kegerator built into a stainless steel cooler allowing you to serve anything on draft without electricity. Cold, hot, still, carbonated - drink options are endless. It's great for upselling and batching cocktails and speeds up serving during the rush. It's also a perfect fit for events with limited electricity (e.g., a pop-up bar on the beach or mobile serving stations during an event). The Cooler Keg is also a great addition to rental businesses for parties, weddings, tailgates, and more. Large events at facilities like conference centers, golf courses, amusement parks, or stadiums? Check out our Ottobot Brew autonomous delivery robot. It's a unique way to serve drinks that also offers digital display marketing.

name: Coolmes Commercial Kitchen Equipment Mfg Co., Ltd
description: Coolmes Meichu was established in 2001. The group covers an area of more than 400,000 square meters and has more than 2,000 employees; Meichu Group has Guangzhou production base and Binzhou production base. Meichu Group has seven divisions: steaming cabinet division, disinfection cabinet division, refrigeration division, food machinery division, baking division, showcase division, and dishwasher division. It is a modern kitchen equipment industry group. Meichu Group is a leading enterprise in China’s commercial kitchenware field. Meichu possesses strong independent R&D capabilities and internationally advanced production equipment. Its products, characterized by high quality and diverse variety, have earned the trust and support of a wide range of users. The group has branches in Indonesia, Russia, Thailand, Vietnam, and the UAE. Meichu products are exported to over sixty countries and have received recognition and praise from experts and industry peers at various exhibitions.

name: COPAMEX EMPAQUE DIVISION BOLSAS DE PAPEL
Cora Italian Specialties
description: At Cora, our family has been a reliable source in café equipment and supplies since 1960 when Peter Cora opened the doors to the first coffee house in Chicago. It wasn't long until people would come to know Peter as the coffee connoisseur and he would advise them on their coffee inspired endeavors for years to come. Today, on the third generation, the Cora family has expanded our offerings beyond the great Italian tradition of coffee and into the world of gelato, pasta, pizza and more! Our client base includes cafés, gelaterias, restaurants, world-renowned chefs, caterers, hospitality centers, home users and more. With over eleven hundred items in our 15,000 square foot warehouse, we can be sure to satisfy a wide range of needs.

name: Corporate Chaplains Of America
description: When your employees are going through tough times in their personal lives, they need support. LEAPCare provides multiple ways for confidential and accessible care for your team. IN-PERSON VISITS CREATE A REGULAR ENVIRONMENT OF EMPLOYEE CARE AT YOUR SITE. On-site visits are available at a frequency that optimizes care and meets the needs of your employees. Invest in your employees by providing confidential, whole-person care, and watch how the positive effects shine through the entire company. Contact us today to take the first step towards creating a culture of care for your team.

name: Corradi USA
description: Corradi is an innovative outdoor shading manufacturer located in Dallas, Texas. Our comprehensive line of shading products exemplify European design, functionality, and exceptional weather protection, transforming any outdoor patio into a living space to be enjoyed all year round. Shading solutions offered include pergolas, louvered roofs, solar screens, awnings, shade sails and our industry leading collection of fabrics.

name: Costa Nova
description: COSTA NOVA is a Portuguese brand dedicated to designing and manufacturing high-quality tableware and accessories made of fine stoneware. Using the best natural resources in Portugal, COSTA NOVA are committed to the highest quality, service and design standards showcasing elegant, timeless and simultaneously trendy collections that reflect the European heritage in ceramics and celebrate all that is irresistibly Mediterranean: the love of enjoying life, family, friends and good food on the table.

name: CP Foods USA
description: Your number one choice for the highest-quality shrimp, shrimp products, and ready-made Asian-style food products. C.P. Foods Products, Inc.is a fully owned subsidiary of Charoen Pokphand Foods (CPF) Group. Charoen Pokphand Foods Public Company Limited is the leading agro-industrial and food conglomerate in the Asia Pacific region. Who We Are Quality food products that you can count on Our Commitment As part of Charoen Pokphand Foods (CPF) we are fully committed to producing food products that achieve sustainable growth in an environmentally responsible manner. ​We aim to be ‘The Kitchen of the World’ by supplying high quality, sustainable and ethically sourced ingredients and finished products to our customers. ​CPF was selected to join Dow Jones Sustainability Index (Emerging Markets) 2015, reflecting a strong commitment to sustainable business practices. Since 2013, CPF has implemented a CSR and sustainability strategy based on the 3 pillars: (1) Food Security (2) Self-sufficient Society (3) Balance of Nature ​These pillars exist in order to drive growth, excellence, and strong results. This sustainability strategy also reflects the Company’s 3 Benefits Principle: to benefit the countries where we operate, our staff, and our Company. ​To find out more about CPF’s general sustainability policies please visit www.cpfworldwide.com | https://www.cpfworldwide.com/en/home

name: Crafted Cocktails
description: Crafted Cocktails is a national brand specializing in premium syrups, shrubs, mixers, and condiments designed to elevate every cocktail experience. For 2026, we proudly introduce our newest innovation — Prickly Pear Syrup — a vibrant, fruit-forward addition crafted to meet the growing demand for bold, visually striking flavors in modern mixology. With its naturally bright hue and perfectly balanced sweet-tart profile, Prickly Pear Syrup enhances margaritas, spritzes, mocktails, and creative bar programs alike. Building on our reputation for quality and innovation, Crafted Cocktails continues to develop products that complement evolving beverage trends while maintaining our commitment to natural ingredients and exceptional flavor. Through strategic partnerships with leading national distributors, our portfolio remains easily accessible to both home enthusiasts and professional bartenders nationwide. Known for innovation, versatility, and premium craftsmanship, Crafted Cocktails delivers exceptional flavors designed to inspire creativity behind the bar and in the kitchen.

name: Craster Ltd.
description: A market-leading designer of beautifully-crafted products for dining, conferencing and display, Craster has been supplying the luxury hospitality and retail industries with intelligently-designed solutions since 1992. Craster provides a creative platform that empowers buyers of premium Hotel, Retail and Restaurant groups to curate brand-differentiating, unique spaces and guest experiences while redefining day-to-day operations with products that are discreet, flexible and respond to their dynamic requirements. Bringing together exceptional design and manufacturing talent, Craster offers a complete product development solution from inception to delivery. Quality underpins everything, which is why Craster products are crafted by expert makers and manufacturers in the UK, Europe and the Far East. A global network of distribution partners are handpicked to ensure excellent expanded services. Craster is a preferred supplier to many of the worlds 5 star hospitality venues including Four Seasons, Ritz Carlton, ACCOR, Hyatt, IHG, Kempinski and Equinox hotel groups and Google, Goldman Sachs, JP Morgan and LinkedIn contract hospitality sites. Craster is also a long-time supplier to The Royal Household.

name: Creative Tops
description: Duralex - In 1945, France was being rebuilt and was full of dynamism. Every company was working on its innovations. Christian Dior shortened skirts and created the New Look, and the Saint-Gobain institution began using tempered glass for your tables: a brand new process that makes glass unbreakable. To support this discovery, which marked a new era in the history of tableware, it created the DURALEX brand. A few decades later, its famous glasses have become true benchmarks! All Duralex products are made in France and their material is sustainable. They have become timeless design icons, designed to be functional and attractive.

name: CreatoRain
description: CreatoRain is an AI-powered video marketing platform built specifically for multi-location restaurant brands. We help restaurant chains drive foot traffic, online orders, and brand awareness by producing high-performing short-form promotional videos at scale using vetted local content creators across U.S. cities. Unlike traditional agencies or in-house teams, CreatoRain combines AI-driven creative strategy, localized creator matching, and performance optimization to deliver consistent, conversion-focused social media content for TikTok, Instagram, and other digital channels. Our platform enables restaurant operators to launch city-by-city campaigns quickly while maintaining brand consistency across locations. CreatoRain currently serves 100+ restaurant brands and produces 300+ videos per month, helping operators reduce customer acquisition costs and improve social engagement without increasing internal marketing headcount. Our solutions are designed for growing and enterprise restaurant chains seeking measurable ROI from digital marketing. At the National Restaurant Association Show, we are showcasing how restaurant operators can use CreatoRain to scale local marketing, support new store openings, and drive repeat visits through authentic, creator-led video content.

name: Crisp
description: Crisp delivers true AI outcomes from retail, turning complex commerce data into clear actions that drive sales, profit, and cash by using AI to deliver on outcomes - not just insights. The leading vertical AI retail data company for both retailers and consumer brands, Crisp connects with retailer data sources for a reliable, daily flow of insights, enabling actions down to the SKU- and store-level, reducing inefficiencies and identifying opportunities to optimize sales and the supply chain. With Crisp, all teams have the insights they need to make faster, smarter decisions. Organizations receive end-to-end support in optimizing their space and category management, demand forecasting, order automation, and agentic commerce workflows. Trusted by over 7000 leading brands, representing more than $2.5T in retail sales across over 250K stores, Crisp transforms data into a competitive advantage. Learn more about Crisp and our approach to collaborative commerce and foodservice at gocrisp.com .

name: Cristel USA
description: INNOVATIVE COOKWARE DESIGNED FOR PERFORMANCE AND FUNCTIONALITY. Cristel is a French manufacturer and seller of premium stainless steel cookware and the innovator of the detachable handle cookware concept as well as fixed handle collections made with the food service in mind. MANUFACTURER SINCE 1826 GUARANTEED MADE IN FRANCE All Cristel products are made in our factory in Burgundy, France, which is accredited by the Origine France Guarantee Label. This allows us to have a strict control of the whole manufacturing process and to ensure that we only produce the best quality of cookware. THE CONTINUATION OF EXCELLENCE CRISTEL develops a policy and strategy based on clearly defined and respected values that make it a great reference in the world of culinary arts and tableware. Our values: French manufacture is integrated in more than 90% of products sold under the brand CRISTEL labeled "Origine France Garantie". A remarkable environmental policy which has consistently been ahead of, and even anticipated administrative regulations. The best working conditions with the best possible tools for our employees. EXCELISS+ UNIQUE NON-CTICK COATING Advantages of the Exceliss non-stick coating by CRISTEL: Safe without PFOA and PFOS Applied and Made in France Powerful on all hobs Ecological and eco-friendly Ultra-resistant

name: Crocs
description: Work shoes from Crocs™ are designed with comfort, style, and functionality in mind. Built for your job with the comfort of our proprietary Croslite™ material, Crocs™ comfortable and supportive shoes for work will help you and your feet get through those long hour shifts. From work clogs to flats, Crocs™ work shoes come with our Crocs Lock™ technology that increases slip resistance for those slippery surfaces in the restaurant or hospital environments. With just a little soap and water, you can easily clean your work shoes. They are also odor resistant for those messy situations. Whether you’re a bartender, waiter, chef, or host, these shoes are comfortable and stylish enough to weather the toughest of shifts!​

name: Cross Reach Inc.
description: Cross Reach Inc. is a leading Japanese matcha company, specializing in the sourcing and export of premium matcha. We proudly present Kagura Matcha, our original matcha brand that bridges Japanese tradition with modern life, delivering pure, sustainable tea that brings harmony and serenity to every cup. Our matcha is produced across certified lines including FSSC22000, Organic, and Halal, allowing us to meet diverse product requirements and applications for food and beverage brands worldwide.

name: Crow Works
description: Crow Works products are made in the USA. We are a commercial furniture manufacturer with over 30 years of experience crafting durable, design-forward furnishings from solid hardwoods. Based in Ohio, we specialize in producing high-quality tables, seating, booths, and millwork for high-traffic environments. Our clients include national and regional restaurant brands, hospitality groups, retail concepts, and corporate environments, with products specified and purchased by designers, architects, procurement teams, franchise operators, and facilities leaders seeking dependable lead times and long-term performance. From custom design and prototyping to value engineering and production, Crow Works partners closely with clients to deliver furniture solutions that support brand consistency, operational efficiency, and lasting durability. Discover more about our work and capabilities at www.crowworks.com.

name: Crown Decor
description: Tabillo, a partof Crown Decor, the flagship Royale Touch Laminates , is a $100 mn company with over 45 years of experience, we are the pioneers and largest manufacturer and exporter ofHighPressure Laminates (Interior and Exterior) from India. Our factory located atAhmedabad , has a production capacity of 20 million sq. mtrs per annum , produces a wide array of products for varied applications like - Table Tops for indoor, outdoor and kitchen HPL Compacts for Toilet Cubicles, Lockers and Outdoor Furniture Compact Sheets for exterior applications like facades, fences, pergolas, gates and many more.... HPL Deck for outdoor applications Decorative Laminate Sheets (over 700 colors and 100 finishes) We have an exclusive range of HPL(High Pressure Laminate) Sheets and Table tops which is branded as "TABILLO" which is adorned with versatile features, like Scratch Resistant, Graffiti Resistant, Flame Retardant, Anti-Bacterial, Anti-Microbial, Solvent Resistant, Impact Resistant, have optimal light fastness and are Easy to Clean Install. Further, with exports tomore than 60 countriesaround the globe, we serve all the major marketslikeEurope, USA, UK,Australia, Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia, Africa and Middle Eastand haveestablished credentials for our table tops since years.We also have ourwarehouse in Singapore, Netherlandsand Poland (UK, USA, FRANCE opening soon) to facilitate the shipments and smaller requirements.

name: Crunchtime
description: Crunchtime helps multi-unit restaurants operate every location like their best one. Trusted by 850+ brands across 150,000+ locations worldwide, Crunchtime connects the full operations management lifecycle across inventory management, labor and scheduling, kitchen management, and operations execution, in the industry's only complete, AI-powered suite. Top operators, including Jersey Mike's, Five Guys, Smoothie King, Wingstop, and Chili's, rely on Crunchtime to achieve profitability and deliver great guest experiences every day in every store. To learn more, visit Crunchtime.com .

name: CS Group
description: CS Group is an innovative beverage manufacturer with a diverse portfolio of beverage brands. We focus on innovation, quality, and product efficacy to create unique beverage brands that are timely and on-trend. We utilize high quality ingredients and natural flavors to create beverages that consumers are asking for. CS Group's brands, Cool Attitudes Craft Mixers and Citrus Springs Juices, are featured in over 50,000 restaurants, hotels, casinos, nightclubs, universities, and vacation venues around the US and are available through an elite network of distributors including PepsiCo, SYSCO, US Foods, PFG, and more.

name: CT Bakery
description: We are a global thaw-and-serve Artisanal Bakery specializing in donuts and sweet breads. Our bakeries and bakers pride themselves on attention to quality and being able to provide consumers with the ability to experience a bakery fresh product consistently. We pride ourselves on being an inclusive product for all. Meaning, we are certified peanut-free, tree-nut-free, and kosher. Our product is produced 24/7 to ensure you receive the finest donuts created and never run out of flavour selections. We have 5 production facilities in Toronto, Canada We ship directly across North America

name: CTA Digital
description: CTA Digital creates purpose-built hardware mounting solutions that power today’s restaurant technology. From front-of-house to back-of-house, our mounting systems and enclosures are designed to improve workflow, maximize space, and support the devices your operations rely on. Our solutions include handheld POS setups, mobile tablet systems, self-service kiosks, and stainless steel workstations—built to perform in demanding hospitality environments.

name: CTK Bio
description: CTK Bio Canada is a vertically integrated bio-based resin manufacturer based in Vancouver, BC. We develop proprietary home compostable resins and is one of North America's largest agave straw raw material manufacturers. Our materials are engineered to fully break down at home, no industrial facility required, without compromising performance. Honu Sustainables supplies restaurants, hospitality groups, distributors, and institutions across Canada and the US with home compostable straws, cutlery, and cups. Every product is backed by CTK Bio Canada's proprietary resin technology and North American manufacturing giving operators certified home compostable disposables with the supply reliability and pricing of a conventional program. No overseas sourcing. No greenwashing.

name: CuBE Packaging Solutions
description: CuBE Packaging Solutions Inc. is a North American manufacturer and supplier of premium, reusable plastic containers designed for foodservice, retail, and custom packaging applications. We specialize in high-quality polypropylene containers that are durable, leak-resistant, and built for everyday use. Our product portfolio includes a wide range of food storage containers, meal prep solutions and snack containers—serving major national brands, private labels, and leading retailers across North America. With in-house manufacturing, design, and packaging capabilities, CuBE offers full customization including colors, branding, inserts, packaging formats, and automation solutions. We help our partners bring innovative, functional, and market-ready packaging to life. Sustainable options available.

name: Cuisine Solutions
description: We pioneered the sous vide cooking method in 1971 and have been changing the culinary landscape ever since. Learn how our innovations are helping chefs around the world run safe, efficient kitchens that deliver memorable dining experiences.

name: Culinevo Kitchen
description: Culinevo Kitchen, based in Fayetteville, North Carolina – is an in-house cookhouse that redefines refrigerated and frozen meals with bold flavors, premium ingredients, and unmatched craftsmanship. From comfort classics like lasagna and enchiladas to global favorites like Indian curries and Korean Bulgogi, we deliver convenience without compromise. Soups, sauces to pasta, beans, and proteins—ensuring exceptional taste and quality in every bite. Trusted by families, retailers, and food service providers, Culinevo seamlessly blends tradition, innovation, and excellence to set a new standard in ready-to-eat meals.

name: Culinova
description: Culinova delivers culinary excellence at scale, producing fully-cooked proteins and meal solutions that are ready to heat & serve for foodservice, grocery, mass, club and convenience store channels. Our offerings include both bulk packaged products for easy reheat in the back of the house, as well as retail-ready packaged product. Examples include: Fully-cooked proteins and meal solutions bulk-packed in 2 – 5 lb bags, shipped refrigerated or frozen and ready to reheat in oven, microwave or water bath Pulled rotisserie chicken and other chilled proteins packaged in clear plastic tubs Ovenable family size meals in bakeable aluminum trays Microwavable single serve meals in plastic trays We produce both branded and private label offerings, and our skilled culinary team will custom develop the recipe you desire. Products are produced in our USDA on-site inspected, SQF Level-2 Certified state-of-the-art manufacturing facility.

name: Culligan Quench
description: Elite culinary destinations have exceptional taste. That’s why they choose Vero. Our Vero advanced five stage filtration technology extracts impurities and purifies water leaving a signature crisp taste. With Vero's ultra filtered still and sparkling water, bottled water service is not just table stakes but a premium beverage for those with a discerning palette.

name: Cup4Cup, LLC
description: Cup4Cup Cup4Cup’s story began in 2010 at The French Laundry when Chefs there developed a way to provide the restaurant’s gluten-free guests with a cornet of Salmon Tartare that tasted just like the original recipe. This development was revolutionary for the restaurant as gluten-free guests could now experience this iconic menu highlight and complete dining experience. This culinary creation was a turning point. The result of the kitchen experiment yielded Cup4Cup—the first 1:1 gluten-free flour that eliminated complicated conversions and delivered premium taste, texture and performance. Just as its name suggests, Cup4Cup replaces traditional all-purpose flour or whole wheat flour in most recipes, cup-for-cup and gram-for-gram, but you’d never know the difference. At Cup4Cup we also provide easy-to-use baking mixes that deliver the same consistency and texture of regular flour. Our customers can utilize our chef inspired library of sweet and savory mixes and recipes for the growing gluten-free community, their friends and families without compromise.

name: CURATE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
description: CURATE brings Phone-To-Table to your Restaurant! We offer "Insta App", Mobile Ordering, Live Group Ordering, Automatic Language Translation, Digital Payment, Split Checks, Menu Optimization and Building, Restaurant Promotions, Marketing and Insights, FOH and BOH Data along with "Live" Operations Viewing through our 1st of its kind Enterprise AI! Curate's founders are also the developers, so we have complete control of all features and benefits while being able to develop additional features as they are created.Join us in the future of digital restaurant technology letting us show you how Curate can enhance your business, customer experience and bring in more profits for servers and operators. GET CURATE'd!

name: Curtis Su Associates
description: Curtis Su Associates is an interior design studio based in Los Angeles. We carefully curated each space with intention. Architecture | Interior Design

name: Custom America Inc.
description: In hospitality, every second counts-from taking orders to processing payments and ensuring seamless guest experiences. Custom America delivers printing, scanning, POS, and data capture solutions designed to keep hospitality businesses running smoothly. With over 30 years of innovation and a presence across industries like restaurants, QSRs, hotels, and entertainment, our technology helps enhance efficiency, elevate guest experiences, and streamline operations when it matters most As part of a global group of 11 technology companies, we provide end-to-end solutions that seamlessly integrate hardware, software, and services to meet the ever-evolving needs of modern hospitality. Whether it's kitchen printing, self-order kiosks, POS terminals, or mobile scanning, our solutions are built to deliver speed, reliability, and innovation. Visit us at booth #5567 to see how our technology is shaping the future of hospitality. Let's build smarter solutions-together.

name: Custom Channels
description: Custom Channels has spent 30 years helping businesses sound as good as they look. We started with licensed background music — and we never stopped building. Today, we're the only platform that unites licensed music, digital signage, audio messaging, AV installation, and retail media under one roof, giving restaurants and multi-location brands a single partner to manage every touchpoint of the in-store experience. Music is more than ambiance. It's a brand asset. It shapes how guests feel, how long they stay, and how much they spend. Research shows that 81% of guests notice the music playing around them — yet most operators still leave it to chance. Custom Channels changes that. Our 10,000+ professionally curated, 100% commercially licensed playlists cover every genre and daypart, eliminating BMI/ASCAP exposure while keeping your brand voice consistent from open to close. But we're more than music. Our platform turns your overhead audio system into a direct revenue channel. With built-in AI voiceover tools, operators can create and schedule location-specific audio promotions in minutes — no studio, no production delays. In-store audio campaigns have shown to drive 20%+ sales lifts per promotion, and when paired with synced digital signage, the impact compounds. Our connected platform integrates with leading POS systems including Toast, Square, and PAR, closing the loop between promotion and purchase so you always know what's driving results. For brands focused on building loyalty, Custom Channels connects directly with loyalty and rewards platforms — automatically triggering personalized audio and signage offers the moment a loyalty member walks in. Loyalty members spend 40% more per visit and return 64% more often. Your overhead system can help make that happen. From custom speaker placement and certified AV installation to daypart-scheduled signage and retail media monetization, Custom Channels is built for operators who want every square foot — and every speaker — working harder. Trusted by McDonald's, CAVA, Burger King, MOD Pizza, Subway, Hard Rock, and thousands more. One platform. No vendor juggling. Every solution your restaurant needs.

name: Custom Cup Factory
description: Custom Cup Factory Inc is your one stop destination for personalized restaurant disposables that cater to a wide array of needs and preferences. With a steadfast commitment to quality, creativity, and customer satisfaction, we have become a trusted leader in the industry. Our Mission At Custom Cup Factory Inc, our mission is to transform your everyday take out order into a memorable and distinctive one. We understand that a cup or container is not just a vessel; its an expression of your identity, a tool for promotion, and a means to contribute to sustainability. We strive to provide exceptional custom food packaging solutions that not only meet these criteria but above and beyond. What Sets Us Apart Unmatched Personalization: We believe that personalization is the key to making every packaging special. Whether youre a business seeking to enhance your brand visibility, an event organizer in need of memorable packaging, or a business looking for a one-of-a-kind cup, we got you covered. Our extensive selection of customizable cups, containers, and packaging allows you to create the perfect design that reflects your unique vision. Quality Assurance: Our unwavering commitment to quality sets us apart. We meticulously source top-tier materials and employ state-of-the-art printing techniques to ensure that your custom orders are not just visually appealing but also durable and functional. Eco-Friendly Solutions: Sustainability is at the heart of what we do. Our eco-conscious materials and manufacturing processes minimize our environmental footprint. We offer eco and recyclable options, empowering you to make eco-friendly choices without compromising on style. Customer-Centric Approach: Your satisfaction is our utmost priority. Our dedicated customer support team is at your service throughout the customization process, from design selection to doorstep delivery, ensuring a seamless and enjoyable experience. Our Product Range CustomCupFactory.com offers an extensive and diverse range of customizable restaurant disposables, including but not limited to: Custom Printed Cups (Paper Coffee Cup, Pet Plastic Cup, PP Plastic Cup, Premium PP Injection Cup ): Ideal for brand promotion, marketing campaigns, and special events. Personalized Paper Bags w/Handles: Perfect for adding a personal touch to your take out, elevating your brand. Custom Utensils: Stylish and eco-friendly cutlery options for a memorable dining experience. Branded Napkins: Tailored solutions for restaurants, cafes, and caterers. Custom Food Packaging: Enhance your brands visibility with personalized takeout containers. Join Us in Elevating Your Take Out Experience CustomCupFactory.com invites you to embark on a journey to elevate your take out experience and create lasting memories. Whether youre looking to make a bold statement, boost your brand, or simply enhance your dining presentation with a personalized touch, we offer the perfect custom disposable solution for you.

name: Custom Sales & Service Inc
description: Mobile Food trucks

name: Cut Fresh
description: Cut Fresh is the Midwest’s go-to pre-cut fresh fruit and vegetable processor and distributor, delivering to restaurants, grocery stores, hospitals, food trucks, schools and caterers in Milwaukee and the Midwest. At Cut Fresh, we’re obsessed with quality . From farm to fork, our produce is meticulously selected, cut, and packaged to deliver uncompromising freshness, saving you time while elevating every meal. Discover how our healthy obsession can help you boost your business .

name: Cypress Grove Cheese
description: Cypress Grove ® is the leading producer of delicious American goat cheese that makes you want to do the happy dance, including Humboldt Fog®, the Original American Original®. Founded in 1983 by goat cheese pioneer Mary Keehn, Cypress Grove crafts cheeses across three product lines that complete every cheese case: fresh, soft-ripened, and aged. Proudly based in Arcata, California, Cypress Grove transforms the ordinary to extraordinary, producing unforgettable cheeses and leading the charge in the American cheese movement.

name: Daesang America Inc
description: Daesang has been one of the pioneers in paving the way for Korean cuisine. As one of the largest South Korean food companies, as well as a global leader in fermentation, we produce a wide variety of traditional and authentic products such as Gochujang, Kimchi and Gochugaru.

name: Daiya Foods Inc.
description: Daiya Foods has been creating delicious dairy-free foods since 2008. The company’s growing line includes cheeses, pizzas, mac and cheese, and frozen desserts made with the signature Daiya Oat Cream™ blend. Daiya products are available in more than 25,000 grocery stores across the U.S. and Canada, as well as through foodservice operators and internationally. For more information, visit daiyafoods.com / foodservice or follow @DaiyaFoods on Instagram and TikTok .

name: Dalian Tianpeng Food Co., Ltd.
description: Dalian Tianpeng Food Co.,LTD, is a Japanese food leading factory established in 1994 in Dalian, Wafangdian, it has 15 factories located in Liaoning, Shandong, Yunnan, Sichuan, Hubei and even abroad Vietnam，korean etc. We specialized in producing sushi products both of dry products like wasabi, soy sauce, sake, mirin, vinegar and frozen products such as gyoza, bao bun, spring roll, yakitori, karaage, takoyaki..., the products have been exported to more than 80 countries and regions all over the world, our annual sales is about 2 billion.

name: Damascus Bakeries
description: We are a 3rd generation, family owned business with our beginnings in Brooklyn, NY. Since our inception in 1930, we have grown to 3 SQF manufacturing plants: Brooklyn, NY- Newark and Clifton, NJ where we currently produce our products. We have paired our Innovative Baking with Old-Fashioned Excellence, to create ‘customized’- though still authentic- lavash wraps, roll-ups, buns, and flatbreads for our customers, and their culinary visions. We have become a leader in the Flatbread World, partnering with some of America’s iconic food companies.

name: DAR PRO Solutions
description: At DAR PRO Solutions, we provide simple, safe, and sustainable solutions for commercial kitchens by collecting and recycling used cooking oil and meat by-products. Our services help businesses make a positive impact on the environment while improving operational efficiency. With trusted, end-to-end recycling, we serve over 200,000 customers across 8+ industries, covering more than 90% of the continental U.S. Whether a local restaurant or part of a national chain, our innovative equipment, and exceptional service empower customers to streamline grease collection and focus on what matters most running their business.

name: Datassential
description: Datassential is the leading global food and beverage intelligence platform providing guidance on trends, competitive benchmarking, and sales intelligence. Through a suite of AI-powered solutions, an intuitive UI, and proprietary data, the food and beverage ecosystem relies on Datassential to more effectively develop, market, and sell their products. Founded in 2001, Datassential powers insights and sales intelligence for brands including Burger King, DoorDash, General Mills, Land O' Lakes, Pepsi, Starbucks, Target, and more.

name: Date Lady Inc.
description: At Date Lady, we believe sweetness should come from real food. We’re a family-founded company built on simple values- quality ingredients, honest sourcing, and products we’re proud to serve at our own table. Our journey starts with one incredible fruit: the date. From it, we craft our Organic Date Syrup- made from 100% organic dates, with a rich, caramel-like flavor and nothing added. No refined sugar, no preservatives- only pure, natural sweetness that works beautifully in coffee, baking, sauces, marinades, and more. What began with syrup has grown into a full line of date-sweetened favorites, including ketchup, chocolate syrup, BBQ sauce, sweet chili sauce, chocolate chips, date sugar, and date paste. Everything we make is designed to give you the taste you expect- without the ingredients you don't. We’re committed to sourcing the highest-quality organic dates and producing every product with care and consistency. All of our products are certified organic, non-GMO, gluten-free, and Kosher- so they work for a wide range of kitchens and customers. For chefs, cafés, and foodservice partners, Date Lady makes it easy to offer something better: clean-label sweetness that doesn’t sacrifice flavor. It’s a simple swap that makes a real difference, for your menu and your customers. From our family to yours, we’re here to make real food taste even better.

name: David's Cookies
description: David's® Cookies is a full-line dessert manufacturer meeting the needs of Foodservice, Retail and C-store operators since 1979. Products include our new Decadent Cookie Doughs – Ube Crystal Sugar m/w Hershey Premier White Chips and Big Monster m/w mini and standard sizes of M&M’s Candies – both of which will also be available in a 1.5 oz size; our new Cheesecake-to-Go variety – Oreo; a new Red Velvet Layer Cake m/w Hershey’s Mini Kisses – also available in individually packaged slices; and just in time for this summer's 250th anniversary celebrations - our red, white and blue layered Patriotic Cake – now available in individually packaged slices. Coming soon: a 2-pack, retail-ready, thaw & serve Decadent Cookie in our two top selling flavors: Triple Chocolate m/w Hershey’s Mini Kisses and Reese’s Peanut Butter Cup! These new products complement our recently introduced Stuffed Cookie Dough line in 4 flavors – PB&J, Chocolate Chip, Birthday Cake, and Cinnamon Apple Pie. Our core product lines include Cookie Dough - over 35 flavors in 12 sizes - .5 oz to 7 oz - across 8 categories including Decadent, Gourmet, Classic, Whole Grain, Filled, Gluten Free and Vegan; Edible Cookie Dough in 4 flavors; Brownies - several flavors to choose from including Brookies, Oreo Blondies and our outstanding Gluten Free Brownie; Muffin Batter in 18 flavors; Thaw & Serve Baked Muffins in 15 flavors; an extensive line of Cheesecakes; Fruit Tart Bases; Cinnamon Rolls; Scone Dough, Dessert Bars and Crumb Cakes. We have an extensive line of Retail-Ready/Individually Wrapped/Packaged T&S Brownies (with display tray), Muffins, Layer Cake Slices, Cheesecakes 2 Go, Edible Cookie Dough Chunks and Pecan Meltaways. We also produce a full line of elegant hand-decorated Individual Desserts and Premiere Layer Cakes. Our products are Kosher/OU Dairy and we also produce a Pareve line of Cookie Dough, Brownies and Muffin Batter. David's Cookies products are distributed throughout the US and selected items are available for Export. As a 'One Stop Bakery Shop' we can supply any operator with products that meet the specific needs for their establishment. Stop by and see us in a new location – Booth #1845 in the South Hall and see why we truly are 'a bite above the rest'®!

name: DayMark Safety Systems
description: DayMark Safety Systems is a pioneer in the food service industry, providing products and services of unmatched quality in the areas of facility, employee, and food safety and technology. Serving the North American and, in partnership with exclusive master distributer Retail Packaging Solutions Ltd., European markets, DayMark has positioned itself as the premiere source of efficient, economical, and innovative labeling for food safety. Established in 1989, DayMark revolutionized labeling for federal food code compliance in the 1990s with the introduction of DissolveMark dissolvable labels; MoveMark removable labels; and ToughMark repositionable labels. In 2012, DayMark brought even greater efficiencies and savings to restaurants and commercial food service operators with the introduction of its direct thermal labeling system, which automated shelf life, food rotation and grab go product labeling. DayMark took another step forward in 2018 with the launch of the MenuCommand kitchen automation platform, supported by the MenuPilot application as well as a line of direct thermal printers, which delivers an affordable, real IoT solution for every food service kitchen. Also in 2018, DayMark was first to market with a truly unique solution: TamperSeal tamper-evident labels, which feature an aggressive permanent adhesive accompanied by patterned security slits, designed specifically to address public food safety for the growing off-premise dining market. When you Partner with DayMark, The Difference is Night and Day.

Offering OEM and ODM services, we deliver one-stop customizable

name: Decorative Ceiling Tiles
description: Decorative Ceiling Tiles Transform your space from plain to beautiful — from the ceiling down. Decorative Ceiling Tiles is a leading specialty supplier of premium architectural surface products, helping restaurants, bars, and hospitality venues create stunning, memorable interiors. With one of the widest selections in the industry, we have everything you need — front of house and back of house. Front of House Ceiling Tiles — Real and faux tin, copper, PVC, and styrofoam in drop-in, glue-up, and nail-up styles. Commercial fire-rated options available. Faux Wood Beams — Lightweight, easy-to-install beams, planks, and trusses perfect for rustic, farmhouse, or industrial concepts. Wall Panels — 3D panels, faux brick, corrugated metal, wood slat walls, and more to add depth and drama to any dining room. Coffered Ceiling Systems — Complete beam and tile systems for upscale dining spaces. Crown Molding & Cornices — Tin, copper, styrofoam, and polyurethane moldings to tie your design together. Back of House FRP Wall Panels — Durable, easy-to-clean fiberglass reinforced panels built to withstand the demands of commercial kitchen environments. Smooth PVC Ceiling Tiles — Moisture-resistant, washable, and code-friendly drop-in ceiling tiles ideal for kitchens and prep areas. Backsplashes — PVC and tin backsplash tiles and rolls, easy to clean and built to handle demanding kitchen environments. Commercial Fire-Rated Ceiling Tiles — Code-compliant ceiling solutions designed for professional kitchens and back-of-house areas. Restaurant Resources ️ Restaurant Idea Gallery Extended Restaurant Photo Library Commercial Ceiling Tiles Free Samples Why Choose Us? ✅ Commercial fire-rated products ✅ Bulk pricing & QuickShip for large projects ✅ Styles from Art Deco to modern industrial ✅ Free samples available 1-866-297-0380 | (954) 280-4694 www.decorativeceilingtiles.net

name: DEEL Media
description: Established in 2009, DEEL Media stands as a prominent player in the digital signage industry, setting ourselves apart by offering all necessary components and services for the deployment of large, successful networks of digital signage. Renowned for our expertise in crafting cutting-edge digital menu boards and enhancing foodservice merchandising experiences. The company's commitment lies in delivering comprehensive, end-to-end digital signage solutions tailored for C-stores, restaurants, and cinemas. Adopting a consultative approach, DEEL Media guides clients from conceptualization through content design to implementation, providing comprehensive after-sales content and technical support. Central to our operations is the Carbon CMS platform which includes cloud-hosted signage management software and robust hardware, engineered to manage large networks of digital menus and other retail merchandising displays. Carbon powers screens worldwide, facilitating seamless content hosting and management for optimal performance and customer satisfaction. Within the DEEL Creative Studio, DEEL’s team crafts captivating designs and dynamic motion graphics for menu boards, promotional displays, and immersive video walls. DEEL Media's relentless pursuit of innovation and unwavering dedication to client satisfaction solidifies its position as the preferred partner for enterprises seeking Digital Signage Excellence.

name: Degrenne North America

Degrenne is proud to have emerged as one of Europe's leading manufacturers of cutlery and is the second largest tableware provider in the world. Degrenne offers high quality tabletop products that adhere to hospitality standards for professional use as well as casual and fine dining. Degrenne tableware collections make a statement. Since its beginnings, the same approach characterizes the brand Degrenne: combine high quality functionality and aesthetics to innovate with collections of porcelain dishes. Noble materials, elegant decorations, clean lines; Degrenne tableware collections can be combined with one another to play with contrasts of shapes, colors or materials to enhance the effect of food on your senses. Degrenne makes it possible to create magical moments at each meeting thanks to unique pieces of tableware that embody excellence. Proudly made in France stocked in the USA (GA warehouse).

Our custom stamped cookies offer a unique alternative to traditional edible gifts. With elegant presentation and custom packaging available, every cookie becomes a memorable brand touchpoint. Perfect for turndown service, hospitality programs, and specialty food offerings, they bring a sweet and delightful surprise to your guests and customers. We recently introduced our custom stamped dog biscuits, now rapidly gaining popularity. For more information, please email info@delightpatisserie.com .

description: At deSter, a gategroup member, we are transforming the food packaging industry with innovative, sustainable solutions designed to meet the evolving needs of the foodservice sector. From our state-of-the-art facility in Ohio, we produce high-quality packaging that meets the most stringent safety and quality standards, including BRC Food and Packaging and ISO9001 certifications. In addition, we developed industrial techniques to integrate RFID tags and QR code solutions into our range of reusable plastic tableware. As an EcoVadis Platinum-certified company, sustainability is central to our mission. We design reusable, recyclable, and compostable products, reducing environmental impact while maintaining functionality and aesthetic appeal. By combining cutting-edge technology with deep market insights, we create packaging solutions that enhance the food experience and support a more sustainable future. With a global presence that includes manufacturing facilities in the U.S., Belgium, Spain, and Thailand, deSter is committed to shaping a greener, more innovative future for the foodservice industry.

description: In the 70s Corrado di Marco began his research to create products capable of combining taste, naturalness and well-being. In 2001 Corrado Di Marco invents the Pinsa Romana, a real revolution. The mix of wheat and soy flours is combined with rice and sourdough. Today more than 7000 Pinseries are distributed worldwide.

name: DiDi Consumer Goods, LLC
description: Dumpling Daughter was born two generations before me. My parents owned Boston’s most renowned 5-star Chinese restaurant, Sally Ling’s! Despite all the fancy food I enjoyed, my favorite food was mom’s home cooking and I often looked forward to an after school snack of steamed buns or a giant plate of dumplings. Dumplings became the essential comfort food of my childhood. I have since founded Dumpling Daughter, which serves many of my family’s most authentic time-tested dishes. Today, we are making people happy - one dumpling at a time.

Having always been the number one beaded ice cream brand, Dippin’ Dots is an iconic fan favorite at events and entertainment venues across the U.S. Dippin’ Dots is the only beaded ice cream partner of one-of-a-kind brands including Dr Pepper® and ICEE®. Dippin’ Dots products are available in ice cream, ice (non-dairy) and frozen yogurt, offering best-selling flavors like Cookies ‘n Cream made with Oreo®, plus legendary favorites like Banana Split and Rainbow Ice. Flash-frozen to capture the purest, creamiest ice cream imaginable, Dippin’ Dots are made using only the best ingredients without adding excessive butterfat and calories.

name: Distinctive Food Imports
description: FEATURING PEPE SAYA CULTURED BUTTER, DUCK INN DOGS AND A SMALL GOOD Pepe Saya Cultured Butter has been an icon in Australia for over a decade and they haven't wasted a second. They have been continually working to create the best buttersheets they can in terms of flavour and useability, since they started making them by hand over 9 years ago. Throughout 2024, Pepe and the team have been working to elevate the buttersheets to a whole new level, with the purchase of a custom sheeting machine from Switzerland. These have been tested with different recipes, production environments and set ups to create a the perfect flavour and useability. Their buttersheets are all about FLAVOUR, 100% pure butter, made in their Sydney buttery.​ ( American Buttersheets coming soon...) We're pleased to also represent their presence in the USA; butter churned by the Amish from farm fresh cream that has been cultured, creating crème fraiche, and then batch churned to create the unique creamy, tangy flavour. ** A true Chicago Original, DuckInn Dogs is the creation of Chicago native Chef Kevin Hickey. A craft version of a classic Hot Dog, the DuckInn Dog combines the best beef with duck fat and encases it in a classic natural casing for a deeply rich flavor and delicious texture with the signature snap of a real old world Hot Dog! Produced in a 100 year old Sausage House on the southside of Chicago, DuckInn Dogs have been repeatedly recognized as one of the best in Chicago. Chef Kevin Hickey’s unique and singular recipe is now available in retail packaging for fine purveyors everywhere and in foodservice packaging for the best bars, restaurants and clubs that want to give their guests an authentic taste of Chicago!** Small Good is a family-owned salumeria in Midcoast Maine making cured and smoked meats with proper technique and proper ingredients. A mix of old-world craft and new-world innovation, our products are cultured through wild fermentation and dry-aged with koji, building complexity and deep umami savor. ** **AVAILABLE IN RETAIL AND FOOD SERVICE FORMATS

What you will find is Drains Made Simple is different from other vendors. We're available around the clock, we care about our clients, and we take pride in helping them succeed.
