Our products are as good as gold - try them today and Taste the Drum Rock Difference

name: Dry Ager USA LP
description: DRY AGER® – The Global Leader in Dry Aging Technology DRY AGER® is the industry leader in professional dry aging solutions, trusted by top chefs, steakhouses, and foodservice operators worldwide. Our precision-engineered systems deliver consistent, safe, and profitable dry aging for beef, pork, and more—enhancing flavor, tenderness, and overall product value. From compact, plug-and-play reach-in cabinets ideal for restaurants of all sizes to our latest high-volume production solutions, DRY AGER® offers scalable options to meet every operational need. Each unit is designed with advanced climate control, hygiene technology, and user-friendly operation to ensure perfect results with minimal effort. Whether you’re introducing dry-aged offerings or expanding into large-scale production, DRY AGER® provides the reliability, performance, and expertise to elevate your program. Dry aging—perfected.

name: DSP CO.,LTD
description: Founded in 1988, DSP is a specialist in metal surface finishing, with extensive expertise in stainless steel processing and coating technologies. We manufacture a wide range of products, including architectural panels, automotive components, elevators, and household goods, and present our tableware brand Vernox and metal tile brand VerQ. Our flagship Vernox table mat is made of SUS 304 stainless steel and features a flexible structure that bends without losing shape, ensuring exceptional durability and long-lasting performance. Its stainless steel composition resists food contamination and staining, making it highly hygienic and suitable for long-term use. We also offer VerQ, an innovative metal tile system that can be easily attached and detached, enabling creative and customizable table styling. Our products are supplied to luxury venues, including Hyatt Hotels Corporation and Marina Bay Sands, as well as high-end tableware retailers. We are actively seeking international distributors to expand our global reach and bring our manufacturing excellence to new markets.

name: Duke Manufacturing Co.
description: Duke Manufacturing is a global food service equipment manufacturer, headquartered in St. Louis, MO. For 100 years, Duke has been providing unique and innovative foodservice solutions. Duke offers customized solutions that not only address the unique challenges of your foodservice operation but also optimize and integrate all phases of workflow from start to finish. We look at problems from your perspective and then work with your team to create tailored solutions that raise profits, increase ROI, drive efficiencies and enhance quality. Duke is focused on providing innovative product solutions; we design our products with your customers in mind. We have a proven track record of delivering solutions that: • Increase throughput and efficiency • Improve food safety • Improve merchandising for better profitability • Easily adapt to changing menus. From hot holding to production, and cooking to refrigeration, Duke is here to be your solutions partner.

name: Dukers Appliance Co.
description: Dukers USA is a factory-direct wholesale distributor of commercial refrigeration and cooking equipment for the foodservice industry. Dukers delivers high-quality, competitively priced equipment backed by dependable service and strong inventory availability across the United States. With over $200 million in sales generated in the past three years, Dukers has rapidly gained market share by offering an economy brand that combines value, reliability, and industry-leading support. The company maintains over 30,000 units in stock across 9 U.S. warehouses, ensuring fast fulfillment and consistent product availability. Product categories include commercial refrigerators, freezers, prep tables, undercounter units, bar refrigeration, and a growing line of commercial cooking equipment. In response to market demand and U.S. electrification trends, Dukers is expanding its electric cooking line to include fryers, griddles, ranges, and convection ovens. Dukers supports its dealer network with strong warranty programs ranging from one to three years for parts and labor, with extended warranty options available. With a growing national sales team and an expanding in-house service infrastructure, Dukers is focused on becoming a leading national brand in the foodservice equipment industry by delivering value, consistency, and long-term partnerships.

name: Dumpling Masters
description: Experience dumplings like never before! Delicate Wrappers Encase inventive fillings--from rich Truffle and Edamame to Thai Peanut Chicken and creamy cheese and protein blends. Each dumpling is a burst of unexpected flavors and textures, perfectly balanced and steamed (or fried) to perfection. These aren't just dumplings...they're a creative twist on tradition, crafted to surprise and satisfy with every bite. Whether it be Asian , Middle Eastern , Italian , French , German , etc., or basically from land or sea...we can create any flavor with any ingredient. Our Gluten-Free Italian Seasoned Mozzarella Sticks are crispy, golden and oozing with rich, melty mozzarella--these aren't just any mozzarella sticks. They're 100% gluten-free and bursting with authentic Italian flavor. Perfectly seasoned, fried to perfection, and completely irresistible, they're the game-changer every gluten-free menu has been waiting for, it's a MUST HAVE.

name: DUONG VU TECHNOLOGIES Co.,Ltd
description: Looking for a reliable, cost-effective alternative to high-cost domestic or China-sourced aluminum foil containers? We are a Vietnam-based manufacturer ready to deliver. We specialize in high-quality aluminum foil pans, containers, and lids designed specifically for the U.S. foodservice, retail, and distribution markets. Our products meet strict food safety standards and are engineered for superior strength, heat performance, and consistency—ensuring they perform in demanding kitchen and takeaway environments. Why partner with us? Competitive Advantage You Can See in Your Margin Manufacturing in Vietnam allows us to offer highly competitive pricing without compromising quality—helping you improve profitability and stay ahead in a price-sensitive market. Stable Supply – Reduce Your Risk Diversify away from over-dependence on China. We provide a stable, scalable supply chain with reliable lead times, helping you avoid disruptions and tariff-related uncertainties. Built for Your Business We support OEM, private label, and customized product development. Whether you supply distributors, supermarkets, or national food chains, we can tailor solutions to match your exact specifications. Quality You Can Trust Our production follows strict quality control systems with consistent output across large volumes. Every shipment is manufactured to meet international standards and customer expectations. Sustainability That Sells Aluminum is fully recyclable, making our products an ideal choice for environmentally conscious consumers and brands in the U.S. market. We are not just a supplier—we are a long-term partner focused on helping you win in your market with better pricing, dependable supply, and responsive service. Visit us at the National Restaurant Association Show 2026 – Booth 13630 Let’s discuss how we can support your business growth starting today.

name: DuraBasic
description: DuraBasic is a manufacturer of non-food disposable products for the foodservice industry. We work primarily with foodservice distributors, supplying products designed to perform consistently at distribution scale. Our core focus is MFPP and polypropylene food containers, supported by essential disposable gloves for foodservice and janitorial use. These are high-volume categories where consistency, availability, and execution matter more than branding.

name: Dynamic USA
description: Dynamic continues to raise the bar in professional food preparation. Built on decades of expertise and fueled by innovation, we are proud to offer our latest generation of equipment — including the new BlendPro3 Series, JuicePro Series, and LT7 Planetary Mixer — along with our expanded line of immersion blenders, salad spinners, and the world’s No. 1 manual dicer. Each product is engineered for performance, durability, and everyday efficiency. Trusted by foodservice professionals worldwide, Dynamic delivers dependable solutions that inspire creativity, ensure consistency, and help kitchens perform at their best.

name: E. Formella & Sons, Inc.
description: E. Formella & Sons, Inc. is a family-founded, women-owned specialty food company dedicated to sourcing, developing, and distributing high-quality Italian and Mediterranean-inspired products for retail, foodservice, and distribution partners nationwide. Built on generations of passion for authentic food and cultural heritage, the company blends old-world traditions with modern market insight to deliver products that resonate with today’s consumers while honoring classic flavors. Operating with a relationship-driven and integrity-focused approach, E. Formella & Sons emphasizes long-term partnerships, accountability, and sustainable growth. The company works closely with trusted domestic and international producers who share its commitment to quality, food safety, and consistency, resulting in a diverse and expanding product portfolio that includes imported Italian specialties, gourmet pasta sauces, giardiniera and antipasti, pickled vegetables, BBQ and wing sauces, and other shelf-stable, retail-ready items designed to perform across multiple sales channels. In support of strategic growth and category expansion, E. Formella & Sons acquired Simply Salsa LLC, further strengthening its presence in bold, flavor-forward condiment categories. Through this acquisition, the company now offers Simply Pickle Salsa, Simply Fresh Giardiniera, and Simply Salsa’s three original salsa flavors, all developed with the same focus on quality ingredients, distinctive taste, and market-ready packaging. Each product across the portfolio is carefully selected or developed with attention to ingredient integrity, authentic flavor profiles, regulatory compliance, and packaging performance, ensuring reliability from production through delivery. E. Formella & Sons is known for its deep understanding of specialty food distribution and its ability to adapt solutions to meet the needs of grocery chains, independent retailers, foodservice distributors, and hospitality operators, offering both branded programs and private label capabilities with flexibility and scalability. Quality assurance remains a core operating principle, supported by rigorous supplier vetting, ongoing product evaluation, and close collaboration throughout the supply chain to ensure consistency, traceability, and on-time fulfillment. While rooted in tradition, E. Formella & Sons remains forward-looking, actively monitoring consumer trends, emerging flavors, and category growth opportunities to drive thoughtful innovation without compromising authenticity. As a women-owned company with strong family foundations, E. Formella & Sons, Inc. continues to build its reputation as a dependable, values-driven specialty food partner committed to exceptional products, collaborative relationships, and long-term growth.

name: E2E Research Services
description: E2E Research Services is a global market research and analytics firm that provides data-driven insights to help organizations make informed business decisions. The company specializes in delivering end-to-end research solutions, combining advanced analytics, domain expertise, and technology-enabled platforms. Founded with a focus on innovation and quality, E2E Research Services supports clients across a wide range of industries, including F&B, healthcare, technology, financial services, and consumer goods. Its service portfolio spans the full research lifecycle—from study design and data collection to analysis, visualization, and strategic consulting. The company leverages both quantitative and qualitative methodologies , along with modern tools such as automation, AI, and machine learning, to enhance efficiency and accuracy. E2E Research Services has developed strong capabilities in conducting sensory research, helping brands evaluate product attributes such as taste, aroma, texture, and overall consumer experience. The company supports a range of sensory methodologies, including central location tests (CLTs), home-use tests (HUTs) , and controlled lab-based studies. By combining trained sensory panels with consumer insights and advanced statistical analysis, E2E enables clients—particularly in food, beverage, and personal care sectors—to refine product formulations, benchmark against competitors, and optimize go-to-market strategies. E2E also has Quantis a comprehensive data intelligence platform designed to integrate enterprise data (includes but not limited to POS data, loyalty data, CRM data, Logistics data etc) and enable organizations to make faster, smarter, and more profitable business decisions. By bringing together the existing and real time data from multiple internal systems and external sources, Quantis transforms fragmented information into a unified, analytics-driven decision engine . Some of the key objectives covered are - Centralised revenue visibility - Performance across stores - Evaluate monetisation efficiency - Customer performance and Loyalty - Marketing and Promotion effectiveness - Menu and product performance - Service performance - Store wise footfall performance - Predictive analytics and demand forecasting and many more++ Quantis caters to the following key challenges - Fragmented data across POS, ERP, CRM, loyalty data and finance systems - Reactive pricing and promotion decisions - Limited visibility into product, store, or channel-level profitability - Manual, Excel-driven forecasting and reporting - Inability to measure ROI of promotions and pricing actions - Data interpretation Quantis enables organizations to move beyond traditional reporting and adopt a data-led operating model, where insights drive strategy across pricing, promotions, product mix, and revenue management.

name: Earthborn Studios, Inc.
description: Earthborn pottery is a high-fired stoneware used in restaurants worldwide. It is vitrified and impressively strong, due to the processes developed over years of empirically testing the relationship of the clay to the glaze, and its maturity in the fire. It is high in iron, which interacts with the glazes, imbuing warmth and integrity to the vessel adding strength in the process. The boro-silicate glazes coat the clay in a durable, scratch-resistant colored glass giving the piece more strength, stability, and beauty. Developing the chef/restaurateur as my primary market has allowed me to create for the creative, design for the artist, and deliver a collaborative functional product available to the food service professional in no other way. Growing my business from my basement to my current 24,000 sq ft facility has been my pleasure, my passion, and my pain throughout the years, which have been spent developing processes and discovering the secrets of the earth and fire.

name: Eastern Fisheries, Inc
description: Eastern Fisheries is a privately owned, vertically integrated seafood company, headquartered in New Bedford, MA, the highest value landing port in the U.S. Founded in 1978, Eastern is the world’s largest harvester, importer and processor of scallops and has become a globally recognized and trusted seafood source to some of the largest retailers, food service distributors and wholesalers in the world. With operations in the U.S., China and Japan and strategic partnerships with the world’s richest supply sources, we are uniquely positioned to handle orders of all sizes and to bring a consistent supply of quality seafood to the market at competitive prices.

name: Eastern Tabletop
description: Starting in 1950 Eastern has been dedicated to designing and manufacturing silver items for the gift and food service industry. Over the years, the expansion of both the gift and buffet line led to the launching of Eastern Tabletop’s Foodservice Division. With sole focus on the tableware, holloware and buffet items combined with the years of experience in silver art the Eastern name has succeeded in being recognized as a company of Quality, Design and Trust. We are proud to stay behind our products that make their mark in the tableware industry with innovation, fine quality, personal service and exceptional value. Some things never change. Then again, some things get better. That's Live Action, The New Era of Eastern. More than a trend change, it's a renewed commitment to delivering holloware that adapts to your changing needs, simplifies your tabletop service, and provides guaranteed quality items “Designed to Last”. All our products are crafted to withstand years of use and service abuse, it’s the quality and workmanship of our products that are here to stay and will never change. A step ahead with innovative products, updated features and trendy items keeps Eastern the forerunner in the latest holloware and buffetware and in demand by the highly professional and celebrity chefs worldwide.

name: Easy Foods Inc
description: Easy Foods is a full-service tortilla manufacturer. Our state-of-the-art facility based in Kissimmee, Florida is capable of producing more than 10 million pounds of tortillas on a monthly basis. Quality and consistency are key at Easy Foods where we've been producing corn tortillas, flour tortillas, tortilla chips, and wraps for years. Restaurant chefs continue to use our products to delight customers for over a decade. Cooking corn on-premises allows us to produce high-quality fresh corn tortillas and chips. Our flour tortillas and gourmet wraps are made fresh to order and have an amazing flavor profile. Foodservice, Retail, and Private label, we do it all in our SQF-certified facility.

name: Easy Ice
description: An Easy Ice Subscription eliminates the hassle of owning an ice machine. We supply you with the best commercial ice machines, bins, and dispensers to meet your business needs at a fixed monthly cost, so it’s easy to budget. Biannual preventive maintenance and all repairs are covered, and we even provide you with free backup ice if your machine goes down. With us in your corner, you’ll never have to worry about your ice supply again! Thanks to our all-inclusive solution, you no longer have to choose between buying an expensive, maintenance-heavy piece of equipment or locking yourself into a traditional ice machine rental or lease agreement—both of which leave you on the hook for all the maintenance, repairs, and bagged ice should your machine break down. We offer a better solution—the industry's only commercial ice machine subscription. From bars and restaurants to hospitals and hotels, if your business depends on a daily ice supply from a commercial ice maker, Easy Ice has it covered.

name: EasyPack Enterprises
description: Harvest Group specializes in producing high-quality disposable packaging products, including bagasse plastic, plastic, injection, and kraft paper products. With manufacturing facilities in central Taiwan and Guangzhou, China, we have a dedicated and reliable production team backed by over 15 years of design and development experience. Our Taiwan-based facility, EasyPack Enterprise, is certified to meet stringent quality standards. Upholding the values of integrity, compliance, and safe food practices, we are committed to delivering the best service and product quality to our customers. This information can be used in the company profile and on exhibition webpages.

name: eCard Systems
description: eCard Systems offers a full suite of gift card solutions, including physical gift cards, digital gift card storefronts, and gift card processing software. eCard’s proprietary gift card processing software solves complex merchant needs, enabling merchants with multiple locations, multiple owners, or multiple point-of-sale technologies to easily sell and process gift cards enterprise-wide across all locations. The Company’s gift card solutions work with more than 125 point-of-sale providers, including dedicated online ordering portals for Square, Toast, Lightspeed, SpotOn, ShopKeep, TouchBistro, Upserve and many others.

name: Ecolab
description: A trusted partner for millions of customers, Ecolab is a global sustainability leader offering food safety, infection prevention, and cleaning solutions that help operators protect their people, brand, and operations. Through a comprehensive approach, we deliver outcomes that matter most for restaurants: Clean spaces, a protected reputation and optimized operations. Our portfolio includes powerful degreasers, floor and drain cleaning solutions, and advanced dishmachine and warewashing technologies supported by expert service and actionable insights. Our experts are an extension of your team. They provide on-site guidance for food safety and compliance as well as actionable insights to improve service and training. By bringing together chemistry, data, automation, and expert service, Ecolab helps restaurants deliver consistent results and perform like their best location—every shift, every day. With Ecolab, you have the resources and confidence you need for all areas of your restaurant operations. Visit Ecolab.com/restaurants to learn more.

name: Ecotrak Facility Management Software
description: Ecotrak is more than a facility management platform—it’s your partner in the trenches. Built for businesses that can’t afford downtime, Ecotrak delivers real solutions, real insights, and real support to help facility teams run smoother, spend smarter, and plan for the long haul. With an intuitive, easy-to-use platform, Ecotrak simplifies asset management, work orders, and service provider coordination—so facility teams can stop putting out fires and start making bigger-picture decisions. Whether it’s preventing breakdowns, maximizing budgets, or optimizing operations, Ecotrak is right there with you, every step of the way. Together, we run it. For more information, visit ecotrak.com.

name: Edgewater Products
description: A Branding Tool That Actually Gets Used. Your coasters sit on every table, in every customer's hand, multiple times per visit. They're not forgotten, they're used daily, touched repeatedly, and often taken home. That's consistent brand exposure in the moment when customers are most engaged. Premium Feel The finest materials signal quality. Your brand deserves to feel refined in your customers' hands. These coasters are made from the most premium-grade cork available and deliver an exceptional look, feel, and performance. Fully Custom Your logo, your colors, your message. Complete creative control to match your brand's aesthetic and standards.

name: Edlund Company, a Welbilt Company
description: With over 100 years of delivering quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Edlund has earned its place as one of the most trusted foodservice equipment manufacturers today. Our ever-expanding range of smallwares and light equipment helps operators become more productive and profitable. Customers worldwide rely on Edlund for equipment that is not only safe, sanitary, and easy to use but also delivers exceptional value. As part of the Welbilt group, our USA-based R&D, manufacturing, and customer service teams make us a nimble partner, ensuring your business is equipped to succeed in today’s dynamic foodservice landscape.

name: Edward Don & Company
description: Edward Don Company has been a trusted name in foodservice since 1921. With a nationwide presence and over 12,000 products in stock supported by seven full-service distribution centers in Chicago, Philadelphia, Atlanta, Miami, Dallas, Los Angeles and Seattle, we will get you what you need when you need it. DON understands that being an industry leader also means backing up our products with outstanding service. Thats why we have a knowledgeable Sales Force and a dedicated Customer Care Team with a consultative approach that works with you to find solutions and create sound strategies that are right for your business. In addition, we know that being the best means working with the best. Our network of the top suppliers in the industry will provide you with a full range of high quality products you can rely on including disposables, smallwares, tabletop, janitorial supplies and equipment so you can have the peace of mind you need to focus on running your business. If youre looking for a proven leader committed to your success, isnt it time you turn to DON?

name: Ed’s All Purpose Seasoning and Rub LLC
Egglife Foods, Inc.
description: Egglife Foods is harnessing the power of eggs to transform traditionally flour-based foods. At Egglife, we believe taste and nutrition are not mutually exclusive, and you should be able to enjoy the foods you love and the flavors you crave, regardless of dietary lifestyle. Whether its a wrap, pasta, or on-the-go snack, Egglife is proving that better-for-you eating doesnt mean giving something up; it means getting more: more protein, more flavor, more ease, and more satisfaction. Find Egglife products chillin in the refrigerated section at retailers nationwide!

name: eGiftify
description: The All-in-One Gifting, Engagement, and Marketing Platform eGiftify is a behind-the-scenes (white-label) solution that helps businesses of all sizes boost sales, customer loyalty, and brand awareness through the power of gifting. Here's what we offer: Effortless Gifting: We provide a seamless way for your customers to send thoughtful gifts instantly, whether it's online, in-store, through your app, or on their mobile device. Multiple Gifting Options: We handle it all, from digital gift cards to physical cards, so you can offer the perfect gifting experience for any occasion. Increased Revenue: Gifting encourages spending, and eGiftify makes it easy for your customers to give and receive gifts that benefit your business. Loyalty and Marketing Tools: Our platform goes beyond gifting. We provide loyalty programs, marketing tools, and promotional features to build stronger customer relationships and drive brand engagement. Simplified Management: eGiftify integrates seamlessly into your existing systems, making it easy to manage your gift card processing, sales, and marketing efforts all in one place. With eGiftify, you can create a comprehensive gifting and marketing strategy that strengthens your brand and keeps your customers coming back for more.

name: EKO Enterprise Limited
description: Eko Enterprise is one of the world‘s most innovative providers in moulded fibre food packaging, The Na:Pac products are developed by our company. Eko Enterprise is dedicated to produce eco friendly products for foodservice industry. Eko Enterprise is a pioneer green-innovator in developing, manufacturing and selling moulded fibre catering disposables. The experience and technology in mould fibre which Eko Enterprise provides is beyond comparison. The company is always in pace with the changing needs of the market. Eko Enterprise has developed a close relationship with distributors around the world. With continuous market research, new product development and effective sales of our eco friendly products, we are confident to help our clients to gain profit.

name: Electro Freeze, a Welbilt Company
description: Electro Freeze has been a leading manufacturer of frozen treat and frozen beverage equipment since 1929. The full Electro Freeze line ranges from space-saving counter top models to compact floor units both gravity and pressurized. Together, they offer the perfect fit for all frozen dessert and frozen beverage needs: soft serve ice cream, yogurt, shakes, frozen custard, slush, frozen cocktails, gelato and Italian Ice. Electro Freeze prides itself in manufacturing equipment that is dependable, easy to operate and simple to maintain to assist operators in growing profits. Visit our website for more information www.electrofreeze.com. We look forward to visiting with you in our booth #5031. See our latest concept, the Auto Flex Cleaning System that provides a state-of-the-art sanitization solution for the H.C. Duke/Electro Freeze GES soft serve freezers.

name: Electrolux Professional, Inc
description: WE STRIVE TO CREATE A BETTER TODAY, BETTER TOMORROW, BETTER FUTURE, for our employees, communities, and customers. At Electrolux Professional Group Americas, we aim to solve the most difficult foodservice, beverage and laundry challenges by delivering unique solutions that inspire creativity, elevate quality, and enhance experiences. We proudly manufacture and distribute a diverse portfolio of globally and locally manufactured products designed to make our customers work lives easier, more profitable, and truly sustainable every day. We also believe in the power of sustainable solutions, not just for today but for future generations. Thats why we offer a variety of eco-friendly options for professional foodservice, beverage, and laundry businesses across the Americas. From energy-efficient appliances to water-saving technologies, the power of our sustainable solutions helps our partners maintain profitability while reducing their environmental impact.

name: eleven TLC
description: eleven TLC began as a tiny seed, driven by the need for more energy, better health + effective management of life's pressures. What started as a personal journey-recognizing that health is an inside job-through what we consume, think, and do—led to small steps that sparked significant changes in my life + my family's well-being. As this understanding grew, the spark was lit to build eleven. From the beginning, we collaborated with MD's, health + wellness experts to create delicious blends that harmonize the body. Our north star was to check all the boxes + ensure that flavor meets function. Today, our products are available in coffee shops, cafes, wellness spas, hotels, doctors' offices, retail + DTC. We are committed to evolving with continuous R&D, learning from you + our partners. We have a expansive mindset, where we are always looking to innovate + refine all aspects of what we do so that we can offer more support to all. We are truly grateful for our mission + the way we pursue it. We recognize the interconnectedness of all life + understand that, at the end of the day, feeling good from the inside out is not just beneficial for us—it's essential for our families, our communities + our planet.

name: Eli's Cheesecake Co.
description: Eli's Cheesecake is a Chicago-born, third-generation, family-owned bakery devoted to handcrafting the best cheesecake in the world. In 1980, our founder, famed restaurateur Eli Schulman, invented Chicago-style cheesecake, known for its beautiful caramelization, creamy texture, and all-butter shortbread cookie crust. Forty-five years later, we continue to spread joy through our delicious desserts and work to give back to the community that built us. Let's make life sweetertogether.

name: Elite Wine Selections Inc
description: Elite Wine Selections Inc. offers a curated portfolio of premium European dealcoholized wines (<0.5% ABV) and sophisticated non-alcoholic beverages sourced from leading producers in Germany, France, Italy, and Spain. The selection is focused on award-winning products that preserve the authenticity, complexity, and sensory structure of traditional wines while providing fully alcohol-free or near-alcohol-free alternatives for modern consumers and professional hospitality use. The sparkling wine range includes elegant Blanc de Blancs styles, refined Rosé sparkling wines, and classic cuvée blends crafted for fine dining, celebrations, and aperitif service. These wines are produced using traditional winemaking methods followed by gentle dealcoholization techniques that retain fine bubbles, freshness, and aromatic precision. The white wine selection features expressive styles such as Riesling, Sauvignon Blanc, and Chardonnay. These wines are defined by freshness, minerality, and aromatic depth, making them highly suitable for food pairing and professional restaurant service. They are designed to replicate the structure and balance expected from high-quality wines while remaining alcohol-free. The red wine portfolio includes Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon blends, and Pinot Noir styles. These wines are crafted to maintain body, tannin structure, and depth, allowing them to be served alongside rich and complex dishes. They are positioned as serious gastronomic alternatives rather than simple substitutes, supporting multi-course dining experiences in fine restaurants and hotels. The Rosé selection offers fresh, elegant and fruit-driven wines that combine subtle complexity with versatility. These wines are suitable for year-round consumption and are widely used in both hospitality and retail environments due to their broad pairing flexibility and lifestyle appeal. In addition to still and sparkling wines, we offer premium non-alcoholic sparkling beverages. These products include grape-based and botanical-infused drinks designed to deliver refined acidity, complexity, and fine effervescence. They are commonly used as aperitifs, welcome drinks, and celebration alternatives in hospitality, corporate events, and premium retail settings. A dedicated category of gastronomy-focused non-alcoholic pairing wines is developed specifically for chefs and sommeliers. These products are designed not to imitate traditional wine directly but to function within culinary contexts, offering balance, structure, and pairing compatibility across tasting menus and multi-course dining experiences. Elite Wine Selections serves fine dining restaurants, luxury hotels, specialty retailers, and corporate hospitality clients, as well as a growing base of health-conscious, sober-curious consumers. Across all segments, the focus remains on delivering a premium wine experience without alcohol, enabling sophistication and modern lifestyle alignment without compromise in quality or sensory experience.

name: Ellsworth Creamery
description: The Ellsworth Cooperative Creamery is based in the Heart of Wisconsin’s Dairyland in the town of Ellsworth, Wisconsin. Known as the Cheese Curd Capital, consumers who demand high-quality natural foods at a great value love our world-famous cheddar cheese curds and our entire line of specialty artisan cheeses. Produced with milk from our 300+ patron family dairy farms, white cheddar cheese curds and specialty artisan cheese from Ellsworth Cooperative Creamery are crafted using the highest quality ingredients and over 100 years of cheese making experience, making a delicious difference you can taste. The latest addition to our cheese portfolio is our Wohlt plant that produces pasteurized process cheese in many different flavors, formulations, types and product forms. If you are looking for curds, traditional cheeses or processed cheese, Ellsworth has it.

name: Elmeco Srl
description: We are an Italian manufacturer of unique frozen and cold beverages dispensers and frozen desserts machinest. Our machines are perfect for production of veriaty of frozen drinks: slushy, smoothie, frozen coffee, frozen cocktails, granita as well as milkshake, soft-serve ice-cream, creme cafe, gelato soft and more.

name: Elo
description: As a leading global supplier of interactive solutions for restaurants, #EloIsEverywhere. To date, we have deployed more than 25 million installations in over 80 countries. A new Elo touchscreen is installed every 21 seconds, on average, somewhere in the world. Built on a unified architecture, Elo's broad portfolio allows our customers to easily Choose, Configure and Connect Control to create a unique experience. Choose from all-in-one systems, open-frame monitors and touchscreen monitors ranging from 10 to 70 inches. Configure with our unique Elo Edge Connect peripherals that allow use-specific solutions. Connect Control with EloView, a secure cloud-based platform for Android-powered devices. EloView enables secure deployment and management of a large network of interactive systems designed to reduce operating costs while increasing up-time and security. Consumers can find Elo touchscreen solutions in restaurants around the globe with self-service kiosks, point-of-sale terminals, interactive signage, brand experiences, price checkers, product finders, hospitality systems, point-of-care displays and transportation applications just to name a few. Learn more at EloTouch.com.

name: Eloma, a Welbilt Company
description: Eloma is based on a balanced blend of traditional and modern from the development of the first combi steamer to the latest GENIUS MT generation. We remain true to this philosophy so that you can continue to experience the joy of cooking and baking in the future. For us, tradition is "100 per cent made in Germany". We undertake to provide the very best quality thanks to German engineering and craftsmanship. For us, modern aspects include technology with little environmental impact, versatility and simple operation which is fun and easy to understand.

name: Embassy of Uganda in Washington D.C.
description: We are happy to tell you about "Good from Uganda", your next flavor adventure! Come and sample the emerging brands that are coming into the US market from the Pearl of Africa. Specialty coffee, fine teas, single origin chocolate, gourmet vanilla, dried tropical fruits, and more are at our booth and ready for your taste buds.

name: EmberGlo
description: Since 1950 EmberGlo has built quality commercial-grade food service equipment. Our gas broilers cook with extreme radiant heat and feature the industry's only completely ceramic broiling hearth that instantly sears the meat allowing it to cook in its' own delicious juices. There are no messy grease trays to clean. 100% of the food’s natural drippings are transformed into the smoke that provides an un-matchable outdoor flavor that customers keep coming back for. Broilers & steamers are made in the USA.

name: Emerald Lawn and Landscaping Facilities
description: Your trusted exterior facilities maintenance company since 1989. name: Excel Dryer, Inc.
description: Now, more than ever, restaurants must provide touchless fixtures in their restrooms. The quality of a restaurant’s restroom often reflects on the kitchen meaning restaurants need to have the most hygienic restrooms to equal the excellent food and service that they provide guests. Excel Dryer offers a full line of touchless hand dryer options as well as accessories allowing you to customize your restroom. Many restaurants now order their hand dryers with our optional new electrostatic HEPA (eHEPA) Filter, proven to remove 99.999% of viruses and 99.97% of bacteria from the airstream. This more durable filter is an affordable way to provide your customers with the highest level of hygiene in the restroom. This is standard in XLERATORsync® and optional in XLERATOR®, XLERATOReco®, and ThinAir®. The D|13 Sink System featuring our XLERATORsync Hand Dryer is the future of commercial restrooms and the most hygienic, sustainable, and cost-effective way to wash and dry hands. A masterpiece of form and function, the sink seamlessly fuses touchless, high efficiency fixtures on the sink deck allowing users to wash, rinse, and dry hands all in one place, as a result, no water is left on the floor. ThinAir Hand Dryers are a high-efficiency, touchless model that are surface-mounted and ADA-compliant! ThinAir dries hands in 14 seconds, uses 960 watts or less, and has a slimmer profile to meet ADA compliance standards. XLERATOR and XLERATOReco Hand Dryers are touchless, sensor activated and get the job done fast with zero contact. Less touch points means less chance for cross-contamination between restroom surfaces, ultimately helping reduce the spread of germs. The XLERATOReco uses ‘no heat’ technology to dry hands fast using only 500 watts, making it the most environmentally friendly hand dryer on the planet. Accessories that restaurants like to incorporate in their restrooms include: XLERATOR/XLERATOReco Recess Kit in brushed stainless or custom painted colors allows you to recess the dryer into the wall. An added benefit is that it minimizes water droplets on the floor. XLERATOR/XLERATOReco XCHANGER Combo Kit combines the recess kit with the XChanger panel to retrofit existing paper/trash receptacles. Available in standard and ADA heights. Wall Guards are designed to fit under Excel Dryers to protect wall surfaces from water droplets. Antimicrobial wall guards come in black and white and are treated with Microban® which will not wear off for the life of the wall guard. Brushed stainless wall guards are also available. Custom image covers allow you to convey your decision to go paperless, add a corporate logo, or custom design.

name: Fentimans Craft Sodas and Mixers
description: Fentimans is a natural botanically brewed craft beverage with a rich history of crafting premium beverages with knowledge and experience passed down through generations of the Fentimans family. In 1905, a fellow merchant asked Thomas Fentiman, a metalworker and ginger beer maker from Cleckheaton, England, for a loan. An agreement was reached and a recipe for Botanically Brewed Ginger Beer was provided as collateral. The loan was never repaid, so Thomas became the owner of the unique recipe, which he began using to produce Fentimans ginger beer. Thomas sold his botanically brewed ginger beer door-to-door via horse-drawn cart in ceramic jars affectionately known as GRAY HENS. The dog that proudly guards each bottle of Fentimans is Fearless, Thomas's faithful dog. Her portrait remains our logo to this day, and she proudly guards our headquarters, Fearless House. It has been over 100 years since Fentimans botanically brewed drinks were created and the business is still in the Fentimans family and owned by Thomas Fentiman's great-grandson. Our flavors continue to be handcrafted at Fearless House (our headquarters) in Hexham England. Our one-of-a-kind, time-honored Botanical Brewing process- The indulgent and distinctive flavor experience starts with scouring the globe for the finest natural ingredients. It’s what we do with those ingredients that make our drinks so special... We check every single ingredient by smell, taste and feel. We reject if not to the highest possible standard. We use raw ingredients to create flavor that goes into every bottle. Our flavor creation expert adds water, ethanol and ingredients to a vat and checks the ingredients daily. Flavor extraction has taken place when our flavor expert says so. Three secret ingredients are added and simmered to ensure flavors combine Temperature cooling and adding yeast. Brewing begins, at which point we begin to infuse with ginger Infusing continues for a minimum of 7 days and is tasted every 12 hours. Once the yeast has finished its work, we allow the botanical base to cool and mature to gain flavor. Flavor and botanical base are infused before carbonation. Water and natural beet sugar are added before carbonation adds sparkle to the liquid. THAT’S BOTANICAL BREWING! Pasteurization not only extends the life of our drinks; the heating process also plays a role in melding together the array of essential oils, botanical extracts and flavors. The result is a rounded, smooth and balanced taste experience. A multi-stage process from botanicals to bottle resulting in exquisite flavor in every Fentimans drink. Tonic Water, Mixers and Sodas are exquisitely crafted using the finest botanicals to ensure each flavor is the perfect partner for your Spirit, Mocktail. Our flavors: Premium Tonic Waters, Muddled Lime Ginger Beer, Ginger Ale, Yuzu, Soda, Elderflower, Ginger Beer, Rose Lemonade, Dandelion Burdock Mandarin & Seville Jigger, Cherry All products are VEGAN , GULTIN FREE , NO ADDITIVES

name: Fermod, Inc.
description: Fermod is the number one brand of food storage shelving in the world! Fermod leads the market in product layout and design, storage optimization, and hygiene awareness. Shelving construction is anodized aluminum with machined aluminum connecters and polymer, machine-washable inserts. This is a shelving product that helps the operator do their job better, faster, and significantly reduces the time needed for assembly and cleaning. • Fermod shelving uses an internal angle configuration – thus eliminates the need for any cross-bracing and allows corner shelf-loading, thus maximizing storage space without having to worry about working around a center post • Fermod shelving is very light, partially pre-assembled, and requires no tools for full assembly • Fermod shelving will not corrode or rust; no more complaints from health inspectors. We offer a lifetime warranty against rust and corrosion! • Fermod shelving uses polymer removable inserts which go right into the dishwasher • Products include static shelving, mobile shelving, dunnage racks, keg racks, and wall shelving

We keep our finger on the pulse of what our consumers want: the legendary favorites they love and new flavors and products they desire.

name: Fiberflon USA
description: Fiberflon is a manufacturer of PTFE and silicone coated fabrics, tapes and belts. Fiberflon serves many different segments of the food industry and offers a wide range of products. These products are used in the following applications; PTFE sheets for Clamshell Grills, PTFE sheets and silicone belts in Vertical Bun Toasters, silicone baking mats, silicone coated fiberglass bread molds, PTFE trays in accelerated cooking ovens, PTFE baking liners and many more. Our products are engineered to overcome the challenging environments in the food manufacturing processes. Fiberflon non-stick food processing belts, sheets and baskets offer faster cooking times with lesser downtime. Our products are ideal for conveying, frying, baking, grilling, microwaving, toasting and freezing. With the help of our wide selection of products, it is possible to cook faster and healthier, while saving time and money.

name: Fibmold Packaging Private Limited
description: FibMold manufactures high-quality, certified moulded fibre food packaging for the global foodservice and restaurant industry. Produced in a fully in-house, certified manufacturing facility , FibMold’s packaging meets food-contact standards while delivering consistent, reliable performance at scale . Designed for demanding foodservice environments , FibMold products are made using food-grade materials and controlled, audited processes . The facility operates in line with ISO, HACCP, and relevant food safety certifications , supporting the needs of quick-service restaurants, chains, and institutional operators. With end-to-end manufacturing control and a focus on quality, compliance, and dependable supply , FibMold delivers packaging solutions brands can trust across markets.

name: Fiero Group
description: Don’t miss Fiero AI live in action at the National Restaurant Show. Join us each morning as we kick off the day with full breakfast service straight from the oven—featuring freshly baked eggs, sandwiches, and more—then stay as we continue with live demos all day long, showcasing the full versatility of Fiero AI across multiple menu categories. From breakfast through lunch and beyond, you’ll experience firsthand how one system can transform your entire operation. Visit us at Booth 1057 and be sure to schedule an appointment with our team to get a personalized look at how Fiero can work for you. Fiero Forni brings generations of Italian craftsmanship to the modern kitchen, building high-performance ovens engineered for authentic artisan pizza. From mobile and rotating floor models to traditional wood-, gas-, and electric-fired ovens, each is designed for precision, durability, and visual impact—supporting a wide range of pizza styles and production goals with fully customizable options. But the future of pizza production is here. Fiero AI is a fully integrated, three-part automation system built specifically for high-volume foodservice environments. Designed to work with your dough—not replace it—Fiero AI enhances speed, consistency, and labor efficiency without sacrificing craftsmanship. From intelligent dough stretching to streamlined topping assembly and precision stone-belt baking, the system allows operators to: Reduce labor pressure and training time Increase output without increasing staff Maintain consistency across shifts and locations Expand menus beyond pizza into breakfast, lunch, and high-margin dayparts Optimize kitchen flow and production predictability This is not a generic robot performing repetitive tasks. Fiero AI is customizable to your recipe, your hydration levels, and your style—preserving your identity while modernizing your operation. Fiero Dough tools further support efficient, artisan-level dough handling in professional kitchens. Fiero Casa brings our Italian design into the home. At the National Restaurant Show, experience how Fiero is redefining what’s possible in pizza production—where tradition meets intelligent automation, and ovens become scalable profit centers.

name: FIFO Innovations
description: Creators of forward-thinking dispensing solutions, proven to increase margins, simplify operations and speed-up service. Discover why the worlds busiest restaurants rely on FIFO Innovations for their sauce dispensing needs.

name: Filtrox
description: Depth filtration for valuable liquids since 1938. SuperSorb An innovation in frying oil filtration technology to the foodservice industry. We developed Carbon Pads and Carbon Envelopes with and for foodservice operators, specifically for the filtration and treatment of frying oil. A unique combination of activated carbon and specialty adsorbents, built into a depth of cellulose fibers, offer both a fine oil filtration and treatment by removing damaging contaminants. Our Carbon Pads are easy-to-use and environmental friendly. Filtration is what we do. People are why we do it.

name: Finding Home Farms
description: Finding Home Farms is a working organic maple farm and sugarhouse in New York's Hudson Valley, founded by Laura and Dana Putnam. Dana is a fourth-generation sugarmaker — maple isn't a business he came to, it's a craft he was raised in. When they built the sugarhouse in Greenville, they brought that generational knowledge to a region with something distinct to offer: Hudson Valley maple has a character all its own. Less intensely sweet than northern varieties, with a softer, more buttery finish that performs differently — and better — in a professional kitchen. Our certified organic maple syrup, pancake and waffle mix, and small-batch jams are made for food service operations that care about what goes on the plate and the story behind it. Our Rye Barrel-Aged Maple Syrup is a SOFI Product of the Year winner — the kind of ingredient that earns a menu callout, not just a line in the recipe. What we bring to your operation: — Certified organic across our full maple line — A genuinely differentiated flavor profile: buttery, less aggressive sweetness, Hudson Valley-grown — SOFI award recognition that gives your team a talking point guests respond to — Gallon syrup, pancake mix, and retail-packaged jams. We are a small-batch producer with the consistency and supply reliability to be a real kitchen partner Available through Baldor Specialty Foods, Northeast and Mid-Atlantic. Direct wholesale inquiries welcome. Sonnet 4.6

Our network of farms and facilities have been in continuous operation since 1950, and the largest tea producers and exporters in China for 25 consecutive years. The operators under our umbrella rose to become some of the leading and most technologically advanced manufacturers and innovators in the Chinese tea industry. Our portfolio of products include EU compliant conventional and organic tea ingredients (first organic tea producer in China since 1989), decaf teas (one of only two companies in China who have a CO2 decaf facility) and chemical solvent-free tea extractions, including instant teas, tea polyphenols, and EGCG. With over 65 years’ experience as a leader in the tea industry, our tea producers export more than 40,000 tons of tea annually, including: green tea, black tea, white tea, oolong tea, pu'er tea, scented tea, special gourmet tea, and intensive processed tea products. Our producers were also the first to resurrect the technologies of sencha and matcha production.

description: The Fuji Oil Group is a global food ingredient manufacturer specializing in plant‑based oils and fats, industrial chocolate, emulsified and fermented ingredients, and soy‑based food solutions. Highly versatile for product development Suitable for dairy alternatives, prepared foods, bakery, and various plant‑based innovations. It also maintains multiple logistics and warehousing centers domestically and overseas.
