Garnier-Thiebaut belongs to HDM Industries; a generation, family-owned business and a global leader in the field of textile, work wear, hospitality and homes. We are a vertical company and we manage all the manufacturing steps: designing collections, dyeing threads, weaving, processing and finishing fabrics, cutting, sewing packaging and delivering finished products. To create a singular proximity with its customers, Garnier-Thiebaut arrived in the US in 1997 and imported its French "Savoir-Faire" featured through 3 brands: Garnier-Thiebaut, Bombacio and GT Hotel Collection. As a worldwide recognized linen designer and manufacturer, we offer today tailored products and services to fit all budgets and needs. We own a cutting and sewing facility in Virginia to better service the US market and we stock bed, bath and table linen collections in Virginia. We offer all fabrics and qualities: flax, polyflax, metis, 100% cotton, cottonrich, and polyester. With a human scale team and the performance of an international company, we designed an approach to meet client's expectations and bring their ideas to life. Our customers include the finest hotels, restaurants, resorts, casinos and cruise lines around the world.

name: Gasser Chair Co. Inc.
description: Founded in 1946 in Youngstown, OH, Gasser Chair is a family-owned American designer and manufacturer of high-quality seating products for casino and hospitality venues. For 80 years, Gasser's philosophy remains rooted in the belief that innovation, quality products, sustainability, and stellar customer service can change an industry a legacy that is chairished and enduring . Every curve, stitch, and structure is built-to-order for both form and function. This is the Gasser standard. Gasser Chair's pioneering spirit has shaped the seating industry since inceptionexperimenting with aluminum before it was standard, pushing the limits of materials, and setting new expectations for what defines a chair. That same innovative mindset lives in every product they manufacture today, from elegant casino lounges to high-performance hospitality spaces. Their chairs feature quality design elements, dependable grade-5 hardware, and durable materials that set the benchmark for excellence. The manufacturer is committed to the success and vision of their customers through industry-leading service, offering a collaborative design process and seating solutions engineered to exceed expectations. Gasser proudly operates under a Zero Waste Plan focused on continual bettermentupcycling material off-fall, recycling processed fabrics, improving employee recycling programs, and locally sourcing raw materials. After 80 years, Gasser Chair is guided by their four core values: respectful, accountable, process-driven, and adaptable. The company remains a trusted name in high-quality furniture manufacturing, standing behind every product with a legacy that's built to last.

name: Gast
description: Gast Manufacturing: Innovating Beverage Dispensing with Air Compression Expertise Gast Manufacturing is a global leader in air compression technology and engineering solutions, trusted across industries for innovation, reliability, and delivering measurable value. Leveraging our deep expertise, we've become beverage dispensing experts, solving challenges for organizations worldwide. Our advanced air-powered systems address common challenges in gas delivery and CO2 systems, transforming how fountain beverage systems operate. By eliminating direct CO2 emissions, our solutions enhance sustainability while delivering tangible commercial benefits: Reduced CO2 Outages: Minimizes interruptions, cutting costs, increasing beverage sales, and improving customer satisfaction. Smaller CO2 Storage Requirements: Enables the use of smaller bulk storage tanks, reducing rental or depreciation expenses. Fewer Deliveries: Reduces the frequency of bulk CO2 deliveries at drive-thrus, with an estimated 1216 fewer deliveries per outlet each year. Enhanced Safety: Eliminates potential leak points and CO2 pump exhaust, mitigating safety risks for operators and customers alike. At Gast, we combine advanced air-powered technology with industry insight to deliver tailored solutions that optimize performance, reduce costs, and promote safetyall while driving operational excellence and sustainability. Gast Manufacturing: Your partner in air-powered innovation and beverage dispensing excellence.

name: Gastronomous Technologies Inc.
description: Gastronomous is a fast-paced, innovative automation equipment designer and manufacturer — revolutionizing how food is prepared and enjoyed worldwide. We build purpose-driven automation solutions that empower kitchens to operate smarter, faster, and with greater consistency. From reducing labor dependency to elevating throughput, our technology sets a new standard for operational excellence in the QSR industry. Bring the power of AI & automation to your Heart of House. See ChronoGrill in action Here !

name: Gather Grills
description: It’s that tradition of food and fire that inspired the creation of Gather Grills. With a desire to renew our relationships and bring friends and family back together, we designed the ultimate fire-burning, food-cooking, guest-gathering table grill. The fire may last only a short time, but the human bonds last a lifetime. Our ancestors understood the power of fire to cook food and to warm hearts. That bond-strengthening power still exists today, and we need it more than ever. Gather Grills has taken that traditional wisdom and matched it with the most innovative outdoor entertaining device on the market today. By offering a multi-function cooker and fire pit surrounded by a table to draw friends closer, Gather Grills helps you put aside the distractions of the world and reconnect with the ones that matter most. So go ahead, tell your guests to have a seat and stay a while.

name: GBS US Foodservice Equipment Inc.
description: GBS US, headquartered in Florida, is a premier distributor of top-tier foodservice equipment brands across North America. Specializing in the distribution, support, and service of globally recognized equipment brands including: Angelo Po combi ovens, Campus Products glass and silverware polishing machinery, and Afinox Blast Chiller Freezers, were committed to delivering excellence and empowering our customers with industry-leading product solutions and after-sales service.

name: GELAGRI IBERICA
description: Gelagri is a pioneer and European leader in the frozen vegetable industry, defined by a unique bond between the earth and the consumer. Born from the strength of the Eureden Group, we are a cooperative-based company where the farmers aren't just suppliers—they are the owners of our vision. We are, at our core, experts in plant-based solutions . With deep roots in the fertile regions of Brittany (France) and the Ebro Valley (Spain), we specialize in transforming the harvest into high-quality frozen vegetables and prepared meals that nourish millions. Who we are at a glance: The Cooperative Spirit: Our identity is built on transparency, fair trade for our 1,900+ farmers, and a long-term commitment to rural development. Industrial Powerhouse: Operating through major production hubs like Gelagri Iberia (Milagro and Santaella), we combine traditional agricultural wisdom with cutting-edge technology. The Trusted Partner: We are the 'architects' behind the frozen aisles of major global retailers, providing tailor-made solutions and managing iconic brands such as Paysan Breton . In short, Gelagri is the bridge between sustainable farming and modern life , ensuring that the purity of the field reaches every kitchen with uncompromising quality.

name: GELOPAR REFRIGERACAO PARANAENSE LTDA
description: Gelopar Refrigeração Paranaense Ltda. is a leading Brazilian company in the commercial refrigeration sector, founded in 1972 and headquartered in Araucária, Paraná. With over 50 years of history, the brand is a leader in the manufacture of equipment for the storage and display of food and beverages, serving both the domestic and international markets.

name: Generous Brands
description: Generous Brands is dedicated to inspiring people to thrive through the power of vibrant nutrition through its leading brands, Bolthouse Farms, Health-Ade, and Evolution Fresh. Generous Brands partners with SAMBAZON to manufacture, distribute and sell SAMBAZON branded beverages.

name: GeoTegrity Eco Pack
description: GeoTegrity is the premier OEM manufacturer of sustainable high quality disposable food service and food packaging products. Since 1992, GeoTegrity has focused exclusively on manufacturing products using renewable raw materials. Our factory is BRC, BSCI, SEDEX and NSF certified, our products meet BPI, OK Compost, FDA and SGS standard. GeoTegrity is a fully integrated manufacturer with in-house design, prototype development and mold production. We offer various printing, barrier and structural technologies that enhance product performance. Up to today, our company has manufactured pulp molded tableware equipment and provided technical support for more than 100 domestic and overseas manufacturers of compostable tableware and food packaging.

name: GESAME Food Machinery INC
description: Gesame, a leading company in the manufacture of machinery and equipment for the handling of meat products, welcomes you to our website and invites you to take a look at our range of products.

name: Gielow Pickles
description: For five generations, the Gielow family has been producing high-quality pickles, peppers, and vegetables for the foodservice industry. Today, Gielow Pickles is a leading national supplier serving customers across the United States and Canada, supported by five manufacturing facilities and a strong distribution network. Our pickles and peppers are trusted by many national restaurant franchises as well as independent operators and distributors who depend on consistent quality, reliable supply, and great flavor. Gielow products are used across a wide range of menu applications—from burgers and sandwiches to Mexican cuisine and deli favorites—helping restaurants deliver the taste and crunch customers expect. Quality starts with the produce. We partner with top growers in the best crop regions and use consistent seed varieties to ensure uniform size, freshness, and flavor. Through advanced produce handling, efficient logistics, and a commitment to clean ingredient options, Gielow Pickles delivers dependable products designed specifically for foodservice. Whether you're serving burgers, tacos, sandwiches, or deli classics, Gielow Pickles provides the flavor, consistency, and reliability that foodservice operators trust.

name: Girard’s Foodservice Dressings, a HACO Culinary Company
description: The Girard’s brand of food service dressings was born from a fascination for flavor. Today, as an entity under HACO Foods Company, we craft our dressings, sauces, dips, and marinades with that same enthusiasm. It’s a culinary curiosity best gratified by bringing fresh tastes to your kitchen, your menu, and every bite your customers come back for.

name: Glacier
description: Capture waste heat energy from your refrigeration system to provide hot water while allowing your compressor to run more efficiently. A heat recovery system is a double-walled heat exchanger with a water storage tank that captures lost heat from your cooling system to heat your water for free. The heated water is then stored in the system until it is needed. The Glacier - Opti-Stor Heat Recovery System is recognized as the innovative leader in heat recovery technology.

name: Global Beerco USA, Inc
description: We are not newcomers to the craft beer industry. In fact, we were there at the beginning—when craft beer was still known as “microbrew.” Since 1992, Global Beerco has been supplying its proprietary Brewmaster’s Dry Wort along with patented bag-to-bag brewing technology. In 2012, we expanded into the hospitality sector with the introduction of HausCraft Beer—a patented, small-footprint, on-site craft brewery. This system produces premium-quality craft beer simply by adding water and yeast, eliminating the complexity of traditional brewing. Today, the HausCraft Beer System is designed to optimize brewing operations by dramatically reducing production costs while maximizing efficiency and profitability. Operators can offer a wide variety of premium craft beers at an exceptional cost per pour—ranging from approximately $0.35 to $0.55 per pint—compared to typical retail pricing of $10.00–$12.00 per pint. No brewmaster is required, creating a high-margin opportunity that traditional hot-side brewing systems cannot match. As the craft beer market evolves, rising production costs and operational complexity have challenged many traditional craft breweries. HausCraft addresses these realities with a streamlined, turnkey solution that removes barriers and simplifies production. By bringing brewing in-house in a scalable format, operators gain control, improve margins, and consistently deliver fresh, high-quality craft beer. Now is the time to rethink how craft beer is produced and served. With the HausCraft system, businesses can seamlessly integrate brewing, attract a loyal customer base, and unlock a powerful new revenue stream.

name: Global Industrial
description: Reliable Solutions Behind Every Great Guest Experience Global Industrial helps hospitality teams source, restock, and manage high-quality, industrial-strength equipment and supplies with quick shipping, trusted service, easy digital ordering, and a strong focus on value. With Operations, Supply & Equipment (OS&E) expertise, we ensure smooth back-of-house operations, streamlined stock management, and consistent, next-level guest experiences while confidently balancing quality, reliability, and cost. KEEP YOUR OPERATIONS RUNNING STRONG…WE CAN SUPPLY THAT! Visit Globalindustrial.com , and follow us on Facebook , Instagram , and LinkedIn.

name: Global Organic Distro
description: BLNCD and Foundry Nation are Minnesota-based cannabis brands redefining modern consumption through thoughtfully crafted beverages and edibles. BLNCD leads with a wellness-forward approach, pairing cannabinoids with functional botanicals to create balanced, elevated experiences. Foundry Nation brings a bold counterpoint, reimagining nostalgic flavors with a modern THC twist. Together, they offer a full portfolio designed for how people consume today. Intentional, social, and anything but one-size-fits-all.

name: Global Payments
description: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN), a leading worldwide provider of payment technology and software solutions, has announced the release of Genius , a powerful new POS command center for business operations. The new Genius platform enables global expansion and vertical specialization at scale, allowing Global Payments to rapidly launch in multiple countries, adapting to the unique requirements of each market. It also unlocks new opportunities in specialized retail segments like age regulated businesses, higher education and consumer service businesses. Genius for Restaurants is designed to meet the operational needs of every restaurant type and scale, from full service table management to checkouts in counter service environments. The platform, which is paired with hardware engineered for higher performance, delivers everything restaurants need: waitlist and reservations, real-time reporting, tableside payments, marketing tools, loyalty programs and more. Genius for Retail is designed to work easily right out of the box. From managing orders and tracking inventory to delivering reliable checkouts and built-in tools for loyalty, marketing, invoicing and reporting, Genius for Retail has everything small and medium-sized retailers need to deliver seamless customer experiences. www.globalpayments.com

name: Global Tableware Collective
description: Global Tableware Collective (GTC) is a pioneering initiative dedicated to empowering under-represented brands in the hospitality industry. By uniting under one umbrella, GTC offers these brands access to resources, expertise, and distribution channels, enabling them to grow nationally in a competitive marketplace. With a commitment to quality, craftsmanship, and authenticity, GTC aims to redefine the standards of excellence in the hospitality industry.

name: Gloria Keg
description: Our patented 10L and 7L kegs were designed to hold cocktails, but will dispense any beverage. At this size, you can simply batch full bottle recipes. We use co2 to keep the ingredients pressurized, fresh, and carbonated if needed. Gloria is the perfect size to serve a crowd, take on the boat, or to use in a business setting to dispense a perfect consistent cocktail. Gloria is easy and fun to use, practical, and looks great! We provide recipes to inspire you, but your options are endless!

name: GMG END. MUTFAK EKIPM. SAN. VE TIC. LTD. STI.
Go-Pak Group
description: Go-Pak Group (member of SCGP) is an award-winning manufacturer and supplier providing packaging solutions to the food service, cash carry and retail sectors globally. We consist of three operating current companies - Go-Pak UK Ltd, Go-Pak Paper Products Vietnam Ltd and Go-Pak Vietnam Ltd. We will officially launch Go-Pak International Ltd this year as an effective solution for mixed containers and a one-stop shop. We offer a variety of hot and cold food and drink packaging and accessories as well as high quality, custom print to bring your branding to life such as disposable paper cups, plastic cup (PP/PET/rPET), soup containers, paper trays, plastic/paper food containers, plastic and paper cutlery, paper/plastic portion pots, food pail, microwave food containers, coffee stirrers and skewers,...etc. All perfectly matched to your requirements. We constantly evolve to provide best-in-class solutions with outstanding customer focus and quality. We integrate sustainability features and benefits as we design, manufacture and deliver food service packaging, from farm to fork. We focus on sustainable and eco-friendly products, particularly our paper-based and recycled plastic product lines as our own brand of Edenware and Go-rPET. Our Go-Recycle scheme offers customers and brands a simple, responsible and cost-effective way to recycle old corrugated cardboard(OCC) - recycling more waste, saving costs and supporting a truly circular economy .

name: Gold Medal Products Co.
description: Gold Medal Products Co. has more than 500 employees committed to fueling our product lines with sales-generating concessions, as well as specialty foods, machines, and supplies. In addition to the network of dealers worldwide, Gold Medal has 15 locations throughout the nation to serve you. A lot has happened throughout our history. The third generation of the Evans family now leads the company and the fourth generation is working here as well. From our humble beginnings, we've grown to over 500 employees supporting efforts from engineering to manufacturing, marketing to customer service. We've been at the forefront of industry innovations, creating new products, continually improving processes and above all, serving the needs of our customers. Put our experience to work for you. Whether you're new to Gold Medal or a decades-long, loyal customer, we will help you get the most out of your concession business. We're proud Gold Medal is trusted as the industry's leading concession equipment manufacturer and supplier, and we are committed to continuing to earn your trust by providing top quality products, service, and support. Together, we will keep making history, now and in the future. You can count on us to deliver snacks, smiles success!

name: Gold Spectrum
description: Gold Spectrum is a hemp company based out of East Tennessee with a full lineup of products available for viewing and purchase on our website. Our most recent is our Delta-9-infused seltzer, and our alcohol recovery/wellness shot called 'Thank Me Later,' which we will have both available to sample at the show!

name: Golden Coast Plastic Packaging Co., Ltd
description: GOLDEN COAST PLASTIC PACKAGING CO. LTD, GROWING UP WHILE PRODUCING VARIOUS FOOD PACKAGING BIODEGRADABLE HINGED CONTAINER, BIODEGRADABLE PLASTICS, DUE TO EXCELLENT QUALITY AND SERVICE, GOLDEN COAST PLASTIC EXPANDED THEIR OVERSEA MARKET RAPIDLY AND EXPORT TO MANY INTERNATIONAL COUNTRIES IN SOUTHEAST ASIA, AFRICA, MIDDLE EAST, EUROPE AND AMERICA.

name: Golden Star Wholesale
description: At Mosul Kubba, we pride ourselves to be the first company to offer a variety of Authentic Mediterranean Partially Cooked Frozen Food products at stores across the country

name: Golden Waffles
description: Golden Waffles is the global leader in fresh‑baked waffle solutions, serving restaurants, hotels, and foodservice operators worldwide. Founded in 1937, the company pioneered the world’s first all‑inclusive waffle program—providing premium mixes, superior commercial equipment, and gold‑glove service across 50,000+ customer locations in 60+ countries. With its turnkey approach, Golden Waffles helps operators deliver consistently delicious, high‑margin waffles while simplifying back‑of‑house operations.

name: Good Young Co., Ltd.
description: Good Young has experienced 35 years of growth and accumulated 20 years of rich experience in the field of automated production. Our factory certified with FSSC22000, HACCP, RFA and Halal and main customers include chain restaurant, milk tea beverage stores, department stores and supermarket and raw material wholesalers. In 2024, Good Young took a major step forward by establishing Taiwan's largest modern production base for tea and food products, driven by innovation and a commitment to excellence. We have integrated research and development, design, production, packaging and logistics for a consistent commodity service. Whether it is tea flavor development, syrup, powder, other food production and raw material supply for bubble tea, we are committed to delivering outstanding products and services to customers worldwide. Through modernized production, we can control quality more efficiently and achieve precise traceability management of the entire production process. In addition to our state-of-the-art equipment, we also have a full international production certification fully meeting quality and export standards fromraw materials to finished products. With extensive global market experience, we export to more than 35 countries including USA, UK, Germany, Japan, Korea, Philippines, Malaysia and etc. and provide tailored solutions based on customer needs and ensure on-time delivery and mission success. Good Young works hand-in-hand with you to bring Taiwan beverage to the world. Good Young ,Always Ahead, Always for You.

name: Goose Point Oysters
description: Nisbet Oyster Co., Inc. has been crafting exceptional seafood experiences from the pristine waters of Willapa Bay, Washington, since the 1970s. Proudly trading under the Goose Point Oysters brand, we’re a family-owned company with a passion for sustainable oyster farming, innovative processing, and delivering shellfish of unparalleled quality. Nestled in Bay Center on the southwestern coast, our vertically integrated oyster hatchery, farm, and processing facility allow us to nurture our oysters from tide to table — ensuring freshness and flavor every step of the way. Our offerings range from hand-shucked oyster meats in various sizes to live, in-shell Goose Point™ Oysters, and our signature BlueSeals™ — pre-shucked oysters perfected through High Pressure Cold Pasteurization for unmatched purity and convenience. Craving something bold? Don’t miss our custom-logo Oyster Shooters™ or the irresistible crunch of our Signature Spice Oyster Breading to complement our hand-shucked oysters. Safety, quality, and sustainability are at the heart of everything we do. With our solar powered hatchery operations at Hawaiian Shellfish LLC, our pristine growing waters, a BAP-certified and inspected processing facility, and cutting-edge techniques, we promise each oyster meets the highest standards. Whether you’re a chef seeking the freshest ingredients, a retailer stocking premium seafood, or a distributor looking for reliability, Goose Point Oysters delivers — every time. Discover the taste of the Pacific Northwest and learn more at goosepoint.com.

name: Gordian
description: Grown in the Land of Eternal Spring, Gordian brings you the finest avocados and guacamole straight from Guatemala, year-round. As a family-owned and operated company, we proudly grow, harvest, pack, ship, and distribute premium, fresh avocados worldwide. With over 10 farms spread across the Guatemalan highlands, we hand-pick avocados all year long, ensuring a consistent supply to meet the high global demand. Our mission is deeply rooted in transcending family values and safeguarding ancestral agricultural practices, all while promoting our local economy. We uphold and surpass quality levels not only set by the industry, but also by ourselves. Discover our in-house recipes, made by our founders, with no preservatives or additives. Original: Fresh, ripe Hass avocados in every jar, delivering pure guacamole goodness. Fiesta: A bold blend of fresh tomatoes, onions, cilantro, and lime for a flavor-packed experience. Smashed: Perfectly ripe, hand-selected avocados smashed to perfection for versatile food service and wholesale needs. Juices and honey Our products are available in a variety of presentations, including cups in two sizes, rigid bags, and mini packs (6 and 12 packs). We also offer white-label packaging, giving you the opportunity to brand your packaging and establish a unique market presence with convenience and cost-effectiveness.

name: Goslyn
description: Goslyn is an industry leader in grease removal with its line of sustainable and environmentally-friendly automatic grease removal devices and related solutions. Its patented, high-efficiency, cost-effective automatic grease removal devices: Have no moving parts Made with hygienic and durable grade 304 stainless steel Have less maintenance time Maintain a 96.4% grease removal efficiency, higher than other systems on the market Goslyn automatic grease removal devices (AGRDs) are immiscible liquid separators designed for food processing and preparation settings and other applications that generate fats, oils, greases and solids (FOGS).

name: GOTEC SA
description: Manufacturer of rotary vane pumps, solenoid pumps, condensate water pumps, tank pumps, oil lifters located in Switzerland since 1964

name: GotFreshBreath
description: If your business strives to create unforgettable environments for your customers and employees, our dispensers were designed for you. Offering mouthwash is a very simple way to give everyone interacting with your business an unforgettable experience. Every GotFreshBreath product was engineered with businesses in mind. Each dispenser is guaranteed to hold-up to daily use and is completely tamperproof. You will not find a better end-to-end solution anywhere else.

name: Gourmet Culinary Partners
description: WHO WE ARE Gourmet Culinary Partners brings over 40 years of industry expertise in delivering chef-driven, high-quality menu solutions tailored to the distinct requirements of diverse food service operations. Our award-winning culinary team collaborates with clients to develop innovative, scalable programs that enhance operational performance and elevate the overall dining experience. From resorts and restaurants to cruise ships and airlines, GCP provides versatile, ready-to-serve solutions designed to seamlessly integrate with your service model and support exceptional guest satisfaction. HOW WE GET THERE We partner with over 70 different distribution partners nationwide to ensure that our products are available to you when you need them. WHERE WE MAKE IT With 4 large manufacturing facilities across the United States we have production and packaging capabilities to meet any demand.

name: Grabeco Packaging LLP
description: At Grabeco Packaging LLP , we believe sustainability is not just a trend — it’s a responsibility. Founded with a vision to create a cleaner, greener future, Grabeco specializes in manufacturing and exporting premium Sugarcane Bagasse Fiber Molded Disposable Tableware under our flagship brand, GoEco . GoEco stands for products that are eco-friendly, durable, and designed for the modern world . Our range of compostable tableware is made from 100% renewable sugarcane fiber, offering a sustainable alternative to plastic without compromising on quality, strength, or style. In just a few years, we have proudly expanded our footprint across five continents and 25+ countries , including the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Dubai, Israel, Greece, and Kuwait , becoming a trusted name among importers, distributors, and brands who value quality and compliance. Our Product Certifications: BPI Compostable TUV OK Home & Industrial Compost PFAS Safe Products 100% Biobased Our Factory Certifications: BRCGS A+ Grade Certified SEDEX SMETA Audited ISO 9001 Certified Star Export House Our strict adherence to global quality and sustainability standards ensures that every GoEco product is safe, compostable, and manufactured under the highest levels of food safety compliance. Why Choose GoEco? 100% Compostable and Biodegradable Superior Strength and Finish Customizable Packaging Solutions Lower Landed Costs Compared to other Suppliers Fast Turnaround with Global Shipping Expertise As a Government of India Certified Export House , Grabeco Packaging LLP is committed to delivering innovative, environmentally responsible solutions that help our partners achieve their sustainability goals while giving end-users the performance they expect. At GoEco , we don’t just sell products. We deliver peace of mind, a promise of quality, and a commitment to a better tomorrow. GoEco — Sustainable. Reliable. Remarkable.

name: Grand River Honey Co.
description: Our family run business has been producing and selling pure raw clover honey in the Dakotas for over 50 years. We are headquartered in Hettinger, ND. Our vast plains and National Grasslands allow native yellow clover to thrive beyond compare. Yellow Sweet Clover, the floral source for our delectable honey, is the building block of our business. The honey it produces is sought around the world. We strive to deliver a pure raw clover honey from North and South Dakota that has no comparison

name: Grandstand
description: We Are Innovators. From product trends to cutting-edge decoration technologies, we’ve delivered high-quality products and creative branding solutions to the craft beverage industry for over 35 years. Our story started in 1988 in Lawrence, printing water bottles and T-shirts. When a local brewery asked us to print on glass growlers, we adapted quickly, embracing a changing industry and finding new ways to make it happen. Growler by growler, pint by pint, Grandstand grew alongside the craft beverage industry. Like the businesses we serve, we became obsessed with quality and kept learning every step of the way. Today, we’ve partnered with more than 17,000 craft breweries, distilleries, restaurants, corporations, and businesses of all sizes. We help ensure their brands are compelling, credible, consistent, and connected. More than 30 years later, we bring the full weight of our experience, creativity, and expertise to showcase your business. Give your brand the attention it deserves — every time.

name: Great Lakes Label
description: Great Lakes Label, a proud veteran-owned company, manufactures foodservice labels and distributes label automation systems to a variety of industries. Get your foodservice labels, food and beverage labels, and wine and spirit labels at Great Lakes Label. Great Lakes Label celebrated 30 years in 2024. Today, we have 6 presses, a booklet machine, a shrink machine, and more than 60 employees. We manufacture pressure-sensitive labels, resealable labels, extended content labels, booklet labels, shrink sleeve labels, and distribute label applicators for a variety of industries. Our foodservice labels come in a variety of sizes, shapes, stock and adhesive options. These labels offer security for your to go & delivery food, inventory management for BOH, and help improve order efficiency and correctness. If you're looking for tamper-evident labels, delivery bag labels, security labels, catering labels, identifier labels, day code labels, dissolvable labels, pressure-sensitive labels, resealable labels, extended content labels, booklet labels, shrink sleeve labels or linerless labels we're your label supplier! We also have a solution for the convenience and ease of a label dispenser for your employees. Our label dispensers are designed for controlled environments. They're heavy-duty, USA-made, and have a powder coat finish for long-lasting durability within the QSR industry. Our experience with top brands within the foodservice industry has provided us with great knowledge in what works and doesn't work. If you're looking for a reliable label supplier, look no further.

name: Great River
description: We are a company that is dedicated to providing the world with environmental solutions to the increasingly prevalent problems of unsustainable plastic consumption. We believe that creating products that are plant-based, renewable, 100% compostable, and most of all, sustainable will help us achieve such a mission. We are PLA and Compostable Paper product experts. For any questions please email us at sam@eco-greatriver.com.

name: Grecian Delight Kronos
description: We're a global food leader, known for innovative products and ethnic flavors. We started with Greek cuisine and now our kitchen is the world. From our full line of Greek and Mediterranean foods to global flavors blazing on the horizon, we're ready to change America's menus. We have two pioneering brands at the head of the table, Grecian Delight and Kronos Foods. Each brand has its own unique history, which has laid the foundation for our quest to discover the great flavors of tomorrow. Together, we are valuable partners to our customers, driven by authentic ingredients and eating experiences. About Grecian Delight Foods: Founded in 1974 by Peter Parthenis, Sr. Motivated by his endless drive, entrepreneurial spirit, Hellenic roots, love of Greek food and passion for innovation, Parthenis was the first to manufacture and nationally market gyros. Since the very start, Grecian Delight and the Parthenis family have been dedicated to quality and sharing the very best authentic Greek Mediterranean cuisine with restaurants and consumers. Grecian Delight is now a premier provider of authentic selections from gyros, global proteins, specialty breads, to tzatziki, hummus and spreads, falafel, plant-based proteins and more. All across America, people ask for Grecian Delight Foods by name. About Kronos Foods Corp: It all started in 1975 with a love for Gyros, the Greek culture and community. Chris Tomaras, a Chicago entrepreneur, rolled up his sleeves to make delicious Gyros and Mediterranean foods for restaurants. It was with his success and hard work that Kronos was born. Over the years, Kronos brought pre-formed, ready-to-broil gyros cones to market, rolled out portion-controlled gyros meats, and expanded into sauces, hummus, bakery items, and more. Followed by the introduction of KronoBROIL technology, providing pre-cooked, ready-to-eat gyros slices without the need for special foodservice equipment. To this day, Kronos continues to explore bold new possibilities.

name: Green Belly Foods Inc.
description: Green Belly Foods is a family business started by two cousins to sustainably support the people they love. They fuse traditional Guatemalan hot sauces and salsas with craft Colorado quality. The dream started in 2014 when Juan shared his Guatemalan mom’s secret savory hot sauce and started importing smoked chile cobaneros from small indigenous farmers in Guatemala. From here his cousin Charlie helped him transform the local farmers market business to a regional brand offering one of the most popular hot sauces ever made. Now you can be one of the first to gain access to their new food service offerings including half gallons!

name: Green Experts Corp
description: GREEN EXPERTS CORP. is a pioneering syrup manufacturer and bubble tea supplier with passions since 1994. We are specialized in good value and premium quality fruit syrups designed to enhance your beverage experience. Our popular items, such as Premcham Fruit Cordial and Lucky Tree Fruit Syrup, are perfect for bubble tea, juice drinks, smoothies, soda drinks, cocktails and many more. We offer ONE-STOP service of boba tea materials to serve customers all over the world. We also offer tailored OEM and ODM services, allowing businesses to create signature drinks that resonate with their customers' preferences.

name: Green Mountain Flavors, Inc.
description: Started in 1992 to address the market need for premium-quality, natural flavorings, Green Mountain Flavors, Inc.® manufactures a wide variety of clean-label natural and organic-certified flavors, extracts, and colors. Our products find use in a wide variety of markets, including bakery, beverage, confection, culinary/food service, dairy, nutrition, and retail. As allowed by FDA regulations, many competitive “natural” flavors contain a number of artificial/synthetic non-flavoring ingredients. Since our inception, we have avoided the use of such artificial/synthetic non-flavoring ingredients. Our standard natural and organic-certified flavors, extracts and colors contain: NO artificial emulsifiers, such as polysorbate 80 NO artificial FD&C “certified” colors NO artificial flavors NO artificial preservatives, such as potassium sorbate or sodium benzoate NO synthetic solvents, such as propylene glycol Whether your flavor requirement is for a pint or a drum, ten pounds or a ton, Green Mountain Flavors can provide the quality, service, and reliability you require.

description: DEFINITION OF PERFECTION GURAL PORCELAIN has been producing flawless porcelain since 1989 by combining traditional craftsmanship knowledge and aesthetic understanding withcontemporary production techniques. This qualified production is carried out not only within the country but also in 60 different countries, over a total area of275,000 m2, of which 75,000 m2 is closed. The quality of the flawless porcelain is certified by TSE and ISO 9001 Quality Assurance Standards. By using both adeep-rooted corporate culture and modern production techniques simultaneously, Güral Porcelain has earned a special place in the industry. Güral Porcelain, whichdevelops robotic solutions for special forms, has made significant improvements in both quality and production capacity with this manufacturing technique. In addition to its R&D studies, Güral Porcelain, a brand with high environmental sensitivity, provides heat recovery in many of the furnaces in its productionfacilities. Heat that would be released into the environment is transferred to suitable areas within the factory where it can be reused, leading to improvements inenergy savings and carbon monoxide emissions. MORE THAN PORCELAIN Craftsmanship, art, quality, and success come together in an unparalleled brand: Güral Porcelain. Since 1989, we have focused on producing flawless porcelain,always questioning how to achieve better. Every time we found answers to these questions, we were rewarded with success. We have become one of the mostrespected porcelain brands in our country and around the world. In order to carry the centuries-old craftsmanship culture and aesthetic heritage of our land to newgenerations, we have created a new porcelain culture. This culture has been adding value to both our country and our employees from the very beginning. Tocontribute to the porcelain culture, we conduct new R&D studies every day in our production facilities. Combining craftsmanship and art, we prepare the future options we create for the spirit of the past with modern production techniques and traditional handcraftmethods with great care. For us, porcelain is like an endless success story that grows as it is told, expanding as it is produced, and spreading to everyone. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dZ9qeH4-ZLA

name: GURSA PACKAGING
description: As GURSA and MIKROPAK Packaging Group; Since 1970, we have been serving in production lines including Paper Corrugated Cardboard Boxes, die Cut Boxes, Food Packaging (pizza, hamburger, chips, take away, fries etc..)), Corrugated Offset and Chrome Cardboard Packaging. In our facilities; Production is made with Flexo, Super Flexo and Offset technologies. Our Esenyurt factory, which became operational in 2015, has a closed area of 30.000m²; -Gursa, 72.000 Tons/Year and -Mikropak 90 Million Sheets/Year packaging are produced. 3rd factory in Tekirdağ, Çorlu, in Velimeşe Industrial Zone, is commissioned in the first quarter of 2023 and started production (our new machines are currently being installed), the first phase of which will have a production capacity of 100.000 tons/year in a closed area of 15.000m² and a total of 65.000m². 4th Factory- We would like you to know that we have made an investment decision for our Corrugated Cardboard Paper and Corrugated Cardboard Packaging production facilities, which have an area of 162.000m² in our fourth factory, Kütahya Zafer Organized Industrial Zone, and that we continue our project with determination.

name: Gusto Brazil
description: We are pleased to introduce our authentic Brazilian cheese bread, a unique product crafted with tapioca flour and real mozzarella and parmesan cheeses. Our bread is naturally gluten-free, non-GMO, sugar-free, trans fat-free, soy-free, and low in carbs, offering full flavor with clean ingredients. Our frozen rolls serve as a versatile, multipurpose dough. Once thawed, they can be used to create waffles, pizza crusts, tortillas, pies, and more. We offer these in four flavors: Traditional, Garlic, Jalapeño, and Bacon. This frozen, take-and-bake line provides exceptional versatility for your customers while remaining a naturally gluten-free option.

name: H&H Products Company
description: HH Products is a specialty manufacturer of delicious and innovative beverage, syrup and ingredient solutions designed to streamline your operations. Whether you order from our stock products or develop a signature recipe with us, HH Products guarantees consistent quality, accuracy and reliability. **NEW FOR 2024 - Flavorful Foods SOFT SERVE Mixes - Vanilla, Chocolate and Pineapple. A rich and creamy soft serve experience sure to satisfy any sweet tooth. **LACTOSE FREE** Our easy to mix beverage concentrates include teas, lemonades, juices, daiquiri mixes and slushes. Our Betty Jean's Old Fashioned Lemonade concentrate is so good, your guests will swear it was freshly squeezed. Come by and taste our brand new Strawberry Lemonade and Peach Sweet Tea! HH ingredients include pancake waffle syrups, food coloring, vanilla flavoring, corn syrups, sweeteners and more. From our Worcestershire and Soy Sauce to our Florida Key West Lemon and Key Lime Juice, you can whip up recipes with confidence knowing you are using only the best ingredients. All HH products are quality controlled in our SQF Certified manufacturing facility ensuring we deliver consistent products in every batch. Restaurant operators trust HH Products to provide delicious and innovative wholesale beverages and ingredients each and every time. Call and find out first-hand why our customers rave about our good old fashioned customer service. ` Even though we've grown quite a bit since our humble beginning in 1964, Mr. Mrs. Hartley (that's who the HH stands for) still make sure our customers are treated like family. Give us a call today and find out why our good old fashioned customer service keeps em coming back for more.

name: Hainan Great Shengda Eco Pack Co., Ltd
description: Hainan Great Shengda focuses on natural fiber food tableware, including plates, bowls, takeaway food containers, trays and coffee cup LIDS. We currently have two production sites and have invested in a digital workshop equipped with 120 fully automated molding equipment, with a total daily capacity of 120 tons/day. Our environmentally friendly products are made from bagasse and bamboo and are certified by FDA, OK Compost and ASTM. We serve more than 50 countries and 10 million consumers worldwide.Committed to sustainable development, our goal is to keep the sky blue, the water clear and the land clean.

name: Hakka Brothers Corp.
description: If youre looking for reliable, affordable, commercial-grade food processing tools, countertop equipment, baking equipment, and refrigeration equipment, were your best choice. We offer a wide range of products, from stuffing machines to sausage stuffing machines, hot dog rollers to bread display cases, beverage machines to refrigerators, to meet your culinary equipment needs at great prices. Our products are backed by an experienced and expert service and support team. We have the largest number of Certified Food Service Professionals (CFSP) and Commercial Food Equipment Service Association Certified Technicians (CFESA) in the United States. Our companys commitment to continuing education keeps our employees at the forefront of every aspect of the food service industry. Our sausage stuffing machine is one of Amazons top sellers. Working with our manufacturing partners, we produce a wide range of countertop food preparation equipment for every type of business. Whether youre looking for a stock pot for your club commissary or a floor deep fryer for your new deli, we have efficient and cost-effective kitchen equipment for you. We have an extensive line of countertop appliances including coffee makers, coffee warmers, slicers, toasters, grinders, hot dog roller graters, induction hobs and more. Each product is engineered to work right out of the box and to consistently produce consistent results. Our commitment to quality and passion for great customer service and fair prices means you can rely on our products for years to come.

name: Hale and Hearty Soups
description: Hale & Hearty began as a New York City-based soup company known for its small‑batch, scratch‑made soups and comforting, classic flavors. The brand built its reputation on fresh, never‑frozen soups made with real stock and traditional techniques, a philosophy they still highlight today. Founded in 1990 and reinvented under new ownership in 2022, our brand continues to honor its roots while embracing a bold new chapter. Our founding Executive Chef still leads the kitchen, crafting fresh, homemade soups built on a signature 36‑hour, scratch‑made bone broth that forms the base of everything we create. Today, we ship our fresh soups from coast to coast, offering a wide range of flavors that bring comfort, variety, and quality to every table. With a strong, enduring brand identity and expanding capabilities that now include sauces and dressings, we remain committed to delivering real, handcrafted food made with care.

name: Halperns'
description: Halperns Steak Seafood is chef-driven and center-of-plate focused supplying only the highest-quality proteins and specialty items from suppliers that reflect our commitment to quality, and match our drive to exceed our customers expectations. Many of our suppliers are steeped in rich family history like our own, with pride and dedication unmatched in todays fast-paced world. Committed to exceeding our customers specifications and expectations every day, we pride ourselves on delivering uncompromising quality meats and artisan ingredients sourced from the finest boutique suppliers from around the world and delivering them at the peak of freshness or aged to perfection. Halperns' partners with companies that have devoted significant resources to practices that protect the environment. Sustainability is a priority. Halperns is more than a supplier, we are committed to partnering with our customers for long-term success by sharing our expertise, stewarding innovation and refining old favorites.

name: Hamilton Beach Commercial
description: Hamilton Beach Brands, Inc. sells over 34 million appliances to retail customers in the United States every year. The company's global commercial brand, aptly named Hamilton Beach Commercial, is highly regarded for its full line of innovative products found in hotels, restaurants, and bars worldwide.Dedicated to offering excellent customer service, Hamilton Beach Commercial is always there to support businesses before, during, and after a purchase. It's a highly supportive partnership that ultimately adds significant value to any equipment investment, no matter how large or small. Hamilton Beach Commercial's global product line includes high performance blenders, bar blenders, drink mixers, juicers, culinary blenders, immersion mixers, toasters, chamber vacuum packaging machines, vacuum sealers, dishers, coffee makers, coffee urns, roaster oven, rice cookers, dehydrator, irons, hair dryers, clock radios, and more. From blending drinks to mixing dough to serving coffee, the expanding full line of products provides the solution to your food service needs. Visit us at hamiltonbeachcommercial.com

name: Hampton Farms Peanuts
description: Hampton Farms, a leading family-owned processor of nut and nut butter products, is the No. 1 brand of in-shell peanuts in the U.S. We sell peanut seed to farmers and work with them throughout the growing season to ensure the best quality peanuts. Visit our booth!

name: Handgards
description: For over 60 years, Handgards has earned the respect and confidence of the food service industry as a progressive innovator in food safety. We also are the industry leader in supplying quality products to our customers. We have been the leader for food service disposables and have flourished by retaining our industry leading ability to develop new and innovative products that help you save time and money. We are also first in food safety innovations that protects the end-user from costly outbreaks of food contamination by providing the broadest menu of products that have a high standard of service all our own. Unlike other companies in our industry, we're an innovator and a manufacturer, not just a distributor. We are capable of manufacturing a wide variety of films using HDPE, LDPE, mLLDPE and Nylon resins. In addition, flexographic printing on the film is available to add a distinct branding message to your products. We continue to manufacture products right here in the USA, providing quicker turnarounds. We offer one of the most extensive and comprehensive lines of food safety, food protection, protective wear, and food service products in the industry. We proudly serve industry leaders and we've been the undisputed market leader for over five decades, an extraordinary achievement in any industry. Our primary mission is to satisfy the needs of our customers by providing quality products and service of the highest level. With our modern manufacturing facility, Handgards is very well prepared to provide manufacturing solutions and provide expertise for your industrial applications for years to come. We are committed to the quality of our relationships with our customers, suppliers, community, and to each other. We are challenged to do our best and are empowered to accomplish the job at hand. As we work together we remember how past experience has helped us grow, but are not intimidated by what is new and untried. Through honest and open communication, we share knowledge and ideas for solving problems and making improvements. At Handgards we accept the challenge to grow our company and continue to be the recognized leader in our industry.

name: HANGZHOU GELATO TECH CO.,LTD.
description: Gelato Tech. Co., Ltd. is one of the leading companies in the manufacture of commercial ice cream equipment. The iconic MILES GALAXY PRO series has unparalleled product stench in its field, gained an excellent global reputation for its performance, practicality and premium quality and fast after-sales service. Thousands of professional customers from more than 50 countries use this machine to make and sell fresh ice cream. It has become the bench mark and most widely used front bar-type displayable ice cream machine series all around the world for gelato bars, pastry shops, cafes, restaurants , hotels and bars.

name: Hangzhou Mingxuan Sanitary Products Co., Ltd.
description: Established in 2010, Mingxuan is a manufacturer specialized in producing Paper Napkin, Toilet Tissue, Paper Towel, Facial Tissue and Mother Paper Roll, etc. Our factory located in Hangzhou City, near the port Ningbo and Shanghai. With more than 16 years exporting experience and convenient transportation access, our products sell to America, Europe, Southeast Asia, etc, and also appreciated by their purchasers.

name: Hangzhou Qingshe Paper Co.,Ltd
description: Hangzhou Qingshe Paper Co.,Ltd established in 2019, is a professional engaged in the research, development, sale and service of hand paper towel, napkins, toilet paper, facial paper, non-woven fabric tissue. Our company covers an area of 5,000 square meters. We are located in Fuyang District Hangzhou,adjacent to Ningbo Port and Shanghai Port.
