We will produce stocks every month, so we can ship within 3 days if you order stocks paper. Adhering to the business principle of mutual benefits, we have had a reliable reputation among our customers because of our professional services, quality products and competitive prices. We also welcome O E M and O D M orders. Our experienced staff members are always available to discuss your requirements and ensure full customer satisfaction.Also we can provide free samples if you need. Whether selecting a current product from our catalog or seeking engineering assistance for your application,you can talk to our customer service center about your sourcing requirements.We warmly welcome customers from at home and abroad to cooperate with us for common success.

name: HANSIN PACKING
description: Hansin Packing was founded in 2006, with a footprint in 100+ countries across all continents. Hansin has 3 manufacturers with a total of 60,000 square meters of production/warehouse space. Our company has built a GMP 100,000-level clean workshop, with 10+ patent-owned bag-making lines. From injection molding, film extrusion, lamination, to bag making, the entire process is completely in-house. We are compliant with FSSC, ISO, Halal, Kosher, etc. Hansin manufactures bag in box (BIB), tea liner, aseptic drum bag, stand up pouch, IBC liner, FIBC , etc. Manufacturing good products, providing feasible solutions, and acting with high efficiency to echo customer needs are the business goals of the Hansin team.

name: HANSON PULP MOLDING TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD
description: HANSON PULP MOLDING TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD is the wholly owned branch of Guangdong Handy Technology Co., Ltd. which was established in 2016 and is a nationally certified high-tech enterprise. The company is located in Houjie Town, Dongguan City, Guangdong Province. The factory covers an area of ​more than 50,000 square meters and has more than 200 employees. The company specializes in the research and development, design, production, sales and service of pulp molding equipment, providing customers with whole plant design and planning, Intelligent pulping system, pulp molding equipment, mold design and manufacturing, post-process automation equipment, technicians output and other services . We are the the standardization promoter of the pulp molding equipment industry, and the technology leader of the pulp molding equipment industry, empowering the molded fibre package manufacturers.

name: Harbar LLC
description: Harbar is a tortilla manufacturer in the U.S. inspired by Mexican tradition and culture. It produces a large variety of tortilla products, from traditional corn and wheat to low carb, gluten free, grain free tortillas. The company has two main brands: Maria & Ricardo's and Mayan Farm, which aim to create wholesome and delicious food moments that unite friends and families through the rich flavors of Mexican cuisine.

name: Hardwood Products Company
description: Manufacturer of Disposable Woodenware from White Birch Hardwood harvested from the woods of New England. We have been in business since 1919 and pride ourselves on high end durable woodenware made in the USA. Our products consist of stir sticks, picks, skewers, ice cream sticks, corn dog sticks, toothpicks, anything wood that can be used in food or elsewhere.

name: Harri
description: Harri is the frontline employee experience platform built for companies who have service at the heart of their business. The solution is built on the notion that the customer experience will never exceed the employee experience. The Harri suite of talent attraction, workforce management and employee engagement technologies enable organizations to attract, manage, engage, and retain the best talent for their business.

name: Hartalega NGC Sdn Bhd.
description: For over 35 years, Hartalega has been a global leader in nitrile glove manufacturing, supplying high quality gloves designed for use in multiple industries, including food handling. Understanding the stringent requirements of the food industry, our BRCGS and HACCP-certified facility provides a hygienic manufacturing environment, ensuring compliance with food safety standards. In addition, our unwavering commitment to innovation empowers us to leverage cutting-edge technology throughout our glove manufacturing process. This dedication translates to the highest quality standards, making us a trusted supplier to major food service providers worldwide.

name: Harvest Food Products
description: Founded in San Francisco in 1982, Harvest Food Products began with authentic family recipes and a commitment to quality. Today, we operate state-of-the-art USDA-inspected facilities in Hayward, California, producing a wide range of premium frozen foods for foodservice, retail, and private label partners. Still family-led, we continue to honor our heritage while innovating for the future. We have many mfg lines, and expertise in various appetizers and entrees such as; Soup Dumplings, Egg Rolls and Spring Rolls, Empanadas, Orange Chicken (and other flavors) meal kits, Pork Buns (and other flavor buns, ie Pizza, Breakfast etc), etc.

name: Hatco Corporation
description: Since 1950, Hatco, a leading manufacturer of commercial foodservice equipment, has been dedicated to supporting the foodservice industry worldwide with its innovative products. With locations in Milwaukee and Sturgeon Bay, Wis., Hatco is committed to exceptional customer service and designs durable sanitizing, warming, holding, merchandising, cooking, and cooling solutions tailored to meet the needs of foodservice operations. A proud employee-owned company and brand of Hatco Corporation, Hatco continues to set the standard for reliability, performance, and excellence in the foodservice industry.

name: HAUR TYI PAPER BAG CO., LTD.
Hawaii Department of Agriculture
description: ALOHA! The Hawaii Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity facilitates the development of Hawaiis agricultural industry through expansion of new and existing markets - creating opportunities for our local producers to participate in trade shows domestically and internationally. A Taste of the States at the 2026 National Restaurant Association Show is a premier example! Treat yourself to a delectable array of tastes - from sweet, spicy, and savory sauces - to fresh ahi poke made on site and then indulge in a variety of specialty beverages - including volcanic iced coffee, iced teas, juices, and fruit sodas! And dont miss sampling all the freshly made Hawaiian dishes at Hawaiis Chef Demonstration Hour - check the Show Schedule for the date and time. We look forward to taking you on a mouthwatering and aromatic tour of the Tastes of the Hawaiian Islands!

name: Hayakawa Sanki, Inc.
description: Hayakawa Sanki, Inc was founded in 1974. Since that time we have developed a broad line of high quality beverage equipment. Now we are a major manufacturer under own brand as well as a major supplier of many well-known beverage machines. By focusing on innovation, quality, and service, we will continue to deliver the best quality, innovative design, and responsive service to our clients.

name: Haynes Lubricants
description: Haynes Lubricants have been used for years throughout the food service industry on a variety of applications; slicers, mixers, soft-serve equipment, batch freezers, shake machines, frozen drink machines, bearings, dispensing units, pumps, cappuccino machines, beverage equipment, and hospital beds. Haynes lubricants are odorless, tasteless, colorless, non-toxic, and are absolutely neutral. They will not turn rancid, contaminate, or taint when in contact with food. Haynes Lubricants are NSF rated H-1 and/or 3H, Kosher Certified and Halal Certified. Our quality and customer satisfaction are unmatched.

name: Heartland Catfish Company
description: In its 30-year history, Heartland Catfish Company has delivered the highest quality U.S. Farm-Raised Catfish to its customers, recognized for its consistent flavor and texture. Our catfish products can be found in grocery stores, restaurants and food service organizations across the country, and are perfect for grilling, baking, sautéing or frying for that perfect catfish plate or po’boy. As the largest vertically integrated U.S. Farm-Raised Catfish producer, Heartland Catfish Company is the industry’s first choice for fresh and individually quick frozen (IQF) catfish. Customers rely on us for the breadth and depth of our product line offerings, with the quality and mild flavor profile bringing customers back year after year.

name: Heartland Food Products Group
description: Heartland Food Products Group is a global leader in the consumer packaged goods (CPG) industry, producing low-calorie sweeteners and liquid water enhancers. Simply put, we make coffee, tea and water taste better. Our sweeteners are also great for baking and sprinkling! From peanut butter cookies to banana bread, low-calorie sweetness starts with Splenda®. Start your day with coffee, fruit, and oatmeal sweetened with delicious, low-calorie products made by Heartland. Our portfolio includes a variety of branded, licensed, and private label products within multiple categories. We also provide strategic co-manufactured partnerships with many category leaders. On the branded side of the business, we manufacture and market Splenda, the #1 brand in the low-calorie sweetener (LCS) category and the most recognizable in the world. Since the acquisition of the Splenda Brand in 2015, Heartland has launched plant based sweeteners including Splenda Stevia Sweeteners and Splenda Monk Fruit Sweeteners , Splenda Allulose Sweeteners , Splenda Liquid Sweeteners , Splenda Coffee Creamers , Splenda Diabetes Care Shakes , Splenda Sweet Teas , and more. To learn more about Splenda, visit https://www.splenda.com/ . More recently, we launched Java House Coffee. Our amazingly smooth cold brew coffee is made in small batches in our Indianapolis manufacturing facilities by steeping coffee in cold water for 12 hours or more. Java House makes it easier than ever before to enjoy a delicious cup of coffee at home and on the go. With Java House Coffee liquid pods, just peel, pour, and enjoy! Each single serve liquid pod combines with 6-8 ounces of water, hot or cold, for the perfect coffee. There’s no need to brew. Now you can enjoy a coffeehouse experience anywhere! Java House also offers many more beverage concentrates and ready-to-drink solutions. Plus there are now several Java House Cafes around greater Indianapolis to experience it. Beyond our brands, we are the leading provider of private label sweeteners and liquid water enhancers in the U.S. Our fast-growing team of product, packaging, and process innovators helps retailers, foodservice operators, and brand owners create consumer-preferred products in a competitive, ever-changing market. Because we are a vertically-integrated company, Heartland is a one-stop shop that can execute every element from ideation to shelf, including Research & Development (R&D); market research; quality; packaging design/creative work through our in-house agency, The Workshop; manufacturing; distribution; and operations. Heartland is headquartered in Carmel, Indiana, with additional offices in Bentonville, Arkansas; Amsterdam, Netherlands; Mexico City, Mexico; and Bogotá, Colombia. Our manufacturing facilities are located in Indianapolis, Indiana; Tultitlán, Mexico; and Amsterdam, Netherlands. Our products are distributed throughout North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Latin America and Asia-Pacific. We employ over 1,200 people worldwide.

name: Heat Seal LLC
description: Founded in Cleveland, Ohio in 1950, Heat Seal’s commitment towards quality and innovation has allowed the company to become a major machinery supplier for the supermarket and industrial industries. Heat Seal is known for their food processing and packaging equipment, such as stretch film overwrappers, ScaleMates, cheese cutters, and label dispensers. Heat Seal also specializes in shrink and skin packaging equipment, for the CPG and industrial markets. Ampak, which was purchased in 1994, expanded Heat Seal’s product portfolio. Products are manufactured within the USA and a new line of shrink machines are being imported from our partner Minipack-Torre in Italy. At Heat Seal, we strive to provide quality products at a great price. Proudly Made in the USA, Heat Seal is committed to great customer service, high quality products and legendary reliability.

name: Heathergrey Collective LLP
description: Heather Grey is a full-service uniform company, that designs, manufactures, and distributes high-quality uniforms for quick-service restaurants, hotels, airlines, schools, and defense organizations. With over two decades of expertise, we have built a strong reputation for delivering premium team uniform solutions that combine functionality, durability, and style. Our customers include industry giants like McDonald’s, KFC, Starbucks, Domino’s, Burger King, Pizza Hut, Jollibee, Krispy Kreme, Taco Bell, Four Seasons, Shangri-La, Hilton, Marriott, Emirates, Etihad, and many more. Backed by a global distribution network, we proudly service brands across 65 international markets, ensuring on-time delivery at market-leading prices. At Heather Grey, we don’t just make uniforms—we create seamless uniform solutions that strengthen brand identity and enhance customer experiences worldwide.

name: Hebei Taying Import And Export Trade Co., Ltd.
description: Our company has provided quality products for chefs, restauranteurs, and busy kitchens that enhance food preparation, cooking and dining experiences for operators and patrons alike. Hawok carries a large inventory of restaurant supplies, restaurant equipment at wholesale prices.Some of the top-rated restaurant supply products include the following categories: dinnerware, flatware, buffet service, tabletop, dining service, beverage service, display, bar supplies, professional cutlery, professional cookware, food storage, bakeware, pizza supplies, food preparation, kitchen utensils, shelving, racks, and countertop manual equipment. You can trust Hawok's commitment to helping you build your foodservice success.

name: Hefei Craft Tableware Co., Ltd.
description: Hefei Craft Tableware Co., Ltd is the leading of disposable wood & bamboo tableware suppliers in China. It has own factory which with over 25 years experience in bamboo&wood tableware production. Supporting businesses globally with a variety of essential products and solutions all over the world. The main products are disposable bamboo/wooden cutlery, skewers, plates, toothpick, stirrers. And the main markets are North America, Europe, and Australia. Company mission is "Focus on environmentally friendly tableware and create a better home together" To be the leader in the disposable tableware manufacturing industry in the world.

name: Helios Technologies
description: Discover the future of culinary excellence with Helios Technologies. As a global leader in electronics, our cutting-edge solutions offered by Enovation Controls and i3PD are crafted to enhance efficiency in the food service industry. Serving customers in over 90 countries, Helios Technologies is at the forefront of empowering culinary professionals to exceed expectations. Join us to experience how we're transforming kitchens worldwide with our pioneering technology. ABOUT ENOVATION CONTROLS: Enovation Controls is a fast growing and innovative manufacturer of electronic controls and displays for diverse markets. Enovation is an international leader in fully tailored solutions for engines, engine-driven equipment, and specialty vehicles with a broad range of displays, controls, and instrumentation products. With an internationally diverse team, Enovation serves customers around the world with global sales, manufacturing, and engineering operations. Enovation Controls also partners directly with OEMs and supports a worldwide network of authorized distributors and system integrators. Visit us at www.enovationcontrols.com ABOUT I3PD: By sticking to its founding principles of Innovation, Inspiration, and Integrity, i3 generated over $13 million in revenue during 2022. i3 has served more than 450 clients and completed over 4,000 projects in its 28-year history. i3 is inspired to create products that holistically combine emotion, user-centered design, engineered precision, quality craftsmanship, smart technology, and design for manufacturability. i3 takes pride in the details and the creative solutions to deliver products that are genuinely easy for users to enjoy. For more information please visit: www.i3pd.com

name: Henan Aluminium Corporation
description: HENAN ALUMINIUM COMPANY IS A COMPREHENSIVE ENTERPRISE WHICH SPECIALIZED IN ALUMINIUM FOIL PRODUCTS, HAVE 2 FACTORIES IN TOTAL, TWO LOCATED IN CHINA . WE HAVE 75 PRODUCTION LINES FOR PAN, 12 LINES FOR POP UP SHEET, 40 LINES FOR FOIL ROLL AND, 8 LINES FOR CUSHION FOIL SANDWICH WRAP, 6 LINES FOR PLASTIC LID AND 2 LINES FOR BOARD LID. ALL OUR PRODUCTS ARE 100% RECYCLABLE, MADE FROM QUALITY ALUMINIUM FOIL THAT CONFORMITY WITH FOODS SAFETY STANDARD SUCH AS BRC, BSCI, HACCP, OU KOSHER, GSV&FDA .

name: Henan Tingxin Packaging Technology Co., Ltd
description: Founded in 2002 with a registered capital of 10 million RMB, Tingxin Paper Products is an integrated enterprise specialized in R&D, production, customization and sales of food and beverage packaging. The company boasts 5 major production bases located in Shanghai, Zhengzhou, Xuchang, Ningbo and Anqing, as well as more than 10 supporting enterprises. Its core products include paper products, non-woven fabric products and bio-based degradable new materials. With over 20 years of industry experience and continuous innovation, Tingxin Paper Products has evolved into a comprehensive solution provider for food and beverage packaging customization, offering more than 30 product series and corresponding services. The company has successively been awarded titles such as High-tech Enterprise and Specialized, Sophisticated, Unique and Innovative Enterprise. Driven by persistent innovation, Tingxin has emerged as a leading brand in the food and beverage packaging industry. Beyond the Chinese market, its services now cover five continents including Europe, North America, South America, Oceania and Asia. Tingxin's products serve over 400,000 catering outlets worldwide every day, reaching more than 50 million people across 41 countries. The company ranks among the top players in the domestic industry.

name: Henny Penny
description: Henny Penny continues more than 60 years of innovation that began in Eaton, Ohio, U.S., with the first commercial pressure fryer in 1957. Today, Henny Penny offers a wide range of high quality foodservice equipment designed for easier operation, greater flexibility and lower operating costs. Product lines include pressure and open fryers, combi ovens, rotisseries, holding cabinets, and display merchandisers. These products and complete start-up, service, training and technical support, are available through Henny Penny's exclusive worldwide distributor network. Learn more at www.HennyPenny.com.

name: Henry J. Meat Specialties
description: For over 70 years, Henry J Meat Specialties has been producing the highest quality of meat products. Famous for our Corned Beef Hash, we offer a wide variety of meat products. We use the freshest spices and ingredients that give all products their consistent superior flavor. With a wide variety of meat specialties, such as but not limited to: sliced corned beef, sliced Italian beef, sliced pastrami, cooked corned beef rounds, and raw corned beef brisket, we have products that will “meat” your needs! All our products are produced in an USDA certified establishment. We service a variety of customers based on their personalized needs – from retail to food service, co-packing, private labeling and custom cutting. Our team works together in order to get our customers what they need, when they need it. Our successful Chicago-based, family owned and operated business has continued to evolve through the decades. We strive to exceed expectations, from price and quality to upholding the highest level of service for our customers.

name: Heritage Health Food
description: The mission of WORTHINGTON® is to produce high quality, great tasting, and healthy, vegetarian products – “World’s Best!” Focusing on both the traditional vegetarian consumer and looking to expand the choices for those seeking a partial or full-time vegetarian plant-based lifestyle. Also, those consumers that are looking for assistance with current health issues that include Dairy Free, Vegan and Non-GMO products.

name: Hero Foodservice
description: We are an international, family owned company known worldwide for Swiss premium quality and innovative product solutions. With more than 130 years of experience, we are specialists for authentic, high quality fruit-based products from premium fruit spreads to baking specialities. Produced according to the highest production and food safety standards. We work with trusted farmers to select nature’s best fruit that goes into our jams to provide you with products of consistent quality. • Our jams and fruit spreads contain only the finest ingredients with carefully selected fruits • Versatiliy & convenient handling • Consistent quality – stable ingredients • Ovenproof and spreadable baking products that maintain flavour and color throughout the baking process

name: HESHAN MINGHAO NEW MATERIALS TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD
description: Heshan Minghao New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. Premium Microwaveable Packaging Solutions for the Modern Foodservice Industry About Us Located in Heshan City, Guangdong Province—one of China’s premier industrial hubs—Heshan Minghao New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer specializing in high-quality, eco-friendly food packaging. With a focus on research, design, and precision manufacturing, we provide the global foodservice industry with reliable, safe, and innovative disposable packaging solutions. Our flagship product line features Microwaveable PP (Polypropylene) Food Containers, designed to meet the demands of modern takeout, meal prep, and food storage services. Why Partner with Minghao? 1. Superior Material & Safety Safety is our top priority. Our containers are crafted from food-grade Polypropylene (PP). Microwave & Freezer Safe: Engineered to withstand temperatures from -4°F to 248°F (-20°C to 120°C) without warping or releasing harmful chemicals. Compliance: All products are manufactured to meet FDA and international food contact safety standards, ensuring safty for distributors and end-users. 2. Advanced Engineering & Leak Resistance We understand that the "last mile" of food delivery is critical. Our containers feature: Precision-Fit Lids: Provides a superior seal to prevent leaks and spills. Stackable Design: High structural integrity allows for stable stacking, optimizing space for delivery drivers and storage in commercial kitchens. 3. Sustainability & Circular Economy Minghao is committed to reducing environmental impact. Our PP containers are 100% recyclable (Recycle Code #5). We utilize high-efficiency manufacturing processes that minimize waste, helping our partners meet their Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) goals while providing a durable alternative to less stable materials. Global Supply Chain Excellence With years of experience in international trade, Minghao has built a streamlined logistics network. Located near major ports in South China (Shenzhen/Guangzhou), we offer efficient shipping timelines and professional export documentation to ensure a smooth entry into the North American market.

name: Hexachase Packaging
description: Hexachase Packaging, the paper bag manufacturer and exporter from Malaysia who exporting our quality products to more than 20 countries worldwide. From notion bag to both flat fold handle and twisted handle bag, Hexachase's comprehensive range of paper bags will suite our customers' every need.

name: Heyuan Lvma New Material Co.,Ltd.
description: Our company is a modern high-tech and professional enterprise integrating material R&D, product design, production and sales . Located in Fuhe Industrial Transfer Park, Heping County, Heyuan City, our factory covers an area of up to 5,000 square meters . We specialize in the R&D, production and sales of disposable biodegradable food containers and special biodegradable plastic particles , including: food boxes, soup bowls, hamburger boxes, self-heating lunch boxes, biodegradable straws, biodegradable plastic bags, as well as special biodegradable plastic granules for food containers, straws and plastic bags, etc. Our products are exported to many countries and regions around the world, including South America, North America, Europe, Asia, Africa, Southeast Asia , etc. We are a company committed to the field of new green environmental protection materials . All raw materials adopted by our company can be completely and rapidly degraded in soil and natural environments as designed, with non-toxic, pollution-free and odorless features. After degradation, they will not damage the soil structure, truly realizing “From nature, return to nature” . Adhering to the business philosophy of “Cherishing the environment, honest service, delivering value” and the service principle of “Based on integrity, customer-oriented, service-oriented” , we wholeheartedly provide high-quality products and excellent services, and work together with you to support environmental protection and create a better ecological home for mankind.

name: High Days
description: High Days is an up-and-coming lifestyle and culture brand Currently focused on Events and Experience Curation, Adult beverage alcohol alternatives, Mind and body Health and wellness products with a Focus on Mental health and anti-depression. They will be showcasing their most recent release of Prebiotic Hemp THC Beverages. One of the first in the Category to prioritize Gut health ingredients with an alcohol alternative hemp beverage.

name: High Desert Milk, Inc.
description: High Desert Milk, founded in 2001 in Burley, Idaho, is a cooperative of six third-generation dairy farmers dedicated to delivering premium dairy products. Our mission began with the goal of creating a stable market for our milk while producing high-quality dairy goods. In 2008, we inaugurated our state-of-the-art facility, specializing in Non-Fat Dry Milk and Skim Milk Powder. Our commitment to growth led to the addition of Grade AA butter products and Buttermilk powder in 2013. In 2020, we expanded our capabilities with a second dryer, enabling us to produce MPC70; a high protein milk powder which won 1 st place in the US Championship Cheese Contest for 2023 AND AGAIN IN 2026. Our latest expansion focuses on manufacturing cream cheese, including food service and cream cheese spreads. At High Desert Milk, we combine tradition with innovation to meet the evolving needs of our global clientele.

name: High-End Uniforms Inc.
description: A marriage of fashion and food COMMITTED TO SERVICE High-End Uniforms is a real family business that takes the word to heart. From longstanding relationships with our vendors, to an approach to customer service that verges on fanatical, we’re a company founded and sustained on the principles of trust, support and mutual respect. After all, what’s the point of family if you can’t depend on them?

name: HIMI
description: HIMI features a full line of patented automatic commercial pre rinse faucets constructed to meet EPA and low lead requirements under its Instinct brand. Through an array of easy to install and easy to pass through Freezer/Cooler Curtains in the Flexcool line, HIMI provides 12 different sizes to meet your needs. Similar light industrial door strip curtains are available in the iFlexCurtain line; and for OEM's of tunnel washing equipment, both Food Service and Laboratory, HIMI can meet your splash curtain needs with the Dura Guard product line. Just contact us for more information and a quote.

name: Hitchcock Farms, Inc.
description: At Hitchcock Farms we are known for quality. For 35 years we have been committed to growing exceptional produce. Our seed selection, farming methods, growing regions, and production and harvest teams consistently produce outstanding veggies and leafy greens, on a year-round basis. We care about flavor and freshness. We care about the crispness and crunch. We care about nutrient dense food, grown in nutrient dense soil. We are proud providers to foodservice operations and retail establishments across the United States and Canada.

name: HMT INDUSTRIES SDN BHD
description: HMT Industries Sdn Bhd is a Malaysia-based manufacturer of food-grade paper packaging, serving F&B, retail, and hospitality businesses across international markets. Strategically located in Johor, Malaysia—near Singapore’s major shipping ports—we provide efficient export access to the United States, Europe, and Asia-Pacific, ensuring stable supply and competitive logistics lead times. With over 200 employees and a 10-acre production facility, HMT operates as a fully integrated, one-stop packaging manufacturer. All key processes—including printing, die-cutting, forming, and packing—are handled in-house, allowing us to maintain strict quality control, flexible production scheduling, and consistent delivery performance. We specialise in a wide range of products including paper cups, bowls, lunch boxes, trays, ice-cream cups, paper lids, cup carriers, wrapping paper, and customised OEM packaging. Whether you require large-volume production, private label solutions, or seasonal packaging campaigns, our team is equipped to support with speed and reliability. HMT is certified under BRC and ISO 9001 , with manufacturing processes aligned to HACCP standards. We are currently advancing towards FSSC 22000 certification , reinforcing our commitment to international food safety and quality systems. Each production batch is supported by traceability systems, material verification, and strict print accuracy control. We understand the importance of cost efficiency and supply chain reliability in today’s market. Our integrated production model allows us to optimise material usage, reduce dependency on external vendors, and offer competitive pricing without compromising on quality. In addition, we actively support customers transitioning towards more sustainable packaging by offering recyclable paper-based solutions and reducing unnecessary plastic usage. At HMT, we focus on building long-term partnerships. We work closely with our customers on demand planning, packaging development, and production scheduling to ensure smooth execution from order to delivery. Reliable supply. Consistent quality. Flexible solutions. That’s what we deliver.

name: Hobart
description: At Hobart, an ITW Food Equipment Group brand, people and food are our passion. We believe great food brings people together, and the relationships we share feed our inspiration to be the best we can be for one another. As a food equipment manufacturer and service provider, we've been dedicated for more than a century to supporting those who are not only passionate about creating great food but are inspired by the people they serve and come to know on a daily basis. Likewise, it is our mission to provide premium food equipment that foodservice and food retail professionals can trust to work hard and deliver quality, consistent results day in and day out, empowering them to focus on what they love mostcreating great food for great people. Backed by our nationwide network of 1,500 factory-trained service technicians, we're always nearby to install, maintain and service your equipment. Hobart is part of ITW Food Equipment Group LLC (a subsidiary of Illinois Tool Works) and is proud to be an ENERGY STAR Partner of the Year since 2008.

name: Hoff's Bakery
description: Hoff's Bakery has been partnering with Retailers, Distributors, Restaurants, Hotels, Universities, Health Care Institutions, Cafes, and other Food Service Establishments since 1983. We take pride in working with our customers to offer the best solutions for their dessert needs. Whether you're looking for traditional decorated cakes or innovative individual desserts, we have a variety of options to accommodate your needs. All of our products are designed to look and taste great, but also to be easy to handle so you can serve with ease! We are continuously doing research and development to expand upon and improve our offerings. We stay on top of the latest trends in flavors, ingredients, shapes and sizes to help us create new and exciting desserts. We want to help your establishment stand out with innovative offerings your consumers' crave.

name: Hollymatic Corporation
description: Hollymatic Corporation was founded during the economic depression days of the 1930s by Harry H. Holly who had been working as a structural iron worker when his employer was forced to close down. After searching six months for another job, he and his wife opened a small hamburger shop in Calumet City, Illinois. It was apparent to Mr. Holly that molding hamburger patties took far too large a percentage of his time. Searching for a better way, Mr. Holly built a simple yet ingenious patty machine from wood. A year later, he patented the device. In keeping with the mindset of our founder, over the next 80+ years, Hollymatic has followed in the strive to innovate and improve processing equipment. Today we offer solutions for processing various proteins, beef, poultry, fish, and pork. Tenderizing, forming, cutting, mixing / grinding, stuffing, as well as marinating systems and vacuum packaging. Integrity, Innovation, Quality, and Care for our Customers is what has been our success!

name: Homegrown Family Foods
description: Renwood Mills is currently located in Newton, NC. We proudly employ about 100 people from in and around the local community. We are a milling facility that grinds wheat and corn as well as a producer of many types of bakery mixes. We make simple southern comfort food that you have come to love. That's why we have trademarked the phrase We Make Delicious Easy. The company was founded in 1935 by G.D. Drum when he purchased what was then known as Maiden Flour Mills and the business has been in continuous operation ever since.In 1935 we were milling less than 20,000 pounds of flour per day. Today our flour milling capacity has evolved into 750,000 lbs. per day. We also have a 12-ton corn mill for grinding corn. We primarily mill "Soft Red Winter Wheat" which is ideal for making light and fluffy biscuits, cakes, crackers and cookies. We also grind both white and yellow corn meal for excellent cornbread, corn muffins and for baking and coating. We have a very diverse customer base including many large commercial bakeries, local and national restaurant chains, foodservice distributors as well grocery stores and alternate /dollar store channels throughout the United States.

name: Honey Management Group Inc
description: Cooler Depot USA (also known as Honey Management Group Inc.) is a distributor of commercial kitchen and restaurant equipment. We supply a large inventory of commercial-grade appliances, particularly refrigeration and freezer units, serving restaurants, cafés, convenience stores, food trucks, and other foodservice businesses across the United States.

name: Honey Smoked Fish Co.
description: Headquartered in Denver, Colorado, Honey Smoked Fish Holdings LLC produces sustainably sourced hot smoked salmon for a variety of applications in the retail grocery, foodservice, and hospitality industries. Our ready-to-eat salmon, arrives fresh and is uniquely hot smoked over hickory chips. From sea, to smoker, to table, Honey Smoked Salmon is never frozen and is always rich in protein, Omega-3s and essential vitamins. As a team, we provide smoked salmon solutions to our customers while operating with integrity, passion, creativity, and expertise.

name: Horacio's
description: Horacio's is a trusted leader in custom stainless steel fabrication and millwork for the restaurant and food service industry. Since 1980, we've helped restaurants, hotels, and commercial kitchens transform their spaces with precision-built equipment and bespoke millwork designed for functionality, efficiency, and style. We provide full design-to-setup services, turning creative concepts into functional, visually striking spaces. From concept development to final installation, our team works closely with chefs, restaurant owners, and designers to ensure every detail from stainless steel prep tables, sinks, hoods, and shelving to custom millwork like cabinets, counters, and display units is tailored to your kitchen workflow, space, and brand. Using top-grade materials and advanced fabrication technology, we deliver durable, high-performance solutions built to withstand the demands of busy kitchens while maintaining a professional appearance. Collaboration, quality, and innovation are at the core of our process, ensuring a seamless, personalized experience that exceeds expectations. With over four decades of experience, Horacio's has earned a reputation for precision, reliability, and creativity. Partnering with us means more than just equipmentyou gain a trusted collaborator dedicated to bringing your restaurant vision to life, from initial design to complete setup.

name: Horizon Motor
description: Horizon Motor is an American heavy-duty electric truck company, headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia and built in Athens, Ohio. Founded in 2019, Horizon offers a complete lineup of zero-emission vocational vehicles spanning Class 3 through Class 8, including box trucks, refrigerated trucks, refuse vehicles, tow trucks, dump trucks, and cement mixers. Every vehicle is engineered with some of the largest battery packs in the commercial truck segment, delivering the range and power that real fleet work demands. Horizon operators see up to 60% lower fuel costs and 30 to 50% lower maintenance costs versus diesel. The Horizon modular charging system scales to any fleet, requires no permits, and fits within existing grid infrastructure. Zero emissions. Full performance. Built in Ohio.

name: Hormel Foods Corporation
description: For more than 125 years, Hormel Foods has brought innovation, beloved brands and outstanding value to our consumers, customers, communities and shareholders. We are proud of this milestone but are motivated by our future. We remain focused on our purpose statement: Inspired People. Inspired Food. Though much has changed since George A. Hormel first founded Geo. A. Hormel Co. in 1891, the company is still proudly based in Austin, Minn., and the values on which it was founded integrity, an uninterrupted quest for quality and innovation, a respect for one another and a commitment to community still define Hormel Foods today.

name: HOS Global Foods
description: HOS Global Foods is the largest importer and distributor for South Asian food in North America and represents multiple leading FMCG brands from India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Malaysia, Thailand, Australia, Spain, Netherlands, Argentina, South Africa, UAE, Canada, Columbia, Mexico, Ecuador, China, Turkey and Vietnam. With its home brand Laxmi, HOS Global Foods also offers a wide range of authentic South Asian cooking ingredients and snacks that cater to the South Asian community through multiple distribution centers across the country. We offer the best quality products that bring you the traditional taste of authentic South Asian home cooking.

name: Hoshizaki
description: HOSHIZAKI is the world leader in the design, manufacturing, and marketing of a wide range of products for the foodservice industry including ice machines, refrigerators, freezers, prep tables, display cases and dispensers. With corporate headquarters in Peachtree City, Georgia and a second manufacturing facility in Griffin, Georgia, Hoshizaki America, Inc. employs over 800 people nationwide. Our attention to detail, continuous innovation, and commitment to the highest standards - ensures that our customers have exceptional quality products. Hoshizaki has earned ENERGY STAR Partner of the Year multiple years in a row for superior energy efficiency achievements. KMEdge ice machines have the edge over the competition with unsurpassed durability and increased efficiency production. Finally, an inventive redesign of the icemaker evaporator. The KMEdge utilizes a one-piece, dual-sided stainless-steel evaporator that envelops the oval-shaped copper heating/cooling tubing, optimizing surface contact area for optimizing energy efficiency. The result is harder, clearer ice, higher ice production in fewer cycles, longer product life and greater reliability. Hoshizaki Steelheart Series is a full line-up of commercial refrigeration equipment with stainless steel inside and out and R290 environmentally friendly refrigerant. With door/drawer combos, field reversible doors, and many options and accessories to choose from, Hoshizaki has your food's best interest at heart.

name: Hospitality Brands
description: HOSPITALITY BRANDS offers the most innovative, unique, and industry leading glassware and drinkware to the hospitality market. Were passionate about finding the right solution to provide experiential serves that elevate presentations and leave long lasting impressions.

name: Hospitality Depot
description: Hospitality Depot is a leading supplier of customizable food and beverage ware. Cups, coasters, plates, napkins, takeout containers and more! We decorate over 500 items with your branding elements. 1 color to digital full color, you will impress your clients with the visibility of your logo that keeps sending the advertising message. Restaurants, Wedding events, Corporate events Coffee Shops, Craft Breweries, Campgrounds, to name a few of the spaces we occupy. We have a full line of hot and cold cups that are fully reusable and some even top rack dishwasher safe. Circularity is taken very seriously too a Hospitality Depot. Our steel cups are second to none when it comes to sustainability. Made from 30% post-consumer steel and Made in the USA. Infinitely recyclable, souvenirable! Eco Friendly has never been better with our line of compostable, post-consumer paper products. Cups, Napkins and Plates all made from sustainable materials and recycled content. When we talk about eco-friendly, we also like to talk about our alternative to single use beverage products. Our extensive line of plastic cups like tumblers, stadium and many other like items are not a one and done. For a few more cents, you can brand a cup that has maximum visibility and can be washed and used over and over again. Best quality, low minimums, and quick turns are what you can expect when ordering from Hospitality Depot!

name: Host Milano
description: HostMilano is the leading international trade show in the hospitality, food-service, retail, large-scale distribution, and hotel industries. Over 2,100 exhibitors and 180,000 professional visitors from around the world meet in Milan (Italy) every other year to connect and discover new products and services. The 45th edition of HostMilano will take place on October 22–26, 2027.

name: Hostie AI
description: Hostie is an AI-first customer experience platform designed specifically for restaurants and co-founded by restaurateurs, powered by advanced AI technology. We streamline communication by centralizing calls, texts, and emails in one easy-to-use platform. Hostie also automates reservation management and takeout orders, allowing restaurants to focus on creating exceptional guest experiences, while saving valuable time on routine inquiries.

name: Hotpack Global Inc.
description: Hotpack Packaging Industries L.L.C. is a global company specialized in disposable food packaging products headquartered in Dubai, and with branches in USA, all over Middle East, Africa, UK Australia. A manufacturing company with 25 years of experience and specialized in disposable food packaging take away products, Hotpack products are recognized all over the world for their quality standards. With a product range of 3500 products, 24 branches, 11 factories, 24,000 plus dedicated customers worldwide and a staff strength of over 2000 employees, we possess some of the world's best state of the art machinery, be it extrusion, thermoforming, injection molding or Tissue manufacturing. In terms of quality, Hotpack is accredited with all major international certifications such as BRC (AA), ISO 9001:2008, ISO 14001:2004, ISO 22000:2005, ESMA etc. Our products can be broadly classified as below. PAPER CUPS, BOWLS, CONTAINERS, BOXES, NAPKINS AND TISSUES, PAPER FLOUR BAGS PLASTIC FOOD FILMS, DELI AND SALAD CONTAINERS, CUPS, PLATES, MICROWAVEABLE CONTAINERS, CUTLERY RANGE, REFUSE BAGS, TSHIRT BAGS, VEGETABLE BAGS ON ROLLS AND TABLE SHEETS HYGIENE PRODUCTS SUCH AS GLOVES, APRONS, MASKS, HATS AND DISPENSERS ALUMINIUM FOILS AND TAKE AWAY CONTAINERS WOODEN PRODUCTS BIODEGRADABLE PRODUCTS FLEXIBLE PACKAGING PRODUCTS LIKE PRINTED LAMINATED PACKAGING FOR RICE, SUGAR, SPAGHETTI, NOODLES, MOZZARELLA, MEAT ETC. For more details, visit our website www.hotpackglobal.com

name: House Foods Holding USA Inc.
description: House Foods Holding USA is dedicated to supplying healthy, natural and functional plant-based products. We offer Tofu, Veggie Burgers, Veggie Balls, Seitan, Tempeh, and other flavor-forward products worldwide under the House Foods America, Franklin Farms, El Burrito, Nature’s Soy and Superior Natural brands.

name: Hrbvor
description: RTD HERBAL TEAS hrb•vor ("herbivore") brings consumers everything they love about herbal tea in the convenience of Still & Sparkling RTD 12oz cans. Certified USDA Organic, Vegan, Kosher, 1% for the Planet, and Women Owned. A natural choice, high velocity seller for conscious consumers from grab & go refrigerators in natural cafes, corporate pantries, premium hotels, gyms and spas. $3bn herbal tea market growing quickly, and fastest in the functional & organic sub-categories. Real Brewed Functional Herbal Blends Refreshing Flavors & Health Benefits Prebiotic Raw Organic Agave Inland Sea Electrolytes

name: Huang Guan Special Printery Co., Ltd.
description: HUANG GUAN SPECIAL PRINTERY CO., LTD.is a professional manufacturer of paper food containers, with 40 years of history and experience. The company's products cover various types of paper cups, paper boxes, etc., suitable for different dining occasions. The company constantly pursues quality improvement and environmental protection practices, and has obtained many international certifications and awards, and has won the trust and praise of customers. HUANG GUAN, we manufacture various of paper food containers, developing coffee cups, double-wall paper cups, beverage cups, paper hot cold cups, take-out boxes, lunch boxes, etc. While pursuing quality, HUANG GUAN also values environmental responsibility. HUANG GUAN has continuously passed ISO 9001 quality management system certification and ISO 22000 food safety management system certification to ensure that its products meet international standards. At the same time, the paper raw materials participated in a number of environmental certifications, such as FSC Forest Stewardship Council certification, PEFC Sustainable Forest Management certification, degradable food-grade paper, etc., demonstrating its commitment to environmentally friendly processes. In addition, it also obtained FDA US Food and Drug Administration certification, proving that its products are harmless to human health. HUANG GUAN also actively invested in the research and development and improvement of paper lunch boxes, and launched products such as take-out boxes made of environmentally friendly oil-resistant kraft paper, reducing the use and pollution of plastics. We hope to use our paper certification to protect your food safety.

name: Huaxin Co., Ltd
description: Huaxin Technology is a globally leading high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, production, and sales of intelligent ice cream vending machines. The company is headquartered in Tianqu Industrial Park, Decheng District, Dezhou City, Shandong Province, a key area within the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated economic development zone, where is benefit from a strategic location and significant industrial synergy. Since its establishment in 2013, Huaxin has been deeply committed to the industry for over a decade. It has accumulated extensive technical expertise and developed profound insights into ice cream vending, gathered feedback from tens of millions of user interactions and consumer behavior analysis. Driven by a deep understanding of the industry and continuous innovation, the company has grown into a globally recognized benchmark for quality in this field.

name: Hubei Wheat-Straw Environment Techologies Co., Ltd
description: We can produce all different shapes of bagasse pulp wheat strawpulp, bamboo pulp mold products which are biodegradable, non-toxicshock resistance antistatic eco-friendly. Our main products are soldworldwide including bagasse pulp bowls, plates,trays, Lunch boxtakeaway, cups&lids tablewares and another similar shape of industry pack projects.We provide one-stop food packaging solutions for our customersfrom restaurant, school, hospital supermarket, airlines and so on.Besides the traditional features of plastic, microwave andrefrigerator safe, our products are also recyclable and compostable asa alternative of traditional plastic or foam.

name: Huileries De Lapalisse
description: Huilerie de Lapalisse has been producing specialty oils in France for over 125 years . We are one of the leading companies in Europe, offering our products under our own brand as well as for white labeling . Our walnut, hazelnut, sesame, almond, pistachio, grapeseed, and many other oils are designed for professionals in the foodservice and retail sectors. To meet the growing demand in North America, we now have a stock available in the United States , stored in our Newark, NJ warehouse , ensuring fast and flexible shipping. Contact me at : alban.demontcheuil@huilerie-lapalisse.com

name: Huizhou Guanzhan Industrial Co.,Ltd.
description: Huizhou Guanzhan Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 2011 and is a comprehensive supplier in the catering utensil packaging industry, integrating research and development, design, production, sales, warehousing, customs clearance, and transportation. It is located in Huizhou City, Guangdong Province. The nearest port is Shenzhen Yantian &Shekou port. Guanzhan Industrial currently owns a self-built industrial park with an area of 100,000 ㎡, equipped with multiple automated dust-free production workshops, large-scale storage warehouses, and a mold engineering project development department. Our products cover PP, PS, PET environmentally friendly food-grade materials, as well as biodegradable products such as PLA, corn starch biobase, paper, bamboo and wood, and sugarcane residue, satisfying customers' diversified choices. Innovation is not only the vitality of our products but also the cornerstone of our enterprise development. Guanzhan has established longterm strategic cooperation mechanisms with multiple research institutions and listed companies to jointly develop more environmentally friendly and safer food-grade new materials. Through years of efforts by our research and development team, we have obtained multiple national invention patents, utility model patents, and design patents, among other intellectual property rights Pursuing excellence in quality showcases the essence of our enterprise. In order to enhance the factory management system and ensure product quality, we have completed multiple domestic and international system certifications, including food QS certification, ISO9001-2019, BRCGSPM, BSCI, FDA, OU, DIN\BPI certification, and other authoritative qualification certificates. Our products comply with food contact material safety and hygiene standards such as GB.T4806.7, FDA and EU.

name: Huizhou Yang Rui Printing and Packaging Co., Ltd.
description: Huizhou YANGRUI Printing Packaging Co., Ltd. established in 2014 in Huizhou, Guangdong, is a national high-tech enterprise and industry AAA credit entity. YANGRUI specializes in manufacturing disposable tableware, packaging containers, bags, and films. It owns the YANGRUI trademark and product design patents. As a manufacturer mainly engaged in food packaging, Yangrui is committed tobringing people the concept of environmental protection and health andproviding food-grade products to the market. After exploration and understanding of domestic and foreign markets, we havemastered and accumulated advanced production and RD technologies,continuously upgraded products and equipment, and introduced advancedautomatic production equipment and product transformation and upgradesfrom Germany for many times. From rigorous selection of raw materials, to material processing, to productmolding and packaging, fully automated production is realized to ensure thatevery product is produced in accordance with high food-grade standards.Yangrui has introduced ERP and production process control systems in 2021 torealize full digital management and realize production transparency and stan-dardization.

name: Humane World for Animals
description: Join us in our hospitality suite (#E255) for the following events, where you can meet our chefs and learn more about our free culinary resources for industry professionals: Chef's roundtable | Sun, May 17, 11:45am to 12:30pm — Join our chef team for a lively discussion on boosting consumer engagement in plant-forward options and increasing demand Coffee hours | Sun, May 17 & Mon, May 18 9:30am to 11:30am — Stop by for free coffee + swag Celebration event | Mon, May 18, 3pm to 5pm — Connect with the companies and institutions we are celebrating who have achieved their ambitious menu goals and learn more about our collaborations and resources (bonus of free food and beverages!) RSVP here to attend our celebration event Humane World for Animals collaborates with the food service industry to grow a healthier, more sustainable food system. Our team is comprised of expert chefs, food service professionals, registered dietitians, and specialists in the art of menu development. We work nationwide, building relationships with the largest food service conglomerates and largest dining operations at colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and healthcare systems. Through our Forward Food Collaborative for industry professionals, we lead virtual and in-person culinary trainings, provide new plant-based menu and procurement concepts, and help industry members roll out new menus nationwide with effective menu placement, labeling, and marketing, all at no cost. Learn more at forwardfood.org

name: IdealTraits
description: Restaurants lose $2,305 to $16,704* every time a hire doesn't work out. IdealTraits fixes that. Automated text outreach connects with candidates on the channel they prefer, at the speed they expect. And built-in tracking and scheduling eliminate the manual follow-up that buries operators every week. Whether you run one location or fifty, the math is the same: turnover is the most expensive line item nobody is calculating. A 10-location operator running 75% annual turnover spends over $500,000 a year just replacing hourly staff. IdealTraits cuts that cycle by helping you find the right people faster and keep them longer. The Waterside Social hired a restaurant manager in 6 days. Over 72,000 quality hires have been made through the platform. Not just filled positions. The right people, in the right roles, staying longer and performing better. IdealTraits was built by people who spent 25 years in the trenches of hiring. We created the platform we wished we had. Stop losing money to a broken process. Start building the team your business actually needs. *Source: Black Box Intelligence. State of the Restaurant Workforce 2024. October 8, 2024. blackboxintelligence.com/news/state-of-restaurant-workforce-2024/

name: Inline Plastics Corp.
description: As restaurants face rising food and labor costs alongside ongoing staffing shortages, Inline Plastics understands the need for packaging that works as hard as your team does. With over 55 years of innovation, Inline Plastics has redefined food packaging with its Safe-T-Fresh® tamper-evident, tamper-resistant technology — protecting your food, your customers, and your reputation. The company has incorporated 10% post-consumer content across its entire PET portfolio, certified by SCS Global. This post-consumer material utilizes advanced recycling which breaks it down to its molecular level and rebuilds it into high-quality PET, ensuring sustainable, reliable packaging without compromising performance. In 2023, Inline Plastics introduced Safe-T-Chef®, the first polypropylene product line with tamper protection designed specifically for hot food applications — a breakthrough solution that allows restaurants, convenience stores, and foodservice operators to serve hot meals with the same level of freshness and safety long associated with the Safe-T-Fresh® line. Made to withstand heat while maintaining clarity and structural integrity, Safe-T-Chef® containers support takeout, delivery, and grab-and-go programs without compromising food quality or presentation. This innovation expands Inline’s catalog of 100+ shapes and sizes — each engineered to help you serve confidently, reduce labor through reliable sealing, and protect your brand with packaging consumers count on. When you choose Inline Plastics, you’re not taking on an expense — you’re making an investment in food safety, shelf life, and consumer trust. Also offering automation solutions for loading, closing, and labeling, Inline helps you save on labor, improve efficiency, and deliver consistent results across your entire operation. Because when your packaging performs flawlessly, your team can focus on what matters most — your customers. See how innovative packaging and automation can help your operation perform at its best — visit InlinePlastics.com or talk to us for more information.

name: Innovative Marketing Consultants
description: At Innovative Marketing Consultants, we specialize in high-quality barware designed to elevate both the functionality and visual appeal of bars, restaurants, and beverage brands. Our product line includes essential and eye-catching items such as napkin or condiment caddies, bar tools, LED signs, tap handles, and bar mats—each built to perform in high-traffic environments while enhancing the overall bar experience. For 35 years, IMC has partnered with beverage manufacturers and distributors with a clear goal: to help grow your business and elevate your brand while delivering exceptional customer service. We offer in-stock branded merchandise with on-demand, quick turnaround times, ensuring you get what you need, when you need it. For more customized or large-scale initiatives, our dedicated sourcing team works directly with skilled global factories, unlocking virtually endless creative possibilities. For beverage brands and operators focused on visibility, our products can be fully customized with logos, colors, and unique design elements. These branded pieces transform everyday bar tools into impactful marketing assets, helping reinforce brand identity at the point of service. From illuminated LED signs that draw attention to featured products, to distinctive tap handles that stand out on crowded draft lines, we help brands create a strong and memorable presence. At the same time, we understand that many restaurants and hospitality groups prioritize a clean, cohesive aesthetic that isn’t tied to a specific brand. That’s why we offer a full range of non-branded, ready-to-use barware. These blank products are designed with the same durability and quality as our custom pieces, making them ideal for venues that want a polished, professional look without added branding—or for those who prefer the flexibility to customize in-house at their own pace. Our bar mats and napkin holders combine everyday practicality with thoughtful design, whether used as subtle, unbranded staples or as customized touchpoints. Likewise, our LED signage and display pieces can serve as ambient design elements or be tailored into bold brand statements depending on your needs. We work closely with restaurants, bars, breweries, distilleries, and beverage marketers to deliver solutions that align with their operational goals, brand strategy, and budget. From small orders to large-scale rollouts, at IMC our team is committed to consistent quality, responsive service, and attention to detail. At the core of our approach is flexibility—offering both customizable and non-branded options that allow our partners to create the exact look and experience they want. Whether you’re building a brand, refining your space, or doing both at once, we provide the barware solutions to support your vision behind the bar.

name: Instafarm
description: Instafarm® began by perfecting the art of growing fresh, nutrient-dense microgreens in home kitchens. After years of refining reliable, soil-based, automated growing for everyday use, that same proven system is now available for commercial kitchens. The Instafarm® Commercial Unit has been named a recipient of the 2026 Kitchen Innovations (KI) Award it is designed specifically for restaurants, chefs, and foodservice operators who want consistent, high-quality greens grown fresh on-site. With intelligent sensors and automated growing technology, Instafarm® removes the complexity of indoor farming—delivering dependable daily harvests without adding labor or disrupting kitchen workflows. Unlike hydroponic alternatives, Instafarm® grows greens in real soil, resulting in superior flavor, texture, and visual appeal. Harvested just steps from the line, these vibrant greens become a powerful finishing touch for entrées, appetizers, cocktails, and garnishes—elevating presentation while delivering peak freshness every service. Current seeds/plants available include Arugula, Beets, Broccoli, Chia, Chives, Cilantro, Dill, Kale, Kohlrabi, Mustard, Peas, Radish, Salad Blend, Smoothie Blend, & Wheat Grass more to come including mushroom varieties. Built for commercial environments, the Instafarm® Commercial Unit offers a space-efficient footprint and a scalable growing system that fits seamlessly into modern kitchens. Subscription-based seed and soil trays provide predictable costs and consistent results, while daily harvest cycles eliminate distributor variability, reduce waste, and improve menu reliability. By bringing green production in-house, restaurants gain greater control over quality, availability, and sourcing. Instafarm® also supports sustainability goals by reducing food miles, packaging waste, and spoilage—while offering a compelling story guests can see and taste. At the 2026 National Restaurant Show, Instafarm® is proud to showcase how a system trusted in many home kitchens is now helping commercial kitchens serve food that looks better, tastes better, and performs better—day after day. Instafarm® Commercial — perfected at home, proven in the kitchen, grown fresh where it matters most.

name: Integrated Control Corp
description: Kitchen Technology Innovations by Integrated Control Corp. (KTI by ICC) delivers a fully integrated, data-driven platform that powers the Path to Excellence in Food Safety and Operations . Designed for modern foodservice enterprises, KTI by ICC combines intelligent edge devices, real-time analytics, and cloud-based applications to transform kitchen operations into connected, high-performance environments. At the core of the platform is KitchenSync , a centralized application that unifies food safety, food traceability, and operational management into a single, actionable system. From automated HACCP compliance and wireless temperature monitoring to Food Traceability (FTL, CTE, KDE, TLC) and dynamic labeling, KitchenSync enables end-to-end visibility, audit readiness, and rapid response across multi-unit operations. Our ecosystem extends to order fulfillment systems, automated customer pick-up solutions, digital training platforms, product management, and intelligent kitchen automation tools —all engineered to reduce risk, improve consistency, and drive measurable operational efficiency. KTI by ICC is not just a solutions provider—it is a technology platform partner , delivering scalable infrastructure and insights that help operators protect their brand, optimize performance, and confidently meet the evolving demands of food safety and compliance.

Governed by a board of top-level food and beverage IT executives, the IFBTA incorporates operator and supplier participation and input to promote technology education, networking, and solutions. description: Interpak Company Limited is a full-service Chinese vendor that supplies customers with a vast range of disposable food containers, cutlery and biodegradable containers. name: Intertribal Agriculture Council
description: American Indian Foods (AIF) is a program of the Intertribal Agriculture Council that began in 1998 under contract with the USDA Foreign Agricultural Service. The partnership was developed as a platform for American Indian food businesses to showcase their products and share Tribal cultures with the world. American Indian Foods come from coast to coast in the United States and are grown on the pristine lands of Native Nations or raised in their natural waters. Many of these products are still traditionally harvested in ways defined hundreds of years ago. Native American communities are close knit, as many nations gather families and friends annually to harvest, celebrate, and give thanks. ​

name: IPORT
description: Restaurants Run on iOS is a fully immersive showcase demonstrating how technology, design, and operations combine to create a seamless guest experience. The booth highlights how integrated hardware and software solutions elevate efficiency, aesthetics, and service from front of house to back of house. At the center is IPORT hardware, engineered for commercial use and optimized for iOS. Attendees can explore secure iPad and iPhone solutions built for the pace and demands of restaurants, cafés, and multi-unit operations. From host stands and tableside ordering to kitchen display systems and mobile workflows, IPORT shows how Apple devices can be deployed reliably, safely, and beautifully throughout a venue—without compromising design or durability. ENZO by New Black powers the operational experience—a modern POS platform delivering intuitive ordering, streamlined payments, and real-time visibility. Paired with IPORT hardware, ENZO reduces staff friction and creates a more fluid guest journey from arrival to checkout. WorkJam brings workforce coordination to life, showing how restaurants can schedule, communicate with, and engage frontline teams directly from iOS—whether managing one location or many. Streamline's IENTERPRISE© platform gives operators real-time visibility and reporting across every Apple device in their environment. By surfacing issues proactively and resolving them quickly, Streamline reduces downtime and keeps the iOS ecosystem running at peak performance. Jamf ensures every device stays secure, configured, and ready for service—providing the enterprise-grade Apple device management that multi-unit restaurant operators depend on. Together, IPORT, ENZO, WorkJam, Streamline, and Jamf demonstrate what's possible when a restaurant runs entirely on iOS—reducing complexity, empowering staff, and creating a more seamless guest experience at every touchpoint. The booth also features Sonance Professional Series speakers—a fitting complement to the environment IPORT and its partners create. Discreetly integrated and virtually invisible, Sonance Pro audio shapes atmosphere through consistent, high-quality sound that enhances the dining experience without adding visual clutter. Because great hospitality isn't just what guests see and touch—it's what they hear. Restaurants Run on iOS is not just a product display—it's a vision for the modern restaurant. It brings to life the idea that when technology is secure, intuitive, and design-forward, operators can focus less on managing systems and more on creating exceptional food, service, and guest experiences.

name: iPourIt

name: Irinox North America

Irinox is known all over the world as the leading manufacturer of commercial blast chillers and shock freezers. Over the years IRINOX has developed a leading edge line of products, proposing revolutionary concepts that have set new food safety benchmarks worldwide including the American industry. Our technology, which offers unique capabilities such as blast chilling, shock freezing, low temperature cooking, proofing, holding, pasteurizing, regenerating and thawing, provides product consistency and reduced product loss ensuring utmost efficiency at work, truly an indispensable tool in today's industrial kitchen. As a pioneer in developing the concepts of blast chilling and high-quality food preservation in the foodservice hospitality, supermarket, catering, confectionery, ice cream and bread-making industries, IRINOX has always invested in continuous research and improvement of its technology, becoming the ideal partner of the most important food professionals companies all over the world.

Its product portfolio includes biodegradable corn starch tableware such as cutlery, container, trays, cups, and straws, as well as household cleaning products like sponges, cellulose sponges, scouring pads, cloths, and personal care tools. The company is a trusted manufacturer and supplier to internationally renowned brands such as KFC, Costco, Walmart, and Emirates Airlines.

name: ItalCrust
description: Three time FABI Award Winning ItalCrust allows any operation to create premium, authentic Italian pizza and atbreads without the time, prep, and experience required for working with dough. Our clean, vegan, non-GMO pre baked pizza crusts are made with "00" our and extra virgin olive oil. We proof our dough for twenty four hours, hand-stretch it, then bake our original dough to perfection in our real oak burning wood-red ovens. With ItalCrust frozen pizza crusts, you get true wood-red pizza that matches the quality of scratch-made dough with faster prep, no waste, and less labor.

name: Italian Exhibition Group S.P.A

name: Italoil LLC
description: ITALOIL is a Chicago-based importer and producer of premium Italian extra virgin olive oil, rooted in family tradition and crafted with a deep respect for quality, origin, and sustainability. Founded by Paolo Savescu, ITALOIL brings to the United States early harvest olive oil produced from family-owned groves located along the shores of Lake Bolsena in Lazio, Italy. Our olive oil is made from carefully selected olives, primarily Caninese, along with Frantoio and Leccino varieties, harvested between late October and early November at peak ripeness. The olives are cold-pressed within hours of picking at our family-operated mill, preserving their natural flavors, aromas, and high polyphenol content. The result is a balanced, vibrant extra virgin olive oil with a distinctive peppery finish, rich in character and true to its origin. ITALOIL is certified organic in accordance with European Union regulations and carries DOP (Protected Designation of Origin) certification, ensuring authenticity, traceability, and adherence to strict production standards. Every bottle reflects the land, climate, and centuries-old traditions of the Lake Bolsena region. What sets ITALOIL apart is its direct connection between producer and consumer. By eliminating intermediaries, we maintain full control over quality while offering a transparent and authentic product. Our mission is not only to provide exceptional olive oil but also to share the story, culture, and craftsmanship behind it. Based in Chicago, ITALOIL operates primarily through farmers markets, direct-to-consumer sales, and partnerships with local restaurants and specialty retailers. Farmers markets remain at the heart of our business, allowing us to connect directly with customers, offer tastings, and educate consumers on the value of high-quality extra virgin olive oil. As we grow, ITALOIL continues to expand its presence both locally and nationally, while staying true to its core values: authenticity, quality, and a deep respect for tradition. Our goal is to bring a piece of Italy to every table, one bottle at a time.

name: JBT Marel
description: Fresh’n Squeeze®, brought to you by JBT Marel, is a trusted leader in commercial citrus juicing for restaurants, foodservice operators, hotels, cafés, juice bars, smoothie bars, and grocery retail. Operators who want to serve fresh orange juice, lemonade, lemon juice, lime juice, citrus blends, and smoothies rely on Fresh’n Squeeze for consistent flavor, efficient workflows, and dependable fresh‑juice production. Our solutions make it simple to offer high‑quality fresh beverages across dine‑in, takeout, grab‑and‑go, and made‑to‑order programs. Powered by JBT Marel’s whole fruit extraction technology, our juicers help operators get more juice from every fruit while protecting natural flavor. Instant separation keeps bitterness and peel oil out of the juice, supporting clean, bright citrus taste for every serving of orange juice, fresh lemonade, citrus shots, smoothie bases, cocktail mixers, and kitchen prep ingredients. With more juice per fruit and less waste, operators can expand beverage menus and streamline back‑of‑house prep without slowing service. Fresh’n Squeeze equipment is built for real foodservice environments where reliability, speed, and easy cleaning matter. Operators can produce fresh orange juice for breakfast, fresh lemonade for lunch service, or fresh lime juice for busy bar programs. Our systems support smoothie stations, brunch menus, coffee bars, and fresh‑juice programs with minimal downtime and simple, intuitive workflows that keep teams focused on guests. By adding fresh citrus to their menu, restaurants can elevate the dining experience and strengthen brand identity. Fresh‑squeezed juice enhances smoothies, cocktails, mocktails, teas, marinades, dressings, desserts, and signature dishes. Whether you serve orange juice to start the day, use lemon or lime juice to brighten cocktails, or blend citrus into smoothies, Fresh’n Squeeze provides consistent quality that guests can taste. With decades of category expertise, Fresh’n Squeeze combines proven engineering with practical guidance for operators. We help restaurants and foodservice businesses integrate fresh citrus in a way that boosts flavor, supports efficiency, and fits daily workflow. Whether you’re building a fresh beverage program, outfitting a smoothie bar, or adding fresh juice to your kitchen prep, our team is ready to help you find the right solution. Visit us at the National Restaurant Association Show to explore how Fresh’n Squeeze can support your orange juice program, lemonade station, smoothie offerings, bar prep, or back‑of‑house citrus needs. Our team is here to help you bring fresh flavor to life with simple, reliable, high‑quality juicing solutions. The Fresh’n Squeeze 1800 was honored as a 2026 Kitchen Innovations Awardee for its advanced whole fruit extraction and fresh juice performance. Be sure to visit our Kitchen Innovations Showcase booth at the Show to see the award‑winning 1800 in person and explore its capabilities.
