The business scope of HUALI covers all the general paper products for food packaging like paper cups for cold/hot drinks with available option of double wall/ripple wall, paper bowls for soup/ice cream and salad, paper boxes like lunch box, hamburger box and corrugated boxes, food trays, paper bags etc. Moreover,we are striving to expand our range of eco-friendly products which is safe for individuals and for the purpose of environmental protection. As part of our sustainability efforts, we provide compostable alternatives such as Polylactic acid (PLA) derived from renewable resources, also aqueous coated material which is water dispersions of polymers (Acrylic Acid Copolymer) and widely used in paper-making as coatings.

name: JISAN FOOD SYSTEM CO., LTD.
description: We started as a food distributor in 1996 and changed its industry to a food manufacturing company in 2010 to produce rice cakes. Our factory is located in Gijang, Busan, and recently we have built a new building. Our factory consists of 4628㎡ of land and produces rice cakes with new machines. Our prodcut is make by IQF technology (tennel freezer). The biggest feature of IQF is that it immediately freezes hot products, minimizing the evaporation of moisture. The rice cakes boast a chewy and soft texture after thawing, resulting in high satisfaction among consumers. We have a lisence of HACCP and FSSC22000 for food safety. We produce rice cake with various filling such as cheese, sweet potato paste, sweet pumpkin paste, cream cheese, etc. We are continuously developing new menu items and making our best efforts to provide safe food for our customers.

name: Jiun Yo Co., Ltd.
description: Jiun Yo Co., Ltd is a leading paper cup manufacturer specializing in Eco-friendly products for 30 years. We offer a wide range of lining materials such as PLA, Aqueous and Bioplastics, with more sizes and applications for customers to choose from, combining products and services into innovative offerings. Innovation is one of our founding values. We strive to expand our range of eco-friendly packaging that is safe for individuals and for the purpose of environment conservation.

name: JRI
description: JRI: Engineering the Future of Food Safety & IoT Monitoring Welcome to the NRA Show Chicago 2026 . In an era where supply chain transparency and operational efficiency are cornerstones of success, JRI delivers world-class technology to safeguard your inventory and reputation. As a global leader in monitoring solutions, JRI provides an integrated ecosystem designed for absolute precision in the food service and hospitality industries. From quick-service restaurants to industrial food processing hubs, our mission is universal: ensuring every link in your cold chain is monitored, documented, and secure. A Global Standard for Food Quality Control JRI operates at the intersection of advanced metrology and the Internet of Things (IoT). We provide peace of mind through a robust, scalable infrastructure that works across borders. Real-Time Intelligence: Our wireless LoRaWAN® and Wi-Fi data loggers provide continuous tracking of temperature and humidity. Whether in a Chicago walk-in cooler or a Singapore distribution center, JRI keeps you connected. The JRI-MySirius Ecosystem: Our cloud platform serves as the digital brain of your operation. It centralizes data from every corner of your enterprise, offering intuitive dashboards and analytics accessible from any device, anywhere. Total HACCP Automation: Compliance is no longer a manual burden. JRI automates documentation, creating a tamper-proof digital trail that makes health inspections and audits seamless and stress-free. Innovation Built for Performance At the NRA Show 2026, we are showcasing how JRI technology overcomes demanding kitchen and warehouse challenges: Unrivaled Connectivity: LoRa® technology ensures signals penetrate deep into industrial freezers and across expansive facilities without complex wiring. Precision Calibration: Quality is in our DNA. Every JRI solution is backed by rigorous calibration standards, ensuring the data you see is the truth, eliminating errors that lead to waste. Instant Risk Mitigation: Our alerting engine uses multi-channel notifications (SMS, Email, Voice) to ensure staff are notified the moment a deviation occurs, saving thousands in potential stock loss. Your International Partner in Growth JRI is a strategic partner for global food brands looking to modernize operations. By integrating our solutions, you reduce energy consumption, minimize waste, and guarantee that customers receive the highest quality product. Visit our booth at NRA Show 2026 to experience the next generation of Nano SPY and LoRa SPY ranges. Let’s discuss a scalable solution for your needs, whether you manage 10 locations or 10,000. Explore more: jri-mms.com

name: JTECH
description: JTECH is your operations-first communications partner bringing everything you need to run a faster, more efficient restaurant into one simple, scalable system. From trusted guest and staff paging to digital displays, automated pager dispensers, and integrated communication tools, we help you streamline operations and elevate the customer experience. For more than 30 years, JTECH has delivered reliable solutions tailored to the real-world demands of restaurants and hospitality environments. Our team of specialists works with you to implement technologies that reduce friction, improve service speed, and support your staff. Our portfolio includes digital displays, wireless communication systems, guest management solutions, and staff paging. Everything designed to improve efficiency and drive revenue. We also offer complementary technologies such as Motorola two-way radios and high-impact commercial digital signage, ensuring your entire operation stays connected and optimized. With proven products, industry expertise, and dedicated support, JTECH is your single source for smarter communication and better operations.

name: JTM Food Group
description: Founded in 1960 by Jack Maas, Sr., JTM originated as Maas Brothers Meats and in 1974 was renamed Jack Maas Meats. To be reflective of the continued growth of the business, in 1980 the company became known by its present nameJTM Food Group. Since the company's inception, it has truly been a family business with participating members including JoAnn and Jack Sr. (Mom and Dad) and their seven children, Jack Jr., Mike, Mary Lou, Joe, Tony, Kathy and Jerry, in addition to the recent involvement of 15 grandchildren. And keeping it in the family, the initials "J, T, and/or M" are part of each family member's monogram! Jack Maas Sr.'s founding principles of dedication, faith, hard work and family continue to embody the JTM spirit and commitment to excellence.

name: Juicernet
description: Since 1982, Juicernet has been more than just a supplier. We are a partner and trusted resource for restaurants and foodservice teams. We help you build a strategy for speed, consistency, and guest appeal. Juicernet supplies commercial juicers with the highest yield in the industry, as well as pineapple corers, including our new TikiCup. We provide guidance on equipment selection, post-installation service, spare parts, and responsive support to reduce downtime and keep service moving. Visit us at Booth #3873.

name: Jumex USA
description: Jumex USA is redefining what juice means for today's consumer. Launched in 2024, the company was built to evolve a beloved heritage brand into a modern, U.S.-focused powerhousebringing bold innovation, new product categories, and culturally relevant experiences to market. Rooted in the rich legacy of Jumex and inspired by the dynamic tastes of today's multicultural consumer, Jumex USA is expanding beyond traditional nectars into exciting new spaces, including functional beverages, sparkling drinks, and adult offerings like Jumex Hard. Each product is crafted to deliver authentic flavor, high quality, and a distinctive "Mexi-cool" edge that resonates across generations. With a sharp focus on growth, Jumex USA partners closely with retailers and distributors to drive velocity, build incremental categories, and connect with consumers in meaningful waysboth in-store and beyond. At Jumex USA, we're not just selling beverageswe're building the future of flavor.

name: Jungle USA
description: Jungle USA delivers premium Italian-designed compostable tableware that blends sustainability, style, and performance. We provide innovative eco-friendly solutions for foodservice professionals seeking elevated presentation and environmentally responsible products.

description: Instantly Editable Digital Menu Boards and QR / Internet Menus. Change Item prices in seconds, add a special or 86 an item from any phone or laptop. 0 Design skills required. Import your existing menu with a photo.

name: Just Chairs and More!

While we started with the best chairs available, our line now includes all types of indoor and outdoor seating including wood and hand tufted booths. Ask your equipment dealer or food supplier about JustChairs. You will be glad you did.

Unlike many companies that produce kibbeh as part of a broader product line, we specialize exclusively in kibbeh, allowing us to perfect every aspect of this traditional dish. Making and preparing kibbeh is both an art and a craft, requiring skill, precision, and dedication. That’s why we are committed to becoming the premier kibbeh manufacturer in the United States—and, ultimately, the world. Our focus is on quality, authenticity, and innovation, ensuring that each piece we produce embodies the rich cultural heritage and exceptional taste that kibbeh deserves

name: Just Spread
description: With great care and passion, we developed Just Spread, a brand that offers simple, healthy, and delicious spreadable foods… Made with only essential ingredients and nothing more. ​ Our promise to you: Just Spread will always have the highest quality ingredients available from around the world. Hand-picked by us, our Fruit Preserves, Honey, and Nut Spreads will never contain GMOs or artificial ingredients, or use any other ingredients that make you cringe. ​

Our solutions are found in over 30,000 stores around the globe, serving some of the biggest brands including: McDonald’s, Burger King, 85C Bakery, HEYTEA, Sephora, IKEA, L'Oréal Paris and hundreds of others. Find out more at www.kabob.io .

name: Kai Multitrade
description: We are specialised in restaurant pacakging supply like Aluminium foil containers / Plastic soup contianers / Non woven bags / Stretch films / paper bags . which we keep ready stock at our newjersey warehouse for pallet shipping .

name: Kaida Plastics
description: Dongyang Kaida Plastics Co., Ltd. was established in 2011. It is a high-tech and specialized enterprise dedicated to the production of high-end plastic bottle for cosmetics, skincare, and beauty products, as well as premium, environmentally friendly, and recyclable food packaging containers made from PET, R-PET, PP, PS, and other materials. The company is located in the beautiful hometown of rosewood furniture—Dongyang, Zhejiang Province—just over 20 kilometers from Yiwu, the world-famous international trade hub for small commodities. Kaida's facilities cover an area of 100,000㎡, featuring six independent dust-free production workshops equipped with more than 80 semi-automatic and fully automated production and packaging lines, as well as multiple precision testing devices. With a workforce of over 150 employees, including more than 20 research and technical personnel and over 10 quality control specialists, Kaida has established excellent sales and customer service teams in both its Dongyang factory and Shanghai office. The company's products have obtained QS National Food Safety Certification, U.S. FDA Food and Drug Administration Standards, EU Food Safety Standards, the "Pin" certification from Zhejiang Manufacturing International Certification Alliance, BSCI Social Responsibility Certification, as well as BRC and ISO9001 International Quality Management System Certifications.

name: KAIPING CITY TIYA PLASTIC INDUSTRIAL CO., LTD.
description: Tiya is a BRCGS certified disposable food packaging manufacturer, specializing in plastic food containers, with OEM/ODM service.

name: Kanak Naturals, LLC
description: Kanak Naturals isn't just another packaging supplierwe're your partner in building real, sustainable change. From foodservice and retail to fresh produce and proteins, our renewable, compostable, and affordable solutions go beyond the "eco" buzzwords. We harness the strength of bamboo and sugarcane to create our molded-fiber packaging, and our crystal-clear RPET made from certified high-quality recycled materials to create innovative packaging that performs with purpose. Every product is designed to protect what matters most: your food, your brand, and our planet. Family-owned and proudly debt-free, we stand for people over profit and progress over waste. Inclusivity and collaboration drive us, from working alongside global brands to supporting small producers with packaging that truly makes a difference. Our name says it all: Kanak, a palindrome which means "gold" in Sanskritrepresents life, nutrition, and the circle of renewal. With us, every product has a positive beginning and end-of-life story. Real solutions. Real impact. Kanak Naturals.

name: Kaneka Green Planet
description: Kaneka Green Planet is a division of Houston based Kaneka Americas Holding, Inc.. Kaneka Green Planet manufactures a new and unique PHA biopolymer called Green Planet PHBH™ is a plant-based biopolymer that offers both flexibility and heat resistance. Kaneka Green Planet PHBH™ is produced via a novel bio-fermentation process which uses renewable plant oils as feed stock. Kaneka Green Planet PHBH™ is not only bio-based and bio-compostable in aerobic, anaerobic, or marine environments, it is also strongly resistant to heat and can act as a barrier to water vapor. Our grades are stable under everyday usage conditions but provided the right conditions, under either anaerobic, aerobic, or marine conditions in the natural environment, the product will begin to biodegrade and will return back to nature. Kaneka Green Planet Resins have been granted Food Contact Approval by the FDA and is suitable for all food packaging products. It can be formed into many products such as cups, cutlery, food trays, plates, pouches, film, straws, packaging material, and can replace most single use plastic products. Kaneka has been producing Green Planet PHBH™ since 2011. With this product, Kaneka hopes to find an alternative solution to the current single-use plastic products as the company recognizes the need to bring to market a plant-based product that will help reduce the ocean and landfill pollution.

name: Kansas State University, Department of Hospitality Management
description: The Hospitality Management Department at Kansas State University is an internationally recognized program; committed to preparing the next generation of hospitality leaders for a successful career in industry or academia by delivering a transformational educational experience through experiential learning, professionalism, international experiences, and strong partnerships with hospitality industry. Our programs are designed to meet the needs of the vibrant hospitality industry. If you are interested in a dynamic career in lodging; foodservice; or meeting, convention, and event management you have come to the right place. Teaching, research, study abroad, and leadership opportunities are designed to prepare students for professional careers in our service-oriented, information-based society.

name: KAPP MUTFAK VE MADENI ESYA SAN. VE TIC. LTD. STI.
Karabetian Import & Distribution Inc.

We always have our family and your family in mind whenever a new product is created. President, Nabil Karabetian

name: Karlowsky Fashion GmbH
description: Karlowsky Fashion is a family-run company with over 130 years of history. What began in 1892 on a wooden cart is now an international manufacturer of professional workwear – and yet it has remained a genuine family business. Our values have grown over generations: authentic, honest, independent, and strong. For us, tradition does not mean standing still, but rather a stable foundation on which we continue to build with foresight. Rooted in the region, connected to the world – that is Karlowsky Fashion. At Karlowsky Fashion, we develop our own products—practical, functional, and modern. We observe the market, listen to our customers, and focus on intelligent solutions for everyday working life. For us, innovation means continuous improvement, the courage to try new materials, designs, and colors, and combining function and style. This results in products that offer real added value. We rely on certified materials and fair production conditions – for a responsible future in textiles. As an active member of amfori BSCI® and part of the Partnership for Sustainable Textiles, we are committed to social and ecological standards throughout the entire supply chain. Our products carry international seals such as Standard 100 by OEKO-TEX®, GOTS, GRS, and the Green Button. Our products meet the highest standards of everyday professional life thanks to durable materials, careful workmanship, and practical design. Whether for healthcare, catering, or the hotel industry, we offer a wide range of colors, sizes, and fits that are available immediately. This ensures that every employee can find the right clothing. We place great value on personal customer contact—friendly, competent, and always solution-oriented. For us, the customer is the focus, which is why we take the time to understand your concerns and find tailor-made solutions.

name: KARMA GLOBAL LTD.
description: Karma Global LTD. is professional supplier for Bakery equipment and Cooking Equipment. Bakery Equipment - Planetary mixer - Mixer Designed with VFD - Spiral Mixer - Double arm dough mixer - Dough sheeter - Combi-Steamer - Convection Oven - Deck Oven Cooking/Kitchen Equipment - Heat lamp - Induction Cooker - Induction Fryer - Microwave Oven - Thermo Blender - Bain Marie - Tray Trolley - Dining Cart

name: Kaufhold's Kurds
description: Kaufhold’s Kurds has been in business since 1995 in Ellsworth, Wisconsin and is family owned and operated. Kaufhold’s Kurds is committed to producing high quality, hand breaded Wisconsin cheese curds by using whole eggs, milk, garlic cloves, jalapeno peppers, habaneros peppers, and onions.

name: Kava Haven
description: Kava Haven is the first kava-based non-alcoholic spirit built for modern hospitality — crafted for bars, restaurants, hotels, and experiences that want to offer guests something they can feel without the downsides of alcohol. Kava Haven was born out of a simple insight: guests want to unwind, connect, and enjoy the ritual of a great drink… but they don’t always want alcohol. Most non-alcoholic options on the market today stop at flavor. Kava Haven goes further by delivering effect — a noticeable relaxing, socially easing buzz that has fueled Pacific Island culture for over 3,000 years. We source premium noble kava from Vanuatu and extract it using a clean CO₂ method to preserve flavor, potency, and purity. Then we blend it into a modern lemon-ginger spirit with bright citrus, real botanicals, and a warm finish that works beautifully in cocktails or on its own. It’s completely alcohol-free, contains no adaptogens or THC, and offers a unique guest experience that’s grounded in tradition and supported by growing consumer demand. Only one year after launch, Kava Haven is now one of the top-selling non-alcoholic spirits in the United States, stocked in 700+ retailers across 30+ states, including leading non-alc shops, specialty grocers, and high-end hospitality venues. We are rapidly expanding with national distributors and recently secured placement with major chain retailers rolling out in 2025. For operators, Kava Haven offers: • A true “third lane” on the menu: not alcoholic, not just another N/A mocktail — but a functional alternative guests can feel • A profitable pour: 17 servings per bottle with excellent margin opportunities • Simple buildability: works in classics (Mule, Sour, Highball) and signature zero-proof creations • The perfect social replacement: great for guests who want to stay longer, order more food, or enjoy a second round without intoxication • A differentiator for wellness-driven hospitality: appeals to sober-curious, fitness-forward, Gen Z, and health-conscious diners Whether you run a cocktail program, a restaurant group, a hotel bar, a café, or a wellness space, Kava Haven gives you a premium, experiential non-alcoholic option that keeps guests satisfied, social, and returning. Come try a sample at our booth and experience why Kava Haven is reshaping what it means to unwind — all the buzz, none of the booze.

name: KCooper Brands
description: KCooper Brands is a leader in OEM manufacturing, specializing in innovative, high-performance solutions for Quick Serve Restaurants (QSRs), casual dining, convenience stores, grocery, and retail sectors. With expertise spanning logistics, engineering, packaging, branding, and filling, we empower our customers to enhance operational efficiency and maintain consistent quality. Our diverse product range includes sanitizer-compatible foodservice towels, all-purpose dry wipes, wet wipes, to include EPA registered formulas, and a comprehensive selection of plastic packaging solutions such as FDA-compliant overwrap films and rigid packaging. We also offer a full line of paper products, including towels, napkins, and tissues, tailored to meet the unique demands of the foodservice industry. Partner with KCooper Brands for a resilient supply chain that drives reliability, sustainability, and superior performance across your foodservice operations.

name: Keep Warm
description: The Future of Food Service: Sophisticated Heat. Unrivaled Precision. Say goodbye to open flames, water pans, and uneven heat. KeepWarm is the cordless chafing system designed to replace outdated setups with precise temperature control, flame-free safety, and significant operational savings. Keep-Warm is the first intelligent, portable, and recurring-revenue warming platform built specifically for hospitality, catering, and restaurants. Our patent-pending dual-interface platform combines premium, battery-powered hardware with sophisticated, app-connected intelligence. The operator-facing interface provides precision thermal control (140-180 degrees), real-time fleet management, and data analytics. The guest-facing interface features dynamic merchandising that displays food names, allergens, and branding, updating instantly via the cloud. Our platform delivers smart temperature control that ensures food safety and quality while eliminating the need for water baths and canned fuel. The units are portable, spill-proof, and battery-powered, providing unprecedented mobility. The modular design scales to any operation, and the app-connected intelligence enables real-time monitoring and control. Most importantly, the platform is built for scale with a recurring revenue model that creates long-term value for both operators and investors.

name: Kegco
description: Kegco is the flagship brand of Beverage Factory | Cydea, Inc., specializing in beverage dispensing and refrigeration products, the brand continues to be the leading innovator in the beverage dispensing and refrigeration industry. Our quality products are built to last for years of use for the coffee enthusiast at heart. From dispensing to storing, Kegco products are well constructed and quality tested to ensure the best experience for the user. Our core focus is to produce superior products that are practical, functional, and aesthetically appealing.

name: Keurig Dr Pepper
description: Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ: KDP) is a leading beverage company in North America and the first to bring hot and cold beverages together at scale. Formed in 2018 with the merger of Keurig Green Mountain and Dr Pepper Snapple Group, Keurig Dr Pepper has annual revenue in excess of $11 billion and nearly 27,000 employees. Our wide range of 125+ hot and cold beverages are designed to satisfy virtually any consumer need, any time, while our powerful sales and distribution network enables us to deliver our portfolio to nearly every point of purchase for consumers. KDP is committed to sourcing, producing and distributing beverages responsibly through our Drink Well. Do Good. corporate responsibility platform including efforts around circular packaging, efficient natural resource use and supply chain sustainability.

name: Kevins Worldwide
description: Kevins Worldwide is a leading industry expert in promotional products and apparel. Since 1994, our team has been providing exceptional products and solutions to clients. What sets Kevins Worldwide apart from the rest is our relationship-driven approach to business. We pride ourselves on our quick response time - all emails and calls are responded to within 90 minutes maximum. Each client is assigned a dedicated Account Executive who manages all client projects, adding value throughout the process. We are also proud to be one of the only promotional product suppliers in the nation to offer services and solutions, like fulfillment and webstores, all in one location. Our strategy of functioning as a partner rather than a vendor means relationships continue to come first. The bottom line is we look to save you money by using strategies and solutions that will save you time and let you focus on your business.

name: Kewpie
description: Since 1925, Kewpie has mastered the art of mayonnaise, blending top-quality ingredients with our signature yolk-only recipe, for an iconic, rich umami taste. Born in Japan and loved worldwide, it’s the ultra-creamy choice of chefs everywhere.

name: KEYUS
description: KPOS (KeyUS Inc.) is a California-based restaurant technology company dedicated to providing an all-in-one intelligent POS, payment, and AI management system for restaurants of all sizes. Guided by the mission “to help every restaurant easily achieve digital and intelligent operations,” KPOS focuses on delivering efficient, reliable, and scalable technology solutions tailored for U.S. restaurant businesses. KPOS offers a cloud-based SaaS platform that integrates point-of-sale (POS) , online ordering , self-pickup , payment processing , and AI analytics into a unified system. Restaurants can manage menus, staff, inventory, and sales data in real time on any device, while securely processing payments through trusted gateways such as Global Payments and TSYS . The system is intuitive, stable, and adaptable for operations ranging from single-store establishments to multi-location chains. On the hardware side, KPOS provides a comprehensive ecosystem that includes smart POS terminals, self-service kiosks, kitchen display systems (KDS), digital scales, cash drawers, printers, and enterprise-grade routers. All devices are deeply integrated with the software to enable true plug-and-play functionality—improving operational efficiency, reducing errors, and enhancing the overall dining experience. KPOS Online enables restaurants to build branded digital ordering and self-pickup platforms, reducing dependence on high-commission third-party delivery apps. KPOS Pay consolidates multiple payment channels—including credit cards, WeChat Pay, and Alipay—into a single interface, supporting fast settlements and unified reconciliation. KPOS Cloud AI leverages aggregated business data to generate insights on sales trends, menu performance, customer preferences, and operational efficiency, empowering data-driven decision-making and smart restaurant management. Today, KPOS serves a growing network of restaurants across the United States, including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and American dining establishments—from family-owned eateries to regional chains. The company has dedicated support teams in major U.S. cities, offering localized training, technical maintenance, and after-sales service to ensure smooth onboarding and reliable daily operations. KPOS operates under a SaaS Subscription + Hardware Authorization + Payment Revenue Sharing model, while actively expanding partnerships with distributors and agents across the U.S. Through standardized products, flexible collaboration frameworks, and high-quality service, KPOS is building a nationwide intelligent restaurant ecosystem. Mission: To help every restaurant achieve higher efficiency and smarter operations at a lower cost. Vision: To become the leading AI-driven restaurant management and payment platform in the United States, making technology the core driver of restaurant growth.

name: KFI Inc
description: KFI is Canada's largest producer and seller of authentic Indian sauces and chutneys. Restaurants across North America are seeing the latest trend - Indian and South Asian food is HOT!

name: Kimbo
description: KIMBO Coffee, USA Naples based espresso coffee roaster NOW in the USA. We believe coffee is much more than craftsmanship and technique. It is a social ritual. It is an excuse to share a moment of pleasure and chat with friends, as well as a way to remind ourselves that it is the little things that really matter in life. Here at KIMBO Coffee, USA our aim is to make this really quite ordinary moment extraordinarily special. Since the founding of our company as Caff Kimbo in Naples, Italy, we have focused all our efforts on making this unique beverage not only a part of the daily Neapolitan routine, but also striven to bring it into chain accounts, hotels, cafes, and restaurants all over the world. Kimbo Coffee, USA is proud to continue this tradition and represent Kimbo il Caff di Napoli, in the USA. We embrace creativity and passion, first in beans and ground, then in single serve. We guarantee coffee of excellent quality and unmistakable flavor, in the finest Neapolitan tradition; offering the market a wide range of products to meet the unique and diverse demands of consumers; spreading the culture of espresso all over the world. This is the mission that has accompanied Caff Kimbo over the last 60 years. Sipping is believing!

Also manufacturer of Sheet Metal fabricated and deep drawn parts/components, exporting to around 70 Countries world wide, carrying 3500 products in our range, established since 1970. our Head office is located in Mumbai and two of our plants located at the outskirt of Mumbai.

name: King's Hawaiian
description: Since our humble beginnings in 1950 in a little town called Hilo on the "big island" of Hawaii, we have remained committed to irresistible, craveable products with an Aloha Spirit. description: KINJIRUSHI is a leading manufacturer specializing in processed wasabi and a variety of Japanese condiments. At our exhibit, we invite you to explore our premium product lineup, including fresh wasabi, frozen and powdered wasabi, as well as ginger, garlic, and yuzu-based offerings.

name: KioSoft
description: KioCaf delivers automated and self-service caf solutions designed for modern commercial environments. From fully automated beverage kiosks to flexible self-service caf stations, KioCaf solutions enable businesses to expand beverage offerings while improving efficiency and reducing labor dependency. name: Kitchenless
description: The New Era of Dining Starts Here Kitchenlesse is redefining food-service with Swiss-engineered steam technology that delivers chef-quality meals in about 60 seconds - without a kitchen.
