Inspired by the simplicity of capsule-based coffee - engineered for food - Kitchenless gives operators a powerful way to upgrade their menu, reduce labor, and meet today's demand for speed, quality, and convenience. One button. 60 seconds. A completely new way to serve food. Come see where tech meets taste.

name: Klean Environmental Equipment Co., Ltd
description: China no.1 ESP device manufacturer and solution provider for commercial kitchen exhaust and industrial waste gas emission. Since 1992, Kleanland has been a global leader in delivering clean air through innovative electrostatic precipitation (ESP) technology. As China’s top provider of air purification systems for commercial kitchens and industrial facilities, we design advanced solutions that tackle smoke, grease, and harmful emissions—protecting both people and the planet. Kleanland’s pioneering invention set the standard for high-performance kitchen exhaust purification, and the company has since remained a global leader in ESP technology, continuously refining and advancing its filtration solutions. Today, our products lead the market and have been trusted by restaurants, hotels, factories, etc. KLEANLAND's businesses are across 91 countries. With over 300,000 units sold and $70 million in annual revenue, Kleanland combines cutting-edge engineering with unmatched expertise. Kleanland holds UL (U.S.), CE (EU), and fire safety certifications, underscoring our commitment to quality and safety. Internationally, our systems shine in critical applications, from commercial kitchens to industrial plants.

name: Klimon
description: Klimon is a next-generation dairy-free dessert and beverage platform built for the era of modern indulgence. Across foodservice, indulgent drinks and desserts are becoming powerful drivers of traffic, excitement, and incremental revenuefueling what we call the Sweet Treat Economy . What was once an add-on is now the reason consumers visit, as these moments increasingly represent the best moment of the day . Klimon was created to lead this shift. Our platform combines a portfolio of ready-to-serve premium frozen novelties, ice cream and grab-and-go treats with a versatile foundation for creating indulgent desserts and beverages across the menu from soft serve and milkshakes to dessert coffees and LTOs. All designed to deliver luxuriously creamy, full-flavor decadence with modern, clean, sustainable dairy-free ingredients and elevated textures. Built specifically for foodservice, convenience, and grab-and-go environments, Klimon helps operators capture high-margin indulgent moments with minimal labor while unlocking endless menu innovation. By combining culinary creativity, bold flavor development, and a flexible platform approach, Klimon transforms dairy-free from a niche alternative into a destination for indulgence. Because indulgence should be for everyone. And the best moment of the day should never require compromise. No Dairy. No Difference.

name: Klondike Cheese Co
description: Klondike Cheese CO. producer of Odyssey Brands Feta Cheese and Greek Yogurt, Greek Yogurt Dips and Reduced Fat Sour Cream. Also crafting Buholzer Brothers Muenster, Havarti, Brick, Gouda and Dill Havarti cheeses. Made in Wisconsin by 5 Master Cheesemakers and four generations of family commitment we only produce the highest quality, award winning products available in retail, foodservice and industrial sizes. Please visit our website for product sizes, nutritional data and great tasting recipes. www.odysseybrands.com and www.buholzerbrothers.com .

name: Kluck, LLC
description: At Kluck, our mission is to simplify your restaurant management by providing an intuitive, all-in-one solution that streamlines operations and enhances guest experiences. Whether youre a busy quick-service concept or an upscale dining establishment, our modular platform ensures you get the right tools for your business without any unnecessary complexity. If you're ready to take your restaurant concept to the next level, Kluck is the perfect solution. Contact us today to learn more about our platform and how we can help your operations.

name: Kolpak, a Welbilt Company
description: At Kolpak, we don't just offer a box; we build relationships. With a legacy of trust and reliability as a leader in cold storage spanning decades, we deliver quality cold storage solutions tailored to your needs. With decades of experience as a trusted leader, we focus on exceptional service and customer satisfaction, ensuring reliable lead times and durable equipment. Our expert teams design efficient walk-in units that enhance kitchen operations, helping foodservice operators improve menus, streamline processes, and boost profitability. Count on Kolpak as your dedicated partner for future success. Our product offerings range from simple, nominal walk-ins to fully customized solutions, ensuring you find the perfect solution for your food storage requirements. By choosing Kolpak, you can save money on energy, operating expenses, and overall ownership costs.

name: Kontos Foods Inc.
description: Manufacture over 60+ varieties of Hand-Stretched Ethnic Flatbreads including: Pocket-Less Pita, Gyro Bread, Higher Protein Greek Lifestyle Pita, Pre-Grilled Panini, and Tandori Nan; all Certified Kosher-Pas Yisroel, and Certified Halal, Vegan, Contain 0% Trans Fat. Wraps including: Gluten-Free Wraps, All-Natural Crpes (Traditional and Savory varieties), Tid-Bits. Fillo Dough, Kataifi (Fresh, Dried, Toasted) Dough and related Fillo/Kataifi Dough Products including: Baklava, Mediterranean Nut Rolls, Balouri, Spanakopita, Tyropita, Dubai Chocolate, etc. Distributors of Mediterranean Specialty Food Products including: Greek Yogurt, Feta Cheese, Halloumi Cheese, Kefalograviera (Saganaki) Cheese, Tzatziki (Gyro) Sauce, Gyro (Cones, Strips, and Loaves), Stuffed Grape Leaves with Rice (Dolmades), Kalamata Olives, Orzo, Hummus, etc. Many Items available for both Retail and Foodservice.

name: Kooka Paper Manufacturing Sdn Bhd
description: Kooka Paper delivers innovative paper manufacturing and converting solutions for changing market demands. Known worldwide for quality and product diversity, we offer customized OEM, house brand development, and private labeling services. We operate responsibly and are certified FSC®, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 9001:2015, BRCGS, and SMETA/SEDEX.

name: Korkio Company
description: JuicyBite is on a mission to bring uncompromising convenience to the kitchen — without sacrificing flavor. Whether you're a chef firing 200 covers a night or a home cook with 10 minutes, you should be able to put real, premium protein on the plate without the prep, the mess, or the guesswork. Founded in 2024 by Juyoung Steve Kim, JuicyBite is a Korean-American owned company headquartered in New York. Every product is 100% made in the United States. Our duck is sourced from American farms and produced in Chicago in a USDA and HACCP certified facility. We're also American Humane Certified — a standard most premium protein brands in our category don't meet. We started with sous vide chicken breast — a proof point that ready-to-eat protein doesn't have to taste like a compromise. From there, we built what we believe is the most innovative duck breast line in the United States. No one else is doing what we're doing with duck: 100% breast meat only (not whole-duck mixed cuts), precision-sliced for fast cooking, and offered in three menu-ready formats: Hickory-Smoked Duck Breast (fully cooked) — 2026 FABI Award winner , recognized as one of just 28 products selected by the National Restaurant Association from across the entire foodservice industry. Korean Bulgogi Duck Breast (marinated, raw) — savory-sweet, crowd-pleasing, ready in 10 minutes. Korean Gochujang Duck Breast (marinated, raw) — bold, spicy-sweet, ready in 10 minutes. In under a year on the market, our duck line has sold over 30,000 pounds , earned 100+ five-star customer reviews , and is now stocked in every H Mart location nationwide (95+ stores) — the largest Asian supermarket chain in America. We're also live on Weee! , the leading Asian grocery e-commerce platform, and currently in conversations with Whole Foods Market . We control our own logistics. JuicyBite operates three fulfillment centers — Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York — giving us nationwide cold-chain reach with the speed and reliability foodservice operators demand. We can ship direct to restaurants, distributors, and retail partners without third-party bottlenecks. At NRA 2026, we're looking to connect with: foodservice distributors, restaurant groups exploring duck or Korean menu programs, retail buyers, and chefs ready to put a premium, on-trend protein on their menu without adding prep labor. Visit our booth to taste the FABI-winning Smoked Duck Breast and both Korean marinated varieties — and see why JuicyBite is becoming the go-to convenience protein brand for the next generation of American kitchens.

name: KOTRA - Korea Trade Investment Promotion Agency
KOZMOPOLITAN GIDA SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.
description: Cosmopolitan Food Group is a global partner that brings the deep-rooted culinary heritage of the Mediterranean to the dynamic world of professional kitchens. With over 25 years of expertise in the olive oil and gourmet food industry, our partnership operates across 5 continents with 6 warehouses and 5 sales offices, serving more than 55 countries worldwide. Centered on the high standards and consistency required by the foodservice sector, our company maintains a strong presence in the United States, supplying the nation’s largest supermarket chains and high-end retailers through our established offices and New Jersey-based operations. Our portfolio for the NRA Show Chicago features our premier brands: Palermo, Casa Di Oliva, Terra Madre, Lio, Olivitaly, and Cordelio. We provide the essential ingredients chefs and culinary professionals demand, delivered with uncompromising quality. Our production range spans from exquisite olive oils and balsamic vinegars to natural honeys, specialty salts, seasonings, sun-dried tomatoes, capers, and gourmet sauces. At Cosmopolitan Food Group , our vision goes beyond mere supply; we strive to be a reliable partner that empowers creativity in the kitchen. By blending traditional methods with modern production technology, we bring the purest Mediterranean flavors to the table with standardized excellence. With a steadfast commitment to quality and a customer-centric approach, we place our global logistical strength at the service of professional kitchens. We invite all foodservice professionals to discover the rich world of Mediterranean flavors, crafted through the perfect balance of experience and innovation.

name: Kraft Heinz Away From Home
description: KRAFT HEINZ AWAY FROM HOME Taste, Flavor, Experience! Kraft Heinz Away From Home (AFH) is the foodservice division of the Kraft Heinz Company. At AFH we stand by our mission to grow with taste, flavor, and experience wherever people eat. We aim to be trusted partners, supporting large and small businesses across the US in their pursuit to provide patrons with the brands and products they love. The Kraft Heinz Company is the third-largest food and beverage company in North America and the fifth-largest food and beverage company in the world, with eight $1 billion+ brands. A globally trusted producer of delicious foods, The Kraft Heinz Company provides high quality, great taste and nutrition for all eating occasions whether at home, in restaurants or on the go.

name: Krinos Foods
description: Established in 1958, Krinos Foods is the largest importer and distributor of Greek and Eastern European specialty foods in North America. Headquartered in New York, Krinos also has facilities in Atlanta, California, Chicago, Louisiana and Texas. Krinos imports, distributes and manufactures over 1,400 frozen, refrigerated and dry products including the best-selling tahini in the U.S. Product lines include beverages, cheeses, coffees, confectionery, meats, olives, olive oils, pastas and peppers. Through its own facilities and a network of public warehouses, Krinos Foods services restaurants, foodservice accounts, retailers, gourmet stores and club stores across North America. This broad customer base allows Krinos to place its products in every market segment and to bring the finest specialty foods from around the world to your table.

name: KRISTAL END. MUTFAK CAMASIRHANE MAK. PAZ. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.
KRS Corporation, LLC
description: KRS — The Bumpbar Company Built for the bump. Designed for the kitchen. Since 2004. KRS Corporation is a premier U.S.-based manufacturer with 22 years of excellence in designing and building rugged hardware for the global hospitality sector. Unlike resellers, we engineer and manufacture our own patented product line in-house. Our focus is on "real-world" reliability: hardware engineered to thrive in the most demanding kitchen environments—where grease, heat, and high-volume stress are constant. A Deeply Patented Technology Stack What sets KRS apart is our commitment to original engineering. We hold 40+ U.S. and International patents , with two-thirds dedicated specifically to our Kitchen Display System (KDS) and bumpbar innovations. This extensive intellectual property portfolio serves as a guarantee of quality and a shield for our partners, ensuring they are deploying unique, protected technology that cannot be replicated by "off-the-shelf" competitors. Exclusive Toast KDS Partner KRS is the only bumpbar for Toast KDS — the exclusive hardware partner for the Toast ecosystem, backed by contract and patented technology. What We're Showcasing at Booth #7377 Visit us to experience our latest professional KDS innovations: Professional Bumpbars: Built for heavy daily use and lightning-fast order "bumping." Designed for the "gloves on, heat on, tickets flying" reality of peak kitchen volume. Mounting & Installation Ecosystem: A full suite of brackets and accessories designed to simplify deployments, reduce costly onsite service calls, and optimize kitchen ergonomics. Modern Integration: Bluetooth, USB, PS/2, and RS-232 interfaces across 16, 20, and 30-button configurations — with simple customization tools that allow installers to standardize across multi-site rollouts in minutes. The "Brand-Agnostic" Strategic Advantage KRS bumpbars work with virtually all major KDS systems globally. We specialize in bridging equipment generations—supporting everything from legacy RS-232 serial environments to modern wireless protocols. With layouts ranging from 16 to 30 buttons, we provide the flexibility that dealers and integrators need to match any kitchen workflow or screen layout. Unmatched Market Footprint & Scalability Since 2004, KRS has been the engine behind national restaurant rollouts. Our track record includes: Global Reach: Active programs across the U.S., Canada, and Australia. Supply Chain Continuity: As a USA-based manufacturer, we offer quality control and drop-ship fulfillment that offshore competitors cannot replicate. Strategic Alliances & Leadership KRS offers a unique opportunity for software-first KDS providers seeking a vertically integrated, patented hardware platform. Whether you are looking for a dependable partner to protect your margins or a strategic alliance to complete your technology stack and outpace the competition, we invite you to start a conversation. Visit us at Booth #7377 for live demos and to discuss partnership or strategic opportunities.

name: Krystalite GT Inc.
description: Krystalite GT Inc. Canadian Manufacturer of PET & rPET Cold Drink Cups Krystalite GT Inc. is a Canadian manufacturer of PET and rPET cold drink cups, supplying foodservice distributors, national chains, and branded end users across Canada and the United States. From our 188,000 sq. ft. manufacturing and warehousing facility in Fergus, Ontario , we deliver dependable North American supply backed by fully vertically integrated production — from sheet extrusion to printing to finished cups . This integrated approach allows us to offer consistent quality, reliable lead times, and high-impact custom-printed programs , while reducing reliance on offshore supply chains. With expanded operations now fully in place, Krystalite GT is built to support customers seeking stability, responsiveness, and long-term partnership in today’s evolving packaging market.

name: Kuloday Plastomers Private Limited
description: We take this opportunity to introduce ourselves as one of the largest Manufacturers and Exporters of Flexible packing materials from India, a leading name in the domain of sustainable packaging solutions, headquartered in India. We are excited to reach out to you with our range of Plastic Paper bags that cater to your packaging needs with an eco-friendly twist. Established in 1975, KPPL is a "Two Star export house" recognized by government of India with major exports to USA, UK, EU, South America, Japan, Australia and New Zealand. We have been audited / inspected by International bodies , further certified with 1) TUD SUD (ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018 certified Company) 2) SEDEX 3) BSCI 4) FSC -C172536 5) CTPAT -VISITED With the global shift towards environmentally responsible choices, the demand for eco-friendly packaging solutions is on the rise. We take pride in being at the forefront of this movement, offering an array of meticulously crafted paper bags Plastic Bags that are not only visually appealing but also align with your commitment to sustainability.

name: Kuo Chang Machinery Co., Ltd.
description: Kuo Chang Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1967. Since its establishment, Kuo Chang Co. has been dedicating to design and manufacture the Noodle Making Machines. Kuo Chang Co. has the professional experience in Noodle Making Machines and most important of all, we listen to our customers carefully. Our main production lines are in Instant Noodle, Automatic Fresh noodle, Automatic Dry noodle (stick), Automatic Steam-Dry noodle and Automatic Wheat Flour Skin. All equipment are certified with CE certification. KCMC has the qualification of ISO 9001 approved in 2000. The Noodle Making Machines of KCMC has affirmed by domestic and around the world. Our major market is oversea which accounting for 90%, including Asia, America, Africa, Europe and Oceania. IN 2003, due to the noodle marketing trend, we evolve national advanced technology and successfully design the Automatic Water-Cook Noodle Making Production Line. Kuo Chang Co. will continue to produce the high technical and high efficient Noodle Making Machines. Also, our team will continually strive for the quality improvement in the conduct of our business. We look forward to the pleasure of serving you in the future.

name: Kuper
description: Kuper Technik is redefining the gourmet ice market. By leveraging innovative freezing technology, we produce automatic ice machines designed to deliver consistent, crystal-clear, premium-quality ice — including the signature 2.5-inch spheres beloved by upscale bars and cocktail lounges. Our solutions bring together precision, reliability, and elegance, ensuring every ice shape meets the highest standards for clarity and consistency. With this technology, Kuper enables beverage professionals and connoisseurs alike to elevate their drinks with ice that melts slowly, minimizes dilution, and enhances visual appeal — a new benchmark in gourmet ice production.

name: KUSINA INS. TAAHHUT MUTFAK TURIZM SAN. VE DIS TIC. A.S.
KUTAHYA PORSELEN SAN. A.S.
description: Since its establishment in 1970, Kütahya Porselen has succeeded in becoming one of the biggest porcelain brands from Turkey to the world with its strategic investments and innovative production approach. With an annual installed capacity of 140 million pieces in 7 factories, today it is writing a global success story by exporting to 72 countries in 6 continents. Contributing to the national economy with the volume of its exports, Kütahya Porselen also reinforced its strength in the international market by acquiring the well-established German brand Mitterteich. Drawing attention with its collaborations and innovative products that make a difference in design, it has won prestigious Red Dot, iF Design, German Design and Good Design awards with collections such as Skallop, Yum, Bevel and Panio. The projects it has realised with world-renowned designers are not only limited to aesthetics, but have also perfected the user experience. In addition to special HoReCa collections for professional businesses such as hotels, restaurants and cafes, it adds value to every table with its stylish and functional home group products. Making sustainability a business model, Kütahya Porselen produces 100% recycled collections from waste materials and prevents 3 million kg of CO2 emissions annually through energy-saving projects. The Company installed a 50,500 m² Solar Power Plant on the roofs of its factories. With this project, it will meet 30% of its annual energy needs from solar energy. By making a difference in quality, innovation and sustainability, Kutahya Porselen makes a difference in every area from tables to nature.

name: Kuwait Packing Materials Manufacturing Company K.S.C
description: K-PAK Kuwait Packing Materials Manufacturing Company KSC, was incorporated in 1986 in Kuwait manufacturing extruded expanded disposable product for the food industry. We are presently operating in Kuwait, two plants in KSA (Dammam, Jeddah, soon in Riyadh), also in Ras Al Khaimah UAE and K-Concept in Dubai. The K-PAK product range is very large with about 300 items for catering, retail, fast-food industry, hypermarket, poultry, etc. With the current market trend, the group has diversified the products to PP, PET, HIPS, Kraft Paper as well as Bio-Degradable containers.

name: KwickPOS
description: KwickPOS is a modern, browser‑based point‑of‑sale system designed by former restaurant operators and engineers who understand the fast‑paced, high‑pressure environment of a busy kitchen. Built for speed, flexibility, and nonstop reliability, KwickPOS gives restaurants the tools they need to run smoother operations without being locked into expensive processing contracts or limited feature bundles. With powerful support for diverse cuisines and complex workflows, KwickPOS handles multi-station routing, modifier-heavy menus, and multilingual staff. Whether you’re running a single location or planning to expand, KwickPOS delivers the speed, customization, and reliability today’s restaurants need to grow.

name: L&T Restaurant Equipment Inc.
description: L T Restaurant Equipment Supply Inc. is proud to be a leading supplier of excellent quality and affordable restaurant equipment and supplies for nearly 30 years. We have a diverse product line and a system that meets the U.S. and international quality standards such as NSF, UL, and ETL. We have a large clientele throughout the United States, Canada, and South America. We have a 5,000 square feet showroom in New York City and a manufacturing and storage facility well over 20,000 square feet in Brooklyn, New York. We carry a full line of products ranging from wok ranges, hood systems, buffet tables, commercial refrigerators, coolers, freezers, smoke houses, stainless steel sinks, shelves, work tables, dinnerware, and restaurant furniture, etc. In addition we offer custom designing, manufacturing, and installation services.

name: La Preferida
description: Established in 1946. La Preferida offers a full line of Mexican products for Foodservice, Retail and export.

name: La Tourangelle
description: La Tourangelle is a family owned and operated producer of artisan food. We’re on a mission to inspire food lovers everywhere. Our natural products are crafted locally in California and France using traditional practices. From sourcing the best quality ingredients to small batch production, our products are rooted in artisan know-how. We believe in making products that are authentic, delicious and sustainable, and in by doing so we can spread joy and well-being through food. As a follow up to our 2021 FABI Award Winning - White Truffle Spray Oil, we're excited to be showcasing our new 2023 FABI Favorite Award Winning - 16oz Non-Stick Cooking Spray.

name: Lab2Fab
description: Engineering food service with the same rigor that put rockets in space, electric vehicles on every road, and robots in kitchens. We are proud to announce a new addition to our manufacturing portfolio with FizzBot, a 2025 Kitchen Innovation Awardee! Initially developed by the Yum! Automation team in RED INNOVATION LABS BY YUM! and now being commercialized by Lab2Fab, FizzBot will revolutionize beverage dispensing. Come check it out at the 2025 National restaurant Show! Our other products include past Kitchen Innovation Award winning products FryBot and PizzaBot, which automate the frying and pizza prep process for commercial kitchens.

name: Labrezza S.A.
description: Labrezza S.A. is a manufacturer of fresh premium pasta & doughs in different formats, all frozen. Our fresh, pasteurized ravioli line (e.g., spinach & ricotta, 4 cheese, mushrooms, butternut squash) is made with durum wheat semolina, with no preservatives and no artificial colors/flavors, ready in 4–6 minutes for fast. We have retail and foodservice packaging and shelf life are 12 months. In doughs, we produce puff pastry and Criolla (“home made” style) oven bake and for frying in different sizes and shape according to what the customers need, puff pastry (round/rectangular family size) for pies, and quiche dough with seed and whole wheat options (including vegan options). Shelve life 12 or 18 months depending of the product. Our packs include separators between discs for ease use. We export to 10+ countries (U.S., Chile, Brazil, Colombia, Spain, UAE, KSA, among others) with international-standard cold chain; our facility has been FDA-inspected. We are open to develop specific products, and flexible formats for fast retail/foodservice launches.

name: Lagoon Furniture America Corp
description: The simple life is our goal at Lagoon. We design and produce indoor and outdoor furniture for everyday life with the spirit of love, simplicity and eco-friendliness. Crafted with the latest in technology, Lagoon products are designed to be functional, durable and ergonomic with modern fashion, the latest trends and the upmost in style. With consideration to every precise detail, we are pleased to bring you easy to use, environmentally friendly products that strictly adhere to recyclable policies using only ecologically sound materials. As you see, we are devoted to you, our environment and our future.

name: Lakeview Cheese
description: LAKEVIEW CHEESE Founded in 2009, Lakeview Cheese is a leading North American manufacturer and distributor of quality branded and private label cheese products. We feature an extensive product portfolio of high-quality cheeses, available in block, print, loaf, sliced, diced, and shredded products which will exceed your expectations. Segments served: Foodservice, Retail, Industrial, International Export Locations: Las Vegas, NV / Salt Lake City, UT / Rancho Cucamonga, CA

name: Lan Shan Enterprise Co., Ltd.
description: We, Lan Shan, are professional manufacturer of residential & commercial RO systems & equipment, water purifiers, and relevant RO parts in Taiwan , with more than 30 years' experience (Established in 1993) in the water treatment field. We’re also selling various system products and spare parts accessories product categories to meet the clients' request. Product system series: Ro system (residential/commercial/industrial), Water purifier, Hydrogen water generator, Water dispenser & drinking fountain, Whole house water filtration system, Shower & faucet filter. Accessories spare parts: Filter cartridge, RO membrane, Filter housing, Faucet, Pump & adapter , Pressure tank , Bracket, UV ray sterilizer, Quick & Jaco fitting, PE tube…so on. For more product information, please visit our website: www.lanshan.com.tw

name: LANDI Global
description: Founded in 2005, LANDI is a leading smart POS provider across payment, checkout, and mobility, with leadership in China, 900 patents, and 130 million terminals deployed. Since 2023, LANDI has accelerated its global expansion, empowering the commerce ecosystem through integrated solutions and strong partnerships to support digital transformation worldwide.

name: Landmark Studio and Design
description: At Landmark Studio & Design we offer easy to maintain commercial grade indoor/outdoor recycled plastic furnishings to suit even the most custom of demands. Whether you’re revitalizing your bar or restaurant patio dining experience, wanting to update furnishings for your hotel guests, or are looking to up your game with product branding, we will guide you every step of the way so you can keep a customer centric focus!

name: Lantmannen Unibake USA
description: Bakery manufacturer of Euro-Bake artisan breads and Schulstad gourmet pastries. Turn to us for labor saving solutions, such as par-baked and fully-baked breads or gourmet freezer-to-oven pastries.

name: Lassonde
description: With over 100 years of history in the food and beverage industry, Lassonde has built a reputation for quality, innovation, and commitment to its partners. At Lassonde Foodservice, we leverage our expertise to provide unique beverage and fruit-based snack solutions tailored to the evolving needs of industry professionals. We believe that success begins with collaboration, and Fairlee is the foundation of that successoffering the basics you can count on to inspire, create, and elevate your beverage menu. Explore Our Fairlee: Basics you can count on. Fairlee is a brand designed specifically for foodservice professionals. Whether you run a restaurant, bar, caf, hotel, casino, catering business, or even a summer camp, Fairlee provides versatile, high-quality beverage solutions that inspire creativity and drive profitability.

name: Laura's Gourmet, LLC
description: Laura’s Gourmet: Chef‑Crafted Flavor and Culinary Innovation For more than two decades, Laura’s Gourmet has stood at the intersection of culinary craftsmanship and modern kitchen innovation. Founded in 2004 by Chef Laura Briscoe—an accomplished culinary educator, recipe developer, and industry mentor—the company has earned a national reputation for delivering premium, chef‑crafted products designed to elevate both professional and home kitchens. Laura’s Gourmet began with a simple but uncompromising philosophy: real food, real flavor, no shortcuts. Today, its award‑winning granola line continues to set the standard for clean‑label excellence. Each blend is crafted in small batches using purposeful ingredients, balanced textures, and flavor profiles inspired by Chef Laura’s professional kitchen experience. The result is a lineup trusted by chefs, retailers, and consumers who demand consistency, quality, and culinary integrity. Building on this foundation, Laura’s Gourmet expanded its portfolio with CounterCool , a chef‑designed kitchen tool engineered to solve real workflow challenges. CounterCool’s five‑tier, collapsible design reflects Chef Laura’s deep understanding of space management, efficiency, and the realities of high‑volume production. Whether in a commercial bakery, catering operation, food truck or teaching kitchen, CounterCool delivers the durability, versatility, and intuitive functionality that culinary professionals expect. At the heart of the brand is Chef Laura’s commitment to empowering cooks of all levels. Her dual perspective—as both a chef and an educator—shapes every product, recipe, and resource the company creates. Laura’s Gourmet is more than a food brand or a tool manufacturer; it is a culinary companion dedicated to helping kitchens run smarter, taste better, and operate with confidence. As Laura’s Gourmet continues to grow, its mission remains constant: to bring chef‑driven excellence to every table and every station, one thoughtfully crafted product at a time.

name: LAV HORECA
description: LAV HORECA is recognized as the professional brand of the Grok Group, shaped by the Group's hospitality know-how and long-standing glassware expertise to meet the real demands of industry professionals. This foundation enables LAV HORECA to address the operational needs of restaurants, bars, cafs, hotels, and catering services with genuine understanding. Guided by decades of manufacturing experience and a hospitality-driven mindset, LAV HORECA supports professionals in turning service goals into reality. Make It Real is not only the brand's motto but a promise to transform ideas, ambitions, and operational pressures into lasting, practical solutions. As both a trusted supplier and part of a group that operates hotels, LAV HORECA carries a rare dual perspectiveseeing the true requirements of daily service from both sides of the table. This insight shapes every product the brand designs, produces, and delivers. As the world's fifth-largest glassware producer, LAV HORECA is relied upon by hospitality operators who need products built for real service conditions. Design considerations reflect the pace and volume of horeca environmentsfrom tempered options that enhance durability to stackable forms that improve space efficiency and workflow. Every feature exists for one purpose: to support smoother operations and elevate the everyday rhythm of professional service. Through its global scale and expertise, LAV HORECA stands as a reliable partner committed to helping professionals create meaningful moments in every setting.

name: Laxway Packaging (Cambodia) Co., Ltd
description: LAXWAY PACKAGING (CAMBODIA) Co., Ltd is specializedin various kinds of food and beverage industry disposable aluminum foil products R&D, production and sales enterprises.The strength of the company, include technology, talent and other resources, the integration of effective and reasonable, and supplemented by the management systems of modern enterprise management mode, scientific and efficient company, through the rapid development in recent years, has become one of the leading manufactures of aluminum foil industry.

name: LC Food
description: We are a distribution-focused company founded by restauranteurs for restauranteurs. We work diligently to grow our presence in the market, enhance our catalogue, and recognize the needs of our customers; distinguishing ourselves as an ally dedicated to customer satisfaction and excellent performance. At LC Food , we are a family committed to our allies to offer them fresh ingredients, quality products, and top-notch equipment. We take pride in providing personalized service that adapts to your needs. Our main goal is to be market leaders, both in terms of price and quality. We strive to exceed our customers' expectations and ensure fast and efficient delivery times. At LC Food , you can count on us as your reliable allies in the industry. We are here to support you every step of the way.

name: LE WAF
description: Leading brand in the premium waffle segment, Le Waf manufactures and distributes authentic Liege sugar waffles. Thanks to the pearl sugar folded in our yeasted dough, Le Waf caramelizes during the baking process to offer you delicious flavor and tantalizing aroma. Available in many sweet and savory flavors, several sizes and many packaging options. Visit booth #12729to taste the best waffle ever !!!

name: Leanpath
description: Leanpath, a Certified B-Corp, is on a mission to make food waste prevention and measurement everyday practice in the world’s kitchens. Operating in over 50 countries, Leanpath's AI-enabled solutions identify root causes of food waste and change behaviors that lead to that waste. Since 2004, Leanpath and its foodservice partners have prevented over 150 million pounds of food from going to waste, an average of 50 percent reduction per kitchen. Leanpath operates in every foodservice segment. Global clients include Sodexo, Aramark, Compass Group, Hilton, Marriott and Google. Leanpath has offices in Portland, London and Sydney.

name: Lee Kum Kee
description: Lee Kum Kee, the pioneer behind Oyster Flavored Sauce, has been a global leader in authentic Asian sauces and ingredients since 1888. Our portfolio has grown from our renowned Oyster Sauce to include Soy Sauces, Sesame Oils, Ready-to-Use Sauces, Chili Sauces, and innovative products like Asian Hot Honeys. We also partner with operators and brands through our custom sauce manufacturing capabilities, developing tailored flavor solutions that bring new menu concepts and products to life. Backed by a legacy of quality, sustainability, and a GFSI BRC Grade “A” certification, Lee Kum Kee is trusted worldwide.

name: Lenovo
description: Lenovo is a US$62 billion revenue global technology powerhouse, ranked #217 in the Fortune Global 500, employing 77,000 people around the world, and serving millions of customers every day in 180 markets. Focused on a bold vision to deliver Smarter Technology for All, Lenovo has built on its success as the world's largest PC company by further expanding into growth areas that fuel the advancement of New IT' technologies (client, edge, cloud, network, and intelligence) including server, storage, mobile, software, solutions, and services.

name: LETA
description: LETA: From 1983 wooden chair roots to Ozcanlar in 2004, evolving into Leta Contract Proje A.S. by 2025. With our Leta Contract brand, we expertly serve the Horeca sector, providing top-tier chairs, tables, armchairs, and mobile furniture. Comfort, style, and natural elements define our offerings, meticulously crafted. Our RD team drives innovation, ensuring quality and modern designs. Operating since 2011 in Bursa Inegols specialized industrial zone (65,000 m), our world-class production blends advanced tech with skilled craftsmanship. We invest in innovation for unique, quality products, achieving high efficiency with cutting-edge machinery and integrated systems. Our production planning ensures fast, durable, and standardized output. We fulfill project-based movable furniture needs with timeless, bespoke pieces. Understanding your vision, we offer creative solutions, managing every detail holistically. We merge aesthetics with practical planning for appealing Horeca indoor and outdoor designs, providing comprehensive, timely after-sales support.

name: Libbey LLC
description: Since 1818, Libbey has been the vanguard of artistry and innovation in glassmaking. From our roots in Toledo, Ohio, to our place as a worldwide total tabletop leader, we continue to empower chefs, mixologists and home entertainers to craft moments that matter with beautiful and durable tabletop products. More U.S. foodservice operators' tabletop investment dollars are trusted to Libbey than to any other brand.

name: Libman Company
description: The Libman Company has been a family-owned business since 1896. We have evolved to produce a diverse range of top-quality mops, brooms, brushes, and innovative cleaning tools designed with precision and care. Our commitment to quality and innovation is evident in our expansive product line and continuous efforts to develop new cleaning solutions. Operating from a 1.6 million sq. ft. facility in Central Illinois, we take pride in manufacturing the majority of our products right here in the U.S. Distributors, and customers alike appreciate our dedication, as reflected in their testimonials about working with Libman. Truly, we are more than just a cleaning tool company; we are a legacy of quality, innovation, and genuine U.S. craftsmanship.

name: Lincoln Foodservice Products, a Welbilt Company
description: Lincoln Foodservice Products, a Welbilt company, is a leading provider of innovative foodservice equipment designed to meet the needs of today’s fast-paced, high-demand foodservice environments. With a strong commitment to quality, efficiency and customer satisfaction, Lincoln Foodservice Products is dedicated to providing cutting-edge solutions that drive operational success for foodservice professionals worldwide.

name: LINYI XINCHEN PACKING CO.,LTD.
description: We are a professional manufacturer and supplier of disposable food service packaging, based in Linyi, Shandong, China. With our factory located in Huadong Plastic Market, we specialize in the production of a wide range of tableware and packaging products, including plastic cutlery, disposable bamboo chopsticks, straws, paper bowls, and paper boxes. Our products are designed to meet the demands of the hospitality and foodservice industries, focusing on quality, hygiene, and cost-effectiveness. We have built a strong reputation for reliable supply and competitive pricing, serving customers both domestically and internationally. We are excited to connect with new partners at NRA 2026 and explore opportunities to support your business needs.

name: Lion's Wood Banquet Furniture
description: Lion’s Wood is an innovator of banquet and food service furniture. Our focus for the 2026 show is to introduce the industry to game-changing technology that will change banquet operations forever. Also, with limited upscale, exterior-grade products on the market, we are introducing our new outdoor collection. As world leaders in induction technology, we hold patents for both solid surface induction cooking and warming. We specialize in the development of tailored banquet furniture for brands, groups, and properties. Tell us your operational challenges, and together we will create a product solution custom built exclusively for you that matches your décor. Our products are made-to-order by the hands of American men and women out of our factories in Baltimore, Maryland. To us, being American made is a badge of honor that we hold dearly. We are privately held, and we stand by our products.

name: Liquid Death
description: Liquid Death Water...And Iced Tea. Liquid Death will not kill you. But make no mistake, our infinitely recyclable cans of premium low-calorie beverages will absolutely murder your thirst. And it doesn't stop there. After twerking on your thirst's grave, these ruthless cans will actually donate a portion of the proceeds to help kill plastic pollution. Why? For centuries, all the funniest and coolest marketing and branding was only done for unhealthy products like beer, fast food, candy, and junk food. But those days are over. Soon, Liquid Death will use health and humor to conquer the world and make all beverages Liquid Death for eternity. At which point we'll finally begin turning the human race into flesh batteries to power our giant marketing robots. But enough about us and our boring story. Tell us about you....

name: Little Sesame
description: Little Sesame is the fastest growing hummus brand in the US. Founded in a 500 sq basement pop up in 2016, Little Sesame launched their grocery ready line of hummus in July 2021. The recipe was created by founders and chefs Nick Wiseman & Ronen Tenne in their flagship restaurant in Washington, DC. The hummus is made with 100% regeneratively farmed chickpeas grown by farmer Casey Bailey under the big sky in Montana. It’s freshly spun and super smooth, layered with rich tahini and brightened with freshly squeezed lemon juice.

name: LloydPans
description: LloydPans is a US manufacturer of products for the Foodservice Industry. Since 1986 we have brought innovative solutions and exceptional customer service to the Foodservice Industry and are widely known as a premier business partner. "Quality by Reputation. Innovation by Design." Standard Pizza Pans and Tools Bakeware for Modern Foodservice Ovens Custom Solutions from Design to Delivery Racks Stands and Cabinets Standard and Custom Coating Options Anodizing Service Engineering and Design

name: Lodge Manufacturing
description: 125 year old Cast Iron Cookware Manufacturer. Made in the USA!

name: LogEasy
description: LogEasy helps restaurants create incident reports that are easy to write today and reliable when they matter most. Instead of messy paper logs or inconsistent reports, LogEasy guides staff through a clear, step-by-step reporting process so incidents are documented quickly and accurately. Each report is automatically locked and sealed with a complete audit trail, ensuring the original record can’t be altered later. The result is documentation that is consistent, verifiable, and defensible if questions arise months or years after an incident. Designed for busy frontline teams, LogEasy makes it simple for any staff member to complete a proper report in minutes while giving operators confidence their documentation will hold up when it matters most.

name: Lola's Fine Foods
description: At Lola’s Fine Foods, our mission is to provide a truly unique hot sauce for everyone to enjoy. Lola’s is made from the freshest ingredients and the world’s most unique peppers for a delectable experience. We believe spicy foods should make the meal, not burn it down. Lola's products are meant to make you feel good and deliver unbeatable flavor. At Lola's, we say that Our Flavor Runs In The Family, and it truly does. Our Lola's Original is a recipe that goes back generations; back to the Philippines where Lola’s family's made an everyday spicy, garlicky table sauce. Growing up, this sauce was always on the table. Lola would make it fresh with every day and the family loved it, but didn’t think much of it, until one day her son Taufeek took some to work on a whim for a company potluck and wowed all his coworkers with it. We've grown a lot since then, but ultimately Lola's is the story of a kid who loved his mom's cooking so much that he needed to share it with the world, and named his company after her.

name: Long Range Solutions LLC
description: LRS enables any business to engage, manage, communicate, and monitor guests, staff, and sites. Combined with in-depth data reporting, we provide real-time insights and analysis for businesses to enhance guest engagement and maximize operational efficiency. The LRS team is committed to building new technologies that empower, restaurants, QSRs, and other businesses the ability to manage their operations while improving the entire guest experience. From traditional pagers and paging systems to innovative order tracking and Motorola two-way radios, find out how LRS can help your business grow and thrive in a changing and competitive world. Our patented technologies are in over 80,000 businesses and 50 countries around the world. Come visit our booth to see the latest in: - Guest Pagers and Paging Systems - Wait staff and Server Pagers and Paging Systems - Table Tracker - table location system - Motorola Two-Way Radios - Push for Service Paging - App free digital waitlist and queue management with paging and text messaging notifications https://lrsus.com/ or contact info@lrsus.com

name: Loop AI
description: Founded in 2022 by a team of engineers and restaurateurs, Loop AI is the enterprise-grade AI platform built for the restaurant and retail back office. Operating as an agentic co-worker, Loop AI empowers brands to drive profitable growth by automating complex tasks across finance, operations, and marketing. Loop AI is trusted by 300+ brands — both public and private — powering thousands of locations in the US. Learn more at LoopAI.com .

name: LoTech Sales
description: We offer custom imprinted kitchen ware and serving utensils.

name: Lotus Bakeries North America Inc
description: Everything about the Biscoff® cookie is iconic: its unique taste, crunchy bite and typical shape. Its distinctive red wrapping is recognized by people all over the world. Since the first cookie was created by Jan Boone Senior in 1932, the recipe never changed. The distinctive caramelized flavor, combined with its crunchiness is a delight in every bite. Yet, it contains nothing but carefully selected natural ingredients. The real secret lies in the mastery of the unique baking process. In addition to the classic cookie, our Biscoff® flavor can also be enjoyed as a creamy spread. By crushing our Biscoff® cookies after baking, they are turned into a delicious spread, keeping all of its unique rich caramelized taste, making the Biscoff® spread a surprising addition to your customers’ favorite baked goods, drinks or desserts.

name: Lotus Energy Drinks
description: Lotus Plant Energy is based upon the sacred lotus flower, the interconnection of mind, body and spirit. We embrace the power of vibrant color, taste and energy to evoke the senses to a feeling of happiness, harmony and balance. Our journey led us around the world to discover 7 of Earth's most powerful plants we used to create our proprietary formula we call PE7™ (Plant Energy 7). We believe Lotus Plant Energy to be the best natural energy drink on planet Earth, to live life on a higher more vibrant level!

name: LS Retail
description: LS Retail is a world-leading developer and provider of business management software for food service, hospitality, retail, pharmacy and forecourt businesses. Our solutions offer powerful F&B functionality with high integration flexibility. Companies can use the composable architecture to build the solution stack they need, leveraging their current investment or adding their preferred hardware, loyalty system, or ERP. LS Retail software is available as a front-of-house, kitchen, and back-of-house solution to integrate to your stack or as a unified restaurant platform on top of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central ERP, allowing companies to manage their whole business – from online ordering to physical locations to recipe and ingredient management, customer loyalty, reporting, and more – with one platform. Every day LS Retail software powers over 110,000 stores, restaurants, hotels, gas stations and pharmacies in 157 countries.

name: LSKB Aluminium Foils Pvt. Ltd.
description: HOMEFOIL, a brand of LSKB Aluminium Foils, offers a premium range of house foils and food containers. The brand features a comprehensive portfolio of aluminium products catering to both industrial and consumer needs. Its mission is to enhance user value through a strong focus on hygiene, safety, convenience and eco-friendliness. HOMEFOIL proudly introduces India’s first Golden Embossed and Silver Embossed Foils, highly versatile, environmentally responsible and thoughtfully designed. With child-friendly safety features, guaranteed length and weight as stated on the pack and superior freshness retention, HOMEFOIL ensures a dependable experience every time. Being 100% recyclable, it is environment-friendly.

name: LuckyEng
description: Replicating the Master’s Touch with Modern Automation! LuckyENG, established in 1992 , delivers innovative automated food machines that empower anyone to become an expert in making gimbap and sushi . We are dedicated to providing futuristic concepts and top-notch quality products, including our high-performance gimbap and sushi machines trusted by major companies and used in thousands of stores across South Korea. We proudly command a 90% domestic market share and export our reliable, high-quality machines to over 40 countries globally. Our commitment to continuous research and development ensures we deliver optimal solutions that help our clients significantly reduce labor costs and enhance productivity. Visit our website( https://luckyeng.net ) to discover how LuckyENG can contribute to your success.

name: Lumana
description: Lumana is a complete AI video security platform that works with any camera, transforming raw video into actionable, real-time intelligence to elevate security, safety, and operations. Powered by Lumana VIA-1, the world’s first continuous-learning video intelligence model, the platform transforms any camera into an AI agent to automate monitoring, streamline responses, accelerate investigations, and generate insights — enabling teams to see, understand, and act when it matters most with minimal manual effort.

name: LumiSource, Inc
description: LumiSource, LLC is a leading full-service supplier of home and commercial furnishings since 1997. We are a nationally recognized designer, supplying to some of the nation's top chains, event planners, and restaurant designers. Specializing in Contemporary, Glam, and Transitional designs, we provide stylish products across living, dining, office, and lighting categories. Committed to innovation, we strive to develop new ideas, set trends, and constantly refresh our product offerings. Our in-house design team of talented innovators is constantly creating original and unique designs with functionality and affordability in mind. Constantly building and adding onto our product collections, having an in-house design team makes it easy for ideas and concepts to become reality.

name: Lund's Fisheries Inc.
description: Lund's Fisheries Inc, Located in Cape May NJ is a vertically integrated seafood company. From our 20 Fishing Vessels to our 3 off loading facilities, Processing Plants and our Fresh Scallop Processing Facility in New Bedford MA. Lund's Fisheries is one of the largest USA MSC Squid and Scallop producers in the United States!

name: Luxer One
description: Luxer One is the industry leader in package management solutions, dedicated to relentlessly improving the way the world receives goods. Our state-of-the-art lockers, powered by intuitive software and supported by a team of dedicated professionals, streamline the delivery process for residents, property managers, and carriers. Luxer One's journey began with a simple idea: to transform package delivery into a seamless and convenient experience for all. What started as a vision has now evolved into a comprehensive ecosystem of cutting-edge technology, innovative solutions, and unparalleled service. Our sleek and secure lockers, crafted from resilient materials and equipped with advanced features, provide a safe and reliable storage solution for packages of all shapes and sizes. Paired with our intuitive software platform, which offers real-time tracking, customizable notifications, and seamless integration with existing systems, Luxer One delivers a seamless end-to-end package management experience. But Luxer One is more than just a logistics company; we're a trusted partner committed to the success of our customers. From personalized onboarding and comprehensive training to 24/7 support and ongoing optimization, we go above and beyond to ensure that every interaction with Luxer One exceeds expectations. Driven by a passion for innovation and a relentless pursuit of excellence, Luxer One continues to push the boundaries of what's possible in package delivery. As we embark on this journey, we remain steadfast in our commitment to delivering convenience, reliability, and peace of mind to our customers, one package at a time.

name: LYFE Outdoor Comfort Solutions
description: Ventizio, a standout brand from LYFE Outdoor Comfort Solutions, is your partner in transforming outdoor restaurant spaces into comfortable havens, regardless of the weather. As Americas leading provider of outdoor comfort solutions, we specialize in climate control technologies for the restaurant sector, ensuring your guests enjoy an exceptional dining experience all year round. Cooling Heating Solutions: Ventizio offers an array of cooling and heating options to suit any outdoor setting. From evaporative cooling systems that lower temperatures during hot days to efficient gas heaters that provide warmth on cool nights, our products are designed to integrate seamlessly into your outdoor decor. Customization Efficiency: Recognizing the uniqueness of each venue, Ventizio provides customizable solutions to align with your restaurants specific needs. Our energy-efficient products not only enhance guest comfort but also demonstrate a commitment to environmental sustainability. Dedicated Support: Choosing Ventizio means gaining a partner committed to your success. We offer comprehensive support and maintenance services, ensuring your investment continues to benefit your establishment for years to come. Elevate Your Dining Experience: Embrace Ventizio and transform your outdoor dining area into a year-round attraction. Experience the difference in guest satisfaction and set your restaurant apart as a destination that prioritizes comfort and quality, no matter the season. Join us at the tradeshow or reach out to discover how Ventizio can redefine outdoor dining at your restaurant. With LYFE, youre not just enhancing a space; youre investing in an experience where every guest can Live Their Fullest Everyday... Outdoors.

name: M/s. Fomex Pulp Pack Private Limited.
Maanshan Hexing Metal Products Co., Ltd.
description: MaAnshan Hexing Metal Products Co.,Ltd. is a professional manufactureer of the stainless steel buffetware. Main products including Chafing dish, Juice Dispensers, Coffee Urn etc. We sells the products to more than 30 countries, and have good feedbacks from the clients.

name: Macie LLC
description: Macie LLC is a Los Angeles-based company specializing in sourcing and delivering high-quality packaging solutions, combining U.S.-based service with reliable manufacturing in Asia. We work closely with our long-term manufacturing partner, a fully certified facility with SEDEX, BSCI, BRC, FSC, and ISO 9001 standards. Through this strong partnership, we combine reliable manufacturing with localized service tailored to the U.S. market. At Macie, we go beyond trading. We actively support product development, quality control, and customization to ensure every product meets both functional requirements and market expectations. Our team understands the importance of speed and communication — we respond quickly, solve problems efficiently, and deliver with consistency. Whether you are building a brand, scaling your business, or optimizing your supply chain, we provide flexible and dependable packaging solutions you can trust.

name: MadChef
description: Welcome to MadChef, the only app designed to empower chefs and restaurant owners to keep more of their sales by lowering their food cost by at least 7-9%. Compile the most cost-effective orders—all with a few clicks. In the restaurant world, convenience comes at a price—sometimes a very steep one. While chefs and operators often stick with familiar ordering routines to save time and avoid headaches, that simplicity can quietly erode already-tight margins. That’s exactly why MadChef was created : to reclaim both control and savings without compromising quality or workflow. As the owner or chef, your key role is to mark substitute products across different distributors so our algorithm can find the best prices for the items you want to order. MadChef’s algorithm automatically splits the order into multiple drafts, each optimized for the lowest prices across your approved distributors. Chefs then adjust quantities as needed to meet each distributor’s delivery minimum—either by increasing certain items or shifting products between distributors. Done. Why MadChef? Because pulling $8K in profit from every $100K in food cost is the easiest money you’ll ever make in a restaurant. Find a simpler way? We’d love to hear it.

name: Made In Cookware
description: Motivated by our 100-year family history in kitchen supply, Made In cookware set out to rethink the kitchen landscape. We partnered with the best raw material providers and multi-generational, family-owned manufacturers in the U.S. and Europe to build superior culinary tools. With the world's finest chefs as product development partners, Made In cookware and tabletop pieces are designed to perform and crafted to last. Today, our kitchenware is trusted by over 2500 restaurants including Michelin starred chefs and numerous high-turn hotel concepts.

name: MAE Fine Foods
description: MAE Fine Foods manufactures Chocolate Bon Bons, Chocolate Mouse Domes (MAELOs), Chocolate Bars and French Macarons at our facility in Avondale Arizona. Our artisanal approach is designed for the most discerning of chefs and at a volume and price to please all involved. In conjunction with our sister company, Global Packaging Group, we can offer private label packaging. Our products have a one-year frozen shelf life and a 30-day refrigerated shelf life.

name: Maeda Kaisan
description: Shimonoseki-based manufacturer specializing in this traditional delicacy and was the first incorporated company in Japan dedicated to its production. We are proud to offer products known for their exceptional taste and quality, earning recognition as among the finest in the industry.

name: Magic Seasoning Blends
description: Built on the principles set forth by our founder, world-famous Chef Paul Prudhomme, we use only the highest quality ingredients sourced from around the world to create our family of flavorful products. From classic and innovative specialty seasoning blends to rubs, bottled sauces, marinades and smoked meats, all of our carefully crafted products are designed to easily deliver complex flavor.

name: MAGNESOL
description: MAGNESOL® filter media extends the usable life of frying oil, improves product quality and reduces frying oil costs. MAGNESOL® acts like a magnet to reduce soluble impurities formed during the frying process that cause off-odors, off-flavors, off-colors, free fatty acids, and polar compound formation.

name: MaintainIQ
description: Maintain IQ is an all-in-on Accountability Suite. Digitize Line Checks, Daily Tasks & Checklists, Prep Lists, Corrective Actions, Preventive Maintenance, Work Orders & Repairs, Vendor & Warranty Management, Internal Audits & Inspections, Compliance Management, and more. Everything is digitally managed, tracked & recorded. Access via phone, tablet/iPad or desktop. Receive automated daily email reports. Staff will know what to do, how & by when. Reduce training, and ensure critical safety, cleaning & compliance procedures are met with notifications. Boost productivity by up to 40 hours per month. Eliminate paper logs. MaintainIQ is 100% customizable for your operations, and can manage multiple locations. Perfect for single unit or multi-unit independent owners, hospitality groups, franchisees & franchisors. Call us at (818) 650-3326 OR book a Free 20min Virtual (Zoom) Demo at: www.MaintainIQ.com.

name: Malou
description: Malou helps hospitality groups take control of their online presence, boost visibility, and drive more guests through the door. With one centralized platform, restaurant operators and marketers can: ✅ Manage and sync listings across 50+ platforms (Google, Open IA, Yelp, Apple Maps, OpenTable, Resy, etc.) ✅ Boost your presence on local search results and across AI platforms (Chat GPT, Grok, Claude, Gemini...) ✅ Generate, respond to, and analyze online reviews from different platforms ✅ Plan and publish social media content ✅ Track performance with clear, actionable insights We combine AI-powered tech with restaurant marketing experts to deliver fast, visible ROI—without adding more to your plate. Already trusted by 3,000+ restaurants in Europe and North America -- from fast-growing franchises, to iconic hospitality groups. Among our clients are Krispy Kreme, Wingstop, Pret A manger, Accor, Riviera Dining Group, Dinex Group, and more.

name: Mama's Creations
description: Mama’s Creations, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAMA) is a leading marketer and manufacturer of fresh deli prepared foods, found in over 15,000 grocery, mass, club and convenience stores nationally. The Company’s broad product portfolio, born from MamaMancini’s rich history in Italian foods, now consists of a variety of high quality, fresh, clean and easy to prepare foods to address the needs of both our consumers and retailers. Our vision is to become a one-stop-shop deli solutions platform, leveraging vertical integration and a diverse family of brands to offer a wide array of prepared foods to meet the changing demands of the modern consumer. Our fully cooked products are available in foodservice and retail packaging (available in on the go formats for convenience) across a variety of cuisines (Italian, Asian, Mediterranean), meal types (appetizers, entrees) as well as formats (proteins - beef, chicken, turkey, pork - salads, grains, olives). Products include: beef meatballs in Italian style sauce, grilled chicken, roasted, pasta meals, olives, salads, paninis, and sandwich wraps. Stop by to sample a selection of our delicious products. For more information, please visit https://mamascreations.com.

name: Manitowoc
description: Manitowoc Ice has built its reputation on developing the most innovative and reliable ice solutions for the foodservice industry. In the restaurant and hospitality business, it can seem like every day brings a new set of obstacles and complications. From maintenance to production, it's no small task to keep every aspect of the organization up and running well especially when you're charged with overseeing the entire operation. At Manitowoc, we know that simplifying even one part of the enterprise can make a profound improvement on the rest of the business. That's why we're dedicated to providing more opportunities for an effortless workflow in your kitchen, harnessing our thoughtful engineering and expertise for streamlined designs and functionality. To provide these practical strategies for your challenges, we've curated our extensive portfolio towards deliberate diversity and versatility. From modular systems to remotely-controlled units, we're constantly innovating our intuitive designs to help your business realize its full potential. Our customized solutions provide much more than just temporary enhancements. Backed by decades of experience in the industry, our products are relentlessly reliable, built to last and withstand the daily pressures of foodservice demands. And that's the same dependability reflected in our own strong support network, providing the consistent service you need at every stage of your business. So, no matter how complex your establishment, you can depend on Manitowoc to provide that unparalleled simplicity, usability, and effortlessness to your operation every day. For more information, visit www.manitowocice.com

name: MANUFACTURAS LENIN
description: It all started back in 1988, as a result of the need to create high quality options for the food industry. We started off by selling tortilla machines and spare parts for the dough and tortilla industry. We quickly grew our operations and then started producing a wide variety of innovative machines, along with technical support for restaurants and tortilla shops in our region. Thanks to you, our company keeps trascending year by year, expanding our specialized team and high tech machinery. We are proud of being the Tortilla Machines Manufacturer with more presence worldwide and in Mexico. We have presence in over 85 countries and keep growing each day. We are Manufacturas Lenin. MISION Produce as a team, with passion, dedication and pride, machinery that surpasses our clients expectations; offering the highest quality and service possible. VISION Become the leading company worldwide in the manufacturing of machinery for the dough and tortilla industry; providing our customers with high quality equipment for their growth and development. PURPOSE Contribute to society’s growth and well-being by developing human capital. QUALITY POLICY MANUFACTURAS LENIN is a Mexican company that manufactures equipment for the food industry. We provide the service and manufacture of machines for corn flour tortilla, wheat flour, browning or frying, and the nixtamalization process. Our commitment to our customers is to provide them with high-quality services and products, meeting the design requirements, those agreed with customers, and the applicable standards. It is the continuous improvement of our processes and management system together with the training of our collaborators, the way to achieve machines with the highest quality at competitive prices.

name: Map Labs
description: Map Labs is the #1 Google & Apple Maps Marketing software and service for multi-location restaurant groups. Map Labs goes beyond just tools and accurate reporting - we deliver strategy, support, and execution that drive real-world results. Over 10,000 world-leading businesses are growing with Map Labs' custom maps marketing strategies and industry-leading software. Visit MapLabs.com to get started today.

name: Maple AI, Inc
description: Maple is at the forefront of developing voice-to-voice AI specifically tailored for the restaurant industry. Our AI receptionist is designed to intelligently handle customer interactions over the phone, providing a seamless and personalized experience that enhances customer satisfaction and streamlines restaurant operations.

name: Maple Leaf Farms
description: Maple Leaf Farms is a fourth generation family-owned company that provides premium quality duck products to the foodservice and retail industries. Independent family farmers raise our ducks in a thoughtful and responsible manner in accordance with our animal well-being guidelines. Learn about our company and find recipes at www.mapleleaffarms.com.

name: Marco Beverage Systems
description: Marco Beverage Systems designs and manufactures innovative, precise and energy-efficient beverage solutions. Their systems are found in hotels, restaurants, quick-serve restaurants, offices, and coffee shops around the world. As a proudly B Corp certified company, Marco beverage systems believes in balancing profit with purpose and making their business a force for good.

name: Margarita Man
description: Margarita Man produces over 30 premium frozen daiquiri margarita flavors. Our products can be found in premier daiquiri bars, restaurants, cruise ships, and many of your favorite Caribbean resorts. All of our flavors are made with pure cane sugar, and NO high-fructose corn syrup is used in any of our products. Our bases can be made with or without alcohol, and are perfect for mixing with tequila, rum, vodka, bourbon, wine, or grain alcohol to make all of your customers favorites. These include margaritas, daiquiris, hurricanes, frozen lemon drop martinis, frose, mango, sangria, and many others. Many of our flavors are made with organic flavorings, including our lime Margarita, Summertime Lemonade, Strawberry, Frose, and Hurricane. We have distributors in many states, and we are always able to ship directly to your business if you prefer. We are also a proud distributor of Frosty Factory frozen beverage machines. We can often get new Frosty Factory machines to our customers quicker than everyone else due to our rolling stock purchase orders that we place with Frosty Factory. We partner with equipment financing companies to offer financing options for your frozen beverage machines. We are your one-stop shop for premium frozen drinks!

name: MarginEdge
description: MarginEdge is a restaurant and beverage management software that streamlines back-office tasks with real-time finances, invoice processing, bill pay, price alerts, inventory, recipe and ordering management for restaurant operators, bookkeepers and accountants. MarginEdge uses machine learning/AI and a team of awesome humans to automatically code line item detail from invoices so restaurant operators and their accounting teams have access to purchasing data in as little as 24-48 hours without manual entry. We then integrate with their POS and accounting systems to provide an automated data link that empowers operators and restaurant accountants with real-time financial data so they can make profit-boosting decisions when it counts, not after the period has ended. As a team built by former (and current!) restaurant operators, part of our mission is to bring operators the same energy, attention to detail, and passion they bring to their guests. Our culture is deeply rooted in service, partially because that's where so many of our team came from, but also because we believe it is just the right way to run a business. We design our software with profound empathy for the complexity of running a restaurant, and the goal of making the magic just a little easier for operators by taking the complex (read: very annoying) back-office tasks off their plate, while empowering them with real-time data.

name: Mariposa Dairy Ltd.
description: Mariposa Dairy , located in Lindsay, Ontario, is a leading Canadian producer of award-winning goat and sheep milk cheeses. Founded in 1989, the company has grown from a small, family-operated creamery into a trusted supplier serving retail, foodservice, and private label markets across North America. At the heart of Mariposa Dairy’s success is a commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation. The company partners with local Ontario farms to source fresh, high-quality milk, ensuring both consistency and traceability. Using state-of-the-art production technology alongside traditional cheesemaking techniques, Mariposa Dairy produces a wide range of products, from creamy soft chèvres to specialty cheeses with unique flavors and formats. Mariposa is especially recognized for its chèvre logs , spreadable bovrès , and award-winning cheeses such as Lindsay Bandaged Goat Cheddar . These products consistently earn recognition at prestigious competitions, including the Canadian Cheese Awards, the British Empire Cheese Show, and the American Cheese Society Awards. Beyond cheesemaking, Mariposa Dairy prides itself on responsible business practices. Its modern facility is designed with energy efficiency in mind, and the company emphasizes waste reduction, recycling, and sustainable sourcing. With continuous investments in technology, food safety, and R&D, Mariposa Dairy is positioned at the forefront of the specialty cheese market. A key differentiator for the company is its expertise in private label production . Mariposa partners with major grocery chains and specialty retailers to develop custom products that align with consumer trends, including clean-label formulations, bold flavors, and premium quality standards. This capability allows customers to expand their cheese category offerings with confidence in consistency, safety, and supply. With a reputation for excellence, a dedicated team, and a focus on innovation, Mariposa Dairy has become a trusted partner to retailers and foodservice providers alike. Whether under its own brand or through private label, Mariposa continues to deliver cheeses that meet the growing consumer demand for quality, flavor, and authenticity.

name: Massad Group LLC
description: The Sauce That Started It All Our Shawarma Sauce is the heart of our brand. It’s what people taste first and what they remember long after. Carefully developed to strike the perfect balance of richness, tang, and spice our sauce is inspired by traditional Middle Eastern flavors while being versatile enough to fit into a wide range of menus. It’s not just a condiment - it’s a flavor enhancer, a signature and a differentiator. What makes our sauce special? Authentic flavor profile that complements, not overpowers Versatility across proteins, vegetables, bowls, wraps, and more Consistency that chefs and operators can rely on Consumer appeal that keeps people coming back for more Whether drizzled over freshly shaved chicken, used as a dip, or incorporated into creative menu items, our sauce elevates every bite. And when paired with perfectly cooked shawarma? It becomes something unforgettable. Reinventing the Shawarma Experience Now let’s talk about the showstopper. Our automated broiler machine is designed to take everything that makes shawarma special and make it more accessible, more consistent, and more efficient for today’s foodservice environment. This isn’t just equipment. It’s a game-changer. Imagine this: A perfectly stacked spigot of marinated protein, slowly rotating. The aroma of spices filling the air. Golden, caramelized edges forming as the meat cooks evenly. Juicy, flavorful slices shaved off effortlessly ready to serve. That’s the magic Now imagine achieving that same result - every time - with minimal labor, streamlined operation, and a visually captivating presentation that draws customers in. Why It Matters for Your Business In today’s competitive foodservice landscape, success comes down to a few key factors: Speed of service Consistency of product Labor efficiency Menu differentiation Customer experience Our integrated solution addresses all of these. Designed for Today’s Food Trends Consumers today are more adventurous than ever. They’re seeking: Global flavors Authentic experiences High-quality ingredients Fast, convenient options Shawarma checks every one of those boxes. Why You Should Stop By Trade shows are full of booths. We get that. But what we’re offering isn’t just another product—it’s an experience, a solution, and an opportunity. When you visit our booth, you’ll: Taste something truly craveable See innovation in action Discover a new way to deliver authentic flavor Come See, Taste, and Experience It Follow the aroma. Watch the sizzle. Taste the difference. Come visit our booth and experience the perfect fusion of tradition and technology - where bold flavor meets effortless execution. We can’t wait to meet you.

description: Founded in 1967, we are proud to be a 100% Employee Owned company exclusively manufacturing frozen dessert mixes for retailers across the United States. Over the decades, we have built a reputation for delivering exceptional quality and service, making us a trusted partner for businesses ranging from national brands and wholesalers to local mom-and-pop shops. After many years of being a regional mix manufacturer, we’ve expanded both our product lines and shipping ranges to accommodate partners across the United States. Our facility, now located in Sandwich, IL, is strategically positioned to efficiently ship products to both coasts. Built in 2018, our state-of-the-art facility adheres to rigorous food safety standards, earning us an excellent SQF score that reflects our commitment to producing safe, high-quality products. Beyond safety, we are deeply committed to sustainability, continuously evaluating and improving our environmental footprint to ensure a better future for generations to come. Our mixes are crafted with fresh raw milk and cream that are rBST-free. We have a full lineup of premium ice cream mixes ranging from 10% - 18% butterfat. Our frozen custard mixes are 10% fat in both unflavored, vanilla, and chocolate options. Our soft serve mixes range from a 4% - 10% butterfat in unflavored, vanilla, and chocolate. We also have several non-dairy options. Peafection®, a non-dairy mix using pea protein, coconut cream mix and a sorbet mix. As a 100% Employee Owned company, we believe in the power of investing in our people. Our team’s dedication and expertise are the foundation of our success. We offer ongoing training and development opportunities to ensure our employees thrive both personally and professionally, creating a culture of ownership and pride that drives innovation and excellence in everything we do.
