Mezete was created to bring the healthy and delicious food of the Middle East to you to be enjoyed anytime and anywhere. Sahtain! صحتين [ It’s our way of Saying, Enjoy your meal! Serving the world our Middle Eastern authentic flavors Our Mission To consistently innovate ways to prepare authentic and healthy Middle Eastern food made with the finest ingredients so anyone can enjoy delicious, wholesome food, no matter where they are. Our Vision To see people worldwide enjoy authentic, healthy and delicious Middle Eastern food as a primary choice. Our Goal To offer health-conscious people around the world uninterrupted access to ready-to-eat, nutritious, and delicious preservative-free meals crafted from natural ingredients with ambient storage qualities, ensuring a long shelf life. We stay true to our roots, delivering authentic flavors and high-quality natural goodness in every bite. The facts and figures that guarantee Mezete’s natural, flavorful, and premium-quality food products: 600+ Employees and Skilled Technicians 45+ Countries - Our global presence allows us to understand and cater to diverse markets effectively. 250+ Daily Quality Control Tests - We ensure consistent quality by adhering to international standards in every step of production. 60+ Monthly R&D Experiments - Innovation is at our core, with our R&D team continuously developing and improving existing and new products. 60+ Products of hummus, dips, sauces, soups, and stews. Pioneers of single-serve hummus packs - The first to introduce them to airlines and space missions using UHT technology for a safe and long-lasting shelf life. 120+ Million Units Annual Production - Equipped for large-scale production with -10 filling lines. First ISO 9001 Certification in Jordan - Our commitment to quality management was recognized in 1994 with ISO 9001 certification.

description: Charcoal ovens, Parrilla, Robata, Hibachi & accessories and grillware. By using advanced engineering techniques and the highest-quality steels, we strive for maximum precision in every detail — resulting in a product that excels in both performance and versatility. The relationship between food and fire brings us back to the deepest origins of gastronomy and of mankind. Cooking over fire is a practice that is sincere, honest, and above all allows for the authentic flavors to speak for themselves. Cooking over fire is deeply rooted in Mediterranean gastronomy. From our Palamós workshop in the heart of the Costa Brava in Spain, where we produce the finest Mibrasa equipment to serve our clients all over the world, we are proud to be the Craftsmen of Fire. name: Michigan Asparagus
description: When spring hits, menus should too. Fresh Michigan asparagus is one of the most anticipated seasonal ingredients in foodservice available for a limited window in May and June, and known for its bold, rich flavor that signals the start of the season. Stop by Booth #8172 to taste the difference for yourself. We’re serving freshly harvested Michigan asparagus, air-fried on-site for a quick, craveable sample that highlights just how versatile and menu-ready this product is. Why Michigan Asparagus belongs on your menu: Flavor that stands out. Michigan asparagus delivers a distinct, rich taste your customers will notice. It’s a premium, seasonal offering that creates urgency and excitement perfect for limited-time features and spring menu refreshes. Freshness that performs. Harvested and delivered within days not weeks, Michigan asparagus arrives at peak quality. That means better texture, brighter color, and longer shelf life in your kitchen compared to imported product. Efficiency in the kitchen. Each spear is hand-snapped at harvest, reducing woody ends and minimizing trim waste. It cooks quickly (5–8 minutes), helping streamline prep and speed up service without sacrificing quality. A story your customers value. Grown by multi-generational Michigan farm families, this is a product with authenticity behind it. Featuring Michigan asparagus connects your menu to real farms, real people, and a true sense of place. Sustainability you can stand behind. Closer to your operation means a smaller carbon footprint and a more transparent supply chain. Most Michigan asparagus relies primarily on natural rainfall, supported by soil-building practices like cover crops. A seasonal advantage. Consumers actively seek fresh, local ingredients -- and asparagus is one of spring’s most recognizable signals. Featuring it on your menu taps into that demand and elevates your offering with a fresh, limited-time experience. Taste it. Feature it. Sell it. Visit Booth #8172 to sample fresh Michigan asparagus and connect with suppliers ready to help you bring it to your menu this season. One bite, and you’ll understand why it’s a spring essential.

Build the kitchen of your dreams. Start exploring Middleby solutions today.

name: Midland
description: Midland is a leading supplier of two-way radio communications to individuals and business professionals in restaurant, hospitality, distribution, retail, education, construction, property management and more. Faster, more reliable, and less expensive than cell phones, two-way radios can improve efficiency and increase safety leading to cost savings and an improved customer experience. Headquartered in Kansas City, Midland has taken a pioneering role in two-way radio technology for over 60 years, introducing CB radio and 14-channel FRS radios to the market. The Midland brand encompasses quality, value, reliability, and innovation. For more information, visit www.midlandusa.com.

name: MIFAB inc
description: Manufacturer of high-capacity, high-efficiency HDPE grease interceptors for the food service industry. Serving all of the USA, Canada, Australia, and the Middle East. MIFAB provides you with the quality, engineered plumbing and drainage solutions you need.

name: Mikasa Hospitality
description: Mikasa Hospitality is focused exclusively on the foodservice industry and develops the highest quality products using best-in-class foodservice specifications and a forward-thinking approach. After launching in 2019, Mikasa Hospitality has developed an extensive portfolio of tabletop products including dinnerware, glassware, and stainless steel. A division of Lifetime Brands, Mikasa Hospitality is committed to helping foodservice providers create eye-catching and Instagrammable dining experiences for customers and shape a new future in the world of hospitality tabletop. To learn more, visit www.mikasahospitality.com .

name: MIKUNIYA Co. Ltd.
description: MIKUNIYA is a nori company based in Hiroshima, Japan, with a rich history of over 200 years. We specialize in producing high-quality nori and supply premium nori to Michelin-starred sushi restaurants worldwide. We also hold a leading market share in Japan’s high-end department stores and supermarkets. We source the finest nori from different regions across Japan, ensuring exceptional taste and texture. With strong purchasing power, our experts actively participate in nori auctions and select the best nori to meet our customers’ needs. Each batch is carefully evaluated, sorted by region and quality, and roasted to enhance its unique flavors and aromas. Building on our long-standing tradition and expertise, we are now expanding into the U.S. market, bringing the authentic taste of premium Japanese nori to a wider global audience.

name: Mil-tek USA Recyling and Waste Solutions LLC
Milano's Cheese Corp
description: Our company is JVM Sales Corp d/b/a Milano’s Cheese Corp and we are the industry experts specializing ONLY in grated and shredded Italian hard cheeses (Parmesan, Romano, Asiago, 50/50 Blends, 3 Cheese Blends, Spice Blends, Specialty Blends & Custom Blends). We’re the FASTEST GROWING Italian Cheese company in the USA

name: Milkadamia
description: Sprouting from our farms in Australia near where the macadamia tree originated, milkadamia cracked the code on preserving the subtle flavor, milky creaminess and health benefits of macadamia nuts into a delicious plant-based milk made with care and flair. milkadamia is also a little billboard {albeit a tasteful one} we created for the kitchen tables, nudging our thoughts towards the power of our food choices, and how preferentially choosing foods that are regeneratively farmed will allow an abundant future for our planet.

name: MillPress Imports
description: Millpress Imports, founded in 2016, is a recognized pioneer in the olive oil industry. We are committed to providing the freshest extra virgin olive oil (EVOO) and vinegar products to retailers in the US market. We source and import from long-term grower partners and quality-minded producers worldwide. Our leadership in the fresh EVOO and vinegar space is evident in our service to the best operators in the tasting bar, private label, and food service sales channels across the US and Canada. Our ever-growing product catalog currently includes a dozen varieties of EVOO, infused EVOOs, artisan vinegars, and a full line of gourmet pantry items. Our early-harvest olive oils have consistently won over fifty gold quality medals (including best-in-class) at prestigious international competitions. Millpress EVOO is fully traceable, sustainably farmed, and third-party lab-verified for quality, organoleptic, and food safety. Our company owns and operates an SQF 9.1 and GFSI-certified bottling facility and distribution hub in Pennsylvania, offering direct distribution to customers across the US and Canada.

name: Milwaukee Pretzel Company
description: After living in Germany for a year Katie and Matt Wessel set out to recreate the traditional Bavarian pretzels they fell in love with in their hometown of Milwaukee. We only use the highest quality ingredients, no added sugar or preservatives. In addition to our hand-rolled line, our German-made high-capacity, automated equipment was designed and engineered to be gentle on our dough and maintain a strong dough structure. That, paired with slow fermentation, creates a richer, more complex flavor and beautiful rise. Say good-bye to soft pretzels as you know them and grab yourself a Bavarian-style "bretzel" from the Milwaukee Pretzel Company. Tradition you can taste.

name: Minima Technology Co. Ltd.
description: Minima Technology Co., Ltd. Taiwan is one of the pioneer manufacturers of biodegradable compostable products and has the certification to support this throughout the Asian region include Japan, Taiwan, Korea since 2003, and this groundbreaking technology is integral in the production of environmentally friendly products and offers alternatives to conventional plastic products. These technologies have allowed Minima Technology the opportunity to enter worldwide markets including Europe and the United States of America. Minima Technology is able to keep ahead of its competitors due to its extensive range of product certification and prides itself on its integrity within the biodegradable and compostable market space.

name: Minipack America
description: Minipack America is known for providing customers with high-quality and innovative packaging machines and providing customers with a competent servicing network throughout North America. Our MX Series was the winner of the 2021 Kitchen Innovation Award and is specifically designed for use in kitchens, food processing facilities and bars. We offer a range of machines from tabletop to swing lid models, as well as HACCP plans. Minipack America prides itself on the exciting capabilities of our vacuum machines such as rapid marination, brining, and infusion to maximize flavor and tenderness. We serve the needs of several industries including supermarkets and grocery stores, restaurant kitchens, artisan food producers, butchers, and food processors.

name: Mishima Foods USA Inc
description: Mishima Foods USA is a leading company in Japanese/Asian food industry and our catalog ranges from dry grocery products such as Crunchy Garlic Chili Sauce to food service items such as Tempura Batter to frozen food, Sukiyaki Beef. Mishima caters high-quality Asian foods for your need. If you look for any Asian product, Mishima is surely able to help you. We are looking forward to meeting you at the show!

name: Miso Robotics
description: Miso Robotics | Restaurant AI Miso Robotics develops industry-changing AI automation for commercial kitchens and restaurants. Our mission is straightforward: deploy proven technology that drives AI adoption in foodservice and makes human lives better. Today, Miso brings operators two distinct products built on that mission. Flippy by Miso | The AI Powered Fry Station Flippy automates frying operations, the industry's most dangerous and hardest-to-staff position. Deployed in commercial kitchens nationwide with over 5 million baskets fried, Flippy reduces fry station labor dependency while delivering consistent execution at twice the throughput of manual operations. Flippy handles the repetitive, hazardous work at your fry station so your team can be redeployed to higher value, customer facing roles. No call-outs. No injuries. No inconsistency. Flippy manages your full fry menu with precision and integrates directly into existing kitchen systems and POS platforms. Zignyl by Miso | AI That Sets Your Team Up to Win Zignyl is an AI powered restaurant operations and employee engagement system built around a simple idea: setting frontline employees up for success. Zignyl helps teams think and act like owners by creating transparency around expectations, performance, and outcomes. By aligning recognition and results, it helps operators improve engagement, strengthen retention, and reduce turnover across locations. Built on a proprietary API that connects point of sale systems, payroll platforms, and connected devices, Zignyl turns fragmented data into insights operators can actually use. Visit Us at Booth 178 in the South Hall See Flippy live and meet the Miso team. Discover how AI automation and intelligent operations software are solving the challenges facing restaurant operators today. Learn more at www.misorobotics.com

name: MistAmerica Corp.
description: For over thirty years, MistAmerica has been the trusted name in creating cool, comfortable outdoor spaces. Our innovative Mist360 fans are the premier solution for cooling patios and other outdoor areas in hot and humid climates worldwide. Featuring our patented high-pressure mist technology, these fans ensure optimal cooling through 100% evaporation at the nozzle, so you and your guests enjoy a refreshing breeze without getting wet. Designed for ease of use, our systems blend seamlessly into any setting. With MistAmerica, you receive not only superior cooling performance but also a commitment to quality installation and service. Trust MistAmerica to keep your outdoor spaces perfectly cool and inviting.

name: MityLite
description: MityLite offers folding tables, banquet chairs, restaurant tabletops and bases, folding and stacking chairs, carts, and more. Holsag by MityLite creates stylish, well-built wood and faux wood restaurant chairs with style, versatility, comfort, and reliable lead times.We also have a beautiful, maintenance-free outdoor patio and dining collection. All Holsag and MityLite products are backed by an industry-leading warranty and are built to the highest standards of quality.

name: MKT Concepts LLC
description: Michael Jannetta first fell in love with Spanish tapas culture while studying abroad in Segovia, Spain in 1987. He launched the Sala restaurant concept in 2002, hiring former Top Chef: España contestant Bárbara Amorós as Executive Chef along the way. Sala Gourmet Foods is inspired by their collective passion for artisanal Spanish croquettes. Our croquettes utilize the finest ingredients and provide a no-prep offering that will add quality and value to your menu. Whether you serve them as an appetizer, side dish, or as part of your catering spread, you will feel great about the quality of the product and the margin for your business.

name: MNG Brands
description: As a trusted leader in health and wellness, we offer premium Cannabis and Kratom products from the most reputable brands. Each product is rigorously tested for purity and efficacy, ensuring top-quality, effective solutions for your wellness needs.

name: Mochi Foods
description: Mochi Foods is a high quality food powder supplier that provides innovative premixes. We have a dedicated Research & Development team that constantly working on new food textures and creating mouth-watering experience. We strive to innovate traditional food technology and grow together with our customers' success. Mochi Foods' product selection includes mochi donuts, waffles, gluten free pancakes and bread mixes. We also carry drinking powders, non-dairy creamers, jelly Boba, natural flavor powders, and much more.

name: Modisoft
description: Modisoft is your partner in POS and payment solutions, offering cost-effective systems with features that scale and adapt to your business. Our product lineup includes a seamless back office for comprehensive restaurant management and Cartzie, a loyalty app that helps you track and reward your clients using up-to-date technology. Were committed to nurturing restaurant communities and helping them thrive!

name: Moffat, a Welbilt Company
description: Moffat is an Ali Group company and renowned as one of the worlds two largest group in the industry. Moffat is not just about the products we offer we provide a range of added value services across the world to meet the changing competitive markets with our dedication to working with our clients and their needs

name: Moins Coffee (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. ​
description: In terms of cost, MOINS Coffee leverages large-scale production and core technologies such as flash extraction, cold brew, and freeze-drying to reduce per-unit costs through efficiency optimization. Its multi-factory layout shortens logistics distances, achieving supply chain cost consolidation. Regarding production capacity, MOINS has an annual roasted bean output exceeding 10,000 tons and freeze-dried block production reaching hundreds of millions, with support for small-batch customization, ensuring stable supply and agile response for Yum China’s nationwide stores. In terms of innovation, MOINS employs 15 Q-Graders and a professional R&D team capable of co-developing exclusive flavors based on market insights. Through products like flash-extracted coffee concentrate, MOINS empowers stores to quickly serve professional-grade coffee, driving menu upgrades and enhancing the consumer experience. For quality assurance, MOINS has obtained certifications such as BRC and HACCP. Its end-to-end standardized quality control and daily cupping mechanisms provide robust external reinforcement for the QA system. During the pre-audit stage, its self-developed equipment and traceability system optimize collaboration mechanisms, enabling advanced warning of quality risks and jointly elevating the safety and value standards of the coffee category.

name: Monaco Foodservice
description: Discover Ugolini, the Italian powerhouse revolutionizing the food and beverage industry with its exceptional equipment. With a rich history spanning over six decades, Ugolini has earned a solid reputation for delivering innovative, high-quality, and reliable solutions. Experience the artistry of our renowned slush machines, designed to craft irresistibly refreshing frozen drinks. Engineered with advanced freezing technology, our machines ensure consistent and delightful slushy textures. From amusement parks to convenience stores, Ugolini slush machines have become the trusted choice for creating memorable frozen beverages. The diverse range of Ugolini also includes soft-serve ice cream machines, granita machines, and hot and chilled beverage dispensers, all designed to enhance your business offerings. With Ugolini, you can effortlessly prepare and serve a wide array of frozen treats and lpourable delights that leave a lasting impression. Ugolini's commitment to quality is unwavering. Our equipment is crafted using top-tier materials and components, ensuring reliable performance, user-friendly operation, and easy maintenance. We prioritize your success from the initial idea to the final customer experience. Partner with Ugolini and access a world of possibilities. With our global presence and dedicated network of distributors and authorized service centers, we provide the support and care you deserve. Elevate your business with Ugolini and experience refreshment solutions that redefine industry standards. Visit our booth at NRA 2023 to discover why Ugolini is synonymous with exceptional quality and reliability.

name: Monastery Hill Bindery
description: Monastery Hill Bindery is the industry leader of luxury products, catering to the world's finest Hotels and Restaurants. As the direct manufacturer, we maintain complete control through every aspect of the manufacturing process, ensuring a superior product with on-time delivery. Family owned for over 150 years spanning five generations, we continue the tradition of fine craftsmanship that gives our full range of products unique design with proven durability. We specialize in Guest Room items like Wastebaskets/ Ice Buckets/ Coffee Trays/Compendiums/Note Pad Holders/Desk Blotters and offer a full array of Restaurant products like Menu Covers/Wine Lists/Check Presenters. Let us help you with your next project!

name: Morrison Cup Solutions
description: Morrison Cup Solutions’ mission is to elevate your brand with a complete, custom cup strategy. No matter the size of your restaurant, we offer 1 million+ runs to as low as 5,000 cup runs, wide-ranging substrates, creative design, and inventory warehousing and distribution. We make it effortless to market your business with custom cups that reflect your identity, no matter the size. Let us help you leave a lasting impression on your guests.

name: Mosquito & Cooling Systems LLC
description: Innovative Heating, Cooling & Insect Control Solutions Mosquito and Cooling Systems, LLC delivers sophisticated outdoor comfort solutions trusted by leading luxury hospitality and restaurant brands nationwide. With over 25 years of experience , we specialize in the design, manufacturing, and installation of high-performance misting, heating, and insect control systems that elevate guest experience without compromising aesthetics. Our climate systems provide precise, quiet, and energy-efficient temperature control , seamlessly extending the use of patios, terraces, and open-air dining spaces throughout the year. Designed with premium components and discreet installation methods, our solutions integrate beautifully into upscale environments. Complementing comfort, our advanced fly and insect control systems help maintain the highest standards of cleanliness and hygiene , operating invisibly while preserving ambiance and guest satisfaction. We offer a full range of services—from custom-engineered system packages for preferred contractors to complete turnkey installations nationwide —all supported by proven hospitality expertise and white-glove service. Together, our solutions create refined, comfortable, and impeccably controlled environments for restaurants and hospitality destinations where details matter.

name: Motherlode Co-Packing, LLC
description: We offer a full turnkey co-packing program to scale your sauce business. Our SQF3 certified facility is centrally located only 20 miles from Denver, CO. Whether it's pasta sauce, syrups, hot honeys, BBQ sauce, teriyaki, condiments like ketchup, mustard, and mayo, or even ambient packed salad dressings Motherlode Co-Packing can provide an easy solution to growing your brand and reaching more store shelves.

name: MotorScrubber USA
description: Experience the world’s first S-Motion Scrubber Dryer. Introducing DRYFT® a breakthrough in floor cleaning technology. With its patented ultra-low profile head shape and groundbreaking 4200rpm Scrubbing Technology, DRYFT® delivers 100% floor cleaning coverage with no limitations . Discover how the super-fast S-Motion of DRYFT® will double your floor cleaning productivity at booth 1042.

name: Mowi USA
description: Mowi ASA is one of the largest seafood companies in the world, and the world’s largest producer of Atlantic salmon with harvest volumes of 475,000 tonnes in 2023, equivalent to a global market share of approximately 20%.

name: Moyer Diebel, a Welbilt Company
description: Moyer Diebel is considered the undisputed leader in the glasswashing and dishwashing industry. Solid construction, unique design and styling enable Moyer Diebel glasswashing machines to produce sparkling clean ware, properly sanitized and ready for immediate use each and every time. These machines are the specified leaders for high-volume applications such as schools, supermarkets, restaurants, churches, jails, pastry shops, sandwich shops, daycare centers, assisted living centers, casinos, major hotels and bars. Moyer Diebel saves labor costs, reduces breakage and increases efficiency with every product manufactured while building it to last. Located in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, Moyer Diebel produces a wide array of automatic bar glasswashers, undercounter dishwashers, and door-type dishwashers (standard and high-hood designs), as well as a 44 and 66 conveyor dishwasher for the commercial food service industry. Although Moyer Diebel makes its home in Winston-Salem, NC, our affiliation as part of the Ali Group gives us a worldwide reach. We have been manufacturing commercial glasswashing and dishwashing equipment for over 70 years and have enjoyed our reputation as a major industry supplier. At Moyer Diebel and throughout The Ali Group, the spirit of excellence drives all aspects of our business, especially the goods and services we provide for you.

name: MPC Paper
description: Since 1975, MPC has been a trusted supplier of high-quality paper products to countless industries throughout North America.

name: Mr. Eats
description: Mr. Eats – Premium Frozen Croquettes and Churros for Every Occasion Mr. Eats brings to market a unique line of premium frozen croquettes and filled churros , designed to deliver maximum convenience, high quality, and excellent profit margins. Created to meet the needs of today’s busy consumers and foodservice operators, Mr. Eats offers two convenient product lines: Retail-ready , fully cooked, pre-fried, and frozen, ready to heat using an air fryer or toaster oven, and serve in minutes with no thawing required. And Foodservice , delivered raw and frozen, designed to go straight from freezer to fryer. Both formats offer a hassle-free experience and consistent, high-quality results with minimal preparation. What sets Mr. Eats apart is our innovative approach to a beloved traditional snack. Unlike common croquettes made entirely of dense dough, our products feature a thin, light, and crispy exterior with a rich and generously filled center . This perfect balance of texture and flavor creates a standout eating experience that keeps customers coming back for more. Our product line is rooted in Brazilian culinary heritage, starting with the famous coxinha —a teardrop-shaped croquette originally filled with seasoned shredded chicken. We’ve expanded this concept into a full range of savory and sweet flavors, including Cheese, Sausage, Beef, Corn & Cheese, Ham & Cheese, Beef Kibbeh, and indulgent dessert options like Churros filled with dulce de leche or chocolate. Each item is carefully crafted using high-quality ingredients and produced with advanced food technology to ensure safety, consistency, and great taste in every batch. Since 1999, Mr. Eats has been perfecting the art of croquette-making. Our USDA-approved facility combines tradition with innovation, allowing us to scale with confidence while preserving the authentic homemade taste consumers love. With broad appeal across cultures and age groups, Mr. Eats croquettes are ideal for retail frozen food sections, delis, catering services, and foodservice operations looking to diversify their offerings. Retailers and distributors benefit from our products’ extended shelf life (12-14 months), minimal preparation requirements, and strong consumer acceptance—delivering a high-margin item that moves quickly and keeps inventory turns high. Whether it’s for birthday parties, game nights, on-the-go snacks, or appetizers at events, Mr. Eats offers a versatile and delicious solution for every eating occasion. Discover why Mr. Eats is more than just a snack—it’s a smart addition to any frozen product lineup. Taste the difference. Serve the convenience. Profit from the quality.

name: MR. MOMO
description: MR. MOMO is a Minneapolis-based food company bringing the joy of Nepali dumplings to the American table. Founded by Subash Yadav and his co-founder Lex, the brand began as a food truck in Arizona and has grown into a fast-rising foodservice brand rooted in culture, quality, and connection. Inspired by the communal spirit of momo in Nepal, MR. MOMO creates premium dumplings made with clean ingredients, bold flavors, and a focus on consistency and ease for modern kitchens. Today, MR. MOMO operates out of its own production facility and is expanding nationally through restaurant and foodservice partnerships. More than just dumplings, the brand is built on a simple mission: to share joy through food and create meaningful connections—one momo at a time.

name: MRCOOL LLC
description: Smart Cooling for Walk‑In Coolers The MRCOOL® Compact Refrigeration System is a compact, energy-efficient cooling unit designed for small to mid sized walk-in cooler spaces. With inverter technology, it adjusts power use to maintain the correct temperature while saving energy. It works in ambient temperatures from 5°F to 113°F (-15°C to 45°C) and can keep your storage space between 0°F and 32°F (-18°C to 0°C)** — ideal for preserving food, drinks, and other perishable items. Smaller Build, Bigger Advantages. Compact Form. Complete System. MRCOOL® Compact Refrigeration System integrates the evaporator and condenser into a single optimized cabinet, reducing bulk while improving efficiency. With no on-site refrigerant piping required, installation becomes faster, cleaner, and far more reliable. Built for a Wider Market Reach The MRCOOL® Compact Refrigeration System is built for true market versatility supporting not only food cooling and preservation but also florals, pharmaceuticals, dairy, beverages, and specialty products. Its wide temperature range and stable performance make it suitable for diverse commercial environments. WiFi Connectivity Real-Time Alerts for Real‑World Cold Storage The MRCOOL® Connect App logs temperatures, monitors energy use, and notifies you immediately if conditions shift—helping restaurants stay compliant and prevent costly product loss. Wi-Fi and electrical availability dependent.- The MRCOOL® Compact Refrigeration System's suggested maximum size** for 33 to 50°F (1 to 10°C) is up to 11 ft × 11 ft × 7.5 ft (2.44m × 2.44m × 1.98m), or 918 ft³ (25.99 m³) of walk-in cooler space, making it ideal for small to medium commercial storage needs. The MRCOOL® Compact Refrigeration System suggested maximum size** for 0 to 32°F (-18 to 0°C) up to an 8 ft × 8 ft × 6.5 ft (3.35m × 3.35m × 2.29m) or 416 ft³ (11.79 M³) walk-in space. For cold box cooler insulation requirement (R-Value), 25 minimum. For a cold box Freezer, the insulation requirement (R-value) is 32 minimum. You can side-mount the installation or install it via a duct. For power, you will need 208-240V supplied to the system. These requirements are subject to electrical availability.

name: MSI Computer Corp.
description: MSI is a world leader in AI PC, gaming, content creation, business & productivity and AIoT solutions. Bolstered by its cutting-edge R&D capabilities and customer-driven innovation, MSI has a wide-ranging global presence spanning over 120 countries. Its comprehensive lineup of laptops, graphics cards, monitors, motherboards, desktops, peripherals, servers, IPCs, robotic appliances, vehicle infotainment and telematics systems, and EV charger are globally acclaimed. Committed to advancing user experiences through the finest product quality, intuitive user interface and design aesthetics, MSI is a leading brand that shapes the future of technology.

name: Multiplex, a Welbilt Company
description: Multiplex is a leading global manufacturer and supplier of cooling and dispense equipment to the beverage industry. We are committed to research and development within our manufacturing facility, so we are continually able to offer our customers sustainable, reliable technology in our product lines. As a result of this, we offer the market a wide range of products and services, always aiming to exceed our customers' evolving expectations. We work in partnership with our customers to ensure we fully understand their needs, so they can deliver even more flexible solutions to theirs.

name: Multy Home
description: Multy, a premier North American manufacturer, provides a versatile range of high-quality, sustainable indoor and outdoor living products, engineered to protect, enhance, and define commercial spaces. Multy’s flooring solutions are formulated to preserve high-traffic common areas such as cafés, lobbies, and patios by regulating moisture and improving safety minimizing slippage. Featuring quick-dry absorbent floor mats, durable barrier mats, and efficient drainage tiles, our products help maintain cleaner, safer environments. To further elevate indoor and outdoor commercial spaces, Multy offers design-forward tiered planter boxes, raised garden beds and stylish planters—perfect for defining spaces and creating inviting, contemporary environments that attract customers, encourage longer visits, and enhance the overall ambiance. Turning Waste into Wonders Multy’s products are crafted using Redu Materials™, an innovative process that transforms landfill-diverted waste and mixed recycled materials into sustainable, high-performance indoor and outdoor solutions. Multy’s mission turns waste into beautiful, ultra durable products that serve homes, businesses, gardens, and more, all while reducing environmental impact and promoting a circular economy.

name: MURTI LLC
description: Aura Seating is a woman owned design-manufacturer of Hospitality, Senior Living and Contract Furniture. We specialize in desgning unique Indoor/Outdoor Banquet Chairs, Cafe/Restaurant chairs, Tables (Dining, nesting, display), Lounge and Banquettes. Our products are recognized for their superior quality and unique customer vision inspired designs. Our unsurpassed customer service long after the sale and the unwavering support to our customers has become a hallmark of our values.

name: Mush Foods US, Inc.
description: Mush Foods grows edible mushroom mycelium to produce great-tasting, sustainable ingredients for foodservice operators and food manufacturers. Our chef-curated products feature premium, wild mushroom roots that pair perfectly with your favorite animal proteins, imparting sensory, nutritional, and operational benefits while dramatically reducing your ecological footprint.

name: My Drap
description: Bring a touch of elegance to every occasion with MY DRAP’s single-use cotton coasters, napkins, placemats, hand-towels, tray mats and more. AT THE TABLE AND BAR Our coasters, napkins and placemats can be fully customized to the desired size, color, design, and logo. Working with our team, we’ll create a beautifully branded product that can be delivered in pre-cut rolls, flat packed, or different types of folds. IN-ROOM DINING AND TRAY MATS No more are the days of folded tablecloths as tray mats, and bulky amenity mats on bedside tables and bathroom vanities. Listening to the needs of our hospitality partners, we have developed custom size tray mats and amenity mats in our signature high quality fabric and non slip finish. Our mission is to bring elevated, modern elegance Into luxury hotel rooms all over the world. IN THE RESTROOM We can proudly offer guests the MY DRAP experience wherever They go. Our woven, single use cotton hand towels are the best in the market. Innovative and as always, fully customizable, our absorbent hand towels allow you to offer a seamless, elevated experience without the hassle and cost of laundering. SEAMLESS AND SUSTAINABLE MY DRAP’s seamless design provides a stitch-free cloth where no more food crumbs can be trapped in the seams. MY DRAP 100% cotton napkins are absorbent and will soak up spills and wipe away messes with grace. Our dedication to sustainability begins in the cotton field, sourcing cotton exclusively through the BCI and flows to our GREEN factory in Barcelona, Spain, where our goods are manufactured. Everything MY DRAP is 100% compostable, allowing them to be single-use. Composed of recycled cotton, enabling a luxurious experience without hurting our planet

name: Mylk Labs
description: Founder Grace Cheng ditched her modeling career to sell oatmeal, and it all worked out! She was always looking for something quick, healthy and delicious to fuel her busy life ... so she created Mylk Labs! A better for you oatmeal that's low in sugar but high in sales ;) To fuel, energize and give back time to focus on more important things in life! Mylk Labs is woman and minority owned.

name: Myojo USA
description: Myojo USA is a fresh noodle specialist based in Chino, California, bringing over 35 years of Japanese noodle-making to the U.S. market. Built on a texture-first philosophy, Myojo develops noodles defined by their spring, chew, and ability to hold their bite — designed to perform in real kitchen environments. At the 2026 National Restaurant Association Show, Myojo brings this philosophy to life through a hands-on tasting experience, featuring multiple noodle cuts and broth pairings that demonstrate how texture transforms the entire bowl.

name: NAKS INC
description: The Restaurant Exhaust Hood Experts Your One Stop Hood Shop™ for high quality commercial and restaurant kitchen exhaust, grease, odor and fume ventilation equipment for everyday food service and retail businesses. Every commercial kitchen exhaust hood and ventilation system is available with pre-piped fire suppression and ductwork. NAKS, Inc. provides the best products for your Commercial Kitchen Ventilation. NAKS experienced and professional sales and customer service representatives can help you find the right product for restaurants, chains, public and/or private institutions. NAKS offers a full line of kitchen ventilation system packages, ventless hood systems, exhaust and supply fans including direct fired heaters, electrical controls, ductwork, and fire suppression systems. Visit our website at www.naksinc.com to see our full line of equipment and our state-of-the-art Hood Builder and Product configurators. We are the manufacturer which allows us to pass on cost savings to you and offer the Lowest Prices Available. Technical Support, Customer Service, and a Full Line of Restaurant Ventilation, Ductwork are what make us your One Stop Hood Shop.

name: Nanak Foods
description: Founded in 1997, Nanak Foods has grown from modest beginnings into North America’s largest processor of traditional South Asian dairy-based foods. The company is wholly owned by Canadian shareholders of South Asian descent and specializes in the manufacturing of authentic, high-quality dairy products including paneer cheese, ghee (clarified butter), yogurt, and a wide range of dairy-based appetizers and desserts. Nanak Foods supplies retail, foodservice, and private-label customers across North America and international markets. The company is currently exporting to Germany, Belgium, the United Kingdom, Singapore, the United Arab Emirates, South Africa, Mauritius, Japan, Australia, Trinidad, New Zealand, and Hong Kong, and continues to expand its global distribution network. In addition to core dairy products, Nanak Foods offers an extensive portfolio of value-added appetizers and traditional desserts designed for both retail and foodservice channels. The appetizer range includes paneer-based snacks such as paneer pakoras, paneer bites, paneer tikka appetizers, and other vegetarian ready-to-cook or ready-to-heat products. The dessert portfolio features popular South Asian sweets including rasmalai, gulab jamun, rasgulla, kulfi (traditional frozen dairy dessert), and other milk-based delicacies. Nanak Foods also serves the Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) sector, including being a supplier of vegetarian burger patties to A&W Restaurants, demonstrating the company’s capability to develop and manufacture customized products for large-scale foodservice and restaurant chains. Nanak Foods’ manufacturing facilities are CFIA, FDA, and EU approved, and operate under Safe Quality Food (SQF) Level 3 certification, ensuring rigorous standards for food safety, quality, and regulatory compliance. With advanced automated production capabilities and a growing export footprint, Nanak Foods is actively seeking distribution partners, foodservice customers, and private-label opportunities across Europe and other international markets.

name: Napa Technology
description: Napa Technology is a leader in automated beverage dispensing solutions, helping restaurants, bars, hotels, and entertainment venues elevate guest experiences while increasing profitability. Known for its flagship WineStation® , Napa Technology also offers TapStation™ for beer and wine on tap, delivering precise portion control, preservation, and self-serve or staff-pour flexibility. Designed to reduce waste, control costs, and drive revenue, Napa Technology’s systems empower operators to offer premium beverage programs with efficiency and consistency. Seamless POS integrations—including platforms like Toast —enable operators to streamline transactions, track usage, and enhance operational control. From interactive tasting experiences to high-volume service environments, Napa Technology combines innovation, reliability, and customer-focused support to transform the way beverages are served.

name: Natalie's Orchid Island Juice Co.
description: Perricone Farms & Natalie’s are two family-inspired juice brands strengthening their reputation for clean juices across the United States. Continuing a legacy of authenticity, care, and quality.

name: Natavo Avocado
description: Discover the world’s first non-browning frozen avocado product , staying fresh for up to 10 days after thawing with nothing added - it's 100% natural. At Natavo Avocado, we’ve redefined what’s possible with avocado. Our revolutionary Natavo™ process naturally deactivates the enzyme that causes browning, delivering a frozen avocado product that stays fresh, green, and delicious for up to 10 days after thawing, even after the packaging is opened. This clean-label solution addresses the growing demand for healthier, more natural food options. Our innovative process has been recognized with a SIAL Innovation Award nomination and the World Food Awards shortlist, further validating Natavo Avocado as a game-changing product for food service operators and chefs worldwide. OUR PRODUCT RANGE: Natavo Avocado offers a versatile range of ready-to-use frozen avocado formats to meet the needs of chefs, food manufacturers, and food service operators: - Avocado Chunks: Perfect for rustic salads - Avocado Slices: Ideal for sushi and sandwiches - Diced Avocado: Perfect for poke bowls and salad bowls KEY BENEFITS OF NATAVO AVOCADO: - No Browning for 10 Days After Thawing: Traditional avocados brown within hours of preparation. Natavo Avocado stays fresh and vibrant for up to 10 days after thawing, even after opening the packaging. - 100% Natural, Clean Label: Consumers demand natural products, and Natavo delivers. - Ready-to-Use Convenience: No more peeling, pitting, or slicing fresh avocados. Our pre-cut avocado products are ready to serve, saving you prep time, labor costs, and reducing kitchen waste. - Perfectly Ripe, Every Time: Eliminate the inconsistency of fresh avocados. With Natavo Avocado, you get perfectly ripe avocado portions every time, ensuring consistency in taste, texture, and appearance. - Consistent Pricing: Avoid the seasonal price fluctuations of fresh avocados. Our frozen avocado range provides predictable costs for better financial planning. - Food Safety & Certifications: Produced in our BRC AA-rated facilities in South Africa and Mexico, Natavo Avocado ensures the highest level of food safety and traceability. WHO WE SERVE: Our products are trusted by some of the world’s most prominent foodservice operators, food manufacturers, and restaurant chains. From sushi chains and salad manufacturers to ready-meal producers and sandwich brands, Natavo Avocado supports the growth of menu innovation while streamlining kitchen operations. Our non-browning, pre-cut avocado products allow businesses to meet the growing consumer demand for fresh, natural, and avocado-forward dishes. It’s time to experience the difference with Natavo Avocado. Our ready-to-use frozen avocado range offers perfect taste, vibrant color, and consistent quality in every bite.

name: Nate's Fine Foods

The Association offers premier educational resources and programs to help attract and develop a strong workforce, as well as ServSafe, the restaurant industry's most trusted food safety training and certification program. Lean, protein-packed, and simple to cook—you’re one step away from roasting, braising, grilling, or simmering.

name: NCC
description: NCC’s point of sale software is an intuitive and proven solution with over 50,000 systems installed worldwide. Crafted for security, dependability, and scalability, our POS systems feature embedded software, above-store cloud management, and back-office management functionality. name: NCCO
description: NCCO delivers smart, scalable solutions that help restaurants improve food safety, streamline operations, and drive profitability. With a century of industry experience, NCCO offers trusted products like the original US-made GuestCheck, register rolls, and food rotation labels as well as innovative solutions like the DateCodeGenie automated labeling system, online food safety training through Always Food Safe, and RightBytes, which unifies foodservice operations through an intelligent platform to simplify daily tasks, enhance compliance, and provide real-time insights into profitability and prep planning. These innovative solutions give operators the control and visibility they need to succeed in a fast-paced environment.

name: NCG Denstor
description: For more than 40 years, NCG Denstor has supported restaurant operators with storage solutions built for speed, efficiency, and durability. Since introducing mobile shelving to McDonald’s in 1985, Denstor has completed more than 15,000 installations and is trusted in over 80% of McDonald’s U.S. locations. As a corporate-approved supplier for McDonald’s and Dunkin’, Denstor delivers turnkey storage solutions designed for the realities of the restaurant environment. At Denstor, we do more than supply shelving. We design stockroom efficiency. Our focus is helping operators maximize capacity, improve efficiency, and save time and money through smarter storage. We manage each project from initial planning, CAD design and logistical expertise to a timely and efficient installation. Our nationwide network of certified installers support projects across the contiguous United States to ensure consistent installation quality and reliability. Maximize Storage Capacity Traditional shelving consumes valuable space with fixed aisles. Denstor’s Mobile Shelving System removes this inefficiency by providing access through a single movable aisle. Operators can easily achieve a 40% increase in storage capacity within the same footprint, with no building expansion required. Improve Efficiency Denstor’s adjustable shelving adapts quickly to menu changes, seasonal products, and fluctuating inventory needs. Tool-free adjustments allow shelves to be reconfigured in seconds. The mobile design improves efficiency by providing access to both sides of each mobile shelving unit and helping to maintain a cleaner, more organized stockroom. Save Time and Money By consolidating access into one mobile aisle, Denstor systems reduce product retrieval time and simplify daily operations. Denstor frames are fully-welded at the factory which facilitate swift on-site installation and minimized labor costs and disruption during remodels. Long-term savings continue through durability and performance. With an average lifespan of 15 years, Denstor systems reduce replacement and maintenance costs while improving accuracy and reducing product loss. Comprehensive Storage Solutions In addition to mobile shelving, Denstor offers cell phone charging smart lockers, crew storage lockers, manager’s office storage, and shelving accessories. Denstor Freezer Guards protect your freezer panel walls and the products stored within it. These solutions work together as a single-source system, supported by turnkey project management from concept through completion. Proven Performance With thousands of successful installations and approvals from leading brands, Denstor is recognized as a trusted name in restaurant storage. Our solutions are proven daily in high-volume, real-world environments. Visit us at NRA Booth 8712 to see mobile shelving in action and discuss your stockroom challenges. Contact Us Email: sales@ncgdenstor.com Phone: 586-790-4840 Website: www.ncgdenstor.com Denstor - We Keep Stock of Things.

name: NCR Voyix
description: NCR Voyix has been continuously transforming, connecting and running tech across retail and restaurants for over 138 years. With our platform-based tech architecture and value-created services, weve got the tools, processes and talent to help our customers create distinctive guest experiences, liberate their staff from manual tasks and expand their use of data and analytics to drive growth.

name: NEW SCHOOL FOODS
description: Introducing the first ever raw-to-cooked salmon filet made entirely from plants, NEW/SCHOOL FOODS has grown to create the only plant-based filet that looks, cooks, tastes and flakes like salmon, with the same Omega 3 content. By providing the same key nutritional benefits without any risk of mercury, micro-plastics antibiotics, our filets make for a plant-based option that finally deserves your attention while providing an elevated experience for your dining guests. Our flavors are carefully crafted using ingredients right from the ocean, giving you a delicate, oceanic and authentic taste. Cook it in a pan, and you'll see our filets transform from raw to cooked right in front of your eyes, providing a familiar cooking experience. The white lines melt upon cooking - just like salmon - allowing layers the flake apart and break into muscle fibers, providing a delicate tender textural experience. Our goal is to provide a filet with chefs in mind that adds another layer of creativity in elevating plant-based dishes and keeping up with changing guests needs. From the Park Hyatt, to Michelin recognized restaurants, to your favourite local ramen spot, and beyond, were here to bring you over to the NEW/SCHOOL.

name: New York State Department of Agriculture & Markets
description: Our mission is to promote New York State agriculture and its high-quality and diverse products, foster agricultural environmental stewardship, and safeguard the state's food supply, land, and livestock to ensure the viability and growth of New York's agriculture industries. Working together, our Divisions: promote New York's agricultural producers and products and the state's food and beverage companies; connect the New Yorks farmers to new markets to grow the agricultural economy; improve access to fresh, local foods to consumers across New York through farmers' markets and farm-to-school programs; protect and enhance New York State's natural resources and working landscapes; maintain plant health by detecting and preventing the spread of diseases and harmful invasive species, promoting integrated pest management, regulating the sale of seed and fertilizers, and ensuring the health of honey bees; promote sustainable animal production agriculture; protect the safety of the animal origin food supply; inspect companion animal shelters; protect the safety of the food supply in New York State from the producer to the consumer through inspection and testing; and assure measurement accuracy of scales and gas pumps, as well as thousands of different packaged commodities for a fair and equitable commercial marketplace.

With a long-standing commitment to engineering excellence, NEXCOM delivers integrated platforms spanning SD-Edge Computing (software-defined edge) , AIoT , and advanced MOM (Manufacturing Operations Management) systems. Its comprehensive product and service portfolio supports a wide spectrum of industries—including networking and communications , mobile and in-vehicle computing , smart city and retail , video surveillance , digital healthcare , OT cybersecurity , industrial automation , and robotics —all developed on open standards to ensure reliability, scalability, and seamless integration. Within NEXCOM’s Intelligent Platform @ Smart City (IPS) business unit, we offer a dedicated range of solutions tailored for the restaurant and hospitality sector . Our platforms enable modern QSR operations , self-ordering kiosks , POS terminals , kitchen display systems (KDS) , drive-thru automation , digital menu boards , and restaurant advertising and signage . These industrial-grade systems enhance customer engagement, optimize workflow efficiency, and support data-driven management across multi-site operations, empowering restaurants to accelerate digital transformation. Focused on innovation and sustainability, NEXCOM continues to strengthen the global AIoT ecosystem , enabling partners and customers to advance their ESG transformation and long-term modernization strategies. Specialties Industrial Fanless Controllers • Panel PCs & HMIs • Industrial Networking (Wi-Fi & Gateways) • Embedded Computers • Telematics & Vehicle PCs • Off-Road / Railway / Marine Computers • IP Cameras & DVR/NVR • Media Players • Network Security • ODM/OEM • In-Vehicle Computing • AI & Edge Computing • 5G • IoT & AIoT • Open Robotics & Machinery • Fitness Console Computers • Edge AI • uCPE • mmWave

Vitamins and Amino Acids like Biotin and Niacin, to give a sustained, natural energy boost. Check out our Facebook, Instagram, or website for recipes and more information about our products! name: Next Robot Inc.
description: Next Robot is AI cooking infrastructure that transforms scratch cooking into a scalable, reliable operating system for modern foodservice. Our mission is preserving culinary culture while feeding the future. We use AI powered cooking robots to honor chef intent and help kitchens scale with consistency, care, and creativity. Built and refined in real kitchens, our technology has been tested in high volume, live operating environments where speed, precision, and reliability matter most. We continuously improve our platform using real world performance data, ensuring our systems evolve alongside the demands of active service. This foundation allows operators to trust automation not as a concept, but as proven infrastructure. Our product portfolio includes Robby, designed for high volume wok and saut applications, and Al Dente, our newest product and 2026 Kitchen Innovations Award winner. Powered by proprietary ChefSight AI and PrecisionHeat AI, our systems protect recipe integrity and deliver consistent results by intelligently monitoring cooking stages and optimizing heat in real time. Next Robot enables restaurants, schools, grocery stores, and multi unit operators to expand menus, standardize execution, and increase throughput without increasing complexity. We are not replacing culinary craftsmanship. We are protecting it. Our primary goal is to scale Next Robot into a multi vertical, enterprise ready platform brand while maintaining cultural credibility within the culinary world. By bridging tradition and technology, Next Robot is building the infrastructure that allows foodservice to grow sustainably while honoring the culture and creativity that define great food.

description: At Nikolas Bakery and Daily Kneads Bread , we believe operators shouldn’t have to choose between handcrafted quality and operational efficiency. We are an immigrant-founded and owned bakery company, built on a passion for craft, hard work, and the belief that great food should be both authentic and accessible at scale. Today, we operate as a nationally scaled bakery partner delivering premium, craft-inspired baked goods designed specifically for high-volume foodservice environments. Our products are made to look and taste like they came from a local bakery—while performing with the consistency, labor savings, and reliability that modern operators demand. Through Nikolas Bakery, we specialize in individually wrapped coffee cake slices, coffee cake bites, muffins, and other grab-and-go bakery items that are “staff-proof” by design. With portion control, extended shelf life, and zero back-of-house preparation required, our products help reduce labor, eliminate waste, and drive high-margin impulse purchases across cafés, campus dining, and foodservice operations. Daily Kneads Bread extends this philosophy into the artisan bread category, offering on-trend, clean-label products like avocado bread that deliver a premium, scratch-made experience without adding complexity to the kitchen. From sandwiches to grab-and-go programs, Daily Kneads allows operators to elevate their menu with minimal labor and maximum consistency. Together, our brands serve more than 3,000 coffee shops and 4,000 retail locations nationwide. We partner with operators ranging from independent cafés to multi-unit chains and university dining programs, providing scalable bakery solutions that perform across one location or hundreds. Our approach is simple: create bakery products that feel handcrafted, function seamlessly in real-world operations, and deliver strong, predictable margins. Whether you’re looking to upgrade quality, simplify execution, or scale a bakery program across multiple locations, Nikolas Bakery and Daily Kneads Bread are built to support growth—without adding complexity.
