description: Trendz Packaging is a leading global manufacturer of innovative food packaging products and solutions. Our company was founded in 2009 on a single mission: to make people’s life more easy and green. Trendz Packaging provide Complete Disposable Food Packaging Solutions to Food service and Household consumers, by supplying over 1,000 products.We have forged strong collaborative partnerships with clients in the United States, Europe, Australia, and various other countries across the globe.

name: NINGBO WONDERFOIL ALUMINIUM FOIL TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD.
description: FOUNDED IN 2010,NINBO WONDER FOIL ALUMINIUM FOIL TECHNOLOGY.CO.LTD IS A COMPREHENSIVE ENTERPRISE SPECIALIZING IN RESEARCH ANDDEVELOP-MENT,PRODUCTION AND SALES OF ALUMINIUM FOIL PRODUCTS.AFTERTEN YEARS OF UNREMITTING EFFORTS,IT HAS DEVELOPED INTO AN INNOVATIVEAND ADVANCED ENTERPRISE IN ALUMINIUM FOIL INDUSTRY IN CHINA. THE COMPANY SPECIALIZES IN PRODUCING VARIOUS KINDS OF HOUSEHOLDALUMINIUM FOIL,ALUMINIUM FOIL CONTAINERS,POP-UP ALUMINIUM FOIL,AIR-LINE LUNCH BOXES,BAKING CUPS,ETC.

name: Ningbo Xiangchi Electrical Co., Ltd
description: Ningbo Xiangchi Electrical Co., Ltd (SANKOOL) is a professional manufacturer of Vertical display coolers, Countertop display coolers, cake showcases, display warmers etc. We were founded in year 2007, with more than 10 years of experience and a modern managed garden factory as big as 40000 square meters, we are growing very fast to be one of the leading companies in this line. SANKOOL has its own professional R&D team and advanced testing facilities, these guarantee us strong ability on products innovation and quality improvements, we have got all the main certification in the world such as CE, GS, CCC, CB, ETL, PSE, RoHs in order to meet the global markets. Holding the concept of Innovation, Quality, Service, SANKOOL is looking for chances to grow together with our worldwide partners.

name: Ningbo Zhongyi Packing Technology Co., Ltd
description: Ningbo Zhongyi Packaging Technology Co., Ltd is founded in August 2018, We are committed to the research and development, production and sales of environmentally friendly plastic food packaging, with a perfect storage, logistics and after-sales system, with an annual capacity of more than 10,000 tons. At present, it has 6 leading domestic PP, PS seven-layer co-extruded sheet production lines, 10 PP, PS, PET blister production lines, and 10 automatic positive and negative pressure molding production lines. The company is researching a wide range of product lines, including disposable environmentally friendly lunch boxes, two-color cups, environmentally friendly soup bowls, fresh trays and pastry boxes. At present, it has passed a number of management system certifications such as QS, B R C, B S C I, I S O 9001, I S O 14001 and obtained printing licenses and other qualifications. In the next 3-5 years, the scale of production capacity will double.

name: Nippon Shokken USA
description: At Nippon Shokken U.S.A., we deliver delicious, high-quality, and easy-to-use sauces and seasonings to customers across the United States. As part of the Nihon Shokken Group , we combine food science, craftsmanship, and innovation to create products that support our customers’ success and enrich food culture. Our mission is to pursue “deliciousness” and “convenience” while contributing to the happiness of people worldwide. Our U.S. journey began in 1988 with a sales office in Torrance, California, importing sauces and seasonings from Japan. Growing demand led to the establishment of Nippon Shokken U.S.A., Inc. in 2006. In 2013, we opened our headquarters and manufacturing facility in West Sacramento, California, allowing us to produce locally with high-quality U.S. ingredients and provide faster reliable service. Today, we continue to grow, offering the same dedication to quality and innovation that has made us a trusted name in Japan for over 50 years . Our success is built on the trust of our customers , the dedication of our employees , and our promise to deliver consistency, quality, and value in everything we do.

name: Nisshin OilliO America Inc
description: Nisshin OilliO Group, Ltd. is one of Japan’s leading comprehensive oil manufacturers, recognized for its innovation in edible oils, functional ingredients, and biotechnology. Founded in 1907 and headquartered in Tokyo, the company generates approximately USD 3.5 billion in annual revenue and commands about 43% of Japan’s BtoC cooking oil market . Guided by its corporate philosophy, “The Natural Power of Plants,” Nisshin OilliO is dedicated to sustainable growth, environmental responsibility, and improving food culture through plant-based technologies. Business Overview Nisshin OilliO operates through three main business segments: Oil and Fat Products This core business includes household, professional, and industrial-use oils. Its product range covers canola, soybean, sesame, and corn oils, as well as functional oils such as MCT and DHA/EPA-enriched varieties. Leading consumer brands like Nisshin Canola Oil and Healthy Resetta have helped secure the company’s top market position, while its customized oil and fat solutions support food manufacturers, bakeries, and noodle producers across Japan and abroad. Processed Food and Fine Chemicals This division develops high-value-added products derived from vegetable oils, including emulsifiers, lecithin, and functional lipids used in pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, and health foods. The company also provides oil-based sauces, dressings, and ready-to-use food products designed for both home and professional kitchens. Health Science & Biotechnology Leveraging advanced bioscience, Nisshin OilliO produces plant sterols, tocopherols (Vitamin E), and other health-promoting ingredients. Its globally expanding MCT oil business addresses the growing demand for ketogenic and sports nutrition products. The company is also advancing bio-based manufacturing, using microbial fermentation to create sustainable and renewable materials that reduce environmental impact. Global Expansion and Sustainability While Japan remains its main market, Nisshin OilliO continues to expand across Asia, Europe, and North America , with production and sales bases in China, Southeast Asia, and Europe. The company emphasizes sustainable sourcing , including RSPO-certified palm oil and non-GMO soybeans, and actively pursues carbon neutrality and renewable resource utilization to support a more sustainable global food system. In the coming years, Nisshin OilliO aims to evolve into a comprehensive “food and wellness solutions company,” integrating food science, biotechnology, and sustainability to deliver healthier, plant-based, and environmentally responsible products worldwide.

name: Nisshin Seifun Welna Inc.
description: As a member of Nisshin Seifun Group with more than 120 years of history, Nisshin Seifun Welna Inc. offers a wide range of processed food products, including wheat flour, premixes, pasta, pasta sauce, and frozen pasta. Our products are sold in more than 50 countries worldwide. Primary business areas: The manufacture and sale of pasta, pasta sauces, premixes, flour for consumer use, heat-and-serve products, dried noodles and frozen food products. About Us: https://www.nisshin-seifun-welna.com/index/global/en/about_us

name: NOH Foods of Hawaii
description: The Original Asian Fusion nearly 60 years now, NOH Foods of Hawaii has made it our mission to create delicious and authentic, simple-to-prepare Asian Pacific-rim cuisine. As we are a family-owned company from the 50th state of Hawaii, many of our delectable dishes are Hawaiian inspired ~ there is always a feel good, "just right" comfort feeling when you cook and dine on the various dishes prepared with NOH Foods products. Pacific Asian Fusion and islander flavors in dry seasoning mixes, sauces, marinades tyo make cooking easy, consistent and delicious! Also manufacturing top Hawiaiian style flavor products and beverages. Retail, food service, and industrial supplier. Customer packing available. Headquarted in Honolulu, HI and warehouse facilities in Gardena, CA.

name: Norbec
description: Norbec is a North American leader in manufacturing both prefabricated walk-in coolers & freezers and doors as well as architectural insulated metal panels for building envelopes. We pride ourself on being a trusted partner for a vast selection of markets, including supermarkets, food service, building envelopes, food processing plants, grocery & convenience stores, clean rooms and more. Founded in 1982, Norbec has earned a solid reputation as a leader and continuously innovates to bring its customers the best products and service. Offering custom build cold room and doors to the food service and supermarket industries is at the core of our expertise. With a variety of accessories along with products tailored to every type of project, Norbec is your number 1 partner. For more information about our products, projects and teams, visit norbec.com.

name: Nordic Ware
description: Manufacturer of PFAS-free commercial Bundt bakeware, baking pans, sheet pans, induction and non-stick cookware, microwave cookware and BBQ cookware. Coating and re-coating of non-stick pans or parts.

name: Norpac Fisheries Export
description: Norpac Fisheries Export delivers a reliable supply of traceable, individually graded premium seafood from Hawaii and the Pacific Oceandelivered with uncompromising consistency and freshness, to support what your kitchen demands.

name: North Canna Co
description: North Canna is a leading hemp THC beverage company based out of Minneapolis, Minnesota. Designed to inspire happy and elevated vibes, our THC seltzers are crafted with natural ingredients, zero calories and zero sugars making them perfect for any occasion where well-being and enjoyment are key. Come say high to our fun and inviting flavor profiles!

name: North Carolina Dept. of Agriculture
description: The Got to Be NC Pavilion in the busy South Hall will feature eight of our members; Homegrown Family Foods, Tidewater Grain Co., Spicewalla, Hickory Nut Gap Meats, DePalo Foods, Hampton Farms Peanuts, Burch farms and Garner Foods. Homegrown Family Foods sources locally grown whole wheat and corn to mill a variety of specialty mixes and grits, flour and cornmeal. They have been consistently milling roughly 800 million pounds of flour every week. The flour is shipped to grocery stores, restaurants, bakeries, and food manufacturing facilities all across the country. Tidewater Gain Co. specializes in Carolina Gold rice on their coastal farm in Oriental and is a totally sustainable family and farmer owned. This is the first NC rice farmer in over 120 years, to grow Carolina Gold Rice, their flagship product. Tidewater grows and mills their rice on the farm and offer current harvest, GMO free white and brown rice as well as middlins or rice grits, rice flour and a specialty long-grain variety of Carolina Gold Rice called Santee Gold to both retail and wholesale customers. Spicewalla sources directly from quality suppliers in small quantities, anywhere from twenty-five to one hundred pounds in a delivery. This method of buying and receiving smaller shipments ensures the freshness of the product not only for our benefit, but for the benefit of our customers. Hampton has carefully cultivated relationships with farmers to ensure their products' quality from seed to shelf. Headquartered in Severn, North Carolina, acquisition by Hampton Farms has allowed for increased quality and variety. Acquired Tanner Nut Company of Tarboro, North Carolina - which now serves as the Hampton Farms Specialty Division producing Honey Roasted Cashews, Honey Chipotle Peanuts and Wildernuts Nut Trios. Hampton Farms introduces an organic line of peanut butter. Hickory Nut Gap since 1916. Pasture raised pork and beef. Employs managed grazing practices, which involve careful planning and observation, and frequent movement of herds. This leads to an animal impact on the land that enriches the soil and feeds the microbial life underground. Winston-Salem based Garner Foods began producing a wide variety of sauces, including Texas Pete in 1929.Today, Garner Foods now offers international flavors, Sabor! by Texas Pete Mexican-Style Hot Sauce and CHA! by Texas Pete Sriracha Sauce. Green Mountain Gringo Salsa remains the freshest jarred salsa on the market. Green Mountain Gringo is Non-GMO Verifiedand all Garner Foods products are certified Gluten-Free! Established in 1950 in Faison, NC, Burch Farms specializes in sweet potatoes, greens, and cabbage. Burch Farms is a family-owned enterprise with brothers, Jimmy Sr., Ted, and Bill Burch at the helm, driving the farm to success over the years. Today, Burch Farms commands over 8,000 acres of farmland and stands as a significant player in the local agricultural landscape, contributing to the vitality of its community.

name: North Shore Safety
description: USA Manufacturer of point-of-use GFCI/ELCI's (GFPE's). North Shore Safety's GFCI products adhere to required NEC article 210.8(b), which mandates all commercial kitchen equipment under 100 Amps has Class A GFCI protection. North Shore Safety provides Custom solutions for OEM, Commercial and Industrial Applications, in Permanent and Portable configurations that support a variety of application needs. Current electrical configuration offerings range from; 15 to 100Amps, 120V to 600V, single, split, and 3-phase.

name: Nory
description: Nory is the agentic AI restaurant operating system, built for multi-location operators who want full control of their prime cost, labor and COGs, from a single platform. We've built a crew of AI assistants that work 24/7 to make sure every one of your restaurant locations is running as profitably as possible. They predict demand, build staffing plans, manage supplier ordering, and keep P&L performance on track. Each one is customized to how each of your restaurants actually operates: your nuances, your budgets, your targets. One agentic AI system. Your entire operation. The Crew of AI Assistants The Forecasting Assistant predicts revenue, guest count, and item-level sales for every 15 minutes throughout the day, at every location, with ~97% accuracy. A fully bespoke, dynamic prediction, not a static weekly average. The Scheduling Assistant turns that forecast into demand-matched schedules in under 5 seconds, within your budget, rules, and local labor laws. Customers typically see a 10–20% reduction in labor cost. The Ordering Assistant translates demand into dynamic par levels, autonomously creates purchase orders, and communicates directly with suppliers. Customers report ~50% less food waste and hundreds of hours saved per team. Your rules. Their execution. You decide how much autonomy you're comfortable with. In Assistant mode, the AI does the legwork and your team approves before anything goes live. In Agent mode, the system acts within the rules you've set. Same guardrails, no manual step in between. Nory was built on AI from day one. Not bolted on. Not a chatbot layered over a legacy product. A crew of AI workers running the operational backbone of your business. "Most operators are still running the old way: HQ sets budgets, reviews data, chases GMs, and iterates slowly. Operators deploying AI assistants are pulling ahead. The gap is widening." — Conor Sheridan, CEO & Co-Founder, Nory Come find us at the show to see how Nory's AI assistants are delivering 10–20% labor cost reductions and ~50% less food waste for multi-location operators across the US, UK, and Europe, including Dave's Hot Chicken and Black Sheep Coffee. Learn more at nory.ai

name: Nothum Food Processing Systems
description: Nothum provides professional kitchens and pilot test centers with smart automation solutions designed to improve consistency, efficiency, and product quality. Their equipment—such as the Bettcher BB-1 and ACS systems—streamlines traditionally manual battering and breading processes, reducing labor demands and ingredient waste. By combining precision engineering with easy operation and cleaning, Nothum helps operators achieve uniform results, extend oil life, and maximize overall kitchen performance.

name: Novamex
description: We may not be perfect, but we strive to be our best in the way we know how, through our products: Jarritos, Mineragua, Sangra Seorial, and Mundet, which are made with natural flavors and real sugar. We not only export products, we export our culture to the world. Each unique taste is a delicious slice of our Mexican heritage. "Be Super Good Stay Unique" aren't just words, they're a philosophy that we proudly infuse into our business. Salud!

name: Novex Products, Inc.
description: Novex Products Inc., is a growing manufacturer of tissue, towel, and napkin products. Our products are designed for applications in the away-from-home market as well as retail consumptions. In addition to our standard items, we also manufacture custom made paper products per customer specifications. We use earth friendly materials and components in our products. We manufacture a wide range of products and strive to be a one-stop shop to all distributors of janitorial, food service, and paper products. Our products are consistent, elegant, cost effective, and eco-friendly.

name: Novolex
description: Novolex is a leading manufacturer of food, beverage, and specialty packaging that supports multiple industries, including foodservice, restaurant delivery and carryout, food processing, grocery and retail, and industrial sectors. Our innovative product portfolio is designed to meet the diverse needs of businesses worldwide and the millions of customers they serve. Through continuous investment in research and development, we are committed to engineering more sustainable choices for the future. Our extensive manufacturing network spans North America and Europe, including two world-class plastic film recycling centers. Discover more about Novolex, our 20,000+ family members and our commitment to innovation and sustainability at www.novolex.com .

name: Now Book It
description: Built by people in hospitality. Powered by AI. Now Book It is the restaurant reservation platform that helps you grow your business, get guests through the door, and give them a reason to return.

name: NSF
description: NSF is a global leader in commercial food equipment safety, backed by over 80 years of protecting public and environmental health. We certify electrical and hygienic design compliance, helping ensure safer commercial kitchens worldwide. Beyond certification, NSF supports the foodservice industry with audits, advisory services, digital solutions, claims verification, management systems, sustainability programs, testing, and training , all designed to keep food operations safe and efficient.

name: Nu Products Seasoning Co.
description: NuSpice is a B2B flavor partner specializing in custom spice blends and seasoning solutions for food manufacturers looking to stay ahead of evolving consumer tastes. We help brands turn market trends and culinary inspiration into scalable, high-performing flavors that succeed in today’s competitive marketplace. At the core of NuSpice is a collaborative, insight-driven approach to flavor development. Our in-house R&D team combines culinary creativity with technical expertise to design blends that deliver on flavor, functionality, and consistency across applications. From bold heat-forward profiles and global-inspired flavors to clean label and comfort-driven solutions, we create flavors that align with both consumer demand and real-world production requirements. What sets NuSpice apart is our deep connection to market intelligence. By closely tracking menu trends, retail innovation, and consumer behavior, we help our partners move forward with confidence and make informed decisions grounded in what is resonating now and what is coming next. This forward-thinking mindset allows us to support customers not just with great flavor, but with strategic direction. From early-stage ideation and bench top development to testing, scaling, and commercialization, NuSpice is built for speed, flexibility, and customization. Our hands-on, responsive process ensures that each solution is tailored to our customers’ goals, timelines, and operational needs. When you work with NuSpice, you gain more than a seasoning supplier. You gain a strategic flavor partner committed to innovation, collaboration, and helping your products stand out on shelf and on menu.

name: Nutritics
description: Nutritics: an all-in-one live food data platform for foodservice, contract feeders and hotels. It unifies recipes, nutrition, allergens, menu management, labeling and digital/paper menu publishing. It materially streamlines back-of-house operations, enables compliance (incl ADDE SB68), improves transparency, reduces cost, labor, risk, and waste, while increasing guest satisfaction and footfall front-of-house

name: NxTrade
description: We are a U.S.-based sourcing and commercial partner specializing in innovative, shelf-stable Mexican food products built for modern supply chains. With deep roots in Mexico's manufacturing community, we connect U.S. buyers directly with top-tier food products — without the unnecessary layers of brokers or intermediaries. BUILT FOR FOODSERVICE & RETAIL Our curated catalog preserves authentic Mexican flavor profiles while solving real-world logistics and distribution challenges. Unlike perishable product lines that complicate storage and handling, our products are ready to serve, easy to stock, and designed to deliver consistent quality across retail and foodservice channels. Shelf Stable Authentic Mexican Flavors through Mexicanly, and sourcing from Mexitory

name: O-View Technology Co., Ltd.
description: O-VIEW Technology — Smart Automation for Modern Food Service O-VIEW Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading provider of intelligent food service automation solutions , dedicated to redefining kitchen efficiency and consistency for the global restaurant industry. With strong expertise in mechanical design, embedded systems, and software integration , O-VIEW develops smart kitchen equipment that reduces labor dependency, standardizes cooking quality, and enables scalable operations for chain restaurants, central kitchens, and emerging food brands worldwide. Product Highlights: Automatic Stir-Fry Machine - Fully automated wok cooking with precise temperature and stirring control - Consistent flavor and texture for Asian and international cuisines - Ideal for high-volume kitchens and standardized menu production Smart Griddle - Even heat distribution and intelligent temperature control - Optimized for burgers, pancakes, grilled meats, and breakfast menus - Reduces manual operation and training time All-in-One Smart Cooker - Integrated cooking, stirring, and recipe management system - Supports multiple cooking modes with programmable settings - Enhances efficiency while maintaining culinary consistency Automatic Noodle Cooker - Precise cooking time control for perfect noodle texture - Suitable for ramen, pasta, and various noodle-based dishes - Improves speed, consistency, and peak-hour performance Bubble Tea & Beverage Automation Solutions - Standardized drink preparation with consistent flavor output - Reduces labor cost while maintaining premium beverage quality - Ideal for chain beverage brands and high-traffic locations Smart Coffee Brewing System - Automated brewing with stable extraction parameters - Ensures consistent taste across multiple locations - Designed for cafés, convenience stores, and self-service environments Why Choose O-VIEW ✔ Smart automation designed for diverse global cuisines ✔ Flexible solutions for restaurants, chains, and central kitchens ✔ Reliable performance with robust R&D and manufacturing capability ✔ Complete service from system design to after-sales support

name: Oatly
description: Our sole purpose as a company is to make it easy for people to turn what they eat and drink into personal moments of healthy joy, without recklessly taxing the planets resources in the process. Oatly was founded back in the 1990s and is based on Swedish research from Lund University. The companys patented enzyme technology copies natures own process and turns fiber rich oats into nutritional liquid food that is perfectly designed for humans. Today, the Swedish company remains independent and dedicated to upgrading the lives of individuals and the general well being of the plant through a lineup of original oat drinks, oatgurts, soft serve and non-dairy frozen desserts. The company operates out of the southern region of Sweden with headquarters in Malmo, and U.S. headquarters in New York City. The Oatly brand is available in more than 20 countries throughout Europe and Asia.

name: ODW Logistics
description: ODW Logistics is a 3rd-party logistics company headquartered in Columbus, Ohio. Opening its doors in 1971, ODW Logistics has over 50 years of experience delivering the difference to our customers. With more than 29 DCs sprawling over 9M-sqft, a comprehensive managed transportation and retail consolidation program ODW provides a wholistic approach to supply chain management. In an industry that never stops moving our experts are available 24/7/365 to ensure your product gets to where it is going on-time and in full every time. With strategic locations in Southern California, Chicago, Memphis and Ohio your product is never more than 4-days from your customers.

name: Oegg Inc.
description: Oegg is a pioneering food brand committed to restoring confidence in food through technology and integrity. Specializing in ready-to-eat soft-boiled eggs and quail egg snacks, we aim to redefine quality standards in the egg industry. Founded in June 2006 and located in the Wangcheng National Economic Development Zone, Changsha City, Hunan Province, China, Oegg operates on a sprawling 67-acre site with a team of over 500 dedicated employees. As a leading agricultural industrialization enterprise and a national high-tech enterprise, Oegg is at the forefront of innovation in the food industry. We are proud to be recognized as a technological innovation giant enterprise, with dual export qualifications for breeding and processing—a unique distinction in Hunan Province. Our products are exported to 18 countries and regions, including the United States, Canada, Japan, Australia, and Southeast Asia, making us a global leader in egg-based foods.

name: Oil Solutions Group, Inc.
description: Oil Solutions Group is a leading provider of extended oil life solutions to the foodservice industry. Founded with a mission to revolutionize how commercial kitchens manage their frying oil, we deliver best-in-class filtration products and innovative solutions that optimize oil management, reduce operational costs, and improve kitchen efficiency. Our Mission At Oil Solutions Group, we strive to be a customer-centric company that creates safe, efficient, best-in-class products along with innovative solutions that optimize foodservice oil management. We are committed to helping our customers achieve superior results while promoting sustainability and environmental responsibility. Industry-Leading Filtration Technology Our flagship Masterfil Filters represent the most effective filtration technology available in the foodservice industry. These advanced filters remove particles as small as micron - thats 30-120 times smaller than traditional paper filters can capture. This superior filtration capability delivers measurable results that directly impact your bottom line. Proven Performance Results Masterfil Filters have been proven to more than double oil life in commercial kitchen operations. By removing the microscopic particles and contaminants that degrade oil quality, our filtration systems help you: Extend oil life by 2x or more Significantly reduce oil purchasing costs Improve food flavor profile and consistency Enhance food quality and customer satisfaction Reduce environmental waste and disposal costs Promote sustainability in kitchen operations Our Promise to Customers Oil Solutions Group sells only best-in-class products that deliver real, measurable value. We dont just sell equipment - we provide comprehensive solutions that transform oil management from a necessary expense into a profit center. Our filtration systems improve oil quality, enhance operational efficiency, and deliver substantial cost savings while supporting your sustainability goals. Commitment to Innovation We continuously invest in research and development to bring the most advanced oil management solutions to market. Our team works closely with foodservice operators to understand their challenges and develop innovative products that address real-world needs. Partnership Approach At Oil Solutions Group, we believe in building long-term partnerships with our customers. We provide ongoing support, training, and expertise to ensure you maximize the value of our solutions. Our customer-centric approach means were committed to your success every step of the way. Discover how Oil Solutions Group can transform your oil management operations and deliver measurable results for your business.

name: OilChef
description: OiL Chef will help you fry food faster, reducing some menu items cooking time by circa 30% and reduce your monthly oil purchases by up to 50%. This innovative sustainable approach to deep frying, reduces operational expenses and improves food quality. Made in USA. Full 3 year warranty. Ask about ur money back guarantee and request your product trial.

name: Oklahoma Department of Agriculture Food & Forestry
Old Hickory Bar-B-Q
description: Hickory Industries Inc. is a family-owned, privately held company that has been a leader in the commercial foodservice industry since 1946. Our 46,000-square-foot manufacturing facility in North Bergen, New Jersey is where we proudly design and produce our Old Hickory Bar-B-Q Machines, including gas and electric chicken rotisseries, churrasco grills, chicken warmers, and rotating pizza ovens. We have formed strong partnerships with leaders in the industrial market and commercial restaurant industry through our reliable and high-quality products at excellent prices. Our dedication to the industry has earned us a reputation for being among the highest in quality and versatility, and a brand name that companies can trust. At Hickory Industries, we also maintain large inventories to ensure we always provide superior service.

name: Old Major - Bacon & Sausage
description: In April 2016, an idea came to life. Founder Mark LaFay started making bacon and selling it out of the back of his pickup truck in a church parking lot in the Meridian Kessler Neighborhood of Indianapolis. 10 Years later, much has changed, but not our commitment to our team, local sourcing, and quality. Old Major Market , is an artisanal bacon and sausage company located in Indianapolis. Old Major sources from Indiana family farmers. Old Major expertly combines old-world craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology to celebrate and advance the art of bacon and sausage making. Known for both honoring traditional culinary practices and embracing innovation, Old Major develops recipes that range from classic to whimsically creative. Our recipe is simple : start with high quality ingredients and produce to the highest of standards.

name: Ole Mexican Foods, Inc.
description: Ole Mexican Foods is one the largest privately held tortilla manufacturer in America with National and International Distribution. We offer a wide range of authentic Mexican products beyond the traditional Corn and Flour tortillas, including chorizos, cheeses and Better For You Xtreme Wellness Products (Keto, Low Carb, etc.) We continue to operate the company guided by our promise of delivering high quality products. It is this commitment that we hope to share with you each time you make Ole Mexican Foods a part of your menu. MORE ABOUT OLE WOMEN OWNED A Certified Minority (Hispanic) Business and Women-Owned Enterprise The Story of Ole Mexican Foods exemplifies the American Dream. With tradition passed down by her grandmother from her native Mexico, Veronica Moreno began selling homemade corn tortillas in her Atlanta neighborhood in 1988. As a result of her unique visioning commitment to quality, word soon spread about her tortillas being the freshest, safest, and best tasting in town. Growing demand for these delicious tortillas led to the purchase of a small production facility, which allowed Veronica to launch her tortillas and other traditional Mexican products to mainstream public. As demands continued, her husband and children joined her in the promise to deliver high-quality, authentic tortillas and Mexican foods.

name: Oleic Solutions
description: We are a trusted provider of innovative and effective solutions based on premium-quality sunflower oils and other natural ingredients. Our mission is to help our customers optimize food costs, simplify technological processes, enhance the taste and quality of products, extend shelf life, and maximize profitability. With a commitment to excellence, we support businesses in the Food Service, Food manufacturing, and Retail sectors.

name: Oliphant Brewing
description: Oliphant Brewing is a small, proudly unconventional beverage company based in Somerset, Wisconsin. Since opening our doors in 2014, we’ve been focused on one thing above all else: making drinks we’re genuinely excited about and sharing them with people who appreciate a little creativity in their glass. We started, like many craft breweries, with beer. Our approach has always leaned experimental: bold flavors, playful ideas, and a willingness to try things other folks might consider a little strange. That spirit of curiosity still drives everything we do. In 2023, we expanded beyond beer and dove into a broader world of beverages. Today, alongside our craft beer lineup, we produce hemp-derived THC beverages, house-made sodas, and a growing range of functional mushroom drinks. Each category gives us a new playground to explore flavor, ingredients, and experiences; whether that means a crisp THC beverage, a nostalgic soda with a twist, or a mushroom beverage designed for balance and focus. At our core, Oliphant is run by a small crew of passionate makers, tinkerers, and self-described weirdos. We’re not afraid to let our freak flag fly, and that shows up in our labels, our recipes, and the energy we bring to everything we make. We believe beverages should be fun, expressive, and maybe even a little unexpected. If you’re looking for something familiar done really well, something completely new, or something delightfully strange, there’s a good chance we’ve got a can for you. Thanks for stopping by and checking out what we’re pouring.

name: OLIPOP
description: Made with real ingredients, real refreshment, and real digestive health support, OLIPOP is the feel-good soda made with care and backed by science. With high fiber and less sugar, but full flavor, it’s a delicious soda that pairs well with everything on your menu. Visit Booth #1985 and sip something that drives repeat purchases.

name: Olive Ecopak Private Limited
description: Olive Ecopak Private Limited marks the fusion of expertise, unwavering dedication, and a resolute commitment to revolutionizing tableware and packaging industry. As a dynamic joint venture set to launch in 2024, we unite the visionary Mr. Ramswaroop Thard, CMD of Rajshree Polypack Limited, and Mr. Rajesh Gandhi, Managing Partner of Oracle Polyplast. This partnership forms the fundamentals of our strength, offering a rich legacy of experience in the tableware and packaging sector. Our founders, Mr. Ramswaroop Thard and Mr. Rajesh Gandhi, together brings over 25 years of invaluable experience in the Plastic Packaging Industry. Their visionary leadership has been instrumental in shaping our journey toward creating innovative and eco-friendly sustainable disposable tableware and packaging solutions. Under their guidance, our passionate team of professionals is on a mission to redefine tableware standards, with sustainability as our guiding principle. Join us as we embark on this exciting journey to make a positive impact on the environment through responsible eco-friendly sustainable disposable tableware and packaging solutions.

name: Oliver Packaging and Equipment Company
description: Founded in 1890, Oliver Packaging is a food equipment company that specializes in commercial bakery equipment - bread and bagel slicers as well as dough moulders - and meal packaging systems. Our Speedseal® Packaging System combines state-of-the-art tray-sealing machines, trays, and lidding film to deliver unparalleled efficiency and simplicity to food service operations. By facilitating portion control, minimizing food waste, and ensuring secure sealing, Speedseal® Packaging Systems optimize time and labor costs while safeguarding food from contaminants. name: Oryx Desert Salt PTY Ltd
description: DESERT SALT- SALT OF THE EARTH - FROM THE KALAHARI Oryx Desert Salt is a naturally organic, crystal-white gourmet salt – mineral rich, unrefined, unpolluted, free from nano or micro-plastics or pharmaceutical contamination, additives or chemicals. “Salt is the smallest ingredient in any meal and yet is has the biggest impact on the flavour and success of the meal” Oryx Desert Salt is sourced from the uninhabitable Kalahari Desert in Southern Africa, where subterranean streams flow through Dwyka rock formations 300 million years old replenishing a 55 million ton underground salt aquifer. The fully saturated brine salt water - untouched by humans, is drawn up onto the saltpan, where it is naturally sundried in 115 F /49 C with the wind, stars, in a full lunar cycle. The result? 100% pure, naturally organic Desert Salt that contains all vital essential minerals and trace elements, the building blocks your body needs to function properly and be healthy – free from toxins, pollution, plastic or any free-flow or anti-clumping additives. Oryx Desert Salt has an exceptional taste - full, gentle and opens all the taste buds, vs sea salt or table salt which tends to be harsh and bitter in comparison. If you’re a chef, or restaurant owner, who wants to be a trendsetter and give their food an ultimate gourmet taste profile, I invite you to taste and experience the difference of Oryx Desert Salt for yourself. Your food will have an enhanced flavor, be healthier and have higher nutritional value. All our grinders have a ceramic grinding mechanism - refillable, reusable and long-lasting, 20x and more. No plastic is ground into the food. Environmentally responsible and a cost saver. #RefillNotLandfill Our glass bottles have the logo printed, so they can be wiped down daily to be kept clean. Dishwasher safe too. Oryx Desert Salt believes in giving back and donates monthly to the Khomani San & Mier communities, aswell as to Project Biome, an agro-ecology regenerative project. Available in all Whole Foods Market stores for the last 5 years, also available on JetBlue airline and Amtrak. #SpotTheHorns #TasteTheDifference #FeelTheDifference #MakeADifference #BEtheDIFFERENCE

name: OZZI
description: The OZZI Closed-Loop Technology Solution for Sustainable Dining eliminates traditional disposable to-go containers for all segments of the food service industry. More than 500 million containers have been averted from landfills and oceans with OZZI. In addition to being able to save you money on your cost of disposables, what makes OZZI unique is: Closed Loop: Our Made in the USA O2GO reusable containers can be sent back to us at the end of their life to be ground and re-made into other products. Zero Waste. OZZI Collection Machine: Our OZZI Collection Machine has a 100% collection rate of our O2GO reusable containers and the highest diner engagement. In addition, case studies show OZZI and O2GO have 19 times fewer greenhouse gas emissions, 25 times less water used, 119,347 cubic feet in waste reduction; and fewer deliveries and less waste hauling costs. It is just a three-step process: (1) Meal prepared in a clean O2GO and is eaten anywhere, (2) Diner returns the O2GO to any OZZI Machine, and (3) O2GO is commercially washed, sanitized and ready for reuse. The OZZI Mission is to Change the World from Disposables to Reusables One Meal at a Time.

Pacific Packaging Far East Pte Ltd is deeply committed to sustainability and continuous improvement. We are a proud recipient of the Superbrands Singapore 2025 Award and the GEM (Green Excellence in Manufacturing) Bronze Award under the SMF/A*STAR/ESG sustainability program. Our ongoing investments in new technology and machine modernization help reduce energy consumption and improve production efficiency, while maintaining high quality and consistency. Our success is built on strong relationships. We work closely with distributors, wholesalers, and OEM partners to develop tailored packaging solutions that balance performance, presentation, and environmental responsibility. Supported by a skilled team and state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities, we ensure that every order — large or small — receives the same attention to detail and commitment to excellence. At Pacific Packaging Far East, we don’t just make packaging — we create kitchen solutions that protect, present, and preserve food safely and beautifully. Whether you are looking for reliable private-label manufacturing, eco-friendly alternatives, or advanced sealing technology, our Singaporean efficiency and global outlook make us a trusted partner for your business growth.
