Our red and ripe tomatoes, picked at the peak of season, are grown throughout California’s Central Valley, the world’s most prolific tomato growing region with our factory located right in the heart of it. We pack exclusively in the #10 flexible pouch and have been doing so for decades. We pioneered where the future of food packaging needed to go and helped revolutionize an industry and have continued to do so ever since. Sustainable, reliable, safe, cost-effective, environmentally responsible packaging. The #10 flexible pouch.

name: Parapet Studios LLC
description: Parapet provides three separate services to restaurant operators. We have the endorsement of KFC's largest franchisee KBP Foods at over 750 restaurants as well as all current franchisees on the KFC Tech Committee. Here’s what we offer: Check: a task management system with all the bells and whistles, and to be blunt, it blows the competition away! Check can run on any web-enabled device, has more features and functionality, is easy to use, and—best of all—it’s inexpensive! Unlike other options out there, you can build as many lists as you want, have as many users as you need, and build both in-restaurant or above-restaurant lists. It scales beautifully to accommodate extremely large companies but works just as well for single restaurant operators. Making it more inviting to the serial franchisees, Check also works painlessly across multiple brands. $10/month per location. InSight : a one-stop-shop for all things reporting. The objective of InSight is to work as a collection service for all of the various data involved in restaurant operations and help make that data easy to view and scale to the end-users’ needs. It comes with many pre-built reports but is easy to customize for operators with a built-in report editing tool. InSight also works as a bridge between various systems—translating data from one system to the next e.g., timekeeping to payroll or BOH to accounting software, etc. We also offer free report customizations. $27.49/month per location. Overseer: a loss prevention tool with an emphasis on prevention. Overseer not only allows users to quickly identify and investigate suspicious behavior but also helps establish loss prevention routines that will help keep employees honest. It also integrates with different camera systems with no added cost. $15/month per location We always offer free trials of our services and never charge set up fees or try to lock our subscribers in with contracts. We do offer discounted bundling options for subscribers of multiple tools!

name: Paris Gourmet
description: Paris Gourmet was established in 1983 by Xavier and Dominique Noel in Houston, TX. Since 1991, we are headquartered in Carlstadt, NJ and became a leading specialty food service importer of gourmet and pastry ingredients. Paris Gourmet has direct distribution in the Tri-State Area, servicing most of the area with its own sales staff and delivery fleet. Nationally, we have a network of over 100 distributors in most major U.S. markets, including the Caribbean, Mexico and Canada. Paris Gourmet has also created and controls a portfolio of proprietary brands developed over the years and also has exclusivity for the U.S. marketing for some leading manufacturers' brands. We specialize in products such as chocolate couverture specialties, butter, meats cheeses, technical products, coffee tea, frozen croissants, Danishes breads, pastry powder preparation mixes, fruit purees, citrus zests, IQF fruits, vanilla beans and extracts, fruit pastes for pastry and gelato, demi-sec/ freeze dried/ candied fruits, spices, nuts, dealcoholized wines and so much more.

name: Park Foods Trading
description: The trusted way to source quality food products.

name: Parpan Breads
description: Parpan was launched in 2020 by Lyon Bakery - a longtime leading artisan bakery in Washington DC. For decades, leading restaurants and premier hotel chains have relied upon Lyon for the highest quality fresh breads. But as demand grew beyond Lyon’s fresh bread delivery capacity, the idea for a new frozen bread company was born. With a multimillion-dollar investment in state-of-the-art processing equipment to increase production capabilities, Parpan is now bringing artisan quality frozen breads to the marketplace nationwide. Whether used for simple sandwiches or as a delicious compliment to full-course dinners, our clients know they can rely on our products to consistently deliver quality, flavor, perfect texture with a diligent focus on food safety.

name: Parsley
description: The chef's secret to a healthy culinary business - Parsley is the leading ERP for food production. Modern, intuitive, and cloud based - it can be accessed from computer, phone or tablet. Manage your recipes, get cost and nutrition facts, automatically get your production plans and track production progress, purchase easily and accurately, receive and finalize invoices, manage multiple locations and commissaries. Used by some of the largest corporate hospitality, prepared meal, regional grocers and catering companies in the US.

name: Pasta Montana
description: Better pasta begins with better wheat, grown right here under the big skies of Montana. Where strong and pure 100% durum wheat doesn't have to travel more than a stone's throw to become fantastic pasta. Come experience old-west virtues of honesty, integrity, and the recognition that you are important to us. This is where crisp Rocky Mountain streams have forged a path for centuries, and where hard work and strong ethics ensure that you and the land will be taken care of for centuries to come. It's rooted in what's local, and what's right. Come ride with us.

name: Pastabiz Pasta Machines
description: Chef trusted Professional Pasta Machines and accessories for the culinary industry. Our line of equipment is catered for the restaurant, educational, commercial, and industrial segments and include Pasta Extruders, Pasta Sheeters, Combination Pasta Machines, Ravioli Machines, Pasta Tools and Accessories. Pastabiz, An EMILIOMITI Company, is the US leader in professional pasta equipment.

name: Pastificio di Martino
description: More than 110 years of experience in the production of Gragnano Pasta make the di Martino Family a reference point in the world market of Protected Geographical Indication (P.G.I.) high quality pasta. Since 1912 the ancient Gragnano’s method of a slow bronze die extrusion, dried at low temperature, mixed with the best Italian durum wheat and the purest local spring water, leads the Di Martino Company to spred the goodness of made in Italy food and culture becoming Official Supporter of Slow Food Italia, partners of Dolce & Gabbana and sponsor of Teatro San Carlo di Napoli.

name: PastryStar
description: Who is PastryStar? We are a family-owned bakery and pastry ingredient manufacturer specializing in high-quality, clean-label solutions for industrial, foodservice, and retail applications. Founded in 1986 and based in Laurel, MD, PastryStar blends authentic French pastry expertise with scalable production and technical support. Our ingredients are developed to meet the performance, consistency, and regulatory requirements of professional operations, including FDA standards and certifications such as Kosher, SQF, and clean-label compliance. Backed by an experienced R&D team, PastryStar partners with customers to develop custom formulations, plant-based alternatives, and innovative solutions aligned with market trends and operational needs. PastryStar delivers reliability, transparency, and quality, at scale. What makes PastryStar different? Clean-Label Excellence Quality and transparency are at the heart of everything we do. Our pastry and bakery ingredients are crafted with carefully selected, natural raw materials and formulated without artificial additives or preservatives. Clean labels are not a trend for us, they are a standard. Made in the USA All PastryStar products are proudly manufactured in the United States at our Maryland facility. This allows us to ensure consistent quality, reliable supply, faster lead times, and strict adherence to U.S. food safety and regulatory standards. R&D Expertise Led by Pastry Chefs Innovation at PastryStar is driven by hands-on pastry expertise. Our in-house R&D team works closely with professional pastry chefs and food industry partner's to develop custom formulations, optimize performance, and create innovative solutions. Custom Product Specialists PastryStar specializes in creating custom products. Whether it’s a one-of-a-kind flavor, a signature dessert concept, or a tailored adaptation of an existing product, if you can dream it, we can make it!

name: Pathwater
description: PATH is the only bottled water company in the industry that offers electrolyte-enhanced purified water in a 100% refillable and sustainable aluminum bottle. PATH provides the convenience of bottled water, a healthy alternative to sugary beverages and is leading the fight against single-use plastic bottles that are harmful to our planet.

name: Pathway Solutions Inc.
description: SOLUTIONS FOR PREPARED FOOD MANUFACTURING COMPANIES Pathway Solutions Inc. was founded in 1999 to provide solutions for prepared food manufacturing companies. To date, Pathway Solutions Inc. has helped hundreds of customers achieve their food packaging and packaging equipment goals, from start-up to full commercialization. In 2008, Pathway Film Solutions, LLC was founded to provide narrow web film slitting, complementing the broad set of packaging materials represented and sold by Pathway Solutions Inc. Pathway Solutions Inc. offers a wide range of related packaging options, including: CPET, PET Pressed Paperboard, APET, OPS, HIPS, & Smooth Wall Foil Trays Microwaveable Cups Lidding Films: Tray and Cup Lidding Films Susceptor Technology Retail Merchandising Sleeves and Cartons Heat Sealing Equipment: Manual Table-top to Fully Automated Meals on Wheels Packaging The Advantage Plus! All of our tray selections have the following outstanding properties: FDA and USDA approved for food applications Resistant to highly acidic and fatty foods Choice of heat-sealable films – peel and non-peel available Freezer to oven (microwave and conventional oven) cooking capability (where applicable) Serving tray appeal Wide variety of shapes, sizes, print patterns, and end use requirements

name: Patra Eco-Dinnerware
description: Patra® Eco-Dinnerware, it is part of living an eco-friendly lifestyle. Our product comes from Earth, shaped and used as a dinnerware and goes back to Earth. We are passionate about helping the environment and Patra® Eco-Dinnerware enables us to achieve that and makes all of us to live better, smarter and mindful. It’s more than using Patra® Eco-Dinnerware; it’s a way of life. Sustainability of a product starts from where the raw materials are sourced and how it is processed for manufacturing the product. Using fallen leaves as our raw material makes us one of the few companies to use 100% renewable resources. No trees are ever cut to make Patra® Eco-Dinnerware.

name: PAX Technology
description: PAX Technology, Inc. is one of the largest electronic payment solution providers in the world, with 70 million terminals located in over 120 countries. As a leading global manufacturer of payment solutions, we are committed to delivering innovative, high-quality, and secure payment solutions to businesses, large and small, worldwide.

name: Paytronix
description: Paytronix is the leading provider of Digital Customer Engagement Solutions for restaurants, convenience stores, and retailers who seek to develop lasting relationships with their guests. For over 20 years, Paytronix has grown its Guest Engagement Platform to seamlessly incorporate individual components of customer engagement into a single, robust platform. Paytronix unifies Gift Card, Payments, Loyalty Programs, CRM, Online Ordering, Mobile Apps, and Reporting into a technology platform equipped with Artificial Intelligence capabilities, so retailers have their Guest Engagement programs integrated into a single-source solution. This enables Paytronix clients to deliver consistent experiences, sophisticated campaigns by segments, and tailored 1:1 messaging. Today, over 1,800 brands rely on Paytronix to help them better engage their guests and create stronger brand preferences.

name: PCB Création
description: For more than 30 years, PCB Creation has been designing and producing exceptional decorations for all creative and qualified professionnals in the world of gastronomy. Our aim is to give a special touch to the chef’s creations in desserts, savoury products and drinks. Located and founded in Alsace (eastern France), all our designs are executed in-house by our dedicated team and expertly manufactured by our company. This masytery of culinary skills, combined with our first-class customer service, ensures creativity, quality and innovation to meet customer expectations.

name: PEACE WORLD
description: Peaceworld is a specialized company in commercial kitchen equipment and smart cooking solutions, holding multiple patents and various international certifications that meet global standards. Based on our proprietary IH (Induction Heating) technology, we develop differentiated cooking equipment such as Underrange (a no-construction under-table induction system) and Eco Master (an integrated cooking table combining heating, ventilation, and air purification with circulation) , while expanding into global markets through K-food cooking solutions, including Ramen cooking machines. Our products are currently used in over 1,900 restaurants and franchise locations in Korea, and we are a trusted company steadily expanding exports to global markets including Japan, North America, and Europe.

name: Pearl Group
description: Pearl Group is a leading manufacturer and exporter of spices and seasoning ingredients in Vietnam. Founded in 2006, Pearl Group has expanded its export market to over 100 countries across continents, successfully reaching even the most demanding markets such as Europe, the United States, Japan, South Korea, and the Middle East, etc.

name: Pecan Deluxe Candy Company
description: Pecan Deluxe is a family-owned, global leader in the developing and manufacturing of inclusions and ingredients (cakes, cookies, brownies, candies, popping boba, toffees, popping candy, granola, fruit preps/sauces, clusters, etc.) providing product solutions that appeal to many sectors of the food and beverage industry. We develop combinations of flavors, textures and aromas that are designed to delight our customer partners, whether a small operation or a large global brand.

name: Pedone Pinsa
description: Discover Pedone Pinsa —a next-generation pizza crust that’s lighter, crispier, and more digestible than traditional dough. Its airy texture and artisan quality make it the perfect canvas for bold, creative flavors.

name: Peggy's Bloodies
description: A concentrate for A Bloody Mary… and a flavor weapon for your food. Peggy’s Bloodies is a bold, small-batch concentrate designed for both cocktails and cooking. Build a premium Bloody Mary or Caesar in seconds—just add tomato juice or Clamato and your favorite spirits. Then take it beyond the glass: mix it into queso, tacos, burgers, marinades, dips, and more. One bottle makes up to 40 drinks, delivering consistent, full-bodied flavor with Peggy’s signature spicy kick every time. Crafted in the Midwest with no shortcuts and no guesswork, Peggy’s Bloodies gives you complete control—whether you like it mild, loaded, or bring-the-heat spicy. This isn’t just a mix. It’s a better way to build a Bloody—and a better way to cook with flavor. Stop by, try it, and see what you’ve been missing.

name: Pei Chen Corporation
description: Global Tea & Beverage Material Leading Manufacturer Founded in 1991, started from wholesale and retail, selling tea, fruit juice and concentrated juice. Has been a supplier of tea beverage materials for nearly 30 years, cultivating countless outstanding elites and establishing two professional exquisite tea material factories.. Has assisted countless international famous chain brand headquarters to grow and establish the leading position in the international tea supply. Certification:FSSC 22000、ISO 22000、HACCP、HALAL、FDA、TUV、TAP、TOC

name: PepsiCo
description: PepsiCo products are enjoyed by consumers more than one billion times a day in more than 200 countries and territories around the world. PepsiCo generated nearly $92 billion in net revenue in 2024, driven by a complementary drinks and convenient foods portfolio that includes Lays, Doritos, Cheetos, Gatorade, Pepsi-Cola, Mountain Dew, Quaker and SodaStream. PepsiCos product portfolio includes a wide range of enjoyable foods and drinks, including many iconic brands that generate more than $1 billion each in estimated annual retail sales. Guiding PepsiCo is our vision to Be the Global Leader in Drinks and Convenient Foods by Winning with pep+ (PepsiCo Positive). pep+ is our strategic end-to-end transformation that places sustainability at the center of our business strategy, seeking to drive growth and build a stronger, more resilient future for PepsiCo and the communities where we operate. For more information, visit www.pepsico.com , and follow on X (Twitter) , Instagram , Facebook , and LinkedIn @PepsiCo.

name: Perfect Venue
description: The #1 highest rated event management software thats easy-to-use, affordable, and makes event planning effortless.

name: Peri Peri Supply Co
description: Peri Peri is no longer a global secret—it’s a fast-growing demand across U.S. menus, and DiChickO’s is leading the charge. We produce the only authentic South African Peri Peri recipe made in America, delivering bold, craveable flavor that today’s customers are actively seeking. Since 2004, we’ve been serving restaurants around the world with foodservice-ready solutions, including gallon sizes available direct and through major distributors like Sysco, US Foods, Gordon Food Service, and Cheney Brothers. Our sauces are vegan, gluten-free, and shelf-stable for over two years, making them as practical as they are flavorful. In addition to our signature Peri Peri Sauce lineup, we’ve expanded into Peri Peri Rub, Peri Peri Honey, Peri Peri Mash, and whole and flaked peppers—giving chefs versatile ways to bring authentic heat and flavor to their menu. Product line includes (from Mildest to Hottest): 4 gal/case, and 12 oz. retail bottles: Peri Peri Marinade Peri Peri Mild Peri Peri Lemon Herb Peri Peri Wing Sauce Peri Peri Medium Peri Peri Hot Peri Peri Extra Hot Peri Peri Rub (Salt) (16, 32 oz. & 50 lb bulk)

name: Phenom
description: Phenom has a purpose of helping a billion people find the right work. Through AI-powered talent experiences, employers use Phenom to hire and onboard employees faster, develop them to their full potential, and retain them longer. The Phenom Intelligent Talent Experience platform seamlessly connects candidates, employees, recruiters, talent marketers, talent leaders, hiring managers, HR and HRIT — empowering diverse and global enterprises with innovative products including Phenom X+ Generative AI, Career Site, Chatbot, CMS, Talent CRM, X+ Screening, Automated Interview Scheduling, Interview Intelligence, Talent Experience Engine, Campaigns, University Recruiting, Contingent Talent Hiring, Onboarding, Talent Marketplace, Workforce Intelligence, Career Pathing, Gigs, Mentoring, and Referrals. Phenom has earned accolades including: Inc. 5000’s fastest-growing companies (5 consecutive years), Deloitte Technology's Fast 500 (4 consecutive years), 11 Brandon Hall ‘Excellence in Technology’ awards including Gold for ‘Best Advance in Generative AI for Business Impact,’ Business Intelligence Group’s Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards (3 consecutive years), The Cloud Awards 2025/2024, The A.I. Awards 2024, and a regional Timmy Award for launching and optimizing HelpOneBillion.com (2020). Headquartered in Greater Philadelphia, Phenom also has offices in India, Israel, the Netherlands, Germany and the United Kingdom.

name: Phillips Gourmet, INC.
description: Based in Kennett Square, Pennsylvania — the Mushroom Capital of the World — Phillips Mushroom Farms is the largest grower of specialty mushrooms and a leader in overall mushroom production. For over 90 years and through four generations, the Phillips family has put a focus on innovation and quality to provide consumers with the best-tasting mushroom. Phillips Gourmet, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Phillips Mushroom Farms, specializes in the development and production of proprietary mushroom formulations for multi-unit restaurant operators, club stores, and grocery stores and provides a market-leading variety of ingredients to meet the needs of virtually any food manufacturer.

name: Pick On Us, Inc.
description: Pick on Us is an industry leader of eco-friendly cuisine décor tools for chefs. For over 30 years we have helped creative chefs wow their guests by presenting their food on unique skewers and picks, made from disposable bamboo. Our eco-friendly products can be found in commercial kitchens all over the country. We service luxury hospitality chefs and caterers at resorts, casinos, restaurants, and country clubs. With over 7,000 clients and year over year annual sales growth, we have remained on the cutting edge of cuisine décor, spotting and setting the trends. Chefs love our products. Creative Chefs can't live without them.

name: Pine Visa Inc.
description: Pine Visa is a labor solutions company that helps U.S. businesses address workforce shortages by connecting them with international workers through employment-based immigration programs. The company works with employers to navigate government processes and bring in qualified workers for roles that are difficult to fill locally. Pine Visa supports both permanent and temporary workforce needs . Through programs such as the EB-3 Visa, the company assists employers in sponsoring foreign workers for long-term positions. It also helps businesses explore temporary or seasonal hiring options through programs like the H-2B Visa and H-2A Visa. The company’s work typically involves coordinating between employers, immigration processes, and international recruitment to help companies maintain stable staffing levels in industries facing persistent labor shortages.

name: Ping Solutions
description: Ping Solutions specializes in crafting unique and innovative merchandising products, whether licensed or original, aimed at evoking lasting emotions. Our team not only understands but embodies the consumer experience, ensuring each product resonates deeply. We have developed a diverse range of captivating products that enhance the customer experience in the restaurant and promotions sectors. Our esteemed clients include prominent names such as Burger King, Krispy Kreme, Little Caesars Pizza, Bonafont, and Home Depot. Furthermore, our expertise extends to the cinema industry. As the primary supplier to AMC Movie Theaters, we consistently design items that elevate the moviegoing experience.

name: Pinnacle Packs
description: Meet Pinnacle Packs – Your Trusted Partner in Paper Food Packaging Solutions Since establishment, Pinnacle Packs has emerged as a leading manufacturer and exporter of high-quality paper food packaging products, delivering reliable and sustainable solutions trusted across global markets including the USA, UK, and Europe. With a strong commitment to innovation, quality, and environmental responsibility, we help businesses upgrade their packaging standards while reducing their carbon footprint. Beverage & Food Packaging Solutions Paper Cups: Premium-quality paper cups designed for hot and cold beverages, ensuring durability, safety, and eco-friendliness. Ripple Wall & Double Wall Cups: Advanced insulation cups that provide superior heat retention and enhanced user comfort. Paper Bowls: Strong and leak-resistant bowls ideal for soups, salads, noodles, and takeaway meals. Paper Lids: Secure-fitting, sustainable lids designed for convenience and spill prevention. Paper Food Containers & Boxes: Durable and food-grade paper containers suitable for takeaway, delivery, and retail food packaging. Global Presence & Trust With a growing international footprint and strong client relationships, Pinnacle Packs is recognized for: Consistent product quality Timely global deliveries Competitive pricing Compliance with international food safety standards Our commitment to excellence has helped us build long-term partnerships with clients across multiple continents. Sustainable Packaging for the Future At Pinnacle Packs, sustainability is at the core of everything we do. Our eco-friendly paper products are designed to replace plastic alternatives while maintaining premium performance and usability. Why Choose Pinnacle Packs? Export-oriented manufacturing Food-grade certified materials Custom branding & printing options Scalable bulk production Strong quality control system Let’s Build Sustainable Packaging Together Partner with Pinnacle Packs to elevate your food packaging solutions with high-quality, eco-conscious products tailored to your business needs. Catch us live at : National Restaurant Association Show —Booth 12429, Lakeside Center, Chicago May 16-19 2026. Interested in deeper collaboration? Book a one-on-one meeting with our team between May 16-19 2026 to take your project from concept to reality with Nessco. +91 9811233377 +91 9971233377 info@pinnaclepacks.com

name: Pistakio
description: Pistakio aims to reimagine pistachios beyond snacking by creating products that are flavor first, easy to use, and endlessly versatile. We use real California pistachios and never any artificial flavors or colors.

name: Pizza Fellas
description: Pizza Fellas offers a line of high-end, par-baked frozen pizza crusts...all made in Italy. They are Vegan, Non-GMO, All Natural and 100% hand-stretched. In all of our doughs, we use our own natural yeasts and sourdough starters, which together with long proofing times, ensure that the crusts are light and easy to digest. Its very cost- and time-efficient, especially in todays times with the labor shortages, etc - plus there is no waste. You take from the freezer what you need. No need for a highly trained pizzaiolo. Pull from freezer, thaw, top, and bake! You will have a fantastic pizza that your guests will love!

name: PizzaMaster
description: PizzaMaster electric deck ovens are manufactured in Sweden by BakePartner. With over 95 different models and over 1,500 combinations, there is an oven to suit every individuals need.

name: PizzaSi
description: PizzaSi is the Auntetich Pizza Solution for Hotels, Venues, Stadiums, Pubs and Restaurants. Market leader for fresh Pizza bases to the hospitality industry in the UK, Europe, and US. Our Pizza solution is an innovative combination of pizza products, equipment, training, and support. Its all about the base(since 1996) - Hand made in Italy by real master pizzaiolo's, our award-winning pizza bases are your key to pizza and FB success! With a wealth of expertise and passion in the pizza and hospitality sector, coupled with foodservice partnerships, we are uniquely positioned to support your business with quality authentic pizza bases and products, progressive product development, menu engineering, staff training, marketing materials and support, both pre-launch and ongoing implementation Put it simply: you can prepare a pizza just like an Italian Pizzeria Introducing our newest innovation: the dunch Discover the anytime grazing and sharing experience, based on the Italian Aperitivo that will drive extra FB revenue!

name: PKN
description: Founder and CEO Laura Shenkar has long been dedicated to preserving freshwater ecosystems. During her work, she saw firsthand how pecan production motivates farmers to prioritize water conservation. Pecans are more than a delicious nut—they’re a cornerstone of native plant ecosystems, water sustainability, and regenerative agriculture. But there was a challenge: while premium half-shell pecans command high prices, smaller pecan pieces often went unsold, leaving farmers without a reliable market for them. That’s where PKN® comes in. Laura founded Lifestock and partnered with leading pecan growers to develop a creamy, nutritious pecan milk that upcycles even the smallest pecan pieces. The result? A rich, dairy-free milk that delivers on taste while supporting American farmers, reducing waste, and championing regenerative farming practices. With every glass of PKN , you’re helping create a sustainable future—one sip at a time. “Milk it for all it’s worth” used to suggest someone was being a bit greedy. But it can be a good thing. Especially when it comes to American pecans.

name: Placer.ai
description: Placer.ai is the most advanced foot traffic analytics platform allowing anyone with a stake in the physical world to instantly generate insights into any property for a deeper understanding of the factors that drive success. Placer.ai provides a range of easily accessible reports on-demand including property evaluation, market and chain level analysis, targeted search and demand planning. The breadth of perspectives empowers professionals across the restaurant sector to understand their audience, test new products and menus, promote efficiently, and improve restaurant operations in order to drive business success.

name: Plate-Mate
description: Plate-Mate models save space, time and money. Plate-Mate models help regardless of the kitchen size. All models allow dishes, and trays of varying shapes and sizes to be used easily. Make service for large groups a breeze. No more cold entrees served because of slow service from the kitchen. Our carts are mobile and accessories allow for tray service and covers.

name: Plenus Group Inc.
description: Manufacturer of value-added specialty frozen and refrigerated foods with an emphasis on soups, sauces and premium food items, celebrating our 25th year in 2027. We’re a family-owned company with minority business certification and decades of culinary experience. Our product lines feature over 100 quality food items offered to restaurants, foodservice customers, and grocery stores nationwide. PGI are also go-to product development specialists for private label items served, utilized, and sold across a broad range of foodservice and retail applications. We own two premier retail brands: Boston Chowda Co and Herban Fresh. Our products are widely used in the restaurant kitchens around the country, including soups, bases, sides, dressings, marinades, stuffings, and other entrée components.

name: PLS
description: PLS is an IT Integrator and Managed Service Provider based in Tempe, Arizona. Our team delivers best-in-class technology solutions to a variety of industries, including traditional and specialty retail, QSR and dining, WMS, healthcare, and hospitality. We can also provide long term support through managed services, help desk systems, repair depot programs, and field deployment and support.

name: PODIUM AMIDOS MODIFICADOS
description: Podium Modified Starches: Excellence in Food Ingredients At Podium Modified Starches, we are more than a supplier; we are a strategic partner dedicated to delivering high-performance solutions for the global food industry. With a deep expertise in cassava-based derivatives, we provide the essential building blocks that enhance texture, stability, and quality in a wide range of consumer products. Our Solutions We specialize in Modified Starch solutions specifically engineered for: Sauces & Condiments: Providing superior viscosity and stability. Sausages & Meat Products: Improving water retention and texture. Bakery: Enhancing crumb structure and shelf-life. Dairy Products: Ensuring creamy mouthfeel and syneresis control. In addition to our core starch line, we offer premium specialty products including: Cheese Bread Mixes and Starches: The perfect base for authentic, high-quality production. Cassava Fiber and Dehydrated Cassava: Ideal for fiber enrichment and clean-label formulations. Native Cassava Starch: Versatile and pure. Quality You Can Trust In an evolving market, safety and transparency are non-negotiable. All Podium products are Food Grade, Gluten-Free, and GMO-Free, catering to the growing demand for "clean label" and health-conscious ingredients. Our manufacturing excellence is backed by world-class certifications: FSSC 22000 (Food Safety System Certification) Halal Certified Kosher Certified Innovation and Responsibility Always attentive to the new demands of the food market, we work to overcome our limits through continuous innovation and personalized service. We believe that true success is built on socio-environmental responsibility and the genuine appreciation of our employees and partners. Our Identity Our operations are guided by a strong ethical foundation and a clear objective for the future: Values: Ethics, Respect, Innovation, Transparency, Competitiveness, and Entrepreneurship. Vision: To be a company recognized globally for its superior quality, strong partnerships with customers and suppliers, and the positive impact of our socio-environmental actions. Podium Modified Starches: Innovation, quality, and sustainability for the food industry.

name: Polar King International, Inc.
description: Polar King provides a portfolio of outdoor refrigerated solutions to meet your needs. Each solution is manufactured with the same seamless, fiberglass construction designed to endure the most rugged conditions and climates. This construction method and insulation material provides superior R-Values, lifetime energy savings, and lower maintenance costs. Polar King manufactures outdoor single & multi-compartment coolers, freezers, & dry storage walk-ins (reduce operating costs), and custom refrigerated trailers. All units are delivered pre-wired, pre-assembled, and ready to operate. Every Polar King unit allows you to design your own floor plan and enables you to locate doors and walls virtually anywhere. Polar King also offers a wide spectrum of optional accessories to make your walk-in even more suitable to your facility. Our Quick Build Program provides faster lead times on common sizes. Polar King offers walk-in, electric refrigeration rentals (reduce capital expense), available for short and long-term applications with nationwide availability. Fast becoming the clear alternative to refrigerated semi-trailers, units are more logically sized in 8’x10’ and 8’x20’ models and arrive on a tilt bed truck for quick and easy delivery. Combining efficiency, durability, and performance, Polar Leasing temporary refrigeration and freezer units provide storage flexibility and savings. Polar King is committed to providing durable and industry-leading refrigerated trailers with nationwide network of dealerships. Standard trailer sizes available include 6’ x 8’, 6’ x 12’, 6’ x 16’, and 6’ x 20’. Each with operating temperatures ranging from 0° Fahrenheit to +50° Fahrenheit. Polar King refrigerated trailers (on-the-go) bring an efficient 110V, commercial-grade, yet affordable solution. Save up to 62% on annual operation costs with a fiberglass refrigeration product versus that of a traditional metal panel. Whether you need trailers and rentals from a nationwide network, or custom-built walk-ins with quick build availability, our team can help. Additionally, at Polar King, we know that no two walk-ins are exactly alike. That’s why our doors are custom-built to fit any manufacturer’s walk-in cooler or freezer. Designed for maximum insulation, durability, and efficiency, our doors provide a seamless fit—eliminating gaps, reducing energy costs, and ensuring a safer, more sanitary environment. Whether you’re replacing an old door or upgrading for better performance, Polar King PolarGuard Doors deliver superior quality and hassle-free installation every time.

name: Polymeric Film & Bags Inc
description: Polymeric presents Toasteewrap thermal paper packaging. Patented technology replaces foil packaging to maintain 4hour+ hold times reducing labor and shrink. Microwave and Conventional oven safe! Available in sheets, premade bags and roll stock. Windows bags showcase your products!

name: Ponthier
description: Advocating the delicious, healthy and sustainable fruit is the mission that Ponthier has set itself to inspire its employees, producers, clients, and partners. The fruit processed in Ponthier’s production workshops makes a sustainable contribution to human wellbeing and nature conservation. We made this commitment because we wanted to act. Our job is to select and source the best varieties of fruit from all over the world and transform them into fruit purées, crushes and coulis made of natural ingredients, providing precise traceability and flawless food safety. Since 1946, we have been working in our workshops in Correze, France to preserve the original taste of carefully selected raw ingredients. We supply our products to all gastronomy professionals, including hotels, restaurants, patisseries, bars, specialist distributors and manufacturers for sweet and savoury creations, plus drinks. It is the original taste of a fruit that nature gives us if we respect it. We source exceptional, rare and exclusive fruit, harvested when ripe and processed with care as close as possible to the orchards, as quickly as possible.

name: Popmenu
description: As a leader in restaurant technology, Popmenu is on a mission to make profitable growth easy for all restaurants. Digital marketing, online ordering and on-premise technologies headline a powerful product suite infused with artificial intelligence (AI), automation, and deep data on guest preferences. The company consolidates tools needed to engage guests, serving as a digital control center for more than 10,000 independent restaurants and hospitality groups in the US, UK, and Canada. For more information, visit popmenu.com.

name: Portland Syrups
description: At Portland Syrups, we believe that every sip should be an experience, which is why we craft our award-winning coffee syrups and drink mixers with the highest quality, whole ingredients. Our syrups contain organic cane sugar, ensuring a delicious, bold flavor without an overly sweet taste. We never use artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives, and we prioritize sustainability and sourcing practices that align with our values. Our small-batch approach allows us to maintain the integrity of our ingredients, resulting in authentic, vibrant flavors that stand out.

name: Porto Brasil Tableware
description: Porto Brasil is a contemporary company with a passion for design. Since its founding 20 years ago, innovation and pioneering have been embedded in its DNA and are part of the daily operations at its factory located in Porto Ferreira, a traditional hub known as the National Capital of Artistic and Decorative Ceramics. Porto Brasil was a pioneer in the production of stoneware in Brazil, and it remains the only national company to industrialize it. We are also the first company in the world to use a digital printing system in this segment. This combination of quality and unique design has opened doors worldwide, making Porto Brasil a potential supplier for markets around the globe. To surprise and meet every need, Porto Brasil offers a vast portfolio of tableware products in a variety of styles, colors, shapes, and textures. These products cater to both haute cuisine and home use, democratizing access to a high-quality line and establishing the company as the leader in this market segment in Brazil, while also opening doors to new markets. Innovative and Sustainable Design The stoneware developed by Porto Brasil is a sustainable and innovative material with an exclusive formula made from the highest quality raw materials. Combining the latest in ceramic technology with the artisanal craftsmanship of our team, we deliver not only products with high mechanical and thermal shock resistance but also pieces with unique personality and character. High Mechanical Resistance The combination of the finest raw materials and a unique firing and hand-finishing process results in a product with superior quality and durability. Food Safe All products manufactured in Porto Brasil Stoneware comply with the worlds leading food safety regulatory standards regarding cadmium and lead release. Handmade Finish The combination of artisanal mastery with cutting-edge equipment and processes results in products with contemporary design and organic forms. These products blend aesthetics and functionality, offering UNIQUE pieces where variations in shape, relief, color, and minor imperfections are not considered defects but rather characteristic features of the products, highlighting their originality and authenticity. Sustainability The stoneware products are eco-friendly, made from natural and non-polluting raw materials. The use of high-quality raw materials in the formulation of stoneware ensures a product with high mechanical resistance and a longer lifespan, which helps minimize our ecological footprint. During the stoneware production process, a percentage of clay and glazes are reused. The clay that is not reused in our process is sent to partner companies who incorporate these materials into their production processes, thereby reducing energy and natural resource consumption. We also recycle the heat generated by our kilns during production, contributing to better energy efficiency. Our kilns use natural gas as fuel, reducing the emission of polluting gases into the atmosphere.

name: POSBANK Co., Ltd.
description: POSBANK is a Point of Sale and Kiosk manufacturer that provides the best quality products and services based on more than 25 years of experience and technology. POSBANK has been leading the POS industry standards with sophisticated design and high performance. We are always focusing on developing market-leading products with a spirit of challenge. As World's leading POS brand, POSBANK became a POS & Kiosk Manufacturing company that attracts the global market. We will always think and strive from the customers’ point of view with the service that fulfills the customers’ satisfaction on price, quality, and support.

name: Posiflex Business Machines Inc
description: Since 1984, Posiflex has designed and manufactured award-winning POS terminals and peripherals. Posiflex has since grown exponentially to provide not only full-service POS stations, but also versatile self-service kiosks, state-of-the-art mobile tablets, and scalable embedded PC solutions. Renowned worldwide in the retail and hospitality industries, Posiflex is a proven leader in POS hardware. With products purpose-built for multiple verticals, Posiflex is a solid solution for virtually any Point-of-Sale requirement. Over 30 patents and numerous awards have been won for product innovation, design and reliability. Offering full-service, self-service, mobile POS and internal service components, Posiflex is your dependable, resourceful all-points-of-service hardware provider. www.PosiflexUSA.com

description: Possmei is a leading Taiwan-based bubble tea supplier, providing high-quality ingredients and professional equipment to beverage businesses worldwide. Our product range includes tapioca pearls, fruit syrups, flavored powders, premium teas, toppings, aluminum cans, and complete shop equipment solutions. With branch offices in the USA and Germany, Possmei offers efficient global support, stable supply chains, and localized service for our international partners. We also offer RTD (Ready-to-Drink) beverages under our brand Popping Jacky , delivering convenient, innovative drink solutions that meet modern market trends. At Possmei, we are committed to quality, innovation, and helping our partners build successful beverage brands around the world.

name: Power Knot
description: Power Knot manufactures the LFC biodigester: an environmentally friendly food waste digester machine which cost-effective and a responsible way to dispose of food waste. The LFC biodigester takes discarded food in a commercial environment and transforms it into grey water that is safe to send to water treatment facilities. The food waste digester machine uses a series of processes that include microorganisms to break down food and transform it into liquid. There are no remaining solids to be emptied from the machine. The LFC biodigester is currently on the ninth generation build. Power Knot provides safe and economically sound waste solutions for commercial, industrial, and military customers globally seeking to reduce their carbon footprint. Our technologies are proven, available today, have been in reliable use for many years, and offer a payback period typically of less than two years. We design, develop, and manufacture waste solution products in our headquarters in Silicon Valley, California.

name: Prairie City Bakery
description: Founded in 1994, Prairie City Bakery is headquartered in Vernon Hills, IL providing premium, fully-baked, thaw-and-sell bakery solutions to the convenience store, foodservice, vend, and in-store bakery channels nationwide. Prairie City Bakery is the total package with a full line of award-winning products and a variety of individually-wrapped and foodservice solutions. Plus, Prairie City Bakery offers you our expertise and proven merchandising solutions to help you design a winning pastry program for your store.

name: Pratica High-Speed Ovens
description: Prtica, founded in 1991, is a global manufacturer of professional foodservice equipment specializing in advanced ventless high-speed ovens . With over three decades of innovation, Prtica has established itself as a trusted partner for restaurants, cafs, convenience stores, hotels, food halls, and chains seeking reliable, efficient, and profitable cooking solutions. Prtica's ovens are designed to help operators expand menus, standardize quality, and reduce labor costsall without the need for a full commercial kitchen. By combining impinged air, microwave, and infrared heating technologies , the ovens deliver consistent results in a fraction of the time of traditional cooking methods. Whether preparing sandwiches, pizzas, flatbreads, entres, or baked goods, operators can finish fresh, refrigerated, or frozen products quickly and efficiently. Key benefits include: Ventless Technology : Catalytic converters eliminate the need for hoods, allowing installation flexibility in virtually any environment. User-Friendly Operation : Intuitive touchscreen panels with picture- or icon-based recipe activation ensure consistency across staff skill levels. Smart Connectivity : Wi-Fi and USB compatibility make it easy to create, update, and share recipes across multiple locationsideal for growing chains. Minimal Clearance Design : Advanced cooling eliminates side vents and louvers, enabling ovens to be placed next to each other or against walls without compromising performance. Prtica's portfolio includes models designed for every operation size and type: Forza STi A 16-inch cavity oven, perfect for pizzas, flatbreads, and cookies. Fit Express, Fit SM Fit ST Versatile 12-inch ovens for sandwiches, meals, pizzas, and more. Fit XL A larger 16-inch cavity oven designed for high-volume operations. Rocket Express A powerful, compact, 14-inch-chamber option delivering speed and versatility. Every oven is built with durability, energy efficiency, and ease of maintenance in mindensuring operators can serve quality food faster, with less training, and at a lower operational cost. Prtica USA, headquartered in Lewisville, Texas, proudly supports customers nationwide with sales, service, and training. The company also provides access to regional test kitchens, where operators can experience the equipment firsthand and even test their own menu items. At the National Restaurant Association Show, Prtica invites attendees to discover how its innovative ovens can help your company Expand your menu, maximize your profits, and minimize your operational costs whether for a single-location caf or a multi-unit chain. Contact us to learn more and schedule your free demo session: info@praticausa.com | www.praticausa.com

name: PreciTaste
description: PreciTaste is an AI-powered, all-in-one platform that acts as your Digital Back-of-House Manager, optimizing every operational task in the kitchen. Our user-friendly, modular solutions bring forecasting, prep, production, and execution into one platform, reducing costs, streamlining labor, and empowering staff with real-time guidance. Restaurants can deploy the solutions that best fit their operations while consolidating multiple back-of-house tools into a single system. With fast deployment and minimal CapEx, operators see measurable improvements in efficiency, execution, and profitability within weeks. PreciTaste delivers industry-leading intelligence through advanced demand forecasting that accounts for weather, seasonality, LTOs, local events, and other demand drivers, paired with real-time analytics that provide deep visibility into store performance and team productivity. These insights are translated into clear, actionable guidance, directing staff with optimal prep and production quantities, brand standards, and up-to-date recipes so teams can execute consistently and efficiently across every kitchen.

name: Prepared Hero

Built on three core technologies— Embodied Navigation, Embodied Manipulation, and Embodied Interaction —Pudu Robotics has pioneered an “One Brain, Multiple Embodiments” architecture, establishing a comprehensive product portfolio that includes specialized, semi-humanoid, and humanoid robots . Currently, Pudu offers four major product lines: service delivery, commercial cleaning, industrial delivery and general embodied AI . Its solutions are widely deployed across industries such as retail, hospitality, manufacturing, real estate and property services, healthcare, entertainment and sport, education, and public services . To date, Pudu Robotics has shipped over 120,000 units globally, with a presence in more than 80 countries and regions .

Our commitment to quality and safety has earned us a reputation for excellence in the food industry, and we are dedicated to maintaining this reputation. At La Querendona, we understand that every customer has unique needs and preferences. Thats why we offer a wide range of packaging options to suit different retail and food service needs. Our salsas and sauces come in various sizes and containers, including packets, bottles, and gallons, making it easy for customers to choose the perfect option for their business. Whether youre a small retail store, a restaurant, or a large food service company, La Querendona has the perfect solution for your needs. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do, and we are dedicated to providing the best possible service to each and every one of our clients. -SYSCO VENDOR -US FOODS VENDOR -LABATT VENDOR SQF CERTIFIED

name: Red Onion
description: RedOnion.ai drives top line revenue by illuminating guest behavioral, frequency and transaction movement, as a byproduct of events that are occurring at every location. By finally understanding what activates a guest and what reactivates them, weve unlocked some of the most complex secrets that have plagued the restaurant industry since its inception. * What is the residual value of a new guest and how are they spending versus my base? * Is my recent LTO driving incremental visits or is it just cannibalizing the existing menu? * Did the recent campaign change behavioral patterns of menu choices? * How do I determine which LTO's drive trial versus drive ongoing affinity to brand? * Is my Loyalty program generating increased frequency or just discounting the check? * Can I identify test stores that would replicate results across the entire brand? * Is there a way to simulate what would happen if I remove a menu item? There is no more honest way a guest can talk to you about your brand than how they buy your food. We download 3+ years of POS transactional data then tie together integrated data points from payment, weather, marketing events, price changes, email, text, loyalty, online ordering, Wifi, demographics, coupons, wait list, reservations and many more, to provide analytics that help to illuminate theWHYbehind guest's behavioral movement in frequency, basket, spend, price, menu mix and more. Why guess when you can know. Ultimately, we help prove the impact of an event thru individual guest movement down to the trade area and guest, then apply that to a predictive technology for sales and menu mix that is second to none. Culminating in a smarter marketing spend, operational adjustments, employee performance and brand decision-making that is data informed versus from the gut. Within our platform we can ingest multiple brands of POS system data from a variety of countries and currencies to generate unique, user-friendly features that brings the answer to you versus having to search for it.Highly visual One-click features that perform strategic, machine learning analytics in areas like Price Elasticity, Menu Analysis, Guest Analysis (down to the individual guest), Event Vitals (macro of a promotion), Campaign Vitals (micro down to the guests that responded), Guest Segmentation, Bullseye Sales Patterning, Fans (multiple visit guests) and more. Additionally we layer on demographics, psychographics and purchasing tags to further understand lifestyle, hobbies and messaging relevancy in Sociogram. Our data trove of knowledge rallies departments together towards brand needs that are defined by your guests. All employees refer back to the same data points and analytics that are a byproduct of guest purchases to drive smarter strategic decisions. These analytics are a direct reflection of every transaction that happens every day. Let Red Onion Be Your Single Source of Truth Thru Data!

Reliancepak’s commitment extends beyond products to exceptional customer service. Our dedicated sales and technical teams work closely with clients to develop tailor-made solutions, optimizing packaging for protection, presentation, convenience, and sustainability. From concept to production and logistics, we ensure seamless communication and reliable delivery networks that support global distribution needs. With a robust presence in international markets and continuous investment in research and development, Reliance Trading Co., Ltd. invites partners seeking a trusted packaging supplier capable of innovation, quality, and environmental stewardship. name: Replenish
description: KI 2026 Awardee: Replenish Genesis™ Blender Replenish® is a revolutionary, fully integrated countertop blended-beverage system that redefines convenient, healthy eating by transforming flash-frozen whole-food ingredients into smooth, delicious, and nutritious beverages in about 60 seconds. Chef-crafted, functional blends are pre-packaged and sealed in a custom-engineered cup, eliminating all prep. At the heart of the system is the Replenish Genesis™ blender, powered by patented Hydroblend™ pressure-controlled, inverted, in-cup blending and Hydroclean™ automated self-cleaning and self-sanitizing. All blending occurs directly in the cup, eliminating product transfer and cross-contamination while delivering fast, consistent, premium smoothies. For foodservice operators, traditional smoothie programs pose operational challenges, including high labor costs, ingredient spoilage, inconsistent product quality, and sanitation risks. Replenish® replaces manual preparation, portioning, cleaning, and sanitation with a fully automated, closed-system blending platform designed for commercial throughput, food safety compliance, and minimal labor. Opportunity for Operators Demand for convenient, whole-food nutrition continues to grow as consumers seek healthier options in fast-paced retail environments. CDC data show that only 1 in 10 U.S. adults consumes the recommended daily intake of fruits and vegetables, while the global smoothie market is projected to exceed $23 billion by 2030 at a 9% CAGR (Grand View Research). Replenish® enables operators to participate in this high-growth category by eliminating operational complexity through seamless integration of automation, sanitation, and performance in a sleek, compact footprint. Replenish Genesis™ Core Advantages Self-Cleaning, Chemical-Free Sanitation Hydroclean™ automatically sanitizes all food-contact surfaces to NSF standards using an onboard water heater without chemicals or operator intervention. Lower Entry Cost, Faster ROI Reduced mechanical complexity lowers equipment cost. Existing freezer infrastructure can often be reused to accelerate payback. The Best Smoothies Patented mid-cycle blade inversion and pressure-controlled blending create consistent texture, taste, and product quality. Faster Blending Commercial-grade blending motor produces smoothies in approximately 60 seconds regardless of operator skill level. Smaller Footprint, Scalable Throughput Compact countertop design allows side-by-side Genesis units to increase throughput without expanding footprint. Operational Advantages Beyond the Blender Long Shelf Life Sealed frozen fruit cups maintain quality for over 12 months with near-zero waste. Easy Installation Requires only basic water and drain connections. Simple Operation Supports crew-serve, self-serve, or hybrid models with minimal training. Fast Restocking Less than five minutes per day is required to restock freezer inventory. Certified Clean UL Listed and NSF compliant to commercial sanitation standards.

name: ROCKY MOUNTAIN SPICE COMPANY
description: ABOUT US Rocky Mountain Spice Company is a supplier of bulk spices, ingredients and custom blends to all types of food-related businesses, from food manufacturers and wholesalers to restaurants and retailers. COMPANY HISTORY Rocky Mountain Spice Company was founded in Denver, Colorado in 1994. We started with a mission to provide fresh quality spices to restaurants and other food service facilities. As we grew, our customers realized that not only do we provide a high quality product, but with a level of care and passion unmatched in the industry. We quickly grew into creating our own blends and packaging creations, and we rapidly became a full-fledged dry ingredient blender and contract packager. SERVICES Food Service and Multiple Unit Locations For more than 20 years, we have been deeply involved in the foodservice business. Whether you have one location or 5,000, our expertise in dry blending ensures that your unique flavors will remain consistent no matter which locations your customers visit. Rocky Mountain Spice Company has relationships with the major distributors, and our logistics department takes care of the details to enhance the efficiencies of the distribution of your products to your restaurants. Contract and Private Label Packaging We have extensive retail packaging capabilities, including bottling, bagging, labeling, and assembly. We offer a turn-key approach in efficiently manufacturing your products, keeping overhead costs down, and allowing you to focus on the sales and marketing of your products. Whether we produce your proprietary recipe, or you choose from our extensive library, we can provide a comprehensive and complete private label program for your supermarket, specialty retail, or catalog business. Our Research and Development team is always available to assist in creating new flavors, and products as well. Our team can also arrange shipping logistics to your customers or distributors. Our program simplifies things for you to assist in the growth of your business. CERTIFICATIONS • BRC • Organic Certified • Kosher Certified • Gluten-Free Certified • Certified Green Business

name: Ronpak
description: Ronpak is a premier, full-service manufacturer specializing in custom-printed paper bags, packaging, and food wraps. Founded in 1947 by Nathan Sedley, Ronpak has evolved from its origins in pharmaceutical retail packaging to a leader in three key market sectors: Quick Service Restaurants (QSR)/Pharmacy, Distribution, and Promotional Packaging. QSR/Pharmacy : Ronpak offers a wide range of custom specialty bags, including lunch bags, pharmacy bags, liquor bags, bread bags, food service bags (carry-out and pinch-bottom), wraps, and more, catering to the unique needs of the QSR and pharmaceutical industries. Distribution : We focus on customers in distribution and outsourcing, tailoring packaging programs to meet their specific demands. Promotional : Ronpak helps customers enhance their packaging by utilizing it as an effective advertising tool, boosting brand visibility and consumer engagement. As demand for Ronpak’s products grew, Nathan Sedley transitioned full-time into the bag manufacturing business, laying the foundation for a nationwide operation. By the 1950s, Ronpak had expanded to a 90,000-square-foot facility in South Plainfield, NJ. This expansion was further bolstered in the 1970s with the acquisition of assets in Los Angeles, CA. By 1985, a new manufacturing plant was opened in Mira Loma, CA, ensuring coast-to-coast distribution capabilities. In the 21st century, Ronpak continued to grow, driven by rising demand for custom-printed packaging. In response, the company built a state-of-the-art production facility in Shreveport, LA, which went online in 2012. This was followed by the relocation of the company’s corporate headquarters to Shreveport in 2013. With strategically located facilities in South Plainfield, NJ; Mira Loma, CA; and Shreveport, LA, Ronpak is positioned to provide timely nationwide distribution, achieving a 99% on-time delivery rate. Now in its seventh decade, Ronpak continues to innovate, investing in cutting-edge printing technologies to meet its customers' growing needs. We understand that packaging is more than just a product—it’s an opportunity for branding and marketing. That’s why we continually strive to improve every aspect of our operations. Ronpak remains dedicated to building strong, positive relationships with our customers, suppliers, and within our own team. Our motto, “Think Outside the Bag for Solutions,” reflects our approach to delivering creative packaging solutions that drive our clients' success. Over 300,000 square feet of manufacturing space across three strategically located facilities in Shreveport, LA (corporate headquarters), South Plainfield, NJ, and Mira Loma, CA. Industry-leading printing and production capabilities. Nationwide distribution with redundant production, ensuring secure, on-time delivery. Trusted supplier with continuous ownership and stability since 1947.
