description: Roses Southwest Papers Inc. is a proud family‑owned and minority‑operated manufacturer based in the American Southwest since 1984. For over four decades, we’ve specialized in producing high‑quality bath tissue, kitchen roll towels, napkins, and a full range of away‑from‑home paper products trusted by businesses and communities across the country. Built on integrity, reliability, and hands‑on craftsmanship, we combine modern manufacturing with the personal touch of a family business. Our mission is simple: deliver superior paper products at a fair price while remaining flexible, responsive, and committed to the customers we serve. Please take a few minutes to review our introduction video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4zmKTb2us9I

name: Rosito Bisani
description: Decades of experience and knowledge in the Specialty Food Service Equipment industry encompasses sales, service, and support throughout North America with offices in both East and West Coast. Test Kitchen facility provides demo and training on pizza, pasta, gelato, espresso and more. Showroom with many types of equipment on display. Certified service technicians with many years of hands on experience in gas, electric, and HVAC. Customers range from mom and pop, chains to corporate accounts.

name: Rosseto Serving Solutions
description: Rosseto is a global company headquartered in Chicago, IL that designs and manufactures Serving Solutions for hospitality, retail and food service industries. We strive to be the trusted leader of innovative serving solutions, while setting new standards for buffet displays, beverage dispensers and dry food dispensers.

name: Rota Robotics LLC
description: Rota Robotics delivers autonomous service robots purpose-built for the foodservice and hospitality industry. We help restaurants, stadiums, arenas, hotels, and large venues operate more efficiently by automating repetitive, labor-intensive tasks such as food running, bussing, cleaning, and material transport. Our solutions are designed to support staff—not replace them—allowing teams to focus on guest experience, safety, and higher-value work. Rota Robotics provides end-to-end deployment, including consultation, mapping, training, implementation, and ongoing service support to ensure successful real-world operation in complex environments. We work closely with national brands, enterprise facilities, and regional operators to deploy robots that integrate seamlessly into daily operations. Our portfolio includes food delivery robots, cleaning robots, and utility robots that improve consistency, reduce strain on employees, and help operators navigate ongoing labor challenges. Our mission is to deliver automation that supports frontline teams, enhances guest experience, and creates measurable operational impact in real-world foodservice environments.

name: Rotella's Italian Bakery
description: Since our earliest days in Calabria, Italy when the Rotella family made rustic loaves of breads for the villagers, we have understood that baking high quality products begins with the finest of ingredients, integrated carefully with old world skills passed on from generation to generation. Five generations later, Rotella’s Italian Bakery, Inc. is among the industry’s most respected, high-volume specialty bakeries, blending state-of-the-art production with old-world technique. Whereas our forefathers baked several types of breads, we now produce as many as 400 varieties—including for national and wholesale distribution, as well as household-name brands you have long trusted. Our commitment to the customer will never waver: We work with only the highest-quality, most wholesome foodservice ingredients. And though we now produce in high volumes, we bake each product as though we were serving it at our own family table. But you don’t have to take our word for it. You can taste our word. Whether you enjoy our Italian bread, mild sourdough or honey flavored wheat bread, there’s a century of pride in every slice.

name: Route 66 International Inc.
description: We are the first seaweed factory on the East Coast​! Thousands of Sushi Chefs use our Premium seaweed across the US. We provide freshly roasted seaweed daily, with excellent quality control from our New Jersey factory.

name: Rouxbe Online Culinary Training
description: Founded in 2005, Rouxbe is the leading provider of online Culinary Training and Development, having trained over 1M chefs worldwide in 80 countries and in 5 languages. Rouxbe provides an innovative online training tool used by organizations to enhance their teams' skills. We offer Online, Self-Paced, Industry Recognized Culinary Technique Courses, Food and Kitchen Safety Courses, Speciality Menu Courses in Plant Based, Seafood, Baking & Pastry and Sushi and Front of House programs. Our partners use our programs to teach key on the job skills while offering continued education hours to those staff looking to further their culinary career. Rouxbe is the Online Learning Provider for three ACF Apprenticeship programs including Fundamental Cook, CFC, and Certified Sous Chef. Scalable, Flexible and Affordable - 100% Online with Chef Instructor Support - Hybrid and Onsite Instruction Options Available Rouxbe provides LMS Integration as well as Reporting Capabilities to track organizational engagement and employee performance. Recognized by ACF, WorldChefs and ACE Trusted by leading organizations like Marriott, Four Seasons, Elior North America, and Sysco.

name: Royal Cup Coffee and Tea
description: Royal Cup Coffee Tea is the proven leader in sourcing, roasting, blending and providing high-quality coffees and fine teas since 1896 and is the chosen partner for restaurants, hotels, offices and commuters across the country. We are rooted in a longstanding tradition of coffee roasting excellence and take pride in our unparalleled dedication to customer care. Learn more about Royal Cup Coffee Tea at royalcupcoffee.com or call 1800-366-5836.

name: ROYAL OF JAPAN, LTD.
description: We work with many suppliers throughout Japan. We handle over 3,000 items, including seasonings, fresh and dried foods, processed foods, sake and other liquors, confectionery, and kitchenware. We research your needs and find the best products for you. Our business concept is to export high-quality, authentic Japanese food products to the world.

name: Royal Pagoda LLC
description: We are a importer wholesale to food distributors and supermarkets.

name: Rudolph Foods Company
description: For over 70 years, Rudolph Foods has crafted bold, flavorful pork snacks including pork rinds , pork skins , cracklins , and chicharrones . Founded in 1955 by John Rudolph, and built on a family recipe still used today, we've grown into the world's largest producer of pork rind and cracklin snacks , with facilities across the U.S. and global partnerships. We also supply pork pellets for fresh-fried preparation in restaurants, bars, and retail delivering hot, crispy snacks in just 60 seconds. Whether your customers call them pork rinds , pork skin , cracklins , or chicharron , we help you serve crave-worthy flavor that stands out. Ready-to-fry pork rind pellets are a low-cost, high-margin menu addition that drives traffic and excitement. Toss in bold seasonings. Pair with sauces. Serve fresh for unbeatable crunch. Fun, fast, and full of flavor pork has never been this profitable.

name: Ruian Weixinli Food Machinery Co.,Ltd
description: Ruian Weixinli Food Machinery Co., Ltd was established in year 1996. The company possesses advanced production equipment, strong technical capabilities, strict quality inspection procedures, and a scientific management system. Our company always insist customer-centric and prioritizing quality belief. We specialize in manufacturing high-quality catering equipment and have developed into an international commercial kitchen equipment manufacturer, with main products including fryers, griddles, plucker, crepe maker, hot dog grill, potato peeler, steak grill etc., primarily for export to more than fifty countries and regions including the Germany, Italy, France, Australia, America and Southeast Asia. Weixinli will continue to work hard, breaking through obstacles in the intense waves of competition,and carefully bringing customers top-quality products with excellent cost performance. We eagerly look forward to joining hands with you to create brilliance together.

name: Runamok Maple
description: Ranked "BEST OVERALL MAPLE SYRUP" by the editors of Food & Wine. Runamok is a family-owned, Vermont-based maple producer innovating maple syrup for the breakfast table and beyond. We offer a unique line of pure, barrel-aged, smoked, and infused syrups made with the highest quality ingredients, elegant packaging, and a commitment to environmental and social responsibility. Founded in 2016, Runamok quickly captured the attention of the food world. Our syrups have been featured in Oprah’s Favorite Things, Saveur, Food & Wine, and more. As our reputation grew, so did our product offerings. In addition to our signature maple syrups, we introduced maple-based cocktail mixers and bitters, a full line of foodservice large-format and portion sizing, as well as innovative products like our one-of-a-kind Sparkle Syrup. Today, Runamok is recognized as the nation’s leading premium maple brand, available in over 2,100 retailers nationwide, and elevating restaurant menus and ingredient lists across the country. While we continue to innovate and expand our offerings, our commitment to quality and creativity remains at the heart of everything we do.

name: RX Music
description: RX Music started out as a technical provider of background music for restaurants, hotels, and retail. Music didn’t remain ‘background’ for long. Two decades of working with music has attracted brilliant music thinkers and creatives to our company. Today, we are a leading music consultancy in North America, helping clients across the globe create distinctive sensory experiences through strategic and creative use of music.

name: S.B. Trading Co., Ltd.
description: We, S.B Global is an expert in research, develop, design, manufacture & sales of disposable tableware in the catering industries. We have gained high reputations & trustfulness in the industries with our advanced technology & manufacturing artwork, strict quality control system, customized design with range of fter sales services. In China, our disposable tableware product is one of the leading brands in the industry. In Northern America, Europe, Middle East, South East Asia, Korea & Japan....., we are also having our market shares expanding continuously. We valued our enterprise belief. All our staff are worked same team spirit. " Customer oriented mind, technology innovations, be humble, to service". To provide customers with high tech, high qualities & diversified disposable tableware products is our mission. We have allied to work with lots of leading manufacturers, distributors, trading firms & high brand catering services providers & have built trustful & mutual benefit relationship after long years of cooperation. We have 3 Logistic Distribution Hubs in the North, East & South parts of China. We will continue to provide our customers with quality services. Sincere cooperation & mutual benefit business development is always our enterprise's value.

name: S.E.A. Global Pte Ltd
description: A leading manufacturing company from Singapore, we have built strong competencies in the manufacture of plastic-related, paper & other sustainable packaging products. For 50 years and more, we have supported food and manufacturing industries consistently.

name: Sabatino Truffles
description: Sabatino Tartufi is the worlds largest truffle company, acting as a importer, manufacturer, and distributor of both fresh and preserved truffles. The family-owned company established itself in 1911 in Umbria and now has offices all over the world, including Italy, Japan, Hong Kong,Canada, and the United States (New York City, Connecticut, Los Angeles, San Francisco, Miami, and Las Vegas).

name: Sadie AI
description: Sadie is the AI support platform designed specifically for hospitality. We help restaurants instantly answer guest questions, manage reservations and catering inquiries, and support team members with real time operational guidance. Available 24/7, Sadie reduces response times, improves consistency across locations, and frees up staff to focus on delivering exceptional service. Easy to deploy and built for restaurant workflows, Sadie fits seamlessly into your existing digital channels. Visit us at the National Restaurant Association Show in Chicago to see Sadie in action. Talk to us at Booth 5751 to set up your 1 month free trial.

name: SageNet
description: SageNet is a managed services provider specializing in connectivity, digital signage, and satellite solutions for distributed enterprises. With more than three decades of experience, SageNet supports many of the nation’s leading retail, restaurant, convenience store, and financial brands by designing, deploying, managing, and monitoring the technologies essential for day-to-day operations. SageNet’s portfolio includes managed network services, digital signage and interactive experiences, satellite and wireless connectivity, plus nationwide field and logistics support. The company manages more than 430,000 endpoints and provides 24/7/365 U.S.-based support through its Network Operations Centers and Security Operations Centers, as well as a centralized National Logistics Center. Headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma, SageNet has regional offices in Atlanta, Toronto, and Washington, D.C.

name: Saltverk Inc
description: Sustainable flaky sea salt from Iceland, used by top chefs and Michelin-starred restaurants worldwide

name: SAMMIC
description: Sammic is the market and thought leader in Food Preparation, Preservation, and Sous Vide Equipment. Known for innovative products with groundbreaking features, Sammic is inspired by the demanding needs of chefs around the world. Working directly with Chefs and Operators for ideation makes Sammic The Right Choice for all culinarians.

name: Samsink Stainless Steel Works
description: Founded in Foshan, China in 1995, we have spent over 30 years mastering the craft of stainless steel sink manufacturing. We produce high-quality stainless steel sinks for homes, restaurants, hospitals, and more, using durable, rust-resistant, and recyclable 304 and 316 stainless steel. In 2018, we expanded to Bangkok, Thailand, strengthening our global supply network. Today, we deliver custom OEM/ODM solutions to over 1,000 clients across six continents—engineered for reliability, hygiene, and long-term performance. We have two state-of-the-art production bases in Asia, equipped with eight modern production lines, ensuring a monthly capacity exceeding 100,000 units. By using only T304 stainless steel material, we guarantee the superior quality and durability of each product. This commitment to excellence ensures that every piece meets the highest standards.

name: San-J International
description: San-J International, Inc. is dedicated to the manufacture of premium Tamari soy sauce and quality Asian-inspired products. We endeavor to produce excellence in our products and services. In 1804 Mie, Japan, the Sato family boldly left their shipping business in the three rivers province to start a Tamari soy sauce company that thrives there to this day. Family tradition, Japanese cuisine philosophy, coupled with the inspiration from the hippie generation in the U.S., the family decided to introduce America to the flavor of Japanese Tamari. First importing Tamari to Natural and Asian grocers in the U.S. the business grew so that in 1987 the first U.S. San-J facility opened in Henrico, VA. Now expanding this location, it was chosen because of its similarity to Mie. Boldly moving towards the future again in a new country, San-J continues to embrace traditions and honors the memory of their origin at the three rivers by representing them with the three bars in our logo. Eight generations later the Sato family faithfully continues the mastery and tradition of Japanese fermentation methods and brewing of tamari. San-J is proud to be a trusted tamari soy sauce brand in the marketplace today. San-J Tamari Gluten Free Soy Sauce is made with 100% soy and no wheat for a richer, smoother taste. The Soybeans we use are all Non-GMO project verified sourced from the USA and Canada. It is brewed up to six months with no artificial preservatives, colors or additives. It is certified gluten-free, Kosher, Vegan, Non-GMO Project verified and FODMAP friendly. San-J also produces eight flavors of Asian Cooking Sauces which are also certified Gluten Free, Kosher and Non-GMO project verified, which are all made using our own Tamari as an ingredient.

name: Sandalyeci
description: Contract grade furniture manufacturer for the hospitality industry offering custom and line items including chairs, booths, tables, table bases and accessories.

name: Saputo Cheese USA Inc
description: Saputo USA (SUSA) is part of Saputo Inc., one of the top ten dairy processors in the world. Through the Dairy Division (USA), Saputo produces markets and distributes a vast assortment of cheeses. Furthermore, the Company converts, markets and sells a broad range of specialty cheeses and holds an important portfolio of import licenses for specialty cheeses manufactured abroad. SUSA also produces a variety of dairy and non-dairy extended shelf-life products. Additionally, Saputo produces, markets and distributes in the USA, and on the international market, dairy ingredients. Products are sold under a variety of the Company's brand names, as well as under customer brand names.

name: SATCO PRODUCTS
description: SATCO|NUVO® is a leading manufacturer of lighting solutions. Including traditional light bulbs, LED light bulbs, decorative lighting fixtures, functional lighting, controls, app-based systems and task lighting as well as lighting components. We have over 15,000 sku's. We are a lighting resource for nearly every application, including residential, restaurant, hospitality, commercial and industrial landscape. We pride ourselves in our ability to serve the lighting community as a single vendor solution. SATCO’s commitment to our customers means continually delivering on product, price and partnership. Whether manufacturing products to solve installation and application challenges or working with our customers in partnership to assist them in their projects, business and sales goals. Satco is a "solution-minded" company. Our customer is our top priority and ensuring our ability to service their needs through sustainable capacity, competitive pricing and solid business practice is central to our business. SATCO has over a dozen stocked distribution centers throughout North America including the Puerto Rico and Canada. We are one of only a few privately held companies of our size, and we attribute our success to our relationships and reputation. We “do the right thing.” Quality, trust, loyalty and hard work are the backbone of this business. These values are part of our legacy and are inherent in how we conduct business, the products we manufacture, the relationships we support and the people behind our business interactions. SATCO|NUVO offers lighting solutions that answer a number of challenges across a wide variety of projects and market segments. Our product lines incorporate the latest technology and integrated controls to meet evolving energy codes and field needs. Builders, franchisees, designers, architects, engineers, electricians and developers can find a variety of functional and decorative answers in both our fixture and lamp lines. Our on-line courses cover these popular and expanding lines. In addition, we offer seminars on lighting basics, retrofit issues and more.

name: Sauce
description: Sauce is your very own Online Ordering, Pickup and Delivery Team The country’s fastest-growing delivery solution, Sauce eliminates third-party commissions, reduces operational costs, and enhances the delivery experience for both restaurants and diners. With Sauce, restaurants can optimize their direct delivery channels while enjoying the benefits of a fully-managed solution - all without lifting a finger. From commission-free ordering to 24/7 personal delivery support and retention, Sauce gives you everything you need to run a successful online delivery business, while you get on with making great food for your customers Key Features That Set Sauce Apart: Commission-Free Ordering Channels: Keep more revenue and lower delivery costs. Unlimited Access to Delivery Drivers: Reduce delays and ensure on-time service. Live Mobile Order Tracking and Support: Improve transparency and customer satisfaction. Refund Reconciliation Management: Save big on operational costs. Retention & Acquisition Experts: Grow your direct orders and customer base. Customer Feedback Tools: Boost engagement and customer loyalty. SEO Optimization Tools: Get discovered faster online and attract more diners. By combining cutting-edge technology, seamless delivery operations, and a focus on customer satisfaction, Sauce enables restaurants to reclaim their profits and own their online presence.

name: Savage Bros
description: With over 170 years of experience supporting the confectionery industry, Savage Bros has built a legacy of quality and expertise. Today, we're proud to also serve the restaurant industry, providing equipment and solutions tailored to the unique needs of commercial kitchens. Our range of equipment includes versatile cooker-mixers and traditional and electric gas stoves designed for larger batches. From confectionery to soups and dips , our equipment helps streamline production, improve efficiency, and maintain consistent quality in both confectionery and restaurant kitchens.

name: Savannah Industrial Solutions
description: At Savannah Industrial Solutions , we believe custom fabrication should be simple, reliable, and built to last. From our facility in Savannah, TN, we design, build, and install millwork, stainless steel, refrigeration, and stone solutions for foodservice, retail, and institutional environments. With everything handled in-house, from engineering to delivery, you get one partner, one process, and equipment that’s made to perform.

name: Savi
description: Savi is the cloud-first video platform for modern distributed enterprise brands and operators, designed to streamline access to video, optimize physical operations, and grow profitability. Savi’s comprehensive product suite delivers a unified platform for emerging and established restaurants, convenience stores, and retail companies to save time, increase profitability, and ensure amazing customer experiences. Thousands of locations have switched to Savi to transform physical operations with future-proof cloud video, searchable data, and cutting-edge AI.

name: Savvy Merchant
description: Helping Merchants Keep More of What They Earn Our mission is to help you reduce those fees, improve your margins, and create a more predictable cost structure — without compromising on security or service.

name: SC Johnson Professional
description: The SC Johnson Professional® purpose is to bring innovative, quality products and services to professional markets with outstanding performance that respect the environment, create efficiencies, reduce inventories, simplify training and provide a positive user experience. This is built on a deep understanding of customer needs and a vision for ‘rethinking the professional experience’ with the user in mind. SC Johnson Professional® provides expert skin care, cleaning & hygiene solutions for industrial, institutional and healthcare users. The line includes a range of specialist occupational skin care products along with well-known SC Johnson® brands as well as innovative professional cleaning & hygiene products.

name: Scheer USA Distribution
description: We supply authentic, best-of-breed Brazilian BBQ Machines and Kitchenware for commercial and residential kitchens across the US. We are here to fill your needs and help open your kitchen!

name: School of Hospitality Leadership, East Carolina University
description: Who are we? School of Hospitality Leadership: The School of Hospitality Leadership (SHL) was established as a program in 1987. The school is now the largest hospitality school of its kind in North Carolina, and one of the largest in the Southeastern United States. Enrollment is between 350-400 students. Students can complete the Bachelor of Science in Hospitality Management either on campus or via distance learning. The students can concentrate in food and beverage management, lodging management and or meeting and convention management. Our goal is to educate and train our students to be the next generation of leaders in the hospitality and tourism industry. We also, offer a minor in hospitality management, a graduate certificate in hospitality management and or sustainable tourism, and a Master of Science in Sustainable Tourism & Hospitality. Hospitality is a high-growth career with much potential for qualified workers. Globally, hospitality and tourism continue to experience steady growth. In the United States, travel and tourism is the first, second, or third largest employer in 30 of the 50 states. Hospitality offers great diversity in its career opportunities and is known for promoting skilled workers quickly through the ranks to supervisory and management positions (www.ahlei.org/workforce/). The SHL is well positioned to help meet the demand for the next generation of hospitality and tourism leadership. State of the School of Hospitality Leadership: The mission of the School of Hospitality Leadership (SHL) program is to offer an outstanding hospitality education through teaching, research, innovation, outreach by delivering relevant experiences and products to students and creating strong ties with alumni and industry partners. It is notable that our faculty utilize a wide variety of engagement projects with businesses, local governments and non-profits. We at the School of Hospitality Leadership are providing the best in service business education and leadership. We as a school can provide service management, marketing and leadership for the breadth and depth of service industry and beyond. Obviously, our niche is tourism and hospitality with segments that include; lodging, food and beverage, meetings, events and tourism, recreation marketing and management, which include; public and private entities, i.e. man- made attractions, natural attractions and cultural attractions.

name: Schreiber Foods
description: Cooper® Sharp cheese, a brand of Schreiber Foods. The savory smell and smooth texture. That memorable taste. This is no ordinary cheese: it’s bold and delicate, creamy and sharp, and so perfectly melty. For more than a century, we’ve been winning the hearts (and tastebuds) of fans at deli counters throughout the Northeast. Now, Cooper is known as the cheese of choice for authentic Philly cheesesteaks. Our new sauce & shreds will bring the sharp Cooper flavor to your menu in efficient formats! Today the Cooper branded items are available for distribution in the United States, however Schreiber Foods Inc. is a global dairy company! If you have questions for Schreiber on cream cheese, process cheese, exporting and more please feel free to stop at the booth and a representative can assist.

name: Scotsman Ice Systems, a Welbilt Company
description: As the world's largest manufacturer of ice systems, Scotsman offers the most ice making choices and is dedicated to developing the next-generation ice production technologies. We back up quality products with The Ultimate Ice Experience. This starts with our world-class manufacturing facility in South Carolina, to our high quality and reliable products, and extends to our dedicated support network. From beginning to end, Scotsmans channel partners and customers get the products, service and support they deserve.

name: Scratch
description: Scratch Food Group creates delicious, accessible, and sustainable plant-based food products for retail, food service, and e-commerce. Our focus is on revolutionizing healthy eating with clean ingredients and creative culinary innovations. We are dedicated to offering products that meet the highest standards of health, taste, and sustainability, which align perfectly with our commitment to wellness, diversity, and environmental responsibility. Core Competencies: Plant-Based Product Innovation: Scratch’s products bring innovation to the table through bold flavors, unique blends, and healthy alternatives that appeal to both children and adults. Custom Food Solutions: Scratch works closely with food service operators to tailor our offerings to meet their specific needs. Operational Efficiency: Our products are designed for fast preparation and easy integration into existing kitchen operations, making them ideal for high-volume kitchens. Scalability & Versatility: Whether for a grab-and-go kiosk, a sit-down restaurant, or catering services, Scratch products are adaptable to various food service formats. Differentiators: Health-Focused & Allergen-Friendly: All of our products are vegan and made with non-GMO ingredients with plenty of gluten-free options, catering to a wide variety of dietary preferences and restrictions. Proven Performance: Scratch products are trusted by restaurants, hotels, universities, and event organizers. Community Engagement & Inclusion: Scratch champions diversity in the food industry by partnering with local suppliers and creating opportunities. Products: Vegan cookies, brownies, doughnuts/donuts, pancake mixes, baking mixes, spices, seasoning blends, batters, desserts, flours, nuts, dried fruit, juices and more.

name: Screenflex Portable Room Dividers
description: Reliable, portable partition systems built for institutional strength, lasting performance, and supported by service teams who prioritize long-term relationships

name: Scrub Daddy
description: Scrub Daddy is a popular cleaning sponge brand known for its distinctive smiley-face design and unique material. Here's what makes it stand out: Material : It's made from a proprietary polymer called FlexTexture , which changes texture based on water temperature: Firm in cold water for tough scrubbing. Soft in warm water for gentle cleaning. Design : The smiley face isn't just cuteit's functional: The eyes act as finger grips for better control. The mouth is perfect for cleaning utensils like spoons and spatulas. Features : Scratch-free on most surfaces (including non-stick cookware, stainless steel, and glass). Resists odors for weeks. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

name: Sea Watch International, Ltd.
description: Sea Watch International is proud to be recognized as the largest harvester and processor of clam products in the world, and one of the top seafood companies in the US. Founded in 1978 in Milford, Delaware, we harvest domestic sea and ocean clams to be further processed into breaded clam strips, frozen clams, canned clams, and New England Clam Chowder. These clams are MSC-certified sustainable and harvested under US Federal regulations by our company-owned vessels. Our high-quality clams are sold to your favorite household brands in various New England Clam Chowder recipes that you've enjoyed for nearly 50 years.

name: Seagrove
description: Alaska's Premium Shellfish and Seaweed Company. Seagrove is Alaska's largest vertically integrated multi-species mariculture company, producing premium oysters and kelp from some of the cleanest waters on earth. Founded in Southeast Alaska, Seagrove brings together science, scale, and deep local knowledge to deliver consistent, traceable shellfish to chefs, buyers, and distributors. Seagrove oysters are grown for chefs who care about flavor, reliability, and story - without compromise. Exceptionally clean shells, crisp, clean bite and smooth texture with no grit. Reliable year-round supply. Clean liquor and balanced bright brininess balanced by a fresh cucumber finish. Today, Seagrove cultivates oysters and kelp across more than 300 acres of permitted farm sites. Our mission: create a vertically integrated, multi-species mariculture company capable of producing world-class oysters and kelp while creating year-round jobs in Southeast Alaska. Shipping flexibility: Wet storage in Ketchikan enables Seagrove to ship the freshest oysters on limited notice. Alaska Gem oysters typically arrive within 24-36 hours of leaving the water. Seagrove's wet storage system holds premium oysters in continuously circulating, ADEC-certified growing water, This allows oysters to relax and recondition before packing and helps maintain consistent supply during rainouts or harvest interuptions. Wet storage improves shelf life by reducing post-harvest stress, lowering mortality during shipping, and ensuring a higher-quality product upon arrival.

name: SEB Professional
description: At SEB PROFESSIONAL, our passion for coffee fuels millions of people as they take on their day. Through SEB PROFESSIONAL's three brands WMF, Schaerer, and Curtis - we support both the commercial and non-commercial food service industry, as well as grocery, convenience retailing and more. Our machines can be found virtually anywhere coffee can be consumed out of the home. In fact, youve probably used or had coffee from our machines at some point this week if you've grabbed a coffee away from home. As the Market Leader in premium automated coffee and espresso solutions, as well as drip coffee, we combine big ideas with innovative ways of solving the most pressing problems in our industry to build the highest quality brewing machines. Our job is to make your job - creating memorable coffee experience to your customers - easy. Here, at SEB PROFESSIONAL, it's not just a cup of coffee; it is countless hands building, thinking, and creating that sparks passion around the world.

name: Secret Aardvark Trading Co.
description: We are a small operation in Portland, Oregon. We started peddling our sauces at the Portland Farmer's Markets in 2004. Scott Moritz, the founder of Secret Aardvark lost his battle with pancreatic cancer in 2009. We're proud to continue his legacy by sharing unique, flavorful, and affordable sauces. From an original line up of 10,we narrowed our product line down to three epic sauces: Aardvark Habanero Hot Sauce, Drunken Garlic Black Bean, and Drunken Jerk Jamaican Marinade. In 2018 we added our newest product, Serrabanero Green Hot Sauce. We're now in over 500 roadhouses and eateries across the nation, proudly gracing tables where the food matters. We are in a number of retail locations, on Amazon, and sold thru our online store. You can also find us internationally. Our website can help you find us. No secret decoder ring required! Price per ounce, our prices are competitive with national and local brands, but we beat them on flavor hands down!

name: Seeker Pitch
description: Yes, that description is 2,820 characters (including spaces), which is safely under the 3,000-character limit for the National Restaurant Association show's company profile. Here is the finalized version again for you to copy: SeekerPitch: The AI-Powered Evolution of Operations Hiring In the restaurant and hospitality industry, your leaders are your brand. But traditional hiring is reactive, expensive, and often results in a "culture mismatch." SeekerPitch is the 21st-century alternative to outdated job boards and high-cost agencies, designed specifically to help operations leaders build elite, consistent pipelines. AI Agents That "Hunt" While You Run Your Business Traditional recruiting waits for applications. SeekerPitch is proactive. Our proprietary AI Agents go "hunting" across 50+ passive channels, niche communities, and professional networks. We identify and engage the top 1% of operations talent—the high-performers who aren't looking at job boards but are the perfect fit for your General Manager, Kitchen Manager, or Multi-unit leadership roles. The "Always Learning" DNA Framework Every restaurant group has a unique "vibe" and performance standard. SeekerPitch doesn't just match keywords; we map your organization’s unique Job DNA and Company DNA. * Learns Your Culture: Our AI builds a profile of what "great" looks like in your specific environment, factoring in leadership styles and team structure. Gets Smarter With Every Hire: The system refines its intelligence after every interview and hire. Because our AI is always learning, your 10th candidate "drop" is significantly more targeted than your first. Vetting for the "Un-resume-able" Soft Skills A resume can tell you where someone worked, but it can’t tell you how they handle a Friday night rush. We pre-vet candidates for the five essentials of hospitality leadership: Composure: Staying calm under operational stress. Coaching Instinct: Developing the next generation of frontline talent. Conflict Resolution: Managing guest and staff issues with grace. Accountability: Owning the P&L and the guest experience. Communication: Driving clarity across the front and back of the house. Through short-form video and AI-scored behavioral interviews , you see the person behind the paper before the first meeting ever happens. Why Hospitality Leaders Choose SeekerPitch: Massive ROI: Eliminate 20-30% agency fees and save $20k–$30k per hire. name: SEM PLASTIK SAN. VE TIC. A.S.
Sempio Food Company
description: Brought to life in 1946, Sempio remains Korea’s number one household brand. We specialize in authentic fermented foods and creating delicious Korean flavors that can be used in cooking world-wide. Sempio products are recognized by industry experts for their outstanding quality, thanks to our continued use of superior technology combined with traditional techniques.

name: Sephra USA LLC
description: Sephra, founded in the early 2000s, is a leading brand specializing in end-to-end consultative sales services for equipment and ingredients used in creating and preparing a variety of dessert concepts. These include Chocolates, Chocolate Fountains, Chocolatier environments, Dessert Beverages, Crêpes, Donuts, Waffles, Popcorn and more. Sephra's comprehensive product range has made it a go-to choice for professional caterers, event planners, and home users alike. With its Headquarters in Scotland, UK, and a location in Pennsylvania, the company operates globally, reaching markets across the Americas, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia, and Oceania both directly through our network of distributors. Sephra’s expansive reach and expertise make it an ideal partner for dessert-based businesses, events and homes worldwide. Our history expanded... Sephra embarked on its remarkable journey in the USA back in 2003, pioneering the art of chocolate fountains and introducing groundbreaking innovations that transformed ordinary events into extraordinary, unforgettable occasions. From the very beginning, Sephra set itself apart as the only brand with sanitation approval, ensuring that its chocolate fountains not only delighted but also met the highest standards of safety and hygiene. On the other side of the Atlantic, a parallel narrative was unfolding in the UK. It all began in a modest garage, where the concept of renting out chocolate fountains ignited a fervent passion for sharing indulgent moments. The pivotal year of 2008 marked a turning point when Sephra Europe's Managing Director recognized the immense potential and forged a partnership with the original Sephra in the USA, becoming a distributor and heralding the birth of Sephra Europe. Sephra Europe's journey continued to flourish, evolving from merely distributing chocolate fountains to offering an ever-expanding array of delectable dessert products. Fueled by an unwavering commitment to quality and a relentless pursuit of innovation, Sephra Europe captivated a broader audience. The narrative reached a significant milestone in 2019 when Sephra Europe acquired the brand from the original Sephra in the USA. This acquisition allowed Sephra Europe to further solidify its status as a trailblazer in the industry. From its humble beginnings in the world of chocolate fountains to its evolution into a comprehensive one-stop-shop dessert solution provider, Sephra's journey serves as a testament to the profound impact of passion, innovation, and unwavering commitment to excellence. The legacy of the brand continues to unfold, driven by an unrivalled commitment to enhancing the joy of sharing delectable moments with loved ones.

name: Serv-Ware
description: At Serv-Ware, we believe building better kitchens should never mean compromise. That's why we deliver high-quality, value-priced foodservice equipment backed by fast, no-hassle warranty support. Our valued partners and end-users count on us for products that perform, service that shows up, and reliability they can trust every day. Serv-Ware, along with Midea Commercial Microwaves, is dedicated to providing the foodservice industry with reliable and efficient equipment that will help build a successful food business. From our beginnings, we've been more than just a supplier; we're a partner invested in your success. Whether you run a single food truck or a multi-location restaurant group, Serv-Ware delivers the tools, expertise, and support you need to keep your operation moving forward.

name: Service Ideas, Inc.
description: For more than 80 years, we’ve been both product makers and foodservice operators, so we understand that great food and beverage service is about the entire experience. What you serve matters just as much as how it’s served. That’s why we design and manufacture products we’re proud to use ourselves—products that elevate presentation, performance, and the customer moment. By listening to and collaborating with customers worldwide, Service Ideas delivers innovative, high-quality solutions that create value for operators and provide better experiences for guests.

name: Service Physics
description: Visit us at NRA 2026: Booth #7365, May 16-19 in Chicago. ️ Swing by our podcast booth! Book a time to chat with us: https://sp-nra-2026.vercel.app/book Data-backed, people-powered service transformation. Service Physics helps restaurants, healthcare businesses, and multi-location service brands eliminate bottlenecks, streamline operations, and drive business value. We don't just advise — we roll up our sleeves, work with your teams, and turn strategy into action. Trusted by: Panda Express, Peet's Coffee, Subway, CAVA, Applebee's, Topgolf, Krispy Kreme, MOD Pizza, Sweetgreen, Dave's Hot Chicken, IHOP, Smashburger, and more. What we do: Operations Strategy Service Delivery System Design Management System Design Time and Motion Studies Customer Experience Consulting Program Management

name: ServSafe
description: For over 30 years, ServSafe has been the most trusted name in food safety training and risk management. Our unique programs have been developed and refined by experienced foodservice industry experts and specialists from regulatory agencies and academia. Together with the National Restaurant Association Education Foundation, our goal is to lead America's restaurant industry into a new era of prosperity, prominence, & participation, enhancing the quality of life for all we serve.

name: Seviroli Foods
description: Since 1960, Seviroli Foods, LLC has been dedicated to the craft of producing the finest filled pastas on cutting edge equipment from Italy using artisan ingredients. Our approach focuses on the needs for our Foodservice, Club Store, Restaurant Chain and Retail partners throughout the USA. Innovation and Collaboration are paramount to meeting our customers' expectations. Your needs are important to us, and we will provide Category Leadership to help drive your sales. Our product line includes filled pastas such as Tortellini, Ravioli, Stuffed Shells, Manicotti, Lasagna Sheets and Single Serving, as well as imported Bronze Die Italian Short and Long-cut Pasta. We also manufacture frozen Specialty Sauces and our unique line of Vertullo imported Specialty Foods complements our capabilities. Our brands are designed for meeting the specific needs for all channels and customers, including our Seviroli, Bernardi, Mama Rosie's, D'Orazio, Vertullo and Italian Feast brands. With headquarters in Garden City, NY and operating Four Production Facilities and our Global Sourcing capabilities, we are committed to providing insightful category extensions and innovative solutions for your business. Seviroli Foods...One bite, and you know it's authentic.

name: Shademaker
description: The architectural essence of Shademaker umbrellas began with a unified design, form, and structure. From this foundation, Shademaker elevates its offering of signature looks by introducing well-crafted styles with advanced functionality and durable materials. With exacting attention to detail, Shademaker delivers the highest standards of quality, innovation, and unparalleled luxury. name: Shandong New Ideas Life Technology Co., Ltd.
description: New Idea specializes in customizing the production of disposable coffee and tea packaging materials. It offers a one-stop service including design, production, storage, and distribution. name: Shandong Runjia New Material Co., Ltd.
description: Shandong Runjia New Materials Co., Ltd. was established in 2015 as a professional factory and manufacturer of baking parchment paper in China. Our production facility spans a total area of 1 acre and features a modern workshop of 35,000 square meters. With 42 production lines in operation, we achieve an annual output of over 20,000 tons. The company specializes in producing a variety of products, including baking paper, baking tray paper, air fryer paper, steamer paper, wrapping paper, and household aluminum foil paper. We have established partnerships with more than 20 renowned supermarkets and companies, such as KFC, McDonald's, Starbucks, Walmart, and Metro. Our certifications include BRC, SEDEX, ISO 9001, KOSHER, and FSC, and our products are FDA and LFGB certified. Our baking paper is made from food-grade, 100% virgin wood pulp. It features a double-side silicone coating that provides excellent grease-proof, water-proof, and non-stick properties. The paper can withstand high temperatures of up to 230°C (450°F). Additionally, we offer OEM services for baking paper rolls and pre-cut baking paper sheets.

description: SHANG WEI, known as the most valuable global market supplier in Malaysia, specializes in manufacturing premium food packaging container using different materials, including PSP, OPS, EPS, PP, PA, KRAFT, and more. The factory covers an area of 60,000 square meters, employs over 300 staff, and achieves an annual production value of nearly 200 million RMB, producing close to 8,000 tons of aluminum foil products per year.

description: Shanghai EGS Industry Co., Ltd. is a professional enterprise that provides one-stop service for customers. Products cover food packaging materials and equipment, new biodegradable materials, automobile and motorcycle parts, printing material and equipment and other fields. Our business covers 88 countries and regions across five continents and more than 120 partners. With the development and expansion of the company's business, Shanghai EGS Industry Co., Ltd. was established in 2022 to integrate the business as a team specializing in trade business. Relying on the business team and supply chain system integration in the industry with nearly 30 years of rich experience in the industry, we have established long-term and stable cooperative relations with a number of domestic and foreign customers. At present, our team has absorbed dozens of talents and partners from all over the world, and has several advanced production lines to meet the needs of different commodities. “EVERYONE GETS SATISFIED” This is not just a slogan, but also a business philosophy throughout the company. The purpose of the company is to take customer satisfaction as the first element, and strive to create value for each customer, to create a reciprocal and win-win future!

name: Shanghai Hi-Dolphin Robot Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Established in 2018, Shanghai Hi-Dolphin Robot Technology Co., Ltd is a worldleading high-tech enterprise, a pioneer in Shanghais AI and Internet+ fields, also the municipal postdoctoral research hub. Its flagship product COFE+, an All- Intelligent, Multi-Category Coffee Robot, is the worlds first brand to iteratively upgraded to the six generation. It is also the only coffee robot globally to be certified by authoritative organizations across Europe, the United States, the Commonwealth, Australia, New Zealand, the Middle East and the United Nations. COFE+ holds the sole quality certification issued by the U.S. FDA, and the only one in the EU that meets with its stringent environmental regulations. It's also China's first coffee robot to win the European Top Design Product Award, the US Product Innovation Gold Award, and China's Innovation Gold Award slam, boasting over 110 domestic and international patents to stand out among competitors. COFE+ is China's first coffee robot to be exported to nearly 50 countries across Europe, America, the Middle East, and Australia, service covered Fortune 500 companies and industry leaders. It's also Chinas first batch of coffee robots to obtain the fresh food business License, and a national onelicense- for-all. As the worlds leading full-function coffee robot, COFE+ occupies only under 2.35 square meters, offers two specialty coffee bean options, two types of milk, two cup sizes, and three temperature modes, with fully customizable concentration, temperature, sweetness, ice level and brew weight. Beyond freshly ground coffee, it can produce over 65 varieties of fresh beverages across seven categories. Featuring thousands of recipes from 197 countries, it lets customers enjoy flavors around the world. Each cup takes about 50 seconds to make, delivering thousands of cups a day with near-zero quality variation. COFE+ perfectly replicates 100% of champion barista techniques while delivers 100% premium caf-quality taste. It's the new generation "All-Round Champion" of the Global Coffee World. Over the past 6 years, COFE+ robotic coffee kiosks have been operated in more than 1,000 scenarios, including shopping malls, office buildings, hospitals, universities, airports, high-speed rail stations, scenic spots, and and pedestrian streets. With over a thousand stores in hundreds of cities, it boasts the most extensive deployment, the highest market share, the longest operating time, and the most reliable stability testing globally. Champion quality at an affordable price has garnered widespread praise from consumers. With extensive partnerships with Fortune Global 500, as well as industry leaders, COFE+ has expanded its reach globally. From the National University of Singapore to Denver Airport, from Melbourne shopping malls to Swiss tourist attractions, from Europe, America, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia to Oceania.

description: We are please to present ourself as leading provider and manufacturer of disposable and food packaging products from China. The main business includes PHA, PLA fully biodegradable disposable cutlery, starch-based tableware, and other injection-molded products. The annual export volume exceeds US$3 million. It boasts professional production lines, an independent mold development department, injection molding department, marketing department, etc. Advanced equipment, top-tier management principles, rigorous product appearance design, mold development, injection molding, packaging, and other quality inspection procedures are employed to ensure product quality.

description: Shanghai Langtuo Intelligence Technology Co.,Ltd, was founded in 2007, our main products including ice maker, automatic tea beverage dispenser, refrigerator, tea extractor, commercial working table. description: Our company is an integrated enterprise specializing in the R&D, production, sales, and service of tea beverage equipment. Nice products,ideal pick!

name: Shanghai Shenwei New Materials Co., Ltd
description: Shanghai Shenwei New Materials Co., Ltd. is a comprehensive service provider that specializes in the hotel and catering industry. It integrates trade and services. Its headquarters is located in Shanghai, China. The company's core services cover all types of catering businesses such as star hotels, chain catering brands, and social catering stores. It has established a complete and diverse product system. The products sold include food contact grade special tableware, commercial stainless steel tableware, and products for various scenarios of household appliances. The company has always adhered to the core business philosophy of "reliable quality, reasonable price, and efficient service". Food safety and product quality are regarded as the lifeline of the company's development. The company strictly selects high-quality supply chain resources across the country and has established a strict supplier admission and assessment system. All products strictly follow national food safety regulations and commercial kitchen equipment industry standards to ensure that each product can meet the high-intensity usage requirements of commercial scenarios and safeguard the first line of defense for catering food safety. As the domestic hotel and catering industry continues to upgrade towards quality, refinement, and greenness, Shanghai Shenwei New Materials Co., Ltd. will continue to anchor the industry's development trends. With new material innovation technology as the core engine, it will continuously refine product quality, optimize service systems, and upgrade solutions, continuously providing products and services that better meet market demands. The company will always work together with all partners, empowering the industry with professionalism, building a reputation with quality, and fully contributing core strength to the high-quality upgrade and sustainable development of China's hotel and catering industry.

name: Shantou Rongya Packaging Industry Co., Ltd
description: Shantou rongya Packaging Industry Co.,Ltd., established in 2009, is a manufacturer and exporter of disposable tableware integrating design, development and sales. In September 2015, it was successfully listed on the overseas Chinese board in Guangdong high tech equity trading center, enterprise code:280358, enterprise abbreviation: rongya tableware. It has won the honorary title of "contract abiding and trustworthy enterprise of Guangdong Province" for three consecutive years. . In order to ensure customer satisfaction, we pay more attention to product safety production. We sincerely invite customers at home and abroad to negotiate and cooperate.

name: Share-ify
description: Share-ify helps food companies simplify compliance, strengthen supplier management, and reduce risk across increasingly complex supply chains. Built specifically for the food industry, Share-ify’s cloud-based software platform gives restaurants, distributors, manufacturers, and retailers a centralized way to manage food safety documentation, product information, supplier approvals, traceability records, quality programs, and recall readiness. With powerful tools for regulatory compliance, supplier collaboration, risk assessment, and AI-supported decision-making, Share-ify helps food safety, quality, procurement, and supply chain teams work smarter, respond faster, and maintain greater confidence in the products moving through their operations. From managing critical documents to improving visibility across business partners, Share-ify provides the structure, transparency, and intelligence companies need to protect their brands, support compliance, and build a safer food supply chain. Visit Share-ify to learn how our platform can help your team move beyond spreadsheets, disconnected systems, and manual follow-up — and toward a more connected, proactive approach to food safety and quality management.

name: Sharp Electronics Corp.
description: At Sharp Home Electronics Company of America (SHCA), we bring decades of microwave leadership to both the foodservice and home kitchen markets. Our commercial cooking business is built around high-performance microwave ovens designed for restaurants, convenience stores, cafés, and other fast-paced foodservice environments, delivering the speed, consistency, and reliability operators depend on every day. That same heritage of innovation extends to our premium home appliance portfolio, which includes built-in Microwave Drawer™ ovens, high-speed ovens, steam ovens, and induction cooktops. Across both commercial and residential kitchens, Sharp creates cooking solutions that pair proven performance with thoughtful design, making everyday cooking more seamless, more confident, and more rewarding.

name: SHENZHEN ELECTRON TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD.
description: Shenzhen Electron Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2008, is a professional manufacturer of digital signage and smart display solutions with strong OEM and ODM capabilities. Our products are widely used in the restaurant industry, including self-ordering kiosks, POS cashier displays, handheld ordering tablets, and kitchen display systems, helping restaurants improve efficiency and customer experience. We also provide advertising displays, meeting room booking panels, digital calendar screens, smart home control panels, and healthcare bedside displays. All products comply with international certifications such as CE, FCC, RoHS, UL, and UKCA. With a strong R&D team and annual production capacity exceeding 5 million units, we are committed to delivering reliable, innovative, and customized display solutions for global partners.

name: Shenzhen Shiyun Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Shenzhen Shiyun Technology Co., Ltd. is the parent company of the TENCLOUDS division and the owner of the TENCLOUDS trademark. Headquartered in Shenzhen, Guangdong Province, one of China’s fastest growing modern cities and a global hub of innovation, the company’s culture and strategic vision are strongly influenced by the dynamic spirit of Shenzhen. As an integrated industrial solution provider, Shenzhen Shiyun is more than a product supplier; it delivers one stop, fully customized services to meet the specific needs of its customers. Shenzhen Shiyun's current business scope includes: - Disposable restaurant supplies, managed under the TENCLOUDS division - Frozen vegetables, canned fruits, and other food categories - Key infrastructure products for foodservice supply chains, such as large scale cold storage systems and heavy duty shelving solutions - Smart technology solutions designed to improve operational efficiency and safety Within this ecosystem, TENCLOUDS operates as a specialized division of Shenzhen Shiyun, focused on providing a comprehensive range of food packaging and food related disposable products to global markets. Originally established as a paper product manufacturing facility in Wuhan, China, TENCLOUDS was acquired and fully integrated into Shenzhen Shiyun in 2022. Today, it offers dependable, high quality solutions made from a diverse array of materials, including molded fiber, paper, plastic, aluminum foil, and other innovative options, to address the varied demands of the foodservice industry.

name: Shenzhen Zhilai Sci And Tech Co., Ltd.
description: Established on November 5th, 1999, Shenzhen Zhilai Sci. and Tech. Co., Ltd. (\"Zhilai\") became a listed company in A-share GEM on April 22nd, 2019 (stock name: Zhilai Tech; stock code: 300771). The company is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing, sales and service of smart storage and delivery, and a comprehensive solution provider with strong capabilities in research and development, and global supply. Zhilai has been focusing on the smart storage and delivery industry for more than 20 years with a wide range of businesses, such as smart storage equipment, smart delivery equipment, vending machine and other automated equipment for the markets of logistics, digital medical care, e-commerce, retail and smart grid. With years of experiences, complete R&D system and strong manufacturing capabilities, Zhilai has launched a series of high-quality and competitive products to meet a variety of customer demands, such as parcel locker, electric storage locker, vending machine, smart fresh food locker, and medical behavior management system for operating room, etc. Zhilai products have been widely used in education, medical care, real estate, government, retail, and other areas, which have been highly recognized in China, North American, European and other markets.

name: Shift4
description: Shift4 (NYSE: FOUR) is boldly redefining commerce by simplifying complex payments ecosystems across the world. As the leader in commerce-enabling technology, Shift4 powers billions of transactions annually for hundreds of thousands of businesses in virtually every industry. For more information, visit www.shift4.com .

name: Shijiazhuang Chimi Packaging Products Co., Ltd
description: Shijiazhuang Chimi Packaging Products Co., Ltd. (Chamepak) is a comprehensive brand service provider specializing in food and beverage packaging for the catering, coffee, tea, and bakery industries, integrating design, production, and sales. Leveraging solid industry experience and continuous technological innovation, Chamepak has built deep expertise in the food packaging sector and served as a long-term stable supplier to many renowned domestic and international brands, including Starbucks, Burger King, Tim Hortons, and Applebee's. Chamepak is supported by a highly experienced team of printing and bag-making technicians. Equipped with multiple internationally advanced automated paper bag production lines, flexographic printing systems, and several Japanese Komori five-color offset printing machines, we deliver high-standard and consistent food packaging solutions. Our main products include paper bags, cups, bowls, boxes, bakery packaging, fried chicken and burger boxes, food wrapping paper, and etc, serving a wide range of catering and food retail applications. In terms of quality and safety management, Chamepak has obtained multiple internationally recognized certifications, including FSC, BRC, SMETA, FSSC22000, HACCP, FDA, and ISO. Our products are exported to over 80 countries and regions, meeting diverse market compliance requirements for food packaging. Since establishment, Chamepak has adhered to the core philosophy of "creating the most competitive products". Through advanced production equipment, consistent product quality, competitive pricing, and an efficient, comprehensive sales and quality service system, we continuously strive to deliver superior product experiences for our customers. Our mission is to remain committed to providing high-quality packaging products, guided by the principle of "Move Hearts, Fair Price", enabling small and medium-sized catering businesses to easily access their own premium branded packaging. In future, Chamepak will continue to deepen its expertise in the food and beverage packaging industry, growing together with our customers and exploring endless possibilities.

name: SHINGI Food Solutions Inc.
description: We are a food packaging company with over 80 years of history. Now we are also selling advanced instant freezer which can keep the freshness and the texture of the foods. As well as we are selling frozen Japanese authentic cusines using this machine. As we are also a profetional food packaging company, we can help solve all your food related problem with One Stop!

name: Shiny Kitchen Inc.
description: Carbon X is a revolutionary system for effectively and safely eliminating carbon, oil, grease, and fat buildup from your metal cookware and kitchen equipment. Our state-of-the-art stainless steel soak tank pairs seamlessly with our exclusive CRX Solution cleaner, allowing you to clean your kitchen equipment more efficiently and cost-effectively than traditional methods. Our specially designed heated soak tanks have been meticulously crafted to ensure they are the safest, most reliable, and most efficient options in the world. The Carbon X machine is made from high-quality 304-grade stainless steel, is fully insulated, and features precise thermostatic control along with cutting-edge safety measures. Compatible with all metal types, including aluminum, the Carbon X machine stands out as the most dependable and advanced soak tank available. What distinguishes the Carbon X system is its remarkable, proprietary cleaner – CRX Solution. This environmentally friendly, biodegradable, food safe formula is non-caustic, non-acidic, and non-toxic, delivering lasting cleaning power for over 30 days, even with continuous use. Simply place your equipment in the tank, turn it on, and see results in as little as 5 minutes to a few hours, leaving you with sanitized, carbon free equipment. The Carbon X system provides an effortless solution for maintaining your kitchen equipment, keeping it free from carbon, grease, and oil. By using this system, you will not only lower costs related to labor, degreasers, water, and equipment replacements, but also prolong the lifespan of your current equipment. Additionally, your kitchen will reach a level of cleanliness that manual methods simply cannot achieve, enabling your staff to concentrate on more critical responsibilities and tasks.

name: Shoes For Crews
description: Since 1984, Shoes For Crews has been the trusted leader in slip-resistant safety footwear, protecting millions of workers worldwide. Our innovative footwear is designed to meet the unique demands of every workplace, delivering all day safety and comfort. With our fully managed footwear programs, available at no cost, we make it simple and effortless for companies to safeguard their teams and keep them moving forward.

name: Shortening Shuttle®
description: Shortening Shuttle®: CUT YOUR OIL COSTS IN HALF WITH THE BOSS (CORDLESS FRY OIL CADDY WITH ADVANCED FILTRATION TECHNOLOGY). We offer an industry leading line of the SAFEST, FASTEST, EASIEST means to transport waste cooking oil from kitchen to dumpster. For over 30 years kitchen crews have been relying on the Shortening Shuttle® to transport their grease. 7 models (2 with reversible hand pumps) assure that one will fit your kitchen. Spare parts are designed to make field replacements fast and easy. Visit us at booth 1638 and see why the Shortening Shuttle® needs to be in your kitchen. Proudly Made in USA with a 1 year warranty. *** www.shortening-shuttle.com *** 508-757-5161 *** email: etrani@Shortening-Shuttle.com cell: (609) 321-0544***

name: SHOTT Beverages
description: SHOTT Beverages -REAL FLAVOR MATTERS At SHOTT, we believe that every beverage can, and should be, full of real flavor. Precisely the way Mother Nature intended. It's been our passion for over 50 years to create highly concentrated syrups that deliver real flavor before sweetness every time! Our extensive range compliments a wide variety of beverage types including coffee, hot chocolate, chai, lemonade, iced tea, hand-crafted sodas, smoothies, mocktails, cocktails and more. Produced in New Zealand using our innovative cold brewing technology and seasonally sourced ingredients, each flavor includes 33 serves per bottle and contains no artificial colors, flavors or sweeteners. Our passion continues to drive our quest to always be leading with innovation. This, coupled with our deep knowledge of the beverage industry has led us to launch our latest caffeine concentrates range SHOTT ENERGY. The new range has beenartfully crafted as a hassle-free solution to serve Gen-Z with the functionality of caffeine but without the coffee flavor. In just one pump, the neutral flavored ENERGY BOOSTinstantly energizes any beverage, or an entire drinks menu, with natural energy-boosting active ingredients. While one pump of the real fruit flavored ENERGY caffeine concentrate transforms a simple soda water into a mouthwatering, high-margin made-to-order energy drink.We've made it that simple for your customer to rethink their drink....all you need to do is add a shot to their drink of choice and watch your bottom line grow! Included in the new range are five thirst-quenching real fruit flavors: Apple Tahitian Lime, Blackcurrant Tahitian Lime, Gold Kiwifruit, Peach Mango and Watermelon Tahitian Lime.Each flavor is infused with caffeine-rich natural ingredients; Yerba Mate, Guarana and Green Coffee Bean Extract which deliver a perfectly balance flavor profile with 60mg of caffeine per serve. The addition of the neutral flavored ENERGY BOOST completes the innovative range to boost any beverage type with 40mg of neutral flavored caffeine per serve. Along with innovation, we are committed to delivering a great flavored beverage experience for your customers. We've taken the complexity out of making a drink by combining our serve station system with our interchangeable concentrates that are all formulated to the same 9:1 concentration. Creating a simplified system allows for hassle-free beverage creation that customers enjoy and want to come back for.

name: Shun Cutlery

Shun is trusted by chefs, culinary professionals, and serious home cooks who value exceptional performance as much as visual beauty. At this year’s show, Kai is proud to introduce Shiranami , Shun’s most elevated and artful series to date. Inspired by the iconic white-capped waves of Japanese art, Shiranami combines flowing Dual Core Damascus steel, a rich blue handle, and refined cutting performance in a series designed to be admired as much as it is used. With a legacy of innovation, premium materials, and enduring craftsmanship, Kai continues to set the standard in Japanese cutlery. name: Silikomart
description: Origins The idea for platinum silicone moulds came to me in 1998 while working in my family's business. To pursue my dream, which kept growing, I felt the need to throw myself heart and soul into this new adventure. This is how Dario Martellato recounts the all-Italian story of his company, founded in 2002 and based between the provinces of Padua and Venice. Dario's winning intuition lies in his firm belief in the potential of platinum silicone in the kitchen, wishing to offer the market a product that stands out for its premium quality synonymous with Made in Italy and its distinctive, sophisticated design. Silikomart today Silikomart is more than a company; it's a true laboratory of creativity, passion and innovation . Over more than twenty years, it has evolved rapidly, becoming a global benchmark for culinary professionals while staying true to its foundational values. Our true asset is our people: 100 team members who, day after day, bring dedication and passion to providing a unique experience for those who wish to express their creativity through the art of cooking. Our teams embody the essence of our company: a dynamic ecosystem where the creativity and enthusiasm of young talents blend with the expertise and knowledge of seasoned professionals. This constant dualism between innovation and experience drives our daily growth. Silikomart is a dynamic, constantly evolving environment where new ideas take shape every day, ready to transform and innovate the industry. It's a place where research and development never stop, and where the future of cooking is written with every new project. Mission With a steadfast commitment to innovation and quality, we create tools that inspire creativity and turn ideas into reality. Our goal is to provide products of excellence, crafted to support and promote the personal expression of professionals and enthusiasts. We follow every phase of the project: from design and prototyping to production. The quality of LSR silicone We make components in LSR platinic silicone, which is absolutely the purest and able to guarantee full compliance with the various certifications of suitability also for contact with food. Some leading characteristics of this material are its resistance to chemicals, to oxidation (oxygen and ozone, also when hot) and aging, its excellent electrical insulation, and its excellent non-stick properties. However, its leading feature is its extreme resistance to temperatures. Indeed, the characteristics of this rubber do not change up to 200-230 C and it maintains its elasticity down to -150 C. It contains no toxic components, has the lowest content of volatile substances, and is commonly used in a wide variety of industries, such as the sensitive pharmaceutical/medical sector.

description: Spices are more than ingredientsthey're storytellers. They hold memories, carry traditions, and bring people together over meals that mean something. That's why Chef Meherwan Irani started Spicewalla: to make it easy for everyone to cook boldly, season fearlessly, and bring big flavour to their tables. Spicewalla was first inspired by Meherwan's childhood (in Ahmednagar, in the midwestern state of Maharashtra in India), where spices are treated like producebought fresh, roasted and ground daily in kitchens across India. Then, in 2009, he founded Chai Pani, his James Beard award-winning Indian street food restaurant. Meherwan was sourcing and blending spices the way chefs dowith care, intention, and an obsession for quality. We are excited to share that superior quality and freshness with each of you!

Spring USA includes Equipex and Versa-Gard and is the exclusive distributor of Roller-Grill and Adventys in North America. For operations that prefer a bottle format, we also offer Huy Fong Sriracha in 9oz, 17oz, and 28oz bottles. At NRA 2026, well showcase how Sriracha2Go helps businesses reduce waste, improve consistency, and delight customers with the authentic Sriracha experience, without the mess. Stop by our booth to see Huy Fong Sriracha packets and bottles in action, learn about wholesale opportunities, and grab some samples.
