name: Star Micronics America
description: Always leading, always innovating, Star Micronics stands at the forefront of the point-of-sale (POS) industry, delivering an expansive portfolio tailored for the restaurant and hospitality sectors. From advanced printing to secure cash management and self-service, our solutions epitomize reliability and innovation. Our software development kits (SDKs) seamlessly integrate with Android, iOS, and Windows devices for optimal receipt, label, and ticket generation. We continually pioneer, evidenced by our cloud-based offerings like CloudPRNT and Star Cloud Services, with added capabilities like Android Open Accessory (AOA) support and MFi-certified connectivity. From peripherals like 2D barcode scanners and tablet POS stands, Star Micronics remains committed to setting industry benchmarks. Visit starmicronics.com or follow us on Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, or LinkedIn to learn more.

name: STARRY FOODS
description: SUPREME DUMPLINGS Crafting Excellence, Delivering Authentic Flavors Founded in 2021 with its first flagship restaurant in Bellevue, Washington, Supreme Dumplings () was born from a vision to bring high-quality, authentic dumplings to the modern dining world. Inspired by the rich culinary traditions of East Asia, Supreme Dumplings has quickly become a trusted name in the premium dumpling and frozen food category. At Supreme Dumplings, we believe that excellence begins at the source. Our xiaolongbao (soup dumplings) are crafted using an exclusive recipe developed by two culinary masters: Chef Peter Wang, with five-star restaurant experience, and Chef Norman Lu, the former head chef at Din Tai Fung's central kitchen. These two chefs are the driving force behind our brand's signature taste. Their expertise ensures that every dumpling achieves the perfect balance of delicate wrapper, savory broth, and fresh filling a true tribute to traditional craftsmanship while meeting the needs of modern kitchens. Our Key Advantages: Exclusive Recipe Classic Flavors: Developed by top-tier culinary experts, our xiaolongbao offer a classic, gourmet experience with every bite, maintaining consistent quality across all batches. Optimized for Modern Kitchens: Supreme Dumplings' products are designed for operational efficiency quick to cook with a 9-minute steaming process, ensuring fast service without compromising on taste. Premium Ingredients, Global Vision: We carefully source ingredients both locally in the U.S. and import specialty items from Taiwan to ensure authenticity and enhance the product experience. B2B (Business to Business) Solutions for Growth: As the demand for high-quality, easy-to-prepare Asian foods continues to grow, Supreme Dumplings offers full-service B2B solutions for restaurants, cafes, catering services, and retailers. Our frozen product line is optimized for scalability and market expansion. Since opening our first location, Supreme Dumplings has continued to grow, now with a dedicated xiaolongbao manufacturing facility. We are committed to providing high-quality products and expanding our reach to serve customers across the globe. Today, Supreme Dumplings is not only a restaurant brand but also a culinary partner helping businesses offer authentic Asian flavors to a wider audience. We are dedicated to supporting our partners with innovative, premium-quality products that cater to the evolving tastes of global consumers. At the 2025 Chicago Trade Show, we are excited to showcase our flagship product line and connect with industry leaders who share our passion for excellence in food service. Join us as we redefine what premium frozen dumplings can achieve in modern dining. SUPREME DUMPLINGS Premium Quality. Authentic Taste. Global Vision.

name: STATTUS Technology, Inc.
description: Recognized as the "Top Architectural Aluminum Product 2026" by Construction Tech Review , Stattus Technology specializes in premium patio coverings, dynamic shade structures, and ultimate weather protection tailored specifically for the hospitality industry. We are dedicated to engineering high-performance, four-season outdoor environments designed for 365-day living across commercial and residential settings. We understand that for restaurants and event spaces, unpredictable weather means compromised guest experiences and lost revenue. To solve this, we provide state-of-the-art motorized louvered roofs and operable aluminum pergolas that seamlessly integrate with your property's existing architectural footprint. By marrying sophisticated architectural design with uncompromising weather resistance, our custom structures allow you to take complete control of your outdoor dining and event spaces. Leveraging extensive expertise in innovative design, precision engineering, and structural integration, our team delivers a seamless, end-to-end experience. From the initial architectural consultation to final installation, we utilize the latest technological advancements to meticulously craft architectural aluminum solutions that elevate your aesthetic while maximizing functional, revenue-generating use. Experience the Stattus Technology difference. Let us partner with you to transform your unprotected outdoor areas into stunning, architecturally sound, and highly profitable retreats that inspire, impress, and endure for years to come.

name: Steelite
description: Steelite International is a world leading manufacturer and supplier of award winning tabletop and buffet products for the hospitality industry. name: Sterling Manufacturing LLC
description: Sterling Manufacturing is owned and operated by Lon Lehman and Chip Tippmann. Lon and Chip both started in the Commercial Steamer business with Accutemp Products in 1992. Accutemp was the first company to manufacture Connectionless Steamers exclusively. Lon performed Manufacturing/Design Engineering while creating and managing the Service Dept. and Chip was the first Outside Sales Representative for Accutemp. Lon finished his tenure with Accutemp as the head of Engineering and Chip had become sole owner of an Outside Sales Rep. Company, which sold Accutemp Products exclusively through much of the United States. In the spring of 2003, Lon and Chip ventured out together and started Intek Manufacturing. Intek manufactured the Xtreme Steam Connectionless Steamer and in 2004, Intek was presented the Appliance Design of the Year Award. Intek was acquired by Unified Brands in 2010. Lon and Chip currently hold five patents related to Commercial Cooking Equipment and have several additional patent applications pending approval. In September of 2014, Lon and Chip formed Sterling Manufacturing and designed the Sterling Steamer. The Sterling Steamer is the culmination of 23 years of experience in designing, manufacturing, servicing and marketing Steam Cooking Equipment.

name: STERNO
description: Sterno is the leading manufacturer of portable food warming systems and creative table lighting solutions for the hospitality industry. The product line includes portable flame and flameless heating solutions, catering equipment and accessories, table lamps with real flame, flameless candle solutions, premium insulated food carriers, and hand sanitizer. For over 100 years, the iconic Sterno brand has been synonymous with quality canned heat. The heritage of reliability and innovation continues today, as Sterno continues to bring to market new products that give foodservice industry professionals greater control over food quality, dcor and hand sanitation. Sterno is a subsidiary of Compass Diversified Holdings (NYSE: CODI).

description: Sugiyo USA, Inc. sprang from Sugiyo Co., Ltd., the original innovator of crab-flavored surimi seafood. Sugiyo pioneered the technology that transformed responsibly harvested whitefish such as Alaska pollock into a versatile seafood ingredient that replicates the flavor, texture, and appearance of snow crab. Today, Sugiyo remains a global leader in surimi innovation, combining decades of craftsmanship with modern food science and responsible sourcing practices. Sugiyo USA brings this heritage and expertise to customers across the United States, serving retail grocery and specialty markets. The company’s flagship brand, Alaskan Snow Legs®, is widely recognized for its premium taste, authentic texture, and consistent performance in both cold and hot applications. From classic leg-style products to flakes, shreds, and specialty formats, Sugiyo USA offers versatile solutions for seafood counters, frozen aisles, cafeterias, and restaurant kitchens. From our corporate headquarters and SQF-certified manufacturing facility in Anacortes, WA, Sugiyo USA continues to expand the surimi seafood category through new product development and awareness-building emphasizing balanced nutrition, clean ingredients and transparent sourcing. Naturally high in protein and low in fat, Sugiyo USA’s surimi is a versatile, satisfying seafood option that fits a wide array of eating styles from dining-out and everyday family meals to lighter, protein-forward snacking fitting perfectly into today’s label-conscious lifestyles.

With hyper-targeted customization as a key 2025 beverage trend, we can help our customers optimize in-house SOPs and recipe builds for improved operational efficiencies to accelerate speed of execution, while maintaining consistent quality, flavor and convenience to the end consumer. Sunny Sky employs approximately 600 team members across six best-in-class manufacturing facilities, Houston, TX (headquarters), Tinley Park, IL, Douglassville, PA, Fullerton, CA, Chicago, IL, and Frostproof, FL. Some of the items we manufacture are pound cake, crumb cake, crispy cookies, cookies, muffins, croissant, cupcakes, and scones. name: Symrise

With a dedicated Food & Beverage division in Teterboro, NJ, we offer irresistible taste solutions for culinary creations, beverages, sweets, snacks, and health-focused products. By fusing unparalleled consumer insights, deep industry expertise, and sustainably sourced, high-quality ingredients, we transform your boldest ideas into your biggest hits. Through bWorks, the beverage incubator by Symrise, we offer turnkey beverage development, from conceptualization and recipe design to prototyping and commercialization. Let’s collaborate and create standout products your customers will love. Connect with us to get started! Symrise—always inspiring more…

name: Tabanero Holdings
description: Tabaero Hot Sauce Condiments Tabaero is a Florida-based, SQF-certified manufacturer of premium sauces and condiments, proudly made in the USA. Best known for its bold, balanced hot sauces, Tabaero has grown into a full-spectrum flavor partner for restaurants and foodservice operators nationwide, offering a diverse portfolio that includes hot sauces, BBQ sauces, taco sauces, salsas, and a wide range of complementary condiments. Founded on the belief that sauces should elevate food rather than overpower it, Tabaero is driven by a flavor-first philosophy rooted in culinary application, operational consistency, and scalable quality. Every product is developed with real kitchen use in minddesigned to perform across menu formats, cuisines, and dayparts while delivering craveable flavor and broad guest appeal. Tabaero's chef-driven approach prioritizes layered flavor, balanced heat, and versatility. Whether crafting a classic hot sauce, a smoky BBQ sauce, a smooth taco sauce, or a fresh-tasting salsa, recipes are built for generous usage without overwhelming dishes. Sauces are formulated to work as tabletop condiments, back-of-house ingredients, or signature menu componentssupporting dipping, drizzling, glazing, marinating, and cooking applications. The portfolio is designed to align with modern menu trends, including global flavors, sweet-heat profiles, citrus-forward sauces, and premium condiments that help operators differentiate their offerings without adding operational complexity. Tabaero products perform across fast casual, casual dining, sports bars, ghost kitchens, catering, and hospitality environments. Operationally, Tabaero is built to support foodservice growth. The company offers scalable manufacturing, reliable supply chain management, and packaging formats designed for both front- and back-of-house efficiency. All products are produced in the USA under strict quality and food safety standards, providing consistency and confidence for single-unit operators and multi-unit chains alike. Beyond product, Tabaero partners closely with operators to support menu innovation and successful execution, offering application guidance, menu inspiration, and collaborative support when needed. As the brand that founded National Hot Sauce Day , Tabaero has helped elevate hot sauce and condiments from an afterthought to a core menu driver. Today, the brand continues that leadership by delivering bold, flavor-forward sauces that meet the demands of modern kitchens and evolving consumer tastes. Tabaero Hot Sauce Condiments Bold Flavor. Balanced Heat. Built for Foodservice.

name: Tabit
description: Transform restaurant operations through mobile connectivity Tabit's unique solution aims to transform the industry by leveraging mobile connectivity to streamline restaurant operations, extend sales opportunities, and elevate the overall experience for both operators and their customers. Designed from the ground up to be mobile, and built upon a single unified platform, the solution implements mobile best practices and offers a business process oriented approach to operators. Tabit's enterprise proven centralized control allows businesses to be managed from one location. It is built for scale with nimble product development to support large multi-location business. Tabit customers have an average of 8-15% increase in spend per customer, 12-15 minute decrease in table turn time at peak time, 20% decrease in number of servers needed per shift, with an increase in tips, and an 80% decrease in server mistakes. Tabit's ecosystem extends beyond the restaurant "four-walls" to include: Online and Mobile ordering, mobile payments, reservations, analysis of business performance, hotel integration, and more.

From beautiful and multi-functional buffet service collections to classic and contemporary tabletop products, we bring creative designs, elevated style and one-of-a-kind product versatility to foodservice customers around the world.

Its unique flavor transforms the taste of fruits and vegetables from ordinary to extraordinary. It is also a great addition to meats and beverages. name: TAMAKI GIDA SANAYI VE TICARET ANONIM SIRKETI
description: TAMAKI FOOD, located in Türkiye, is one of the largest and most dynamic manufacturers and importers of Japanese, pan‑Asian, and fusion cuisine food products and have been serving both the HoReCa (Hotels, Restaurants, Catering) and Retail segments with a wide range of high‑quality products, including different kind of sauces, rice, breadcrumbs, wasabi, rice vinegars, and soy sauce. Our mission is to bring authentic flavors and innovative culinary solutions to professional kitchens and households, combining traditional techniques with modern production standards. Over the years, our portfolio has grown more with new items introduced to meet evolving consumer demand. TAMAKI’s competitive advantages are clear. Our products are natural, made using traditional techniques, and packaged in convenient, ergonomic formats. Many of our items are bestsellers, recognized with gold medals and industry awards. In the current economic climate, manufacturers based in Turkiye enjoy undeniable advantages over imported products, offering high quality at competitive prices. These strengths allow us to maintain leadership in the market and build lasting relationships with partners worldwide. Distribution is one of our strongest assets. We supply products to more than 500 distributors and are present on the shelves of leading hypermarket and supermarket chains. This multi‑channel approach ensures that Tamaki products are accessible to both professional chefs and everyday consumers, reinforcing our reputation for reliability and convenience. Looking ahead, TAMAKI FOOD is committed to continued growth and innovation. We plan to expand our product range with new sauces and food items, strengthen our presence in additional export markets, and increase the use of domestic raw materials. Sustainability is a key priority, with ongoing efforts to adopt eco‑friendly packaging and reduce environmental impact. At the same time, we are investing in digital transformation, enhancing e‑commerce channels and leveraging data analytics to optimize sales strategies. TAMAKI FOOD has grown from a regional manufacturer into an international leader in Japanese, pan‑Asian, and fusion cuisine products. With a robust production infrastructure, innovative R&D capabilities, and a strong presence in more than 15 countries, we continue to expand our global footprint. By combining authenticity, quality, and efficiency, Tamaki has earned the trust of distributors, retailers, and consumers worldwide. As we look to the future, we remain committed to innovation, sustainability, and excellence, ensuring that Tamaki will continue to shape the culinary landscape for years to come.

Founded by Beppe Montanaro and his wife Domenica, the company boasts a long family tradition in the industry, which translates into a deep knowledge of truffles and a genuine passion for this precious ingredient. Tartuflanghe offers a wide range of truffle-based products, from classic fresh truffles to real specialties: sauces and creams, condiments and oils but also innovative spherified and freeze dryed ingredients for chefs. Tartuflanghe also produce sweet truffles made with Piedmotese IGP hazelnuts.

By embedding consumer data into product innovation, marketing and research, Tastewise's disruptive AI models create scalable, personalized and innovative products and communications that predict today's consumer and planetary needs. Its AI's deep behavioural intelligence, computer vision and text, image and video models are the catalyst behind innovation at the world's top 100 food and beverage brands.

name: Tater Kegs
description: Tater Kegs are shredded potato mixed with delicious flavors. All the best parts of a baked potato in the perfect handheld package. From the freezer to the fryer to the customer. Flavor Favorites include Bacon Cheddar, Bacon Jalapeno, Buffalo Chicken, Cheese Bomb More..

name: Taylor Precision Products
description: When Taylor was founded in 1851, by George Taylor, he had a motto: accuracy first. Since then, our legacy has grown to include a wide range of measurement products for home and industry. We develop the most accurate measurement products. We've been in the measurement business for almost 150 years... which is why Taylor is the brand you can trust.

name: TCI - Textiles Coated International
description: Textiles Coated International (TCI) has been a global leader in high-performance fluoropolymer films, laminates, and composite materials since 1985. For four decades, TCI has built its reputation on engineering materials that perform reliably in the most demanding chemical and thermal environments. From extreme heat to aggressive chemicals, TCI solutions are trusted across industries where durability, purity, and consistency are non-negotiable. Operating from two advanced manufacturing facilities with more than 180,000 square feet of production space, TCI integrates customized coating, lamination, fabrication, film processing, mixing, maintenance, research and development, and laboratory testing. Supported by over 300 skilled employees and an around-the-clock manufacturing schedule, TCI delivers high-quality products with short lead times and exceptional customer support. At the 2026 NRA Show, TCI is proud to present its advanced cookware solutions, engineered to improve efficiency, cleanliness, and performance in modern kitchen operations. Designed for speed ovens, clamshell grills, toasters, and high-volume commercial environments, TCI cookware delivers consistent cooking results while reducing oil usage, cleaning time, and operational downtime. Featured products include the Fiberglass-Free Release Sheet , a 100% PTFE, NSF-certified solution that eliminates fiberglass concerns while providing long-lasting nonstick performance; the EverClean Cavity Liner , which simplifies oven maintenance by keeping interiors clean; and the industry-leading EverBasket , a durable, oil-free, nonstick basket designed for rapid-cook and microwave-enabled ovens. EverBasket is metal-free, resistant to thermal shock, and built to withstand continuous use across a wide temperature range. TCI also manufactures EverForm molded PTFE cookware, trays, and liners made from its award-winning CrossFilm material, offering exceptional strength, abrasion resistance, purity, and even heat distribution. All TCI cookware products are designed for direct food contact and comply with FDA regulations, reinforcing TCI's commitment to safety, quality, and long-term performance. With TCI, kitchens enter a new era of efficiency, sustainability, and culinary excellence - powered by materials engineered to perform where it matters most. We look forward to connecting with you at the 2026 NRA Show and discussing how TCI's cookware solutions can elevate your kitchen operations. See you at the booth #4674!

name: TeamWorld Corporate Programs

From new hire kits to uniform rollouts, our programs are built to bring consistency, control, and efficiency to growing brands. In an industry full of options, we stand apart through strong partnerships and reliable execution. We don’t operate as a vendor. We act as an extension of your business, delivering a Premier Customer Experience every step of the way.

Our Panibois collection offers innovative, oven-safe wooden molds that combine functionality with presentation, allowing chefs and bakers to bake and serve in the same vessel. These eco-friendly molds elevate both efficiency and visual appeal, making them ideal for bakeries, catering, and retail-ready applications. At Technobake, we focus on providing high-quality, differentiated products that help our customers stand out. Headquartered in Ocala, Florida, Tech Serv proudly delivers trusted, high-performance IT support to restaurants and businesses across the United States — from California to Boston, Texas to Hawaii, and everywhere in between. With deep roots in North Central Florida and Southern Georgia, our reach now spans coast to coast, serving clients in major metros like Miami, New York, and Los Angeles, as well as remote markets where reliability matters most. At TechServ, technology and hospitality meet — ensuring your business is always equipped for success.

Our goal is to continuously improve, by simplifying the work of those who use our equipment.

name: TekFlix
description: High turnover does not have to mean constant retraining from scratch. TekFlix helps multi-unit restaurant operators turn SOPs, menu guides, and compliance docs into 60-second video modules staff can finish before a shift so new hires are floor-ready faster, and training finally keeps pace with hiring. This innovative approach makes learning more accessible and effective. In the fast-paced restaurant environment, waiting for scheduled training sessions isn't feasible. TekFlix provides role-specific modules that staff can access before shifts, in break rooms, or on their phones, ensuring they're prepared from day one, regardless of when they started. If you are exploring how AI can fundamentally improve learning and knowledge delivery, TekFlix is worth a closer look.

name: Tell City Pretzel Company
description: Tell City Pretzels is built on a tradition that dates back to 1858 , when the company began handcrafting its signature crunchy artisan pretzels using time-honored baking techniques. For more than a century, the brand has been known for its distinctive flavor, satisfying crunch, and commitment to quality—making it a true original in the world of pretzels. While honoring its deep heritage, Tell City Pretzels continues to evolve to meet the needs of today’s customers. In 2022 , the company expanded into soft artisan pretzels for the foodservice industry , bringing the same dedication to craftsmanship and quality to restaurants, breweries, stadiums, and hospitality partners. By blending artisan methods with thoughtful automation, Tell City Pretzels is able to deliver foodservice-ready consistency while still maintaining the flexibility to innovate and collaborate with customers on unique pretzel shapes and sizes tailored to specific menu concepts and price points. Most recently, Tell City Pretzels introduced a whole wheat pretzel that meets school nutrition requirements , expanding the company’s ability to serve schools and institutional foodservice programs seeking better-for-you options without sacrificing taste or quality. Today, Tell City Pretzels stands at the intersection of heritage and innovation . From its roots as one of America’s original artisan pretzel bakers to its growing presence in foodservice and institutional markets, the company continues to deliver pretzels that are handcrafted in spirit, consistent in quality, and designed to meet the evolving needs of modern customers. Tell City Pretzels—where tradition, craftsmanship, and innovation come together in every twist.

description: That’s it., maker of the #1 fruit bar in America, is an LA-based healthy snacking company founded in 2012 by Dr. Lior Lewensztain and driven by a mission to help people eat more fruit. Today, That’s it. is recognized as a trusted leader in better-for-you snacking, offering convenient, allergy-friendly products made with six real ingredients or fewer. Free from added sugar, sugar alcohols, natural or artificial flavors, and artificial colors, every snack is made with 100% real fruit and provides natural fiber from fruit. In 2025, the brand delivered more than a quarter-billion fruit servings and expanded beyond Fruit Bars into Minis, toddler snacks, confections, and, most recently, higher-fiber and higher-protein snacks. That’s it. snacks are available in more than 85,000 retail doors nationwide, including Costco, Sam’s Club, Walmart, Target, Kroger, and Whole Foods, and are also available onboard multiple airlines.

name: The Amazing Flameless Candle

On average, a single 48 table restaurant saves $3-5,000 annually and countless hours of labor, and waste compared to fuel cell and oil candle options. Learn more at https://flamelesscandles.com

name: The Campbell's Company
description: Get more with Campbell's Foodservice Backed by over 125 years of experience, Campbell's Foodservice offers over 1,000 carefully crafted foods your guests know and love. Whether it's through premium soups from Campbell's Culinary Reserve, tasty sips by Pacific Foods Barista Series , fun-loving Goldfish snacks, or the craveable chips of Kettle Brand and Cape Cod , we'll help you boost customer satisfactionand your bottom line. For us, food is not just about flavor. It's about connecting. That's why we strive to help you create long-lasting connections with your customers. Stop by our booth to see how you can get more with Campbell's, from supporting your business to enhancing each guests' experience and everything in between.

name: The Clearly Food and Beverage LLC
The Coca-Cola Company
description: About The Coca-Cola Company The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE: KO) is a total beverage company with products sold in more than 200 countries and territories. Our company's purpose is to refresh the world and make a difference. We sell multiple billion-dollar brands across several beverage categories worldwide. Our portfolio of sparkling soft drink brands includes Coca-Cola, Sprite and Fanta. Our water, sports, coffee and tea brands include Dasani, smartwater, vitaminwater, Topo Chico, BODYARMOR, Powerade, Costa, Georgia, Gold Peak and Ayataka. Our juice, value-added dairy and plant-based beverage brands include Minute Maid, Simply, innocent, Del Valle, fairlife and AdeS. We're constantly transforming our portfolio, from reducing sugar in our drinks to bringing innovative new products to market. We seek to positively impact people's lives, communities and the planet through water replenishment, packaging recycling, sustainable sourcing practices and carbon emissions reductions across our value chain. Together with our bottling partners, we employ more than 700,000 people, helping bring economic opportunity to local communities worldwide. Learn more at www.coca-colacompany.com and follow us on Instagram, Facebook and LinkedIn.

name: The Delfield Company, a Welbilt Company
description: A best-in-class team providing premium serving, fabrication, and refrigeration for our partners.

name: The Essential Mixologist
description: The Essential Mixologist is a leading supplier in farm-direct dehydrated fruits, vegetables, and juices, specializing in premium solutions for the modern mixology space. Headquartered in the U.S., we serve the food service, hospitality, retail, and club store industries, sourcing sustainably from farms in Guatemala and other international regions. Our extensive product line includes over 40 varieties of citrus, tropical fruits, berries, vegetables, cocktail rimmers, culinary dusts, and now natural juices, all crafted to enhance cocktails, mocktails, and culinary presentations. Utilizing state-of-the-art solar dehydration technology, we preserve the vibrant flavor, color, and texture of each ingredient while maintaining an eco-conscious production process. Our mission is to deliver consistent, high-quality, ready-to-use products that help our clients lead in an ever-evolving beverage industry. Dehydrated garnishes offer distinct advantages over fresh alternatives, including zero prep time, extended shelf life up to 12 months, no shrinkage or spoilage, consistent sizing, and reduced labor and safety risks. We maintain full control over our supply chain by working directly with farmers and using sustainable packaging solutions to uphold our commitment to quality and environmental responsibility. Our clients include global bars, restaurants, hotels, cruise lines, airlines, retailers, and caterers—from boutique venues to leading hospitality brands. We offer flexible, scalable supply, custom blends, private-label opportunities, and robust customer support with training resources and digital tools. Whether enhancing classic cocktails or supporting the rise of non-alcoholic mixology and culinary fusion, The Essential Mixologist continues to innovate with products that reflect current and future trends. As demand for premium beverage experiences continues to grow, we are expanding into new international markets and investing in advanced supply chain systems and product development. More than just a garnish and juice supplier, The Essential Mixologist is your trusted partner in sipping greatness worldwide. We don't just support greatness — we create it.

name: The Howard Company
description: In business since 1950 and headquartered in Brookfield, Wisconsin, The Howard Company is the nation’s leading branding signage and technology provider. As an employee-owned company, we have built our reputation by providing first-class customer service through our consultative process, a broad product line, and customization to fulfill our clients’ needs. We specialize in drive-thru systems, digital displays, illuminated and non-illuminated menu boards, building signage, interior design and décor, point-of-purchase merchandising, design services, digital services, installation services, and rollouts.

name: The J.M. Smucker Company
description: Smucker Away from Home is a division of The J.M. Smucker Company and specializes in meeting the needs of foodservice professionals in both commercial and non-commercial segments. A wide range of quality products are offered through its family of iconic brands, including Smuckers, Jif, Folgers, 1850, Dickinson's and Cafe Bustelo to name a few. The comprehensive portfolio of categories and leading brands is designed to meet the needs of all foodservice segments, considering every application from breakfast condiments to back-of-house ingredient solutions, to branded coffee. The consistent thread is a dedication to offering trusted brands to elevate the dining experience for your guests.

name: The Legacy Companies
description: The Legacy Companies unites a portfolio of trusted foodservice brands, delivering the essential equipment culinary professionals rely on to power successful commercial kitchensacross every category, from prep to cooking, refrigeration to beverage, and everything in between. Our family of brands includes General ranges and fryers; Maxx Ice ice machines; Maxx Cold refrigerators, freezers, and merchandisers; Adcraft smallwares, countertop electrics; Black Diamond ice, cooking and refrigeration equipment; Bevles heater-proofers and holding cabinets; Legion kettles and skittles; Excalibur dehydrators; Zeroll scoops and dishers; Vinotemp wine cabinets; Blakeslee dish and glass washers; West Bend coffee urns; and Omega juicers, blenders, and beverage dispensers. Each brand maintains its focused expertise and heritage, while together forming a comprehensive portfolio that equips operators with dependable, performance-driven solutions for every station in the kitchen. By honoring the strength of each brand while operating as one unified organization, The Legacy Companies delivers complete kitchen solutions backed by expertise, reliability, and long-term value.

name: The Little Potato Company
description: The Little Potato Company is a family-owned, North American food company specializing in proprietary varieties of Little Potatoes grown for exceptional taste, texture, and convenience. Founded in 1996 by Angela Santiago and her father, the company began with a simple vision: to bring small, flavorful potatoes from farm to table and make everyday meals easier and more enjoyable. Today, The Little Potato Company has grown into a category leader, partnering with family farms across the United States and Canada to produce and distribute fresh, high-quality potatoes year-round. The company was the first in North America to focus exclusively on growing and selling Little Potatoes and have since become the #1 Little Potato brand in North America with the largest Little Potato breeding program in the entire world. Rooted in its agricultural heritage, the company emphasizes responsible farming practices, long-term grower relationships, and a commitment to sustainability. Its vertically integrated approach—from variety development and farming partnerships to packaging and distribution—ensures consistent quality and innovation across its product portfolio. Designed to deliver confidence in the kitchen, The Little Potato Company focuses on creating value for operators through reliable quality, consistent year-round supply, operational efficiency with less labor dependence and waste, and a lower plated cost, making wholesome, fresh food more accessible without compromising on taste or nutrition. Over the last 30 years, The Little Potato Company has continued to grow the category through industry-leading processes, innovative new varietals, value-added options, and flavor-forward offerings. Today, the company remains focused on thoughtful growth and innovation while staying true to its family values, agricultural roots and commitment to Feed the World, Better.

name: The Magic Group
description: Magics Group is a U.S.-based provider of next-generation automated retail and food & beverage solutions, specializing in smart vending machines that deliver engaging, high-margin consumer experiences. With a growing footprint across malls, airports, entertainment venues, and hospitality locations, Magics Group offers a diverse product lineup including barista-quality coffee systems, cotton candy and popcorn vending, claw machines, and customizable retail solutions such as phone case printing. Designed for ease of operation, fast deployment, and strong ROI, our machines combine innovative technology with proven revenue models. Backed by U.S.-based support and global manufacturing capabilities, Magics Group empowers operators and businesses to unlock new revenue streams with minimal labor and maximum efficiency.

name: The Montague Company, a Welbilt Company
description: The Montague Company remains committed to the values that have kept customers satisfied and business strong well into its second century. Classic design, fine craftsmanship, and customized solutions bring you the highest quality commercial cooking equipment built on a heritage of specialized manufacturing. Product innovation and continued investment in new manufacturing processes and technologies continue to provide competitive pricing and excellent return on investment.

name: The Morning Star Company
description: Welcome to Paradiso tomato products: a brand with a quality you can see, field-to-factory freshness you can taste, and cost savings sure to boost your bottom line. Our red and ripe tomatoes, picked at the peak of season, are grown throughout California’s Central Valley, the world’s most prolific tomato growing region with our factory located right in the heart of it. We pack exclusively in the #10 flexible pouch and have been doing so for decades. We pioneered where the future of food packaging needed to go and helped revolutionize an industry and have continued to do so ever since. Sustainable, reliable, safe, cost-effective, environmentally responsible packaging. The #10 flexible pouch.

name: The Neil Jones Food Company
description: We are a family-run, privately-owned U.S. Corporation processing fresh-packed Pacific Northwest fruit and California tomatoes. From custom sauce blends to industrial juice concentrates, our product offering is diverse like the customers we serve. We pride ourselves on our versatility, consistency and ongoing commitment, not only to the quality of our products, but to each other. Whether you require 3000 cases or 300,000 cases a year, NJFC is a partner you can trust.

name: The Oregon Fruit Company
description: Oregon Fruit is a family owned fruit processing company based in the heart of the Willamette Valley, operating since 1935. Whether you're building a beverage program from scratch, developing seasonal limited time offerings, or simply wanting to upgrade your current purees, their range of products has what you're looking: accessible, high-quality real fruit. Oregon Fruit products will always have fruit as the first ingredient and are free of any preservatives and artificial colors. Owned and operated in Salem, Oregon, every batch of product is meticulously evaluated for quality, food safety, and an overall customer experience. From the eccentric chefs and renegade bartenders to the midnight bakers and the sunrise pancake makers, their goal is to provide you with the highest quality real fruit ingredients you can get.

name: The Pack America Corp.
description: We are a global manufacturer committed to the creation of innovative and sustainable packaging. Pack America’s ongoing objective is to become a packaging resource for our clients; not just a company from which to buy packaging. Our professional staff works diligently to stay current with contemporary packaging trends and materials. We have a responsibility to our client to present our fresh and original packaging solutions on a regular basis.

name: The Packaging Source, Inc.
description: The Packaging Source has been successfully serving the packaging needs of restaurants for over thirty years. Our complete line of packaging products is readily available and offers the latest and most successful trends for a unique and customized "look". Our knowledgeable sales staff is available to offer creative and thoughtful suggestions to help you accomplish your packaging goals. We welcome the opportunity to help you customize your packaging to maximize your restaurant's image through custom paper and plastic bags, foodservice tissue, as well as boxes and labels.

name: The Perfect Purée of Napa Valley
description: A Foundation of Flavor. A World of Possibility. For almost 40 years, The Perfect Purée has been the leading U.S. producer of premium fruit purées, trusted by restaurants, hotels, bars, bakers, brewers, and multi-unit operators to deliver quality and consistency across the menu. Today, that legacy has evolved into a complete professional fruit flavor system designed for precision, operational efficiency, and scalable menu innovation. Our portfolio includes our signature frozen fruit purées and concentrates, Tastecraft® Freeze-Dried Fruit, culinary-inspired craft fruit syrups, and Perfect Fruit Foams™, a groundbreaking new product category coming soon. Together, these formats are designed to work across the entire menu, expanding revenue opportunities without increasing complexity or SKU count. Our ready-to-use products eliminate the variability, waste, and labor associated with in-house processing of fresh fruit. With consistent Brix levels, balanced pH, and uniform viscosity, operators can rely on repeatable results from jar to jar, and location to location. The result: Up to 25% cost savings versus scratch-made purées Reduced prep time and labor No trim waste or spoilage Year-round flavor consistency Predictable cost per ounce From independent kitchens and bars to national chains, The Perfect Purée provides scalable fruit flavor solutions that deliver the control, consistency, and cross-menu versatility required to innovate confidently — and execute profitably.

name: The Prestwick Group Inc.
description: At Max-R, a division of the Prestwick Companies, we manufacture the longest lasting and lowest maintenance site furnishings out of the purest recycled plastic. Products include waste, recycle, hostess, work stations, outdoor furniture, planter boxes, picnic tables, benches, menu boxes, message centers, and over 1,000 other products. We make most products in 15 different collections and over 100 color combinations. Virtually maintenance free and customizable to fit your specific needs, our tailored solutions and world-class service will enhance your space and make it easy for visitors to properly dispose of waste and recyclables. *We did all the recycle bins for the convention center meeting rooms and they are almost a decade old and they still look brand new!

name: The Sugarman of Vermont, LLC
description: The Sugarman of Vermont, based in the heart of maple syrup country in Hardwick, Vermont, is a producer of craft maple products specializing in the foodservice and hospitality industries. The company sources raw maple syrup from producers, and then blends and bottles the syrup into a wide range of size configurations, enabling restaurants, hotels, and cafeterias to offer natural and healthy food products to their customers. To learn more, visit our brand new website: www.sugarmanofvermont.com!

name: The Town Dock
description: For 40 years, The Town Dock has focused on offering both the highest quality wild-caught calamari and the very best service. A market leader in foodservice calamari, we are a vertically integrated seafood company, located on the water in Point Judith, Rhode Island. We partner with a dedicated fleet of fishing vessels, local fishermen, and global suppliers, and provide the calamari expertise that guides our customers in making the best decisions to help their business grow.

name: The Virginia Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services
Thermodyne Foodservice Products, Inc.
description: Thermodyne is a worldwide supplier of patented slow cook and hold ovens designed to sustain food quality and reduce food waste. The revolutionary method of conduction heating, called Fluid Shelf technology, delivers exact temperature through every shelf which means temperatures are sustained even with door openings. Thermodyne ovens are designed to be user-friendly, improve kitchen efficiency, and eliminate error all of which will have a positive impact on your bottom line. Every Thermodyne model is EPA 202 Approved, standard with our 60-day Money Back Guarantee, and 2-Year Parts Labor Warranty. Thermodyne is sure to have the equipment to meet your needs.

name: THERMOTOTAL
description: THERMOTOTAL — BRAZIL’S #1 ICE CREAM CART MANUFACTURER Thermototal is Brazil’s pioneer and leading manufacturer of insulated ice cream carts and thermal street vending solutions. With over 50 dedicated professionals and a 3,000 m² production facility, we combine world-class engineering with highly competitive pricing — delivering international-quality products ready for the U.S. and global markets. Built to Perform. Built to Last. Our carts are engineered with superior thermal insulation to maintain optimal product temperatures even under extreme heat conditions — including hot asphalt, sand, and direct sun exposure. Each unit is designed for durability, easy maintenance, and effortless cleaning, ensuring maximum operational uptime for your business. Fully Customizable to Your Brand We offer 9 cart models — including classic pushcarts and tricycle formats — all fully customizable in colors. Whether you’re building a fleet for a national franchise or launching a single-location concept, Thermototal delivers a product that becomes a moving billboard for your brand. Thermototal proudly serves clients across North America, Latin America, Central America, Africa, and Europe. Our factory operates with state-of-the-art equipment, proprietary tooling, and raw materials that meet international quality standards — all backed by a full product warranty. Why Partner with Thermototal? • Pioneer in insulated cart manufacturing in Brazil • 9 models for diverse business needs • Full brand customization (colors, logos) • Exceptional thermal insulation performance • Easy to clean and maintain • Competitive export pricing • Proven in 4 continents www.thermototal.com.br +55 19 3491-6074

name: ThermoWorks
description: ThermoWorks has decades of experience in the temperature measurement and instrumentation industries. We are seasoned in the development and instruction of measurement courses, publications, and the design of some of the worlds leading temperature calibration standards. You will find ThermoWorks products in virtually every industry. You can find us in home kitchens where our Super-Fast Thermapen has changed the cooking and dining experience of tens of thousands of great food lovers. You can find us in thousands of commercial kitchens across America. Hundreds of food processing plants and farming operations use our products, from dairy, to produce, to meat, seafood and poultry. Cold chain management employs our loggers and thermometers to make sure your food makes it to you in top quality and safety. Many of our thermometers are award winners and widely recognized as the best in their class. Most are unique and different from what others offer. If you shop carefully and closely compare performance, features and price, youll find we are the leading value in many product categories. We make low cost pocket thermometers, high speed thermometers, sophisticated professional meters, and a growing variety of sensors and probes. Behind the panels or labels of other equipment youll find we make OEM temperature components for a growing number of other companies. Most of our in-house staff is engaged in marketing, technical support, product definition, design, and operations. We run our own calibration lab and service departments. Most products can be repaired right here. We do not outsource our order desk nor our warehouse and fulfillment. All of this is done by ThermoWorks staff so you can speak directly with people that know something about the products and the status of your order.

name: Thomas Keller Restaurant Group
description: Cup4Cup Cup4Cup’s story began in 2010 at The French Laundry when Chefs there developed a way to provide the restaurant’s gluten free guests with a cornet of Salmon Tartare that tasted just like the original recipe. This development was revolutionary for the restaurant as gluten free guests could now experience this iconic menu highlight and complete dining experience. This culinary creation was a turning point. The result of the kitchen experiment yielded Cup4Cup—the first 1:1 gluten free flour that eliminated complicated conversions and delivered premium taste, texture and performance. Just as its name suggests, Cup4Cup replaces traditional all-purpose flour or whole wheat flour in most recipes, cup-for-cup and gram-for-gram, but you’d never know the difference. At Cup4Cup we also provide easy-to-use baking mixes that deliver the same consistency and texture of regular flour. Our customers can utilize our chef inspired library of sweet and savory mixes and recipes for the growing gluten free community, their friends and families without compromise. Proper Stock & Sauce Co. At Proper Stock & Sauce Co. we make stocks and sauces employing the same methods and techniques of high caliber chefs. Our products are produced without compromise, utilizing the finest roasted bones, select quality produce and fresh herbs. Each stock is masterfully hand crafted and allowed to simmer gradually to develop peak flavor characteristics focused on quality, clarity, consistency, and cost effectiveness.

name: Thunder Group Inc.
description: Thunder Group Inc. is a foodservice smallware company located in 780 South Nogales Street, City Of Industry, California, 91748. Thunder Group Inc. started its humble beginning in Keelung a small city in northern Taiwan, and it has grown into the one of the largest manufacturers and international distributors of melamine-ware, flatware, kitchenware and restaurant-ware. With manufacturing facilities throughout Asia and distribution centers around the globe, Thunder Group Inc.s mission is to provide customers with the highest quality and the largest selection of products delivered to customers in the most efficient method and on time. And because our customers are dealing with the manufacturer directly, our customers will also be getting the most competitive prices. Thunder Group Inc. prides itself in quality, innovation and above all safety. Because we know it is important to our customers and their customers, we have a complete lines of products that meet NSF, AGA, and UL requirements. Thunder Group Inc. will continue to invest in product development and design with these goals in mind. So welcome to the Thunder Group family and enjoy our hospitality and services.

name: Thunderbird Food Machinery Inc
description: Thunderbird has been in business for over 38 years and in that time, we have developed strong relationships with tens of thousands of customers around the world. Through those strong relationships, and an intense desire the develop high quality equipment at affordable prices, Thunderbird Food Machinery is one of the world's leading manufacturer of food service equipment. "We, here at Thunderbird take pride in our products and build our machines to last. The face of Thunderbird is changing: bringing in and birthing out new mottos and ethics in our business practices. We value each relationship we form because there are no " space customers." We have a superior team of customer service driven individuals at all of corporate offices. We stand behind our products, employees and the promise of exceeding expectations in every endeavor Thunderbird and our affiliates choose to follow. We will do all we can to ensure satisfaction!" All Thunderbird products are backed with a standard warranty of 500 days and an extended warranty up to 7 years, We have over 3,000 dealers and 350 service agents across the U.S. and Canada. After more than 38 years of experience in providing durable, long last and cost effective mixers and other food equipment; Thunderbird has continued to strive for excellence within every endeavor. Through modern engineering and " good old fashion durability", Thunderbird has maintained the reputation of being one of the world's most reliable manufactures of food service machinery in the industry.

name: Tidewater Grain Co.
description: Tidewater Grain Co is a totally sustainable family and farmer-owned specialty small grain producer based in Oriental, NC. Our focus: heirloom grains. We are proud to be the first NC rice farmers in over 120 years, to grow Carolina Gold Rice, our flagship product. We grow and mill our rice at the farm and offer current harvest, GMO free white and brown rice as well as middlins or rice grits, rice flour, rice hulls and a specialty long-grain variety of Carolina Gold Rice called Santee Gold to both retail and wholesale customers.

name: Tiki Farm Inc
description: Tiki Farm is the world’s leading designer and manufacturer of custom ceramic barware and drinkware for the hospitality industry. Since 2000, we have partnered with restaurants, resorts, and global brands to create distinctive, high-quality ceramic programs that elevate the guest experience and strengthen brand identity. From custom Tiki mugs and specialty drinkware to appetizer serve ware and tabletop lamps, Tiki Farm develops fully branded tabletop solutions designed to enhance presentation, increase guest engagement, and create revenue-generating collectible programs.

name: TITA USA
description: We are a Brazilian Company bases in Araraquara, Sao Paulo State, Brazil, and we currently have the company Tita Food Equipment LLC based in Orlando, Florida, which sells all Tita equipment in the US market. We are specialists in the manufacture and sale of heated display cases and convection ovens, we have 30 years in the Brazilian market and we are present in more than 15 countries. We offer solutions to bake, exhibit and to keep foods for a long time in ideals conditions, the equipment can be used in restaurants, pizzerias, coffee shops, convenience stores, school canteens, food retail stores, food delivery services, etc. Our Displays Cases Line have a clean and modern design, with LED lighting and 360º vision, showing more and better your products, as well as temperature control to keep your products in optimal conditions. Our convection ovens line is compact in size and bakes products such as cheese bread, croissants, empanadas, frozen fried snacks, cookies, etc. We are always investing in technology and design that guarantee sophistication, quality and economy, in addition our product line is certified by Inmetro (Brazil), CE (Europe) and UL/. NSF (USA)

name: TKMM LLC
description: Proper Stock & Sauce Co. unites the talents of two of the culinary world’s most visionary chefs: Thomas Keller of US-based Thomas Keller Restaurant Group and Mitch Mitchell of UK-based TRUEFoods. Prior to the company’s founding in 2019, Thomas Keller had been developing an idea for a brand of stocks and sauces made from only the most essential, natural ingredients. He had worked with Mitch Mitchell of TRUEFoods and knew he and Mitchell shared the same appreciation for — and approach to preparing — classic meat stocks with no additives or enhancers. The two chefs soon formed TKMM, an initialism created from their names. Then the pandemic struck, bringing the restaurant industry to a temporary halt. Keller and Mitchell used the time to refine their recipes for seven initial products. When shipping from the UK to the US proved to be prohibitive, they chose a facility in Portland, Oregon to begin production. The brand was renamed Proper Stock & Sauce CoTM. to honour the authenticity of their approach and their UK-US roots. The company's products, including private label offerings, are now available to restaurants across the US.

name: TLM INTERNATIONAL INC.
description: iLIVING USA is the flagship brand of TLM International, Inc. We are a premium retailer/wholesaler company, our brand covers a diverse range of products such as Mobile fans & high velocity fans and many others. We are committed to bring the best-quality products, excellent customer service, and unbeatable prices. We strive to constantly update and innovate new products designed to optimize your business and home experience to promote healthy living.

name: TMHUS
description: Our goal is to improve your business with smart technology. We offer secure and efficient solutions to help things run smoothly. At TMH, we provide the right tools and services to fit your needs, making your operations easier and more effective. Book your demo with us NOW: https://calendly.com/themerchanthub/30min

name: TNI Telecom Inc.
description: TNI Telecom is Nation's ITSP VOIP Hosted Business Phone Service Provider. We have been delivering unified communications and offering Data, Wireless Backup & Professional Services for nearly two decades. TNI is a name trusted by over 30,000 business customer locations and covers around 38,000 zip codes all over North America. TNI has the dexterity to handle even the most demanding challenges faced by customers in the National IT Projects. At TNI, we place the highest value on Service, Integrity and Commitment. These are not just words authored in a mission statement, but are part of our culture and company DNA. Our prime goal is to never compromise on the quality of service OR relationships with our clients. We continue to build our network of "raving fans" based on trust and reliability through our excellent services. Today, TNI provides IT/Telecom Services from coast to coast. It is a One-Stop shop for small Restaurants/Pizzerias to large enterprises for their reliable Business Phone system, Auto Attendants, Call Ques, Call Recording, E-Fax service provider Our mission is to render the best technical infrastructure experience possible for our valued customers. We help businesses take the strain off and focus their attention on what they do best - Expanding their Business!

name: Toast Inc.
description: Toast [NYSE: TOST] is a cloud-based, all-in-one digital technology platform purpose-built for the entire restaurant community. Toast provides a single platform of software as a service, or SaaS; products and financial technology solutions that give restaurants everything they need to run their business across point of sale; operations; digital ordering and delivery; marketing and loyalty; and team management. By serving as the restaurant operating system across dine-in, takeout, and delivery channels, Toast helps restaurants streamline operations, increase revenue, and deliver amazing guest experiences. For more information, visit: www.toasttab.com

name: TodayPay Inc.
description: TodayPay is the technology infrastructure behind modern refund experiences for restaurants. Refunds are one of the largest—and least optimized—payment flows inside restaurant operations. They sit at the intersection of guest experience, support cost, chargebacks, and cash flow, yet are still handled through rigid “refund to original tender” processes that were never designed for today’s environment. TodayPay replaces that model with a real-time, flexible refund execution layer. Instead of forcing refunds back to the original payment method—often slow, failure-prone, or incompatible with how the transaction occurred—restaurants can instantly issue a refund through a secure link delivered via SMS or email. The guest selects their preferred delivery method, and the refund is completed in seconds. Behind the scenes, TodayPay handles orchestration, routing, and issuance across multiple payout options, without requiring operational lift from restaurant teams. The result is a fundamentally different outcome: • Faster resolution: Refunds completed in seconds, not days • Lower support burden: Fewer inbound calls, repeat contacts, and escalations • Reduced disputes and chargebacks: Issues resolved before they become claims • Improved guest retention: Turn negative moments into loyalty-driving experiences • Better cash flow control: Refund timing and method become an operational lever For restaurant operators, this shifts refunds from a reactive cost center into a controllable part of the payments stack. TodayPay is designed to work alongside existing POS, payment processors, and customer support workflows, with both API-driven and no-code deployment options. Whether resolving order issues in-store, through guest relations, or at scale across digital channels, restaurants can standardize and accelerate how refunds are delivered—without changing how payments are accepted. In an industry built on speed, consistency, and guest satisfaction, refunds are one of the last broken experiences. TodayPay fixes that.

name: Todd's Foods
description: Dotty’s and Barnard's offer breading and baking mixes that are flavorful and easy. Crafted with premium quality ingredients, our breading and baking mixes elevate your meal to something more than ordinary. Premixed and simple to make saves you time and energy, with a fresh taste! Dotty’s brand began in 1952 in Des Moines, Iowa. In the beginning Dotty’s Donut Mix was the focus of Iowa Donut Supply, which also supplied donut making equipment and donut toppings. As time went on Dotty’s was a franchised donut shop and had several locations throughout Iowa, but they all eventually closed. Through this time Dotty’s also ended selling and servicing equipment and worked on adding other breading products including Dotty’s One Step Breading Mix. The brand was acquired by Todd's Foods in 2023. Barnard’s brand began in 1945 in Wichita, Kansas at the Barnard House Family Restaurant with the signature breading mix Barnard’s Crunchy Dip. Through the years Barnard’s Crunchy Dip became a popular choice breading product throughout the Midwest. Production was moved from Wichita, Kansas to Iowa City, Iowa and then in 1994 to Des Moines, Iowa where it is currently being made.

name: Tony Chachere's Creole Foods
description: Tony Chachere's (sash-er-ee) is a manufacturer of Louisiana Creole Style food products founded in 1981 by Tony Chachere himself in the Southwest Louisiana town of Opelousas. Tony's produces the #1 Creole Seasoning blend in the U.S. and probably the world. Tony's Original Creole Seasoning is a blend of salt and spices that should be used instead of salt and pepper to season any types of food. Tony's also produces a full line of rice mixes, seasoning blends, marinades, injectable marinades, dry gravies, dry roux, breading mixes, salad dressings, and even a bloody mary mix. All of our products contain some version of our Creole Seasoning which give each and every item we produce that unique Tony's flavor. Our products can be found in grocery stores, through specialty distributors, food service distributors, and Dot Foods.

name: Topema Innovations
description: Since its foundation in 1965, the TOPEMA brand has shown its commitment to think and manufacture new solutions, always considering the next step in equipment for professional kitchens. Topema is proud to have participated in the development of important professional kitchens in the country, including the CSN Mill kitchen, which provided about 26,000 meals per day, and the Itaipu Power Plant, which served 75,000 meals per day during its construction. To provide a consistent result, it was necessary to manufacture all the fundamental installations: cooking lines, refrigeration, preparation, distribution, transport, cleaning, storage, and stainless steel furniture. TOPEMA was a pioneer in developing professional kitchen equipment with automation in its processes. Laser cutting , Panel Bender Machines , Robotic Welders, and more. Thus, it was a natural progression for TOPEMA Professional Kitchens to evolve into TOPEMA INNOVATIONS Professional Kitchens. Innovation division started on 2009 ! Bringing solutions like Organic Waste Processors , Biomass Water Heater , Smart Lockers , Automated Drink Machines and more then 30 new products focused on saving operational costs.

name: Tormek
description: Well-grounded in the Swedish tradition of advanced innovation, functionality and quality, Tormek has developed a unique sharpening system that has come to set a standard in modern edge tool sharpening. Innovative and patented solutions Since the start, problem solving through innovation is a strong driving force for Tormek. Today Tormek holds close to 20 patents and is a leading brand within sharpening of edge tools, offering a complete system including jigs and attachments, each one specially designed to easily achieve the optimal sharpness on all kinds of hand tools. A global brand Through selected importing partners, Tormek exports to over 35 countries world­wide. The products are appreciated by cabinet makers, woodworkers, woodturners, hunters and outdoor enthusiasts as well as professional chefs, restaurants, industrial kitchens and households. The Tormek sharpening system is also used in professional sharpening businesses. Made in Sweden Tormek is fully focused on sharpening. All the product development, engineering work and production are made in Sweden. The company is located in Lindesberg, a small town in the heart of Bergslagen with a history in mining. The production is carried out in close cooperation with selected suppliers, all specialized and the best in their fields. This ensures the highest quality and a continuous access to the best and most modern manufacturing technology.

name: Tortilla Masters Equipment
description: Tortilla Masters Equipment introduces Ventura Flex, the tabletop corn tortilla machine. Ideal for restaurants, this machine's specialty is to produce a perfect corn tortilla that is ready to cook.

name: Total Filtration USA LLC
description: Total Filtration USA supplies practical air filtration and fluid management solutions into commercial kitchen and industrial environments across the United States and Canada. On the commercial side, we provide electrostatic filtration systems designed to replace traditional pollution control units (PCUs). These systems are more compact, easier to install, and significantly reduce both upfront and ongoing costs, making them ideal for restaurants, stadiums, hotels, and large-scale foodservice operations. For industrial applications, we supply a range of high-efficiency mist and oil extraction systems used within CNC machining environments. These systems improve air quality, protect equipment, and create safer working conditions without the complexity and maintenance burden of conventional setups. Alongside our filtration range, we also supply coolant management solutions, including the Wogaard Coolant Saver. This system is designed to recover and reuse coolant, reducing waste and delivering a clear return on investment for machine shops and manufacturers. We hold stock in Florida and support customers across North America with straightforward lead times, technical support, and a growing distribution network. Our focus is simple: deliver solutions that are easy to install, commercially viable, and backed by real-world performance.

name: Total Package Solutions
description: At Total Package Solutions , we specialize in custom-printed cups - creating a powerful extension of your brand. From full-color designs to flexible order sizes, we make it easy and affordable to get high-quality, branded disposable cups—and more. We proudly serve: Restaurants & Cafés – Boost brand visibility with every to-go order Events & Venues – Add a polished, personalized touch to any occasion Wholesalers & Distributors – High margin, fast turnaround, low MOQs Why work with us? Fast Turnaround – Standard lead time of 6 weeks with 2- and 4-week turnaround options. Low Minimums – 1-1,000 cases, we got you. More Than Cups – We also supply custom-printed napkins, bags, containers, and more Stop by Booth #14027 in the Lakeside Room (Beverage Room) to see samples, request a free mockup, and enter to win 10 free cases of printed cups !

name: TouchBistro
description: If you're looking for an all-in-one restaurant management solution, you've come to the right place. TouchBistro is an all-in-one point of sale (POS) and restaurant management system that makes running a restaurant easier. Equipped with the most essential front of house, back-of-house, and customer engagement solutions on one powerful platform, TouchBistro helps restaurateurs streamline and simplify their operations. To date, TouchBistro has powered more than 16,000 restaurants in over 100 countries, and is a global leader in the hospitality technology space thanks to an unparalleled dedication to customer success and cutting-edge technology.

name: Toufayan Bakeries
description: Toufayan Bakeries was established in 1926. We are a third generation family owned and operated commercial bakery. We specialize in Pocket Pita, Flatbreads, Wraps, Gluten Free Wraps, Flour Tortillas and NY Style Bagels. We have production in NJ & FL, shiping coast to coast and internationally.

name: Tractor Beverage Co.
description: Farmer-founded and employee-owned, Tractor Beverage Company is on a mission to change the way beverages are grown, made, and served. Since 2015, Tractor has led the foodservice industry as the first and only USDA Certified Organic, non-GMO total beverage solution served at scale across the United States. Today, Tractor beverages are served at thousands of restaurants, venues, and hospitality destinations across the country. Tractor's portfolio includes organic craft sodas, lemonades, teas, aguas frescas and premium beverage concentrates made with real fruits, roots, blossoms, and spices. Built specifically for foodservice, Tractor helps operators simplify back-of-house beverage programs while serving drinks that guests feel good about. In 2026, Tractor introduced Haymaker, a lightly sparkling organic farmer's tonic inspired by the original drink of the fields. Made with apple cider vinegar and vibrant organic fruit flavors, Haymaker brings a modern take on a centuries-old recipe to today's beverage programs. Tractor's ready-to-drink beverages, including Haymaker, are also Clean Label Project Certified, reflecting the company's commitment to ingredient integrity and transparency. Tractor's specialized team oversees everything from financials and culinary development to marketing and operational logistics, ensuring the provision of top-quality products and services. Efficiency drives our operations, designed to streamline back-of-house processes, with our supportive team ready to assist with any inquiries. Collectively, we are crafting a more sustainable future. Whether it's adding a single beverage, expanding your organic offering or building a totally custom program, we're here to make it work.

Ergonomic handles provide a secure grip, while flared rims ensure drip-free pours. Oven safe to 500°F and available in a range of sizes, this line handles the rigors of commercial kitchens. Commercial-Grade Aluminum Cookware Tramontina’s aluminum cookware delivers fast, even heat in a lightweight, durable design. Heavy-gauge aluminum construction, triple-riveted stainless steel handles, and removable silicone grips support high-volume use. Reinforced nonstick fry pans are also available in this line. Carbon Steel Cookware Carbon steel delivers powerful searing, rapid heat response, and a finish that improves with use, creating a nonstick-like cooking surface. The line features riveted steel handles and select fry pans with removable silicone grips. Define Guest Experience With Tabletop Essentials Table settings are more than functional — they set expectations. A wide assortment of premium porcelain and flatware combine durability with design to complement any menu or décor. Stainless Steel Flatware From classic to contemporary styles, Tramontina flatware offers balanced weight, durability, and a comfortable feel to enhance the dining experience. Polywood Steak Knives Precision-honed stainless steel blades cut effortlessly, while Polywood™ handles deliver durability and water resistance. These premium steak knives elevate presentation and stand up to frequent use. Indoor and Outdoor Seating Tramontina’s plastic furniture is crafted from UV-resistant fiberglass resin for lasting performance indoors and out. Design and durability make these collections ideal for hospitality settings. Oceano +Clean Project chairs are made with plastics recovered from the Brazilian coast — reinforcing Tramontina’s environmental commitment. Visit our website to learn more about our Hospitality products: tramontina.com/hospitality

name: United States Postal Service
description: We connect the nation! The U.S. Postal Service is the only delivery service that reaches every address in the nation: 160 million residences, businesses, and Post Office Boxes. The Postal Service receives no tax dollars for operating expenses and relies on the sale of postage, products, and services to fund its operations. With more than 34,000 retail locations and one of the most frequently visited websites in the federal government, usps.com, the Postal Service has annual operating revenue of more than $71 billion and delivers 48 percent of the world's mail. With more than 630,000 employees, we are one of the nation's largest employers. And we have one of the world's largest computer networks.

name: University of Houston, Conrad N. Hilton College
description: The Conrad N. Hilton College of Global Hospitality Leadership at the University of Houston was established in 1969 by one of the most iconic names in the hospitality industry, Conrad N. Hilton. Consistently ranked one of the top hospitality programs in the world, our students benefit in countless ways from industry connections over 50 years in the making, including bi-annual job fairs, a wide range of internship opportunities, and a well-placed network of more than 10,000 alumni in leadership positions in more than 50 countries around the world. Hilton College offers a specialized business degree that prepares students for careers in the world’s top hotels, restaurants, resorts, casinos and clubs. With a job placement rate of 91 percent upon graduation, Hilton College students typically have their choice of job opportunities in the United States and abroad and always have a solid foundation for post-graduate work. Hilton College, which shares the same building as its teaching hotel, houses two hospitality related industry institutes, numerous classrooms, two computer labs, a library and hospitality archives. Last spring, a new Center for Student Success opened, putting all the services needed to help students navigate their college careers under one roof. There is also a wine lab and several food science labs, including a beverage lab and product evaluation lab. And the College is home to a popular student-run coffee shop that, combined with its student lounge areas, gives students a “home away from home” to study and hang out with friends. In addition to the Hilton University of Houston being the College’s teaching hotel where students apply theoretical learning to practical hands-on experiences, students have experiential learning opportunities in the production of important annual College events such as Gourmet Night, Industry Think Tanks, and Corks and Forks. When the world is your classroom, learning also takes place as easily in a vineyard as it does in a casino or on the floor of a major industry trade show. Naturally then, annual trips to places like Napa Valley, Las Vegas, Chicago and New York City are also part of the hands-on experiential curriculum.
