name: UPM Adhesive Materials
description: UPM is a global supplier of self‑adhesive label materials, serving customers across packaging, labeling, and related applications. The business focuses on material performance, reliable supply, and practical solutions that support customer operations in demanding environments. At the National Restaurant Association Show, UPM is presenting UPM QuickStick Receipt materials , developed for quick‑service restaurant environments where speed, order accuracy, and operational consistency are essential. Built on UPM QuickStick adhesive technology, the portfolio is designed to perform across a range of packaging surfaces, from repositionable applications to higher‑adhesion solutions suitable for sealing. This allows restaurants to select the level of performance that fits their workflows and equipment. Quick‑service restaurants operate under constant pressure to maintain order accuracy, food safety, and service speed while managing equipment reliability and day‑to‑day efficiency. UPM QuickStick Receipt materials are engineered to support these requirements through reliable adhesion and consistent print performance in high‑speed operations. Testing shows fewer printer interruptions, reduced adhesive build‑up on cutting knives, and consistent print quality, helping teams focus on daily operations rather than equipment maintenance. The portfolio includes Peel, Hold and Seal options, available in multiple sizes to support different printers and restaurant workflows. Scalable production capacity and a global distribution network support reliable availability for customers operating across regions. Select products within the UPM QuickStick Receipt portfolio are certified as CarbonNeutral® by Climate Impact Partners in accordance with The CarbonNeutral Protocol. This certification applies to specific products and supports customers who are addressing waste and environmental impact alongside performance requirements. UPM is a material solutions company. We renew the everyday.

name: Urschel Laboratories, Inc.
description: Urschel has expanded its portfolioand now offers cutting machinery and processing line solutions. With the addition of KRONEN commercial systems, including washers, peelers, dryers, dicers, slicers, and conveyors, Urschel customers benefit from having even more options backed by Urschel solid customer support. As the #1 Global Leader in Food Cutting Technology, Urschel continues to successfully lead in the development , selling, and support of industrial cutting machinery to partner and assist food processors. A 100% employee-owned company, founded in 1910, the U.S. based manufacturing company has continued to expand in technology to keep pace and adapt to the ever-changing needs of the industry. Contact Urschel to learn more at www.urschel.com .

name: US BeerSAVER Systems Inc.
description: BeerSAVER was founded in New York in 2007, and has offices located in New York, Vancouver and Hong Kong. BeerSAVER is the world leader in draft beer and wine controls innovation, helping control slippage and inventory using advanced flow metering technology. BeerSAVER even allows for customers to pour their own beer & wine using the SelfTAP system. BeerSAVER has developed an online system for owners and operators to track the amount of beer and wine actually poured versus what is being rung in to eliminate waste and theft. Our systems are installed in over 600 locations. The system provides information to help reduce slippage and increase an operator's profits. It also acts as an inventory management system. Whether you are in the restaurant, at the corporate office, or at home, you will have real-time access to information for your establishment from your computer, tablet or smartphone.

name: UVE Solutions
description: For almost 20 years, UVE Solutions has helped leaders in the F&B space turn fragmented distributor data into measurable competitive advantage. With 150+ clients worldwide and direct connectivity to more than 7,000 distributors, we deliver true Route-to-Market visibility at the outlet level not just shipment assumptions but verified sell-out intelligence . In a landscape where growth is pressured and margins are tight; brands can’t afford blind spots. UVE automates distributor data integration , aligns broker and field execution , and provides clear accountability across regions and channels. The result? Stronger execution. Smarter decisions. Faster growth backed by facts. From scaling brands to global organizations UVE Solutions is the intelligence layer behind modern Route-to-Market strategy.

name: Uygun Rafine Yag San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Sti. Monteida
description: Monteida is a family-owned olive oil producer from Turkey’s Aegean region, built on five generations of olive growing and production expertise. Combining heritage with modern production capabilities, Monteida operates a fully integrated facility where crushing, refining, bottling, and quality control are managed under one roof, ensuring consistency, traceability, and dependable supply. The production facility covers 8,100 m² with a storage capacity of 4,000 tons in stainless steel tanks, supported by an in-house accredited laboratory and international certifications including FSSC 22000, ISO 9001, Halal, and Kosher. This structure allows Monteida to maintain strict quality standards while delivering scalable and reliable production for global partners. ** Monteida offers a focused and practical product range tailored for foodservice and retail channels, including Extra Virgin Olive Oil and Pure Olive Oil. The portfolio is designed to meet the real operational needs of professional kitchens — delivering stable performance, consistent flavor profiles, and versatility across a wide range of applications. Our Extra Virgin Olive Oil is cold-extracted using only mechanical methods, offering a clean and balanced profile with fresh olive notes, mild bitterness, and a smooth peppery finish. It is well-suited for dressings, dipping, and finishing applications where flavor matters. Pure Olive Oil provides a neutral taste and higher smoke point, making it a practical choice for frying, sautéing, and high-volume cooking environments where consistency and efficiency are critical. With FDA-compliant labeling and packaging formats such as 1L PET bottles and 3L tins, Monteida products are designed for ease of use in restaurants, catering operations, and distribution networks. The packaging supports both back-of-house efficiency and retail shelf presence. Monteida is actively present in international markets including the USA, Canada, Brasil, Australia, Japan, Thailand, Taiwan and Switzerland has established Monteida USA Inc. with warehousing and distribution operations in New Jersey. This local presence enables faster delivery, reduced lead times, and more efficient supply chain management for U.S.-based partners. We collaborate closely with distributors, foodservice operators, and private label partners, offering flexible solutions supported by consistent quality, operational reliability, and a long-term partnership approach.

name: V. Formusa Company-Marconi Foods
description: V. Formusa is a family owned and operated company celebrating 128 years in business. Founded in Chicago in 1898 by Vincent Formusa, VFC serves North America with the finest quality Italian and Specialty Products. We Specialize in pickled Vegetable products including the Famous Marconi Giardiniera and also pack Gourmet Italian Salads, Olives, and Pepper Mixes. We are direct importers of Fine Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Pasta, Tomatoes, Peperoncini, and More. Stop by Booth 7845 and see what our 128 years of experience can do for you!

name: V. Marchese
description: Our humble origins take us back to 1934, when our namesake Vito Marchese, fondly known as the “banana man,” delivered fruits and vegetables from his hand-painted truck. From gardens and farms to your kitchen, you can bet that our produce, dairy, and spices are the freshest of the fresh! Our intensive food safety procedures and certifications keep our facilities clean, safe, and exceeding industry standards. Some things never change, like our commitment to quality in both our goods and our services. Nothing appeals to us more than the opportunity to show you how much we appreciate your business. Everyone in the V. Marchese family is happy to go the extra mile to ensure you have everything you need. We even share menu recommendations! Because at the beginning, middle, and end of the day, we’re produce people. But we’re also people people.

name: VacMaster
description: VacMaster, a division of ARY Inc, has been the standard in commercial-grade vacuum packaging equipment for restaurants. It began over 30 years ago when there were little to no options for quality yet affordable vacuum packaging machines. VacMaster filled that void and quickly became a favorite of foodservice professionals. Throughout the years the product line has expanded. VacMaster now offers packaging equipment to fit any budget. And it isn't just packaging solutions they provide. For restauranteurs and chefs wanting to offer a unique experience for their customer, VacMaster has developed three sous vide immersion circulators that deliver consistent, flavorful results even at scale. For over 45 years, ARY Inc has been bringing innovation and a wealth of experience to restauranteurs and foodservice professionals alike. It began when the company's founder gained a unique insight into the challenges and shortfalls of the professional cutlery available to the food industry. A desire to improve these conditions lead him to found ARY Cutlery. The goal, to provide quality, comfortable cutlery at an affordable price won the business of many in the foodservice and food processing industry. Innovations such as double-injected handles ensure a long-lasting and sanitary knife that can stand up to repetitive use in a fast-paced work environment. An economy line that is capable of perfect cuts time and time again but is perfectly priced for buying in bulk. Creating designs that earn NSF-approved ratings to reduce worries during inspections. Personal Touch Our team of dedicated experts answer the phone every time you call. We understand how important our equipment is to your business and can answer most questions immediately. We are proud to be involved with the Missouri Restaurant Association and have developed working relationships with several local and regional culinary schools. Quality Results VacMaster machines are built to last. We use the highest-grade materials available and design all our equipment to be serviced. Many of our customers have owned the same VacMaster for more than 20 years. Competitive Price Our experience and innovation made vacuum packaging affordable for restaurants and the foodservice industry more than 30 years ago. VacMaster remains the quality leader at a competitive price.

name: Value Foods R&D Co., Ltd.
description: Value Foods has devoted more than 30 years to advancing food research and development, specializing in powdered food formulations such as milk tea powders, fruit drink powders, and cheese foam powders widely used in beverage chains. Serving both domestic and global markets, we have formed long-term partnerships with numerous renowned brands. Recognized as a trusted and professional industry collaborator, we are driven by our mission of “creating unlimited value for our customers.” We continually pursue innovation and provide comprehensive end-to-end R&D and ODM services—from concept development to full-scale production. 1. Strong R&D Capabilities With decades of innovation experience, Value Foods unites a multidisciplinary team skilled in formulation, flavor engineering, and process technology. We help brands build differentiated and competitive products through sharp market insights and continuous innovation. 2. Commitment to Food Safety Our six core food safety principles guide every step—from ingredient sourcing and production processes to inspection and traceability. Every product is crafted to meet international safety standards, ensuring genuine peace of mind for consumers. 3. Tailor-Made Development Services Every brand has distinct ambitions and needs. Value Foods provides flexible, customized R&D solutions—including concept creation, formulation design, and packaging adjustments—ensuring alignment with each client’s market and business strategy. 4. International-Standard Quality Assurance We implement globally recognized systems such as ISO 22000, HACCP, and FSSC to build a rigorous quality management framework. Each stage—from raw materials to finished goods—is carefully monitored to ensure safety, consistency, and excellence. 5. Fully Integrated Services Value Foods delivers end-to-end support, including R&D development, prototyping, pilot runs, ingredient sourcing, mass production, and logistics. Our vertically integrated workflow enhances efficiency and shortens time-to-market, helping clients capture opportunities faster. 6. Trusted Long-Term Partnerships With deep industry experience, Value Foods has built strong collaborations with more than 500 domestic and international clients. Our expertise, stable quality, and reliable service make us a preferred long-term development and manufacturing partner for leading brands worldwide. At Value Foods, we believe that innovation, quality, and partnership are the key drivers of sustainable growth. With our comprehensive capabilities and unwavering commitment to excellence, we look forward to creating greater value together and shaping the future of the food industry alongside our partners.

name: Van Duc Food Company Limited
description: VD FOOD is a food producer with food exports to international markets. We supply frozen seafood and high-end value-added products.

name: Vandemoortele
description: Authentic Bakery Products from France, Italy and Belgium. A One-Stop-Shop for all your freezer-to-oven bakery needs.

name: Vanee Foods Company
description: The Vanee Foods Company manufactures shelf stable entrees, gravies, sauces, soups and soup bases. The Company serves a diverse customer base from three facilities in the suburbs of Chicago. Founded in 1950, Vanee Foods remains family owned and operated. The Vanee Foods Company has thrived due to its singular focus on excellence in its manufacturing processes. Vanee Foods designs its production capabilities to combine both operational flexibility and economies of scale, supported by best-in-class food safety and quality assurance programs. This proven excellence is the reason why so many of the biggest and best food brands trust Vanee Foods as their manufacturing partner.

name: Vantron Technology
description: Vantron is a global provider of embedded computing and IoT solutions, enabling restaurant operators and technology partners to deploy, manage, and scale connected devices with confidence. Our portfolio includes industrial-grade hardware platforms and a robust device management solution that together support mission-critical applications such as kiosks, POS systems, kitchen display systems, and digital signage. By unifying hardware and software into a single, reliable ecosystem, Vantron helps organizations reduce operational complexity, minimize downtime, and accelerate time-to-deployment across multi-location environments. Whether you’re modernizing stores, rolling out new digital experiences, or standardizing infrastructure across hundreds of locations, Vantron delivers the edge technology that keeps restaurants connected, resilient, and future‑ready . http://vantrontech.us/

name: Veggies Made Great
description: Veggies Made Great is on a mission to inspire people to love eating veggies. So, we create the most remarkably delicious and nutritionally smart, veggie-rich foods ready to eat and available everywhere. Because at Veggies Made Great, we value honesty, authenticity and good health all in pursuit of serving up the good life with every bite. That's why veggies are our #1 ingredient. Our first priority. Our first love. Just look at our ingredient lists. We're real. Real veggies made into real delicious foods that are really good for your bottom line. Unlike anything else on the menu, Veggies Made Great will help your operation stand out as a destination for plant-forward mini meals, snacks and sides you can serve up in a snapwithout any added labor or strain on your staff. See, we're the real deal. Veggies Made Great can elevate everything you offer. Revenues go up. Costs go down. Because with our premium quality, people-pleasing products, you menu foods both healthy and craveable. Labor-saving and shrink-reducing. Prep that's as simple as heat n' serve. Now together, let's get real and spread the veggie love. Menu Veggies Made Great and grow your menu (and business) with this veggie-rich opportunity. A successful and growing brand in supermarkets and club stores, Veggies Made Great products are now available in foodservice with sweet muffins, savory frittatas, blondie bites, egg patties, cornbread, and breakfast bakes.

name: Velvin Packaging Solutions Pvt Ltd
description: Velvin Group is a leading Indian manufacturer of sustainable paper-based packaging, with over 30 years of expertise serving customers across 5 continents . We operate 6 manufacturing units in India and 1 in Dubai , offering strong domestic and international supply capabilities. Our monthly production capacity includes: 120 million paper bags (SOS, V bottom & handle Bags) Dedicated high-speed lines for QSR cartons, meal boxes, cups, tubs, bowls, trays, and food wraps With large-scale capacity, FSC-certified materials, and container-load programs, Velvin is a reliable partner for QSR chains, food service brands, and global distributors . With our U.S.-based office, Meraki Packaging Corporation , we are able to offer DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) pricing directly to your doorstep , ensuring completely hassle-free deliveries.

name: VendiBean
description: VendiBean is a beverage-tech company revolutionizing the self serve coffee industry. Our IoT, bean-to-cup espresso machines brew 15+ barista-quality beverages, paired with a proprietary product line including oat and coconut milk for today’s diverse consumer preferences. Built for high-volume environments, VendiBean combines café-quality with operational efficiency. Our smart technology streamlines coffee vending operations with a centralized dashboard, real-time consumption data, and automated email alerts for inventory, service, and maintenance. With VendiBean, operators save time and reduce labor while elevating the coffee experience—helping restaurants, hotels, and venues keep guests energized, satisfied, and coming back.

name: Venus Processing and Packaging Limited
description: Venus Processing and Packaging Ltd is a leading innovator in the production of high-quality, responsibly sourced food ingredients for the global market. Built on a passion for fresh, home-grown produce, the company specialises in processing and packaging premium Individual Quick-Frozen (IQF) West African yams, African white sweet potatoes, and plantains. At the heart of the company’s portfolio is Sympli , a food-service brand. Sympli embodies Venus’s commitment to authenticity, nutrition, and convenience by transforming freshly harvested local crops into clean-label, value-added ingredients. Developed in close partnership with regional farming communities and food-service operators, Sympli products help reduce food waste while ensuring consistent quality and year-round availability. All Venus products under the Sympli brand are 100% natural, free from preservatives, additives, and artificial colours, and meet stringent quality and safety standards. Pre-peeled, pre-cut, and pre-washed, the IQF range delivers labour savings, minimal preparation waste, and dependable performance in fast-paced professional kitchens. With a rapid 3–5-minute cook time, Sympli ingredients offer reliable taste, texture, and portion control across applications. The Sympli range includes a versatile selection of yam, plantain, and sweet potato cuts available in various pack formats. Individually quick frozen to lock in freshness and preserve nutritional value, Sympli supports food-service operators seeking consistent, authentic, clean-label ingredients with strong consumer appeal. Through its Sympli brand and a commitment to excellence, Venus Processing and Packaging Ltd enables chefs and operators worldwide to serve high-quality dishes with confidence, convenience, and year-round reliability.

name: Verder, Inc.
description: Enabling Progress - As a worldwide technology leader, the Verder Group provides advanced pumping solutions to thousands of customers around the globe. Vital components, which help them to ensure economic, technological, and environmental progress. Day by day, to the benefit of many. With our 27 locations worldwide and an extensive dealer network, you are always guaranteed with global presence and local service. Microdos, a Verder Company, was founded in 2006 in Rieti, the center of Italy, and develops, manufactures, and commercializes a wide range of OEM pumps and complete dosing systems. Microdos truly believes in the added value of Italian production that enhances expertise and innovation, a direct result of our dedication to quality, accuracy, design, and attention to detail. In the restaurant business, Microdos helps equipment manufacturers to design solutions including flavor and concentrate pumps in beverage/ coffee dispensing, detergent and sanitizer pumps in commercial dishwashing machines, enzyme pumps for fat/oil/grease traps, and much more.

name: Verifone
description: Verifone is the payments architect shaping ecosystems for online and in-person commerce experiences, including everything businesses need – from secure payment devices to eCommerce tools, acquiring services, advanced business insights, and much more. As a global FinTech leader, Verifone powers omni-commerce growth for companies in over 165 countries and is trusted by the world’s best-known brands, small businesses, and major financial institutions. The Verifone platform is built on a four-decade history of innovation and uncompromised security, annually managing more than 12B transactions worth over $500B on physical and digital channels.

name: Verizon Business Group
description: Verizon Business IoT Connected Solutions provides end-to-end, secure, and intelligent connectivity, leveraging 4G/5G, managed services, and the ThingSpace IoT platform to help organizations automate operations, manage assets, and improve efficiency. Recognized as a leader in managed IoT connectivity, they offer global reach and industry-specific solutions for vehicles, smart cities, and retail. ThingSpace IoT Platform: A central platform for building, simulating, certifying, and activating IoT devices, offering self-service management and API integrations. IoT Connectivity Services: Secure, reliable connectivity (4G, 5G, LTE-M, NB-IoT) for managed assets on a global scale. Asset Tracking & Management: Tools like Verizon Connect for fleet management, and Critical Asset Sensor for tracking inventory and equipment in real-time. IoT Security: Solutions including IoT Security Credentialing provide device-level authentication to protect data and secure IoT ecosystems against threats. Professional & Managed Services: Consulting and support for implementing complex IoT projects, from design to operational maintenance.

name: VerTerra Ltd
description: VerTerra is a leading brand in the eco-friendly dinnerware industry. Since 2006, we have been providing sustainable alternatives to traditional disposable tableware. Our product range is made from natural, biodegradable materials, making them an ideal choice for those looking to reduce their impact on the environment. Our products not only look beautiful, but they are also practical and cost-effective, providing operational efficiency and reducing labor costs. With a commitment to sustainability, VerTerra has become the go-to choice for leaders and innovators in the industry. VerTerra Dinnerware has earned its reputation as the leader in sustainable dining plateware, serveware, and food packaging. Since our inception in 2006, we've been driven by a mission to revolutionize the single-use food packaging industry, replacing environmentally damaging materials with our innovative, eco-friendly alternatives. Our signature product launching in 2007 - The Palm Leaf Plate: Dinnerware from Fallen Leaves® - symbolizes this commitment. Our entire range of products, from palm plates to cups, trays, boxes, cutlery, straws, picks and more, is crafted from 100% renewable resources like palm leaves, balsa wood tree trunks, bamboo, and sugarcane. This commitment to sustainability has not only earned us USDA Bio-Preferred and BPI-certified compostable credentials, but also the trust and loyalty of businesses in the F&B industry. VerTerra's commitment extends beyond products, directly impacting global communities and the environment. --Over the span of 17 years, VerTerra has focused on employing women in its factories, fostering economic opportunities for over 10,000 women in rural India and Indonesia. --We've successfully prevented the production of over 50 million pounds of plastic. --We've proudly produced over 8 billion palm plates, a quantity so vast that it could stretch from Earth to the moon and back. --VerTerra champions carbon footprint reduction through zero-waste manufacturing, recycling production water, and turning leaf scraps into nutrient-rich compost.

name: Vertex China
description: Award-winning china dinnerware known for their outstanding quality, first-class innovation, and exceptional value. One of today’s leading worldwide chinaware companies serving upscale restaurants, cruise lines, casinos, hotels, commercial catering and the leisure hospitality industry. At Vertex China, versatility is truly redefined.

name: Vestaboard
description: Vestaboard is a beautiful messaging display that brings any space to life. Inspired by the iconic split-flap boards of European train stations, Vestaboard's patented mechanical characters physically flip to reveal messages, menus, specials, and colorful designs — creating a captivating moment every time they update. Available in two editions: the Flagship Vestaboard (132 characters, wall-mounted) and the new Vestaboard Note (45 characters, countertop or wall-mounted, starting at $999), both controlled from anywhere via a free mobile and web app. Schedule daily specials, welcome guests by name, or join multiple Notes together seamlessly to create captivating arrays. Unlike other forms of electronic communication, Vestaboard offers focused, high-visibility messaging that brings people together and creates more inspiring environments. Vestaboard’s ability to always be fresh, captivating and delightful, from the moving flaps to the mesmerizing sound, is unlike any other piece.

name: vGrubs
description: ✅ What vGrubs Does for Restaurants The restaurant industry has a brutal truth: delivery is growing, but profits aren’t. Third-party apps take 20–30%, delivery fees eat margins alive, and most owners are working harder while earning less. vGrubs exists to flip that reality on its head. vGrubs is a performance-based revenue growth platform built specifically for restaurants. We don’t give you “tools,” “dashboards,” or tech headaches. We give you more revenue, higher profit per order, and direct customer ownership —with zero upfront cost. We do it three ways: 1️⃣ Virtual Stores (New Revenue Without New Overhead) Most restaurants only appear online as a single brand. That means you’re invisible to massive demand on apps for other cuisines. vGrubs launches additional delivery-only brands—wings, burgers, tacos, late-night comfort food—using your existing kitchen, ingredients, and staff. You instantly operate as multiple storefronts online, capturing new customers and new orders you would’ve never seen. You fulfill the orders; we handle the menus, listings, and setup. It’s found money from your existing operation. 2️⃣ vDrive (Slash Delivery Fees, Keep More Profit) Delivery commissions and inflated fees destroy margins. vDrive cuts that down by leveraging a nationwide delivery network that reduces your delivery cost by up to 50%. You collect the delivery fee and tips, keep more per order, and stop handing your profits to third-party platforms. Same customers, same delivery experience—just finally profitable. 3️⃣ vOrders (Own Your Customers Again) For the first time, you get your own direct ordering site and app—built for free. No commissions, no middlemen. Customers order directly from you, and you keep 100% of the revenue. It gives you repeat business, customer data, and a real brand relationship instead of renting customers from marketplaces. ✅ Why Restaurants Choose vGrubs No setup fees No monthly fees No risk No extra staff No new equipment headaches You only pay after you’re net-positive. If we don’t help you make more money, we don’t make any. Simple. Thousands of restaurants across the U.S. are already generating new daily orders, lowering delivery costs, and turning delivery from a loss-center into a profit engine. Some add dozens of new orders per day. Others reclaim thousands per month in margin they were losing to fees. ✅ The Bottom Line vGrubs helps restaurants: Add new revenue Increase profit per order Own their customers Grow without extra overhead We don’t “promise potential.” We drive real dollars. If you’re tired of working harder for shrinking margins, vGrubs exists for one reason: More orders. More profit. Zero upfront cost. Stop bleeding. Start earning. Let’s grow.

name: Vibes
description: Vibes' mobile-first platform creates personal, revenue-driving and long-term mobile engagement between consumers and the world-class brands they love. Industry leaders like Chipotle , KBP Brands and Portillos use Vibes to grow customer relationships with relevant, high-volume mobile messaging and mobile wallet marketing on a global scale. Vibes enables marketers to seamlessly connect with their customers using a data-rich and API-packed solution that beautifully optimizes and unifies their SMS, MMS, RCS and Mobile Wallet campaigns.

name: Victory Refrigeration, a Welbilt Company
description: For over 65 years Victory has been a leading manufacturer of commercial foodservice refrigeration products. We are focused on providing our customers with unsurpassed value, superior customer service and the highest quality products available in the industry today. A continuous product development process ensures a steady stream of innovative, technologically advanced designs; which provide the ultimate in energy efficiency, food safety, storage flexibility, reliability and durability. Each Victory model is designed with essential standard features, while also offering a wide variety of options, accessories and modifications. Victory is specified and purchased for use in prisons, colleges, universities, hospitals, supermarkets, schools, and fine restaurants throughout the United States and around the world.

name: Videri
description: Videri Digital Signage for Food & Beverage Videri delivers sleek, ultra-thin digital signage built for modern food & beverage environments—from QSRs and cafés to bars and food halls. Our wirelessly connected Digital Canvases replace static menus with dynamic, high-impact displays that enhance guest experiences and drive revenue. Easily update menus, pricing, and promotions in real time with Videri’s intuitive platform—no complex infrastructure required. Our energy-efficient, sealed displays install cleanly on walls, counters, and kiosks, making them ideal for fast-paced, high-traffic spaces. With Videri, F&B brands can engage customers, highlight high-margin items, and adapt instantly—turning every screen into a smarter, revenue-generating touchpoint. Join the Digital Transformation With 100,000+ Videri Digital Canvases deployed worldwide, we’re helping food & beverage brands unlock new possibilities with beautiful, scalable, and easy-to-manage digital signage solutions. Visit Videri to see how we can help your brand Be Seen, drive sales, and create unforgettable guest experiences.

name: Vieira's Bakery Inc
description: Family owned bakery, producing authentic European recipes since 1974.

name: Vienna Beef LTD
description: Vienna Pickles and Chipico (Chicago Pickle Company) are divisions of Vienna Beef LTD and have been making refrigerated Kosher Dill Pickles and Condiments since 1925. Our pickles and condiments are picked, packed, brined, and shipped daily to assure peak flavor and maximum crunch.

name: Vietnam Wellhome Ecoware Co., Ltd
description: One cent saving by specializing in tech means the Wellhome whole world. WELLHOME product include COM-postable Biodegradable PP or PS Cutlery, Paper Cups, Plates, Straws, Containers, Others. We are professional on the mould and machines.

name: Villeroy & Boch USA Inc
description: Villeroy Boch dining culture - our companys core competences since it was founded in 1748 - enjoys the highest reputation the world over - both among consumers and professionals alike in the hotel restaurant trade. The outstanding quality of our product ranges, their distinctive design language and the comprehensive range of tableware, glassware and cutlery makes the difference - providing the optimum basis for creative hospitality.

name: VIPColor Technologies
description: VIPColor Technologies has been providing innovative digital color label printer solutions since 1998. We manufacture printers that produce high quality color labels for diverse applications, ranging from brilliant labels for premium retail goods to durable labels for outdoor and maritime environments. Through the years, our industrial printers have been used by small to medium and several FORTUNE 500 companies. Our printers have simultaneously helped streamlined workflows, raised productivity and product quality while improving bottom lines. With the ability to print fast, on-demand and cost-effectively, we aim to bring convenience and flexibility to our small-medium enterprise clients. Businesses challenged by a high mix of products and offerings, along with small batch jobs, find our digital solution especially compelling and value-adding. Targeted at companies dissatisfied with the long lead-time and large print-run constraints dictated by current label delivery methods, VIPColor is dedicated to creating a new level of labelling value around packaging and identification activities.

name: VISION PAK HK LIMITED
description: VISION PAK HK LTD Specializing in Paper Packaging, Food, Cosmetics, Electronics, Shipping and Mailor box Packaging. Our first class facilities and wonderful team has unmatched service feature your packaging, so as to ensure to give you value-added solutions for your paper packaging needs. Vision Pak had a good reputation in USA, UK, Australia and Euro . Our long time cooperation with KFC, MOCHINUT, DISNEY is the best proof. Future is seeable and touchable with Vision Pak. Join Us.

name: Visionova Multisource Pvt Ltd
description: Visionova Multisource (P) Ltd. is the manufacturing arm of Narsingh Dass Group . It is engaged in manufacturing of food packaging, converted products and coating solutions. We provide following solutions: Greaseproof Silicone Coating Wax Lamination HSL coating PE coating Aqueous coating We provide following products: Food wraps (greaseproof paper, wax paper, baking paper paper, foilwrap) Disposables (paper cups, bowls, plates) Baking & chocolate (baking paper, baking liner, chocolate wrapper) Corp. Office : NDG Cella, 11702/3, 2nd Floor, Shakti Nagar, Delhi - 110007, India Regd Office & Factory : NDG Cella, Khata No. 38, Killa No. 32 8 NH 1, GT Karnal Road, Near Petrol Pump, Choki Dhani, Gannaur, Sonipat, Haryana – 131101

name: VisionTechShop
description: VisionTechShop/HK Systems offers electronic scales including label printing, portion control, POS interface, price computing, and more. We also supply POS products such as terminals, printers, cash registers and more. Other products offered are labels, paper, food wrapping machines, and coin sorters,

name: Vista Alegre USA
description: Founded in 1824, Vista Alegre has acquired an unprecedented reputation, becoming a global luxury brand. Currently produces high quality table porcelain, decorative porcelain, gift items, hotel and hospitality, glass and crystal. In 2001, The Vista Alegre Group of companies (porcelain, earthenware and stoneware) merged with Atlantis Group (high quality handmade crystal and glass) forming the Vista Alegre Atlantis Group, acquired in 2009 by Grupo Visabeira. Thus was born one of the largest producers of tableware and gift items in the world - currently producing 15 million pieces per year in tableware porcelain, The Vista Alegre also manufactures decorative porcelain, crystal, glass - both for table, decorative and bar, which it exports to over 70 countries. The Vista Alegres successful path is due to the highest standards of quality and design, combined with its innovative capacity and extensive technical and artistic knowledge. Great contemporary artists from very different fields, including design, illustration, painting, sculpture, architecture, literature and photography, have joined their talent to many of the brands creations. Ross Lovegrove, Marcel Wanders, Siza Vieira, Joana Vasconcelos, Patrick Norguet, Jaime Hayon, Malangatana, Semp, Karim Rashid, Brunno Jahara, Carsten Gollnick, Sam Baron, the Pineda Covalin brand and the Maison Christian Lacroix and Oscar de la Renta are some of the names associated with Vista Alegre. At the forefront of world design, the brand has been distinguished with countless awards and nominations, assigned by the most prestigious institutions, including the Red Dot Design Award, German Design Award, Good Design Award, The Icon Awards and Wallpaper Design Awards.

name: Vista Hermosa
description: Vista Hermosa was formed by spirit and resolve inside the sturdy brick walls of Tacombi, a group of Mexican taquerias committed to sharing authentic Mexican taco culture. The tortilla is the golden foundation of a quality taco, and without local sources who could meet our quality standards for freshness and flavor, we decided to make our own tortillas the traditional Mexican way. From scratch. Every day. We have since continued on to craft a full line of handmade tortilla products: Corn Flour Tortillas and Totopos, that preserve and share the flavors of Mexico.

name: Vitamix Commercial
description: The Vitamix family of companies, privately held and family owned since 1921, recently celebrated its 100th anniversary. Millions of people around the world employ Vitamix machines to prepare nutritious whole foods in their home kitchens and deliver exceptional and consistent results in their commercial kitchens. The company's commercial customer list reads like a who's who of major restaurant chains, and gourmet chefs say their Vitamix machines are as important to them as their knives. The company developed the first true commercial production-grade blender in the early 1990s, igniting the smoothie and frozen coffee movements, and has been named the Best in Class Overall beverage blender for nine consecutive years by readers of Foodservice Equipment Supplies magazine. Vitamix continues to win awards for its products, culture, and user experience and is found in more than 130 countries. The company is headquartered in Olmsted Township, Ohio, near Cleveland, Ohio. For more information, please visit vitamix.com/commercial.

name: VITO Fryfilter, Inc.
description: VITO Fryfilter distributes the German-made VITO oil filter system for deep fryers. With its micro-particle filtration, easy, fast, and safe handling, VITO became the best fryer in-tank filter system in the USA and the rest of the world. Oil savings of up to 50%, labor savings, improved food quality, and easy handling are only a few benefits VITO stands for and are much valued in QSR operations, hotels, fine dining, and casual restaurants around the globe.

name: Vivant
description: Vivant is your one-stop connectivity partner eliminating internet, network, and phone outages through reliable, scalable solutions backed by amazing human support. We revolutionize how businesses connect, communicate, and grow. Trusted by thousands of small and medium-sized businesses nationwide, including restaurants, healthcare providers, dealerships, and service companies, Vivant is the strategic partner that ensures you always stay connected.

name: Voicebit
description: VoiceBit is phone AI for restaurants that does more than answer calls. Our AI helps restaurants take direct orders, collect payments, detect fraud, coordinate delivery, and also powers web ordering so staff can focus on in-person customers and food instead of managing phones. VoiceBit saves restaurant owners time, money, and gives them complete control of their ordering channels.

name: Volcora
description: Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Hicksville, NY, Volcora is a leading provider of point-of-sale hardware, cash management systems, and retail IoT technology built for real-world business needs. We deliver rugged, reliable POS terminals, cash drawers, receipt printers, scanners, safes, and accessories that streamline operations and enhance efficiency across retail, restaurant, hospitality, ticketing, and event environments. Our hardware is software-agnostic, easy to integrate, and trusted by millions of merchants globally for durability, performance, and value. Backed by industry-leading warranties and support, Volcora is your partner in building faster, smarter, and more secure checkout experiences.

name: Vollrath Company
description: Vollrath is a global leader in foodservice equipment and supplies that offers an expansive portfolio of award-winning, premium-quality commercial foodservice equipment including countertop equipment, smallwares and serving systems. Founded in 1874 and based in Sheboygan, Wisconsin, the company is a privately held with 11 manufacturing factories spread across the United States, Europe and China. Primarily produced and assembled in the United States, Vollrath's products are manufactured to exacting quality standards globally, backed by outstanding customer service and extensive educational resources. For more details, visit vollrathfoodservice.com.

name: Vosne Technology Co., Ltd.
description: 【Company Profile】 Founded in 2021 and rooted in the core industrial belt of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, Vosne Technology is a modern packaging solutions provider integrating R&D, production, and sales. Building on over a decade of experience in packaging product development and manufacturing, the company focuses on innovative applications of eco-friendly materials. It continuously deepens expertise in thermoforming processes and multi-functional film lamination technologies, with product lines spanning food-grade packaging, industrial protection, and other diverse fields. 【Core Competencies】 Leveraging a 6,600-square-meter intelligent production base, we have established a comprehensive manufacturing matrix: ✓ 6 sets of fully automated laminating units for precision film lamination ✓ 4 high-speed thermoforming production lines with a daily capacity of 120,000 units ✓ 4 sets of 100-ton dual-side precision stamping equipment ✓ 10 food-grade paper container production lines Equipped with CNC machining centers and Class 100,000 cleanrooms, we meet international certification standards including BSC, FDA, and ISO, delivering end-to-end services from design prototyping to mass production. 【Global Presence】 Guided by our “Green Smart Manufacturing · Global Sharing” philosophy, our eco-friendly packaging solutions have successfully entered 28 countries and regions, with a service network spanning: • North America: USA, Canada, Mexico • Europe: Germany, France, UK • Asia-Pacific: Australia, Singapore, Japan, South Korea Through overseas technical service centers, we deliver localized custom solutions to global clients, having completed over 300 specialized product development projects. 【Future Vision】 At the forefront of packaging industry transformation, Vosne Technology will intensify R&D investment in biodegradable materials, build digital flexible production lines, and deepen strategic partnerships with Fortune 500 companies. We invite partners across industries to explore the boundless potential of eco-friendly packaging, empowering sustainable development through innovation and jointly building a green business ecosystem.

name: Vulcan
description: Vulcan is among the world's largest manufacturers of commercial kitchen equipment. For more than 150 years, we’ve been recognized as the best-in-class supplier of top-quality, energy efficient cooking equipment. Offering a full line up, Vulcan can answer all your kitchen needs, from ranges to fryers, convection ovens to griddles, combi oven to braising pan, and everything in between. Masterful design. Precision performance. State-of-the-art innovation. When you’re ready to turn up the heat, turn to Vulcan. Visit the Vulcan booth for live cooking demonstrations throughout the show.

name: Wabash Valley MFG Inc.
description: For over 30 years, Wabash Valley Furnishings has been a trusted leader in high-quality site furnishings, delivering durability, functionality, and style to outdoor spaces across the country. Our extensive product line includes commercial-grade benches, waste receptacles, picnic tables, grills, bike racks, and moreeach designed to withstand the elements while enhancing any environment.

name: Wagging Dog Bakery LLC
description: Puppin’ Mini Cupcakes aren’t just another pet treat — they’re an incremental revenue engine for operators who win on attachment sales. At the National Restaurant Association Show, we’re introducing a product built for coffee shops, pizza counters, convenience stores, and microbreweries—where the real money isn’t the core item, it’s the add-on. Today’s customers aren’t just buying for themselves. They’re walking in with their dogs, thinking in “treat moments.” Puppin’ turns that moment into a paid SKU: a premium, human-grade mini cupcake designed specifically for dogs, with simple, recognizable ingredients and a format that immediately signals indulgence. Why it works in your environment: • Built for attachment sales – “Coffee for you, Puppin for your dog,” “Pizza night, don’t forget your pup,” “Beer for you, treat for them.” • Impulse-ready – countertop jars, merch tables, or register placement drive grab-and-go decisions • Zero operational friction – shelf-stable, no prep, no refrigeration, no waste • High emotional ROI – customers don’t hesitate; it’s a feel-good add-on that converts instantly Why your customers buy: • Dogs are already with them —drive-thru, patio, taproom, walk-up window • Replaces the free “pup cup” with a monetized, premium alternative • Social-ready, giftable format (birthdays, gotcha days, everyday moments) • Clear, simple ingredient deck that aligns with premium expectations Why it stands out: • Visually disruptive —breaks the “brown biscuit” monotony • Designed for trial —small, affordable, high-perceived value • Proven to drive incremental spend without slowing throughput We’re not another me-too bone in a bag. We’re the cupcake that wags back—and the add-on your customers didn’t know they’d pay for.

name: Waiakea Hawaiian Volcanic Beverages
description: Waiākea Hawaiian Volcanic Beverages is a public benefit corporation founded in 2012 in Hilo, Hawai'i with the stated mission of sustainably providing naturally healthy Hawaiian coffee and water products while contributing to and promoting clean water access, conservation, and education for those in need in Hawai'i and throughout the world. Available at thousands of retail locations across Hawai'i and the continental U.S., including Whole Foods, 7-Eleven, Walmart, and more. Waiākea was one of the first in the U.S. to develop and commit to 100% post-consumer recycled packaging in 2012, and continues to be the enviro-tech leader of its category for this and its many other initiatives. Its award-winning taste is derived from its natural filtration through 14,000 feet of porous volcanic rock, making it naturally alkaline and electrolyte-rich. Through its non-profit foundation, the Kōkua Initiative, Waiākea works to empower the people of Hawai'i through a 3 piko approach that encourages educational opportunities, 'āina-based conservation & sustainability, and support for the most vulnerable in our community. Since its inception, the project has impacted over 495,000 people in Hawai'i.

name: Wakayama Export Promotion Council of Agriculture, Fisheries
WALL DESIGN MAKEOVER
description: "Art that transforms the spaces guests remember" We design, fabricate, and install custom artwork for restaurants and hospitality spaces —personally hands on from first concept to final installation, anywhere in the US. Restaurant owners are focused on operations, food quality, and staffing — leaving art and visual atmosphere as the last item on a very long list. That gap is exactly where we work. We step in as a single-source partner to design, fabricate, and install custom visual environments that align with your brand, elevate the guest experience, and turn your space into something customers want to come back to. "Most restaurants treat art as an afterthought. We make it the point"

name: Walters Bay
description: Walters Bay is an award-winning 100% Pure Ceylon Tea producer. 100% hand plucked tea with processing and packaging factories in Sri Lanka. We control end to end the entire tea supply chain from the tea fields, to growing the tea, to the customers doorstep, and we believe this is extremely unique to the industry. We produce and deliver over 12 MM pounds of Walters Bay and private labeled iced and hot teas to over 30 countries, and we have not missed one shipment during the past 24 months of these historic supply chain issues. We have been 100% on time and 100% on spec and our customers rely on our supply chain security. Walters Bay has tea supply available and the capacity to support all your tea needs. Walters Bay focuses its attention on the often-forgotten link in the farm-to-cup chain, the family farmer. We work with up to 10,000 family farmers in Sri Lanka. We offer farm to cup sustainability with unique traceability and visibility at origin. We take immense pride in our transparent sustainability programs. Our tea workers and their families have access to schools, daycare centers, hospitals, retirement programs, and the highest wages in the tea industry. Our commitment to the environment is as strong as our commitment to our workers. Hand-plucking tea leaves ensure our teas are grown, processed, and distributed sustainably. The superb flavor of our gourmet iced tea attributes to the superior quality of our 100% Pure Ceylon Tea, harvesting, and processing methods. The care provided to our workers, their families, the environment, and the land is directly reflected in the quality of our tea. From our family to yours, at any given time we can tell you where the tea comes from, how it was grown, and how it was processed. We are proud to offer dozens of delicious flavors of iced and hot teas that have won every single category at the World Tea Championships for 14 years. For the last 20 years, our focus in the U.S. has been developing foodservice iced teas servicing small and large restaurant chains as well as broadline distribution partners. Our tea ships through a variety of distribution channels nationwide. As the largest exporter of tea from Sri Lanka to the US, we are currently in 1 million food service institutions including 60-70k restaurants.

name: Winston Foodservice
description: Winston Foodservice: Proven Solutions for Your Kitchen Challenges Winston Foodservice delivers proven solutions to your toughest operational challenges: rising food costs, labor constraints, inconsistent quality, limited space, and equipment flexibility. With industry-leading technologies, we help operators maximize efficiency, consistency, and profitability across cooking and frying operations. CVap Cooking Holding Technology Originally developed as a holding solution, CVap has evolved into a precision cooking platform trusted by world-renowned chefs, independent operators, and major chains worldwide. No vent hood or floor drain required - dramatically reducing installation costs and expanding placement options. Fully portable - perfect for ghost kitchens, mobile operations, pop-ups, and catering. Precision control - cook and hold with consistent, repeatable results that reduce waste and labor. Energy efficient - lower operating costs without sacrificing performance. Collectramatic Pressure Fryers Built over 50 years ago at Colonel Sanders request, Collectramatic remains the industry workhorse for high-volume fried chicken operations. Superior product quality - pressure frying traps natural juices, nutrients, and flavor with minimal flavor transfer. Up to 75% more output - the LP56 produces significantly more chicken per fryer than competitors during rush periods. Extended oil life - patented cold zone prevents cracklings from scorching; cook up to 360 lbs between filterings. Lower operating costs - cooks at lower temperatures (max 360F), reducing energy use and extending shortening life. Programmable controls - 20-channel processor ensures consistency and reduces training time. Zero downtime - no mid-shift clean-outs required during peak service. Backed by decades of engineering expertise and real-world foodservice experience, the Winston team has invested in the right technology and talent to solve problems that matter. Whether youre adapting to new service models or maximizing existing operations, Winston delivers the flexibility and reliability todays market demands. Visit us at booth 4276 to discover how CVap and Collectramatic can benefit your operation.

description: Welcome to The State of Cheese! Cheesemaking is more than an occupation; it is a way of life in Wisconsin. It is the only place outside of Europe with a Master Cheesemaker program. name: WizKid Products
description: WizKid Products develops innovative solutions that keep facilities cleaner between cleanings. The WizKid Antimicrobial Mats line helps keep floors free of puddles, odors, and stains while enhancing a facility’s appearance. Each mat features an industry-leading 30-day antimicrobial treatment that kills 99% of germs, slows bacterial growth, and neutralizes odors. With premium carpet-like texture and high-quality non-slip backing, these mats outperform standard options. The customizable WizKid Antimicrobial Runner Mats provide extended floor protection throughout a facility and feature an adhesive backing that secures the mat in place, protects floor finishes, and can be removed easily within 90 days without residue or damage. WizKid’s patented Splash Hog Vertical Urinal Screen was created because “no man wants to stand in another man’s pee.” As the only urinal screen that extends up the back wall, it stops splashback where users actually aim and features a built-in bullseye target, equipped with triple suction cups to prevent falling forward and flex points for compatibility with full-size and compact wall-mounted urinals. The Stingray Urinal Screen delivers superior coverage with its innovative stingray shape and multiple flex points, ensuring a secure fit across nearly every urinal style. A unique Tether Tab attaches the screen to the urinal, keeping it in place before and after each flush. Both the Splash Hog and Stingray include a punchout to accommodate drain domes, multi-length spines to reduce splashback, and an embedded enzymatic drain cleaner to help prevent buildup. Available in ten fragrances plus a fragrance-free option, WizKid Products is committed to making your world a cleaner, better-smelling place. WizKidProducts.com | 954-323-2485

Stone hearth ovens, Planchas, Vertical Rotisseries, Charbroilers, Tandoors, Gas Rice cookers and more.

name: Wood Valley Ranch Mamaki
description: Wood Valley Ranch is a regenerative farm and specialty tea producer located in the lush rainforest of the Kaʻū district on the Big Island of Hawaii Island . We specialize in cultivating Māmaki (Pipturus albidus), a rare botanical found only in Hawaiʻi and traditionally enjoyed by Native Hawaiians as a nourishing, caffeine-free herbal tea. As one of the largest commercial growers of Māmaki, Wood Valley Ranch is helping bring this unique plant to a broader global audience while maintaining its integrity, quality, and cultural significance. Our farm sits at 2,400 feet elevation on the slopes of Mauna Loa , where nutrient-rich volcanic soil, consistent rainfall, and a cool climate create ideal growing conditions. Māmaki brews into a smooth, amber-colored tea with a naturally mild sweetness and subtle notes of toasted hazelnut and honey. It is naturally caffeine-free and rich in antioxidants and beneficial plant compounds, making it an excellent option for today’s consumers seeking clean-label, functional beverages that support daily wellness. Emerging research is also exploring its potential role in cognitive and nervous system health. Our Māmaki is USDA Organic Certified, Certified Naturally Grown, Non-GMO Project Verified, and carries the Hawaiʻi Seal of Quality and Grown With Aloha designations. We cultivate over 9,000 trees using regenerative farming practices that prioritize soil health, biodiversity, and watershed protection, ensuring both environmental stewardship and long-term agricultural resilience. Wood Valley Ranch supplies premium Māmaki to tea brands, foodservice operators, and specialty retailers looking for differentiated, origin-driven ingredients with a compelling story and reliable supply. Our products are carefully harvested and processed to ensure consistency, flavor quality, and traceability from farm to customer. For buyers, Māmaki represents a unique opportunity to introduce a new category of herbal tea—one that stands apart from commoditized botanicals and delivers both functional appeal and a strong sense of place. It performs well across retail, café, and hospitality settings, offering flexibility as a standalone tea or as a base for innovative blends and ready-to-drink applications. name: Yangjiang Shibazi Group Co., Ltd
description: Introduction to Yangjiang Shibazi Group Co., Ltd. The brand of Yangjiang Shibazi Group's "Shibazi Zuo”(Means: Made by Shibazi) began in the 1930s. The company has developed from traditional manual production of carbon steel kitchen knives to a modern and mechanized scale. It produces thousands of specifications that can meet the needs of domestic and foreign markets. It’s a comprehensive large-scale brand enterprise integrating scientific research, steelmaking, production, sales, and tourism services. The quality of “Shibazi Zuo" knives has always been inseparable from two main lines. One is the guarantee of the entire industry chain, extending from knife-making to steel smelting technology control. Master the process technology of metallurgical preparation of materials, including the relationship between material and cutlery performance, and then grasp, improve, and continuously develop the entire life cycle of knife technology and production process manufacturing, including trying product recycling and reuse; the second is the entire process monitoring, that is, at the node of the industrial chain entirely, all processes are identified, designed, implemented, and continuously improved to form a Shibazi’s unique quality management system, namely the "Shibazi dual quality mode”. During the development of the group company, it experienced four leading development stages and five technological revolutions, which established the company's leading position in the Chinese kitchen knife industry. Yangjiang Shibazi has passed ISO9001:2015 and ISO14001:2015 certifications. The enterprise was rated as "National Quality Work Advanced Unit", "National Industrial Tourism Demonstration Site", "Guangdong Province Private Enterprise Innovation Industrialization Demonstration Base", "Guangdong Province Intellectual Property Demonstration Enterprise", "Yangjiang City Intellectual Property Protection Key Enterprise", "High-tech Enterprise" "2018 Guangdong Province Innovative Enterprise", "Yangjiang Hardware Knife Scissors Leading Enterprise", etc.; won the "Yangjiang Famous Knife" award, "2012 Yangjiang Municipal Government Quality Award", "2019 Guangdong Provincial Government Quality Award", won in 2020 The Hong Kong Quality Assurance Agency issued the first "AAAAA Standardized Good Behavior Enterprise Certificate" and many other honorary titles in the hardware knife and scissors industry in China (including Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan). At present, the company has more than 1,000 domestic and foreign self-made mechanical equipment (sets), more than 250,000 square meters of industrial land and supporting facilities, and 1,416 employees. Sales in 2019 reached 550 million yuan, profits and taxes were 67.55 million yuan, and export sales were $12.8 million.

description: Looking for an easier, smarter way to manage your restaurant’s inventory? Yellow Dog Software's Inventory Management Solution offers a full-featured back-office solution designed to simplify everything from physical counts to recipe costing so you can spend less time on spreadsheets and more time on your guests. With mobile tools that let you take inventory by tablet or phone, built-in workflows to auto-capture invoices via email, upload or photo, and detailed real-time cost reports, you’ll eliminate errors, cut labor time by 6-10 hours a month, and finally see where your food & beverage dollars are going. name: Yellowbird Foods
description: Yellowbird Foods is a leading natural brand and manufacturer of certified organic hot sauces in the US. Founded in 2012 in Austin, TX by a musician with a culinary curiosity and an artist with a passion for plants, Yellowbird began as one homegrown farmer’s market hot sauce that grew into an array of flavor–forward spicy condiments focused on building a wildly delicious, healthy, and better–for–the–world flavor offering. Before Yellowbird, hot sauce was merely watered–down, mildly spicy vinegar. We transformed an entire category and in doing so, raised the bar for hot sauces and condiments alike. Our key differentiator is our wild determination to work directly with organic farms and farmers focused on growing food the right way. Each of our spunky flavors has a unique profile that can only be derived from the use of farm–fresh ingredients paired with our specific batching and bottling process. We work with nature, not against it, to strike a beautiful balance that demands respect.

description: Yelp for Restaurants provides the technology busy operators need to capture every guest and every dollar. By taking over phone chaos, Yelp Host gives your staff precious time back to focus on exceptional in-house hospitality. Yelp Host integrates perfectly with Yelp Guest Manager to completely streamline your front-of-house operations. To further maximize your visibility, Yelp Ads helps you get discovered by hungry diners using keyword and area targeting to reach your most likely customers. Restaurants running Yelp Ads can experience up to an 8% monthly lift in diner bookings.* Connected directly to the largest consumer network in the U.S.**—reaching an average of 2.4 million daily visitors without cover fees—Yelp’s intelligent automation ensures no missed calls and no missed revenue. For more information, visit: restaurants.yelp.com *Yelp Internal Data 2024. Based on average results from a sample study of restaurants with Guest Manager that purchased Yelp Ads between July 2023 and June 2024 in LA, SF, and NYC. Results may vary. **Based on Comscore Media Metrix® 2022 data.

name: Yerba Madre
description: Yerba Madre—formerly Guayakí Yerba Mate—is the 30-year pioneer of regenerative yerba mate [yer-bah ma-tay] and the category leader in ready-to-drink mate beverages across North America. The name Yerba Madre is a tribute to Mother Earth and the ancestral wisdom of the Indigenous communities who have cultivated yerba mate for generations —a reflection of the values the brand has championed since day one. Headquartered in Oakland and Los Angeles, California, Yerba Madre sources regenerative, organic, shade-grown yerba mate in direct partnership with 257 Indigenous and farmer families across Argentina, Brazil, and Paraguay. Using its Market Driven Regeneration™ model, every purchase helps conserve and restore the Atlantic Forest, support fair trade premiums, and build long-term economic resilience for grower communities. Yerba Madre is proudly the first yerba mate to be Regenerative Organic Certified® and the first company in South America to achieve ROC™ Gold status, marking a dual milestone in regenerative agriculture and ethical sourcing. This achievement affirms the brand's leadership in regenerative business. The ROC™ seal debuted on Yerba Madre packaging for Traditional Air-Dried Loose Leaf and Mate Bags in May 2025. As one of the original founding B Corp, Yerba Madre is committed to ethical business practices across ten key pillars, including climate positivity, living wages, circularity, and inclusion. Yerba Madre is available in over 45,000 retail locations across the U.S. and Canada. To learn more, visit www.YerbaMadre.com . https://www.tiktok.com/@officialyerbamadre https://www.reddit.com/user/OfficialYerbaMadre/ https://www.youtube.com/@drinkyerbamadre https://www.linkedin.com/company/yerba-madre/

This innovation has had a positive impact on people's daily lives, improving lighting in different contexts, such as the home, outdoor spaces, public spaces, restaurants, hotels, bars and more. Our company has played a key role in bringing these solutions to the public's attention. We have therefore brought together our series of rechargeable lamps into a dedicated brand called UBIQUA. The "UBIQUA" brand comes from the Latin word "ubique" meaning "everywhere", reflecting the brand's creative mission by redefining the concept of lighting. With our lamps, summarized in this new catalogue, we want to highlight the importance of design and technological innovation in improving people's quality of life and shaping the evolution of modern lighting. name: Zhuhai Zhihe Zhisheng Industrial Co., Ltd
description: Zhuhai Zhihe Zhisheng Industrial Co., Ltd. is the first domestic and top three global "smart manufacturing" enterprise for thin aluminum cups in China. After years of development and research, the company has finally broken through the industry's difficulties and foreign monopolies. Using exclusive research and development technology, it has achieved stable mass production of 0.18mm aluminum cups and broken through the industry's unparalleled thickness of 0.14mm. It is the only enterprise in the world that can customize colored aluminum cups. The aluminum cups developed by the company, with the advantages of 100% recyclability, no formaldehyde and BPA Free,are gradually replacing disposable plastic cups, providing great assistance in reducing global plastic waste and environmental protection.

name: Zojirushi America Corp
description: Zojirushi has been the leading manufacturer of high-quality vacuum insulated beverage serving products since 1918. The commercial products are designed for durability and performance to make the jobs of our service professionals easier while withstanding the rigorous daily use in an industrial setting. The coffee equipment line includes vacuum insulated creamers and carafes, glass and stainless lined AIR POT and GRAVITY POT beverage dispensers. The restaurant equipment line includes commercial grade rice cookers and warmers and an electric water boiler. All products meet or exceed the required NSF and ETL industry standards for sanitation and safety. Access 2026 Zojirushi Commercial Catalog HERE

name: ZOLL Medical Corporation
description: ZOLL Medical is a leader in emergency response, providing life-saving solutions trusted by restaurants, schools, corporations, and public spaces nationwide. At the National Restaurant Association Show, we're showcasing our full portfolio — the ZOLL AED 3, AED Plus, and Powerheart G5, plus AEDtrax, our new IoT monitoring module that gives multi-location operators 24/7 AED readiness visibility, GPS tracking, and instant deployment alerts from anywhere. We're also featuring ZOLL Mobilize, our Stop the Bleed kit for rapid bleeding control in workplace emergencies. If you manage people across multiple locations, ZOLL has the tools to keep every site covered.

name: Zox Robotics
description: Zox Robotics specializes in providing service robotics solutions to automate processes in industries such as hospitality, retail, cleaning, hotels and restaurants. Our focus on technological innovation allows us to design and deploy intelligent robots that optimize key operations, improve productivity, and deliver a superior customer experience. At Zox Robotics, we are passionate about helping companies transform the way they work through the implementation of advanced technology. Our team of experts works closely with each client to develop customized solutions that address their specific challenges, boosting efficiency and enabling their transition toward an automated digital future.

name: Zubairi Packaging LLC
description: Zubairi Packaging is an expert manufacturer of high-quality plastic, paper and Aluminum packaging products in UAE. We have been providing reliable and sustainable solutions to meet the needs of our customers. Our extensive range of products includes a variety of plastic bags, films, Aluminum Container, Paper Bags and other disposable products that position us among the top manufacturers of UAE. Our main products include: - Carry Bags, Garbage Bags, Vegetable Rolls, Table Sheets, Paper Bags, Aluminium Containers. At Zubairi, we know that in order to be able to offer effective solutions we must do so through Innovation and Ethical Business practices. These values are held sacred to us and guide us towards our goal of becoming the most sought-after plastic bag manufacturer in UAE. We have more than 20 years of experience in the production of high-quality products. Our clients include major retail brands, public and private entities within the professional and industrial sector. Zubairi Packaging was founded in India and expanded to the United Arab Emirates in 2008, becoming a leading manufacturer. We have served over 5,000 customers in 25 countries over the past 15 years. We are committed to providing eco-friendly, biodegradable, and sustainable products. As a family-run company, we emphasize ethics, integrity, and providing growth opportunities for our employees.

name: ZUMEX
description: Zumex is the world leader in the design and manufacture of innovative solutions for extracting fruit and vegetable juice. With more than 35 years of experience, Zumex has become a multinational company headquartered in Spain and present in more than 100 countries through its subsidiaries in USA, Mexico, United Kingdom, France and Germany. Check our website to learn more about us and discover our products! https://www.zumex.com/us
